ye mahaḥ rajasaḥ viduḥ viśve devāsaḥ adruhaḥ
marudbhiḥ agne ā gahi
ye ugrāḥ arkam ānṛcuḥ anādhṛṣṭāsaḥ ojasā
marudbhiḥ agne ā gahi
ye śubhrāḥ ghora varpasaḥ su kṣatrāsaḥ riśādasaḥ
marudbhiḥ agne ā gahi
ye nākasya adhi rocane divi devāsaḥ āsate
marudbhiḥ agne ā gahi
ye īṅkhayanti parvatān tiras samudram arṇavam
marudbhiḥ agne ā gahi
ā ye tanvanti raśmibhiḥ tiras samudram ojasā
marudbhiḥ agne ā gahi
abhi tvā pūrva pītaye sṛjāmi somyam madhu
marudbhiḥ agne ā gahi
ayam devāya janmane stomaḥ viprebhiḥ āsayā
akāri ratna dhātamaḥ
ye indrāya vacaḥ yujā tatakṣuḥ manasā harī
śamībhiḥ yajñam āśata
takṣan nāsatyābhyām parijmānam sukham ratham
takṣan dhenum sabardughām
yuvānā pitarā punar satya mantrāḥ ṛjūyavaḥ
ṛbhavaḥ viṣṭī akrata
sam vaḥ madāsaḥ agmata indreṇa ca marutvatā
ādityebhiḥ ca rājabhiḥ
uta tyam camasam navam tvaṣṭuḥ devasya niṣkṛtam
akarta caturaḥ punar
te naḥ ratnāni dhattana tris ā sāptāni sunvate
ekam ekam su śastibhiḥ
adhārayanta vahnayaḥ abhajanta su kṛtyayā
bhāgam deveṣu yajñiyam
iha indra agnī upa hvaye tayoḥ id stomam uśmasi
tā somam soma pātamā
tā yajñeṣu pra śaṃsatā indra agnī śumbhatā naraḥ
tā gāyatreṣu gāyata
tā mitrasya praśastaye indra agnī tā havāmahe
soma pā soma pītaye
ugrā santā havāmahe upa idam savanam sutam
indra agnī ā iha gacchatām
tā mahāntā sadaspatī indra agniḥ rakṣaḥ ubjatam
aprajāḥ santu atriṇaḥ
tena satyena jāgṛtam adhi pracetune pade
indra agnī śarma yacchatam
prātar yujā vi bodhaya aśvinau ā iha gacchatām
asya somasya pītaye
yā su rathā rathītamā ubhā devā divispṛśā
aśvinā tā havāmahe
yā vām kaśā madhumatī aśvinā sūnṛtāvatī
tayā yajñam mimikṣatam
nahi vām asti dūrake yatrā rathena gacchathaḥ
aśvinā sominaḥ gṛham
hiraṇya pāṇim ūtaye savitāram upa hvaye
sa cettā devatā padam
apām napātam avase savitāram upa stuhi
tasya vratāni uśmasi
vibhaktāram havāmahe vasoḥ citrasya rādhasaḥ
savitāram nṛ cakṣasam
sakhāyaḥ ā ni ṣīdata savitā stomyaḥ nu naḥ
dātā rādhāṃsi śumbhati
agne patnīḥ iha ā vaha devānām uśatīḥ upa
tvaṣṭāram soma pītaye
ā gnāḥ agne iha avase hotrām yaviṣṭha bhāratīm
varūtrīm dhiṣaṇām vaha
abhi naḥ devīḥ avasā mahaḥ śarmaṇā nṛ patnīḥ
acchinna patrāḥ sacantām
iha indrāṇīm upa hvaye varuṇānīm svastaye
agnāyīm soma pītaye
mahī dyauḥ pṛthivī ca naḥ imam yajñam mimikṣatām
pipṛtām naḥ bharīmabhiḥ
tayoḥ id ghṛtavat payaḥ viprāḥ rihanti dhītibhiḥ
gandharvasya dhruve pade
syonā pṛthivi bhava anṛkṣarā niveśanī
yacchā naḥ śarma saprathaḥ
atas devāḥ avantu naḥ yatas viṣṇuḥ vicakrame
pṛthivyāḥ sapta dhāmabhiḥ
idam viṣṇuḥ vi cakrame tredhā ni dadhe padam
samūḍham asya pāṃsure
trīṇi padā vi cakrame viṣṇuḥ gopāḥ adābhyaḥ
atas dharmāṇi dhārayan
viṣṇoḥ karmāṇi paśyata yatas vratāni paspaśe
indrasya yujyaḥ sakhā
tat viṣṇoḥ paramam padam sadā paśyanti sūrayaḥ
divi iva cakṣuḥ ātatam
tat viprāsaḥ vipanyavaḥ jāgṛvāṃsaḥ sam indhate
viṣṇoḥ yat paramam padam
tīvrāḥ somāsaḥ ā gahi āśīrvantaḥ sutāḥ ime
vāyo tān prasthitān piba
ubhā devā divispṛśā indra vāyū havāmahe
asya somasya pītaye
indra vāyū manaḥ juvā viprāḥ havante ūtaye
sahasra akṣā dhiyas patī
mitram vayam havāmahe varuṇam soma pītaye
jajñānā pūta dakṣasā
ṛtena yau ṛtāvṛdhau ṛtasya jyotiṣas patī
tā mitrāvaruṇā huve
varuṇaḥ prāvitā bhuvat mitraḥ viśvābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
karatām naḥ surādhasaḥ
marutvantam havāmahe indram ā soma pītaye
sajūs gaṇena tṛmpatu
indra jyeṣṭhāḥ marut gaṇāḥ devāsaḥ pūṣarātayaḥ
viśve mama śrutā havam
hata vṛtram sudānavaḥ indreṇa sahasā yujā
mā naḥ duḥśaṃsaḥ īśata
viśvān devān havāmahe marutaḥ soma pītaye
ugrāḥ hi pṛśni mātaraḥ
jayatām iva tanyatuḥ marutām eti dhṛṣṇuyā
yat śubham yāthana naraḥ
haskārāt vidyutas pari atas jātāḥ avantu naḥ
marutaḥ mṛḍayantu naḥ
ā pūṣan citra barhiṣam āghṛṇe dharuṇam divaḥ
ājā naṣṭam yathā paśum
pūṣā rājānam āghṛṇiḥ apagūḍham guhā hitam
avindat barhiṣam
uta u sa mahyam indubhiḥ ṣaṭ yuktāṁ anuseṣidhat
gobhiḥ yavam na carkṛṣat
ambayaḥ yanti adhvabhiḥ jāmayaḥ adhvarīyatām
pṛñcatīḥ madhunā payaḥ
amūḥ yāḥ upa sūrye yābhiḥ vā sūryaḥ saha
tāḥ naḥ hinvantu adhvaram
apaḥ devīḥ upa hvaye yatra gāvaḥ pibanti naḥ
sindhubhyaḥ kartvam haviḥ
apsu antar amṛtam apsu bheṣajam apām uta praśastaye
devāḥ bhavata vājinaḥ
apsu me somaḥ abravīt antar viśvāni bheṣajā
agnim ca viśva śambhuvam āpaḥ ca viśva bheṣajīḥ
āpaḥ pṛṇīta bheṣajam varūtham tanve mama
jyok ca sūryam dṛśe
idam āpaḥ pra vahata yat kim ca duritam mayi
yat vā aham abhidudroha yat vā śepe uta anṛtam
āpaḥ adya anu acāriṣam rasena sam agasmahi
payasvān agne ā gahi tam mā sam sṛja varcasā
sam mā agne varcasā sṛja sam prajayā sam āyuṣā
vidyuḥ me asya devāḥ indraḥ vidyāt saha ṛṣibhiḥ
kasya nūnam katamasya amṛtānām manāmahe cāru devasya nāma
kaḥ naḥ mahyai aditaye punar dāt pitaram ca dṛśeyam mātaram ca
agneḥ vayam prathamasya amṛtānām manāmahe cāru devasya nāma
sa naḥ mahyai aditaye punar dāt pitaram ca dṛśeyam mātaram ca
abhi tvā deva savitar īśānam vāryāṇām
sadā avan bhāgam īmahe
yaḥ cit hi te itthā bhagaḥ śaśamānaḥ purā nidaḥ
a dveṣaḥ hastayoḥ dadhe
bhaga bhaktasya te vayam ud aśema tava avasā
mūrdhānam rāyaḥ ārabhe
nahi te kṣatram na sahaḥ na manyum vayaḥ cana amī patayantaḥ āpuḥ
na imāḥ āpaḥ animiṣam carantīḥ na ye vātasya praminanti abhvam
abudhne rājā varuṇaḥ vanasya ūrdhvam stūpam dadate pūta dakṣaḥ
nīcīnā sthuḥ upari budhnaḥ eṣām asme antar nihitāḥ ketavaḥ syuḥ
urum hi rājā varuṇaḥ cakāra sūryāya panthām anvetavai u
a pade pādā pratidhātave akaḥ uta apavaktā hṛdayāvidhaḥ cit
śatam te rājan bhiṣajaḥ sahasram urvī gabhīrā sumatiḥ ṭe astu
bādhasva dūre nirṛtim parācais kṛtam cit enaḥ pra mumugdhi asmat
amī ye ṛkṣāḥ nihitāsaḥ uccā naktam dadṛśre kuha cit divā īyuḥ
adabdhāni varuṇasya vratāni vicākaśat candramāḥ naktam eti
tat tvā yāmi brahmaṇā vandamānaḥ tat ā śāste yajamānaḥ havirbhiḥ
a heḍamānaḥ varuṇa iha bodhi uru śaṃsa mā naḥ āyuḥ pra moṣīḥ
tat id naktam tat divā mahyam āhuḥ tat ayam ketaḥ hṛdaḥ ā vi caṣṭe
śunaḥśepaḥ yam ahvat gṛbhītaḥ saḥ asmān rājā varuṇaḥ mumoktu
śunaḥśepaḥ hi ahvat gṛbhītaḥ triṣu ādityam dru padeṣu baddhaḥ
ava enam rājā varuṇaḥ sasṛjyāt vidvāṁ adabdhaḥ vi mumoktu pāśān
ava te heḍaḥ varuṇa namobhiḥ ava yajñebhiḥ īmahe havirbhiḥ
kṣayan asmabhyam asura pracetāḥ rājan enāṃsi śiśrathaḥ kṛtāni
ud uttamam varuṇa pāśam asmat ava adhamam vi madhyamam śrathāya
athā vayam āditya vrate tava anāgasaḥ aditaye syāma
yat cit hi te viśaḥ yathā pra deva varuṇa vratam
minīmasi dyavi dyavi
mā naḥ vadhāya hatnave jihīḍānasya rīradhaḥ
mā hṛṇānasya manyave
vi mṛḍīkāya te manaḥ rathīḥ aśvam na saṃditam
gīrbhiḥ varuṇa sīmahi
parā hi me vimanyavaḥ patanti vasyaḥ iṣṭaye
vayaḥ na vasatīḥ upa
kadā kṣatra śriyam naram ā varuṇam karāmahe
mṛḍīkāya uru cakṣasam
tat id samānam āśāte venantā na pra yucchataḥ
dhṛta vratāya dāśuṣe
vedā yaḥ vīnām padam antarikṣeṇa patatām
veda nāvaḥ samudriyaḥ
veda māsaḥ dhṛta vrataḥ dvādaśa prajāvataḥ
vedā yaḥ upajāyate
veda vātasya vartanim uroḥ ṛṣvasya bṛhataḥ
vedā ye adhyāsate
ni ṣasāda dhṛta vrataḥ varuṇaḥ pastyāsu ā
sāmrājyāya su kratuḥ
atas viśvāni adbhutā cikitvāṁ abhi paśyati
kṛtāni yā ca kartvā
sa naḥ viśvāhā su kratuḥ ādityaḥ su pathā karat
pra ṇaḥ āyūṃṣi tāriṣat
bibhrat drāpim hiraṇyayam varuṇaḥ vasta nirṇijam
pari spaśaḥ ni ṣedire
na yam dipsanti dipsavaḥ na druhvāṇaḥ janānām
na devam abhimātayaḥ
uta yaḥ mānuṣeṣu ā yaśaḥ cakre asāmi ā
asmākam udareṣu ā
parā me yanti dhītayaḥ gāvaḥ na gavyūtīḥ anu
icchantīḥ uru cakṣasam
sam nu vocāvahai punar yatas me madhu ābhṛtam
hotā iva kṣadase priyam
darśam nu viśva darśatam darśam ratham adhi kṣami
etāḥ juṣata me giraḥ
imam me varuṇa śrudhī havam adyā ca mṛḍaya
tvām avasyuḥ ā cake
tvam viśvasya medhira divaḥ ca gmaḥ ca rājasi
sa yāmani prati śrudhi
ud uttamam mumugdhi naḥ vi pāśam madhyamam cṛta
ava adhamāni jīvase
vasiṣvā hi miyedhya vastrāṇi ūrjām pate
sa imam naḥ adhvaram yaja
ni naḥ hotā vareṇyaḥ sadā yaviṣṭha manmabhiḥ
agne divitmatā vacaḥ
ā hi ṣmā sūnave pitā āpiḥ yajati āpaye
sakhā sakhye vareṇyaḥ
ā naḥ barhiḥ riśādasaḥ varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā
sīdantu manuṣaḥ yathā
pūrvya hotar asya naḥ mandasva sakhyasya ca
imāḥ u ṣu śrudhī giraḥ
yat cit hi śaśvatā tanā devam devam yajāmahe
tve id hūyate haviḥ
priyaḥ naḥ astu viśpatiḥ hotā mandraḥ vareṇyaḥ
priyāḥ su agnayaḥ vayam
su agnayaḥ hi vāryam devāsaḥ dadhire ca naḥ
su agnayaḥ manāmahe
athā naḥ ubhayeṣām amṛta martyānām
mithas santu praśastayaḥ
viśvebhiḥ agne agnibhiḥ imam yajñam idam vacaḥ
canaḥ dhāḥ sahasaḥ yaho
aśvam na tvā vāravantam vandadhyai agnim namobhiḥ
saṃrājantam adhvarāṇām
sa ghā naḥ sūnuḥ śavasā pṛthu pragāmā su śevaḥ
mīḍhvāṁ asmākam babhūyāt
sa naḥ dūrāt ca āsāt ca ni martyāt aghāyoḥ
pāhi sadam id viśvāyuḥ
imam ū ṣu tvam asmākam sanim gāyatram navyāṃsam
agne deveṣu pra vocaḥ
ā naḥ bhaja parameṣu ā vājeṣu madhyameṣu
śikṣā vasvaḥ antamasya
vibhaktā asi citrabhāno sindhoḥ ūrmau upākaḥ ā
sadyas dāśuṣe kṣarasi
yam agne pṛtsu martyam avāḥ vājeṣu yam junāḥ
sa yantā śaśvatīḥ iṣaḥ
nakir asya sahantya paryetā kayasya cit
vājaḥ asti śravāyyaḥ
sa vājam viśvacarṣaṇiḥ arvadbhiḥ astu tarutā
viprebhiḥ astu sanitā
jarā bodha tat viviḍḍhi viśe viśe yajñiyāya
stomam rudrāya dṛśīkam
sa naḥ mahāṁ animānaḥ dhūmaketuḥ puru ścandraḥ
dhiye vājāya hinvatu
sa revāṁ iva viśpatiḥ daivyaḥ ketuḥ śṛṇotu naḥ
ukthaiḥ agniḥ bṛhadbhānuḥ
namaḥ mahadbhyaḥ namaḥ arbhakebhyaḥ namaḥ yuvabhyaḥ namaḥ āśinebhyaḥ
yajāma devān yadi śaknavāma mā jyāyasaḥ śaṃsam ā vṛkṣi devāḥ
yatra grāvā pṛthu budhnaḥ ūrdhvaḥ bhavati sotave
ulūkhala sutānām ava id u indra jalgulaḥ
yatra dvau iva jaghanā adhiṣavaṇyā kṛtā
ulūkhala sutānām ava id u indra jalgulaḥ
yatra nārī apacyavam upacyavam ca śikṣate
ulūkhala sutānām ava id u indra jalgulaḥ
yatra manthām vibadhnate raśmīn yamitavai iva
ulūkhala sutānām ava id u indra jalgulaḥ
yat cit hi tvam gṛhe gṛhe ulūkhalaka yujyase
iha dyumattamam vada jayatām iva dundubhiḥ
uta sma te vanaspate vātaḥ vi vāti agram id
atha u indrāya pātave sunu somam ulūkhala
āyajī vāja sātamā tā hi uccā vijarbhṛtaḥ
harī iva andhāṃsi bapsatā
tā naḥ adya vanaspatī ṛṣvau ṛṣvebhiḥ sotṛbhiḥ
indrāya madhumat sutam
ucchiṣṭam camvoḥ bhara somam pavitre ā sṛja
ni dhehi goḥ adhi tvaci
yat cit hi satya soma pāḥ an āśastāḥ iva smasi
ā tū naḥ indra śaṃsaya goṣu aśveṣu śubhriṣu sahasreṣu tuvīmagha
śiprin vājānām pate śacīvas tava daṃsanā
ā tū naḥ indra śaṃsaya goṣu aśveṣu śubhriṣu sahasreṣu tuvīmagha
ni ṣvāpayā mithūdṛśā sastām a budhyamāne
ā tū naḥ indra śaṃsaya goṣu aśveṣu śubhriṣu sahasreṣu tuvīmagha
sasantu tyāḥ arātayaḥ bodhantu śūra rātayaḥ
ā tū naḥ indra śaṃsaya goṣu aśveṣu śubhriṣu sahasreṣu tuvīmagha
sam indra gardabham mṛṇa nuvantam pāpayā amuyā
ā tū naḥ indra śaṃsaya goṣu aśveṣu śubhriṣu sahasreṣu tuvīmagha
patāti kuṇḍṛṇācyā dūram vātaḥ vanāt adhi
ā tū naḥ indra śaṃsaya goṣu aśveṣu śubhriṣu sahasreṣu tuvīmagha
sarvam parikrośam jahi jambhayā kṛkadāśvam
ā tū naḥ indra śaṃsaya goṣu aśveṣu śubhriṣu sahasreṣu tuvīmagha
ā vaḥ indram krivim yathā vājayantaḥ śatakratum
maṃhiṣṭham siñce indubhiḥ
śatam vā yaḥ śucīnām sahasram vā samāśirām
ā id u nimnam na rīyate
sam yat madāya śuṣmiṇaḥ enā hi asya udare
samudraḥ na vyacaḥ dadhe
ayam u te sam atasi kapotaḥ iva garbhadhim
vacaḥ tat cit naḥ ohase
stotram rādhānām pate girvāhaḥ vīra yasya te
vibhūtiḥ astu sūnṛtā
ūrdhvaḥ tiṣṭhā naḥ ūtaye asmin vāje śatakrato
sam anyeṣu bravāvahai
yoge yoge tavastaram vāje vāje havāmahe
sakhāyaḥ indram ūtaye
ā ghā gamat yadi śravat sahasriṇībhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
vājebhiḥ upa naḥ havam
anu pratnasya okasaḥ huve tuvipratim naram
yam te pūrvam pitā huve
tam tvā vayam viśva vārā śāsmahe puruhūta
sakhe vaso jaritṛbhyaḥ
asmākam śipriṇīnām soma pāḥ soma pāvnām
sakhe vajrin sakhīnām
tathā tat astu soma pāḥ sakhe vajrin tathā kṛṇu
yathā te uśmasi iṣṭaye
revatīḥ naḥ sadhamāde indre santu tuvi vājāḥ
kṣumantaḥ yābhiḥ madema
ā gha tvāvān tmanā āpta stotṛbhyaḥ dhṛṣṇav iyānaḥ
ṛṇoḥ akṣam na cakryoḥ
ā yat duvaḥ śatakratav ā kāmam jaritṝṇām
ṛṇoḥ akṣam na śacībhiḥ
śaśvat indraḥ popruthadbhiḥ jigāya nānadadbhiḥ śāśvasadbhiḥ dhanāni
sa naḥ hiraṇya ratham daṃsanāvān sa naḥ sanitā sanaye sa naḥ adāt
āśvinau aśvāvatyā iṣā yātam śavīrayā
gomat dasrā hiraṇyavat
samāna yojanaḥ hi vām rathaḥ dasrau amartyaḥ
samudre aśvinā īyate
ni aghnyasya mūrdhani cakram rathasya yemathuḥ
pari dyām anyat īyate
kaḥ te uṣaḥ kadhapriye bhuje martaḥ amartye
kam nakṣase vibhāvari
vayam hi te amanmahi ā antāt ā parākāt
aśve na citre aruṣi
tvam tyebhiḥ ā gahi vājebhiḥ duhitar divaḥ
asme rayim ni dhāraya
tvam agne prathamaḥ aṅgirāḥ ṛṣiḥ devaḥ devānām abhavaḥ śivaḥ sakhā
tava vrate kavayaḥ vidmana apasaḥ ajāyanta marutaḥ bhrājat ṛṣṭayaḥ
tvam agne prathamaḥ aṅgirastamaḥ kaviḥ devānām pari bhūṣasi vratam
vibhuḥ viśvasmai bhuvanāya medhiraḥ dvi mātā śayuḥ katidhā cit āyave
tvam agne prathamaḥ mātariśvane āvis bhava sukratūyā vivasvate
arejetām rodasī hotṛ vūrye asaghnoḥ bhāram ayajaḥ mahaḥ vaso
tvam agne manave dyām avāśayaḥ purūravase su kṛte sukṛttaraḥ
śvātreṇa yat pitroḥ mucyase pari ā tvā pūrvam anayan ā aparam punar
tvam agne vṛṣabhaḥ puṣṭi vardhanaḥ udyata sruce bhavasi śravāyyaḥ
yaḥ āhutim pari vedā vaṣaṭkṛtim eka āyuḥ agre viśaḥ āvivāsasi
tvam agne vṛjina vartanim naram sakman piparṣi vidathe vicarṣaṇe
yaḥ śūrasātā paritakmye dhane dabhrebhiḥ cit samṛtā haṃsi bhūyasaḥ
tvam tam agne amṛta tve uttame martam dadhāsi śravase dive dive
yaḥ tātṛṣāṇaḥ ubhayāya janmane mayaḥ kṛṇoṣi prayaḥ ā ca sūraye
tvam naḥ agne sanaye dhanānām yaśasam kārum kṛṇuhi stavānaḥ
ṛdhyāma karma apasā navena devaiḥ dyāvāpṛthivī prāvatam naḥ
tvam naḥ agne pitroḥ upasthe ā devaḥ deveṣu anavadya jāgṛviḥ
tanū kṛt bodhi pramatiḥ ca kārave tvam kalyāṇa vasu viśvam opiṣe
tvam agne pramatiḥ tvam pitā asi naḥ tvam vayaskṛt tava jāmayaḥ vayam
sam tvā rāyaḥ śatinaḥ sam sahasriṇaḥ su vīram yanti vratapām adābhya
tvām agne prathamam āyum āyave devāḥ akṛṇvan nahuṣasya viśpatim
iḍām akṛṇvan manuṣasya śāsanīm pituḥ yat putraḥ mamakasya jāyate
tvam naḥ agne tava deva pāyubhiḥ maghonaḥ rakṣa tanvaḥ ca vandya
trātā tokasya tanaye gavām asi animeṣam rakṣamāṇaḥ tava vrate
tvam agne yajyave pāyuḥ antaraḥ aniṣaṅgāya catur akṣaḥ idhyase
yaḥ rāta havyaḥ avṛkāya dhāyase kīreḥ cit mantram manasā vanoṣi tam
tvam agne uru śaṃsāya vāghate spārham yat rekṇaḥ paramam vanoṣi tat
ādhrasya cit pramatiḥ ucyase pitā pra pākam śāssi pra diśaḥ viduṣṭaraḥ
tvam agne prayata dakṣiṇam naram varma iva syūtam pari pāsi viśvatas
svādu kṣadmā yaḥ vasatau syona kṛt jīva yājam yajate sa upamā divaḥ
imām agne śaraṇim mīmṛṣaḥ naḥ imam adhvānam yam agāma dūrāt
āpiḥ pitā pramatiḥ somyānām bhṛmiḥ asi ṛṣi kṛt martyānām
manuṣvat agne aṅgirasvat aṅgiraḥ yayāti vat sadane pūrvavat śuce
accha yāhi ā vahā daivyam janam ā sādaya barhiṣi yakṣi ca priyam
etena agne brahmaṇā vāvṛdhasva śaktī vā yat te cakṛma vidā vā
uta pra neṣi abhi vasyaḥ asmān sam naḥ sṛja sumatyā vājavatyā
indrasya nu vīryāṇi pra vocam yāni cakāra prathamāni vajrī
ahan ahim anu apaḥ tatarda pra vakṣaṇāḥ abhinat parvatānām
ahan ahim parvate śiśriyāṇam tvaṣṭā asmai vajram svaryam tatakṣa
vāśrāḥ iva dhenavaḥ syandamānāḥ añjas samudram ava jagmuḥ āpaḥ
vṛṣāyamāṇaḥ avṛṇīta somam trikadrukeṣu apibat sutasya
ā sāyakam maghavā adatta vajram ahan enam prathama jām ahīnām
yat indra ahan prathama jām ahīnām āt māyinām amināḥ pra uta māyāḥ
āt sūryam janayan dyām uṣāsam tādītnā śatrum na kilā vivitse
ahan vṛtram vṛtrataram vyaṃsam indraḥ vajreṇa mahatā vadhena
skandhāṃsi iva kuliśenā vivṛkṇā ahiḥ śayate upapṛc pṛthivyāḥ
ayoddhā iva durmadaḥ ā hi juhve mahā vīram tuvi bādham ṛjīṣam
na atārīt asya samṛtim vadhānām sam rujānāḥ pipiṣe indra śatruḥ
a pād a hastaḥ apṛtanyat indram ā asya vajram adhi sānau jaghāna
vṛṣṇaḥ vadhriḥ pratimānam bubhūṣan purutrā vṛtraḥ aśayat vyastaḥ
nadam na bhinnam amuyā śayānam manoḥ ruhāṇāḥ ati yanti āpaḥ
yāḥ cit vṛtraḥ mahinā paryatiṣṭhat tāsām ahiḥ patsutaḥśīḥ babhūva
nīcāvayāḥ abhavat vṛtra putrā indraḥ asyāḥ ava vadhar jabhāra
uttarā sūḥ adharaḥ putraḥ āsīt dānuḥ śaye saha vatsā na dhenuḥ
a tiṣṭhantīnām a niveśanānām kāṣṭhānām madhye nihitam śarīram
vṛtrasya niṇyam vi caranti āpaḥ dīrgham tamaḥ āśayat indra śatruḥ
dāsa patnīḥ ahi gopāḥ atiṣṭhan niruddhāḥ āpaḥ paṇinā iva gāvaḥ
apām bilam apihitam yat āsīt vṛtram jaghanvāṁ apa tat vavāra
aśvyaḥ vāraḥ abhavaḥ tat indra sṛke yat tvā pratyahan devaḥ ekaḥ
ajayaḥ gāḥ ajayaḥ śūra somam avāsṛjaḥ sartave sapta sindhūn
na asmai vidyut na tanyatuḥ siṣedha na yām miham akirat hrādunim ca
indraḥ ca yat yuyudhāte ahiḥ ca uta aparībhyaḥ maghavā vi jigye
aheḥ yātāram kam apaśyaḥ indra hṛdi yat te jaghnuṣaḥ bhīḥ agacchat
nava ca yat navatim ca sravantīḥ śyenaḥ na bhītaḥ ataraḥ rajāṃsi
indraḥ yātaḥ avasitasya rājā śamasya ca śṛṅgiṇaḥ vajra bāhuḥ
sa id u rājā kṣayati carṣaṇīnām arān na nemiḥ pari tāḥ babhūva
eta āyāma upa gavyantaḥ indram asmākam su pramatim vāvṛdhāti
anāmṛṇaḥ kuvid āt asya rāyaḥ gavām ketam param āvarjate naḥ
upa id aham dhana dām apratītam juṣṭām na śyenaḥ vasatim patāmi
indram namasyan upamebhiḥ arkaiḥ ya stotṛbhyaḥ havyaḥ asti yāman
ni sarva senaḥ iṣudhīṃr asakta sam aryaḥ gāḥ ajati yasya vaṣṭi
coṣkūyamāṇaḥ indra bhūri vāmam mā paṇiḥ bhūḥ asmat adhi pravṛddha
vadhīḥ hi dasyum dhaninam _ ekaḥ caran upaśākebhiḥ indra
dhanoḥ adhi viṣuṇak te vi āyan ayajvānaḥ sanakāḥ pretim īyuḥ
parā cit śīrṣā vavṛjuḥ te indra ayajvānaḥ yajvabhi spardhamānāḥ
pra yat divaḥ hariva sthātar ugra niḥ avratāṁ adhamaḥ rodasyoḥ
ayuyutsan anavadyasya senām ayātayanta kṣitayaḥ navagvāḥ
vṛṣāyudhaḥ na vadhrayaḥ niraṣṭāḥ pravadbhiḥ indrāt citayantaḥ āyan
tvam etān rudataḥ jakṣataḥ ca ayodhayaḥ rajasaḥ indra pāre
avādahaḥ divaḥ ā dasyum uccā pra sunvata stuvataḥ śaṃsam āvaḥ
cakrāṇāsaḥ parīṇaham pṛthivyāḥ hiraṇyena maṇinā śumbhamānāḥ
na hinvānāsaḥ titiruḥ te indram pari spaśaḥ adadhāt sūryeṇa
pari yat indra rodasī ubhe abubhojīḥ mahinā viśvatas sīm
a manyamānāṁ abhi manyamānaiḥ niḥ brahmabhiḥ adhamaḥ dasyum indra
na ye divaḥ pṛthivyāḥ antam āpuḥ na māyābhiḥ dhana dām paryabhūvan
yujam vajram vṛṣabhaḥ cakre indraḥ niḥ jyotiṣā tamasaḥ gāḥ adukṣat
anu svadhām akṣaran āpaḥ asya avardhata madhye ā nāvyānām
sadhrīcīnena manasā tam indraḥ ojiṣṭhena hanmanā ahan abhi dyūn
ni āvidhyat ilībiśasya dṛḍhā vi śṛṅgiṇam abhinat śuṣṇam indraḥ
yāvat taraḥ maghavan yāvat ojaḥ vajreṇa śatrum avadhīḥ pṛtanyum
abhi sidhmaḥ ajigāt asya śatrūn vi tigmena vṛṣabheṇa puraḥ abhet
sam vajreṇa asṛjat vṛtram indraḥ pra svām matim atirat śāśadānaḥ
āvaḥ kutsam indra yasmin cākan prāvaḥ yudhyantam vṛṣabham daśadyum
śapha cyutaḥ reṇuḥ nakṣata dyām ud śvaitreyaḥ nṛṣāhyāya tasthau
āvaḥ śamam vṛṣabham tugryāsu kṣetra jeṣe maghavan śvitryam gām
jyok cit atra tasthivāṃsaḥ akran śatrūyatām adharā vedanā akaḥ
tris cit naḥ adya bhavatam navedasā vibhuḥ vām yāmaḥ uta rātiḥ aśvinā
yuvoḥ hi yantram himyā iva vāsasaḥ abhyāyaṃsenyā bhavatam manīṣibhiḥ
trayaḥ pavayaḥ madhu vāhane rathe somasya venām anu viśve id viduḥ
traya skambhāsa skabhitāsaḥ ārabhe tris naktam yāthaḥ tris u aśvinā divā
samāne ahan tris avadya gohanā tris adya yajñam madhunā mimikṣatam
tris vājavatīḥ iṣaḥ aśvinā yuvam doṣā asmabhyam uṣasaḥ ca pinvatam
tris vartiḥ yātam tris anuvrate jane tris suprāvye tredhā iva śikṣatam
tris nāndyam vahatam aśvinā yuvam tris pṛkṣaḥ asme akṣarā iva pinvatam
tris naḥ rayim vahatam aśvinā yuvam tris devatātā tris uta avatam dhiyaḥ
tris saubhaga tvam tris uta śravāṃsi naḥ triṣṭham vām sūraḥ duhitā ruhat ratham
tris naḥ aśvinā divyāni bheṣajā tris pārthivāni tris u dattam adbhyaḥ
omānam śam yos mamakāya sūnave tri dhātu śarma vahatam śubhas patī
tris naḥ aśvinā yajatā dive dive pari tri dhātu pṛthivīm aśāyatam
tisraḥ nāsatyā rathyā parāvataḥ ātmā iva vātaḥ svasarāṇi gacchatam
tris aśvinā sindhubhiḥ sapta mātṛbhiḥ trayaḥ āhāvāḥ tredhā haviṣ kṛtam
tisraḥ pṛthivīḥ upari pravā divaḥ nākam rakṣethe dyubhiḥ aktubhiḥ hitam
kva trī cakrā trivṛtaḥ rathasya kva trayaḥ vandhuraḥ ye sanīḍāḥ
kadā yogaḥ vājinaḥ rāsabhasya yena yajñam nāsatyā upayāthaḥ
ā nāsatyā gacchatam hūyate haviḥ madhvaḥ pibatam madhupebhiḥ āsabhiḥ
yuvoḥ hi pūrvam savitā uṣasaḥ ratham ṛtāya citram ghṛtavantam iṣyati
ā nāsatyā tribhiḥ ekādaśaiḥ iha devebhiḥ yātam madhu peyam aśvinā
pra āyuḥ tāriṣṭam niḥ rapāṃsi mṛkṣatam sedhatam dveṣaḥ bhavatam sacābhuvā
ā naḥ aśvinā trivṛtā rathena arvāñcam rayim vahatam su vīram
śṛṇvantā vām avase johavīmi vṛdhe ca naḥ bhavatam vājasātau
hvayāmi agnim prathamam svastaye hvayāmi mitrāvaruṇau iha avase
hvayāmi rātrīm jagataḥ niveśanīm hvayāmi devam savitāram ūtaye
ā kṛṣṇena rajasā vartamānaḥ niveśayan amṛtam martyam ca
hiraṇyayena savitā rathena ā devaḥ yāti bhuvanāni paśyan
yāti devaḥ pravatā yāti udvatā yāti śubhrābhyām yajataḥ haribhyām
ā devaḥ yāti savitā parāvataḥ apa viśvā duritā bādhamānaḥ
abhīvṛtam kṛśanaiḥ viśva rūpam hiraṇya śamyam yajataḥ bṛhantam
āsthāt ratham savitā citra bhānuḥ kṛṣṇā rajāṃsi taviṣīm dadhānaḥ
vi janān śyāvāḥ śiti pādaḥ akhyan ratham hiraṇya praugam vahantaḥ
śaśvat viśaḥ savituḥ daivyasya upasthe viśvā bhuvanāni tasthuḥ
tisraḥ dyāvaḥ savituḥ dvau upasthāṁ ekā yamasya bhuvane virāṣāṭ
āṇim na rathyam amṛtā adhi tasthuḥ iha bravītu yaḥ u tat ciketat
vi suparṇaḥ antarikṣāṇi akhyat gabhīra vepāḥ asuraḥ su nīthaḥ
kva idānīm sūryaḥ kaḥ ciketa katamām dyām raśmiḥ asyā tatāna
aṣṭau vi akhyat kakubhaḥ pṛthivyāḥ trī dhanva yojanā sapta sindhūn
hiraṇya akṣaḥ savitā devaḥ āgāt dadhat ratnā dāśuṣe vāryāṇi
hiraṇya pāṇiḥ savitā vicarṣaṇiḥ ubhe dyāvāpṛthivī antar īyate
apa amīvām bādhate veti sūryam abhi kṛṣṇena rajasā dyām ṛṇoti
hiraṇya hastaḥ asuraḥ su nīthaḥ su mṛḍīkaḥ svavāṁ yātu arvāṅ
apasedhan rakṣasaḥ yātudhānān asthāt devaḥ pratidoṣam gṛṇānaḥ
ye te panthāḥ savitar pūrvyāsaḥ areṇavaḥ su kṛtāḥ antarikṣe
tebhiḥ naḥ adya pathibhiḥ su gebhiḥ rakṣa ca naḥ adhi ca brūhi deva
pra vaḥ yahvam purūṇām viśām devayatīnām
agnim sūktebhiḥ vacobhiḥ īmahe yam sīm id anye īḍate
janāsaḥ agnim dadhire sahaḥ vṛdham haviṣmantaḥ vidhema te
sa tvam naḥ adya sumanāḥ iha avitā bhava vājeṣu santya
pra tvā dūtam vṛṇīmahe hotāram viśva vedasam
mahaḥ te sataḥ vi caranti arcayaḥ divi spṛśanti bhānavaḥ
devāsaḥ tvā varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā sam dūtam pratnam indhate
viśvam saḥ agne jayati tvayā dhanam yaḥ te dadāśa martyaḥ
mandraḥ hotā gṛha patiḥ agne dūtaḥ viśām asi
tve viśvā saṃgatāni vratā dhruvā yāni devāḥ akṛṇvata
tve id agne subhage yaviṣṭhya viśvam ā hūyate haviḥ
sa tvam naḥ adya sumanāḥ uta aparam yakṣi devān su vīryā
tam gha īm itthā namasvinaḥ upa svarājam āsate
hotrābhiḥ agnim manuṣaḥ sam indhate titirvāṃsaḥ ati sridhaḥ
ghnantaḥ vṛtram ataran rodasī apaḥ uru kṣayāya cakrire
bhuvat kaṇve vṛṣā dyumnī āhutaḥ krandat aśvaḥ gaviṣṭiṣu
sam sīdasva mahāṁ asi śocasva deva vītamaḥ
vi dhūmam agne aruṣam miyedhya sṛja praśasta darśatam
yam tvā devāsaḥ manave dadhuḥ iha yajiṣṭham havyavāhana
yam kaṇvaḥ medhyātithiḥ dhana spṛtam yam vṛṣā yam upastutaḥ
yam agnim medhyātithiḥ kaṇvaḥ īdhe ṛtāt adhi
tasya pra iṣaḥ dīdiyuḥ tam imāḥ ṛcaḥ tam agnim vardhayāmasi
rāyaḥ pūrdhi svadhāvas asti hi te agne deveṣu āpyam
tvam vājasya śrutyasya rājasi sa naḥ mṛḍa mahāṁ asi
ūrdhvaḥ ū ṣu ṇaḥ ūtaye tiṣṭha devaḥ na savitā
ūrdhvaḥ vājasya sanitā yat añjibhiḥ vāghadbhiḥ vihvayāmahe
ūrdhvaḥ naḥ pāhi aṃhasaḥ ni ketunā viśvam sam atriṇam daha
kṛdhi naḥ ūrdhvān carathāya jīvase vidāḥ deveṣu naḥ duvaḥ
pāhi naḥ agne rakṣasaḥ pāhi dhūrteḥ arāvṇaḥ
pāhi rīṣataḥ uta vā jighāṃsataḥ bṛhadbhāno yaviṣṭhya
ghanā iva viṣvak vi jahi arāvṇaḥ tapuḥ jambha yaḥ asmadhruk
yaḥ martyaḥ śiśīte ati aktubhiḥ mā naḥ sa ripuḥ īśata
agniḥ vavne su vīryam agniḥ kaṇvāya saubhagam
agniḥ prāvat mitrā uta medhyātithim agniḥ sātau upastutam
agninā turvaśam yadum parāvataḥ ugrādevam havāmahe
agniḥ nayat navavāstvam bṛhat ratham turvītim dasyave sahaḥ
ni tvām agne manuḥ dadhe jyotiḥ janāya śaśvate
dīdetha kaṇve ṛta jātaḥ ukṣitaḥ yam namasyanti kṛṣṭayaḥ
tveṣāsaḥ agneḥ amavantaḥ arcayaḥ bhīmāsaḥ na pratītaye
rakṣasvinaḥ sadam id yātumāvataḥ viśvam sam atriṇam daha
krīḍam vaḥ śardhaḥ mārutam anarvāṇam ratheśubham
kaṇvāḥ abhi pra gāyata
ye pṛṣatībhiḥ ṛṣṭibhiḥ sākam vāśībhiḥ añjibhiḥ
ajāyanta sva bhānavaḥ
iha iva śṛṇve eṣām kaśāḥ hasteṣu yat vadān
ni yāmañ citram ṛñjate
pra vaḥ śardhāya ghṛṣvaye tveṣa dyumnāya śuṣmiṇe
devattam brahma gāyata
pra śaṃsā goṣu aghnyam krīḍam yat śardhaḥ mārutam
jambhe rasasya vāvṛdhe
kaḥ vaḥ varṣiṣṭhaḥ ā naraḥ divaḥ ca gmaḥ ca dhūtayaḥ
yat sīm antam na dhūnutha
ni vaḥ yāmāya mānuṣaḥ dadhre ugrāya manyave
jihīta parvataḥ giriḥ
yeṣām ajmeṣu pṛthivī jujurvāṁ iva viśpatiḥ
bhiyā yāmeṣu rejate
sthiram hi jānam eṣām vayaḥ mātuḥ niretave
yat sīm anu dvitā śavaḥ
ud u tye sūnavaḥ giraḥ kāṣṭhāḥ ajmeṣu atnata
vāśrāḥ abhijñu yātave
tyam cit ghā dīrgham pṛthum mihaḥ napātam amṛdhram
pra cyāvayanti yāmabhiḥ
marutaḥ yat ha vaḥ balam janāṁ acucyavītana
girīṃr acucyavītana
yat ha yānti marutaḥ sam ha bruvate adhvan ā
śṛṇoti kaścid eṣām
pra yāta śībham āśubhiḥ santi kaṇveṣu vaḥ duvaḥ
tatra u ṣu mādayādhvai
asti hi ṣmā madāya vaḥ smasi ṣmā vayam eṣām
viśvam cit āyuḥ jīvase
kad ha nūnam kadhapriyaḥ pitā putram na hastayoḥ
dadhidhve vṛkta barhiṣaḥ
kva nūnam kad vaḥ artham ganta divaḥ na pṛthivyāḥ
kva vaḥ gāvaḥ na raṇyanti
kva vaḥ sumnā navyāṃsi marutaḥ kva suvitā
kva u viśvāni saubhagā
yat yūyam pṛśni mātaraḥ martāsaḥ syātana
stotā vaḥ amṛtaḥ syāt
mā vaḥ mṛgaḥ na yavase jaritā bhūt ajoṣyaḥ
pathā yamasya gāt upa
mā u ṣu ṇaḥ parā parā nirṛtiḥ durhaṇā vadhīt
padīṣṭa tṛṣṇayā saha

miham kṛṇvanti avātām
vāśrā iva vidyut mimāti vatsam na mātā siṣakti

adha svanāt marutām viśvam ā sadma pārthivam
arejanta pra mānuṣāḥ
marutaḥ vīḍu pāṇibhiḥ citrāḥ rodhasvatīḥ anu
yāta īm akhidra yāmabhiḥ
sthirāḥ vaḥ santu nemayaḥ rathāḥ aśvāsaḥ eṣām

acchā vada tanā girā jarāyai brahmaṇaspatim
agnim mitram na darśatam
mimīhi ślokam āsye parjanyaḥ iva tatanaḥ
gāya gāyatram ukthyam
vandasva mārutam gaṇam tveṣam panasyum arkiṇam
asme vṛddhāḥ asan iha
pra yat itthā parāvataḥ śociḥ na mānam asyatha
kasya kratvā marutaḥ kasya varpasā kam yātha kam ha dhūtayaḥ
sthirā vaḥ santu āyudhā parāṇude vīḍū uta pratiṣkabhe
yuṣmākam astu taviṣī panīyasī mā martyasya māyinaḥ
parā ha yat sthiram hatha naraḥ vartayathā guru
vi yāthana vaninaḥ pṛthivyāḥ vi āśāḥ parvatānām
nahi vaḥ śatruḥ vivide adhi dyavi na bhūmyām riśādasaḥ
yuṣmākam astu taviṣī tanā yujā rudrāsaḥ nū cit ādhṛṣe
pra vepayanti parvatān vi viñcanti vanaspatīn
pra u ārata marutaḥ durmadāḥ iva devāsaḥ sarvayā viśā
upa u ratheṣu pṛṣatīḥ ayugdhvam praṣṭiḥ vahati rohitaḥ
ā vaḥ yāmāya pṛthivī cit aśrot abībhayanta mānuṣāḥ
ā vaḥ makṣū tanāya kam rudrāḥ avaḥ vṛṇīmahe
gantā nūnam naḥ avasā yathā purā itthā kaṇvāya bibhyuṣe
yuṣmeṣitaḥ marutaḥ martya iṣitaḥ ā yaḥ naḥ abhvaḥ īṣate
vi tam yuyota śavasā vi ojasā vi yuṣmākābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
asāmi hi prayajyavaḥ kaṇvam dada pracetasaḥ
asāmibhiḥ marutaḥ ā naḥ ūtibhiḥ gantā vṛṣṭim na vidyutaḥ
asāmi ojaḥ bibhṛthā sudānavaḥ asāmi dhūtayaḥ śavaḥ
ṛṣi dviṣe marutaḥ parimanyavaḥ iṣum na sṛjata dviṣam
ud tiṣṭha brahmaṇaspate devayantaḥ tvā īmahe
upa pra yantu marutaḥ sudānavaḥ indra prāśūḥ bhavā sacā
tvām id hi sahasas putra martyaḥ upabrūte dhane hite
su vīryam marutaḥ ā su aśvyam dadhīta yaḥ vaḥ ācake
praitu brahmaṇaspatiḥ pra devī etu sūnṛtā
acchā vīram naryam paṅkti rādhasam devāḥ yajñam nayantu naḥ
yaḥ vāghate dadāti sūnaram vasu sa dhatte akṣiti śravaḥ
tasmai iḍām su vīrām ā yajāmahe su pratūrtim anehasam
pra nūnam brahmaṇaspatiḥ mantram vadati ukthyam
yasmin indraḥ varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā devāḥ okāṃsi cakrire
tam id vocemā vidatheṣu śambhuvam mantram devāḥ anehasam
imām ca vācam pratiharyathā naraḥ viśvā id vāmā vaḥ aśnavat
kaḥ devayantam aśnavat janam kaḥ vṛkta barhiṣam
pra pra dāśvān pastyābhiḥ asthita antarvāvat kṣayam dadhe
upa kṣatram pṛñcīta hanti rājabhiḥ bhaye cit su kṣitim dadhe
na asya vartā na tarutā mahā dhane na arbhe asti vajriṇaḥ
yam rakṣanti pracetasaḥ varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā
nū cit sa dabhyate janaḥ
yam bāhutā iva piprati pānti martyam riṣaḥ
ariṣṭaḥ sarvaḥ edhate
vi durgā vi dviṣaḥ puras ghnanti rājānaḥ eṣām
nayanti duritā tiras
su gaḥ panthāḥ anṛkṣaraḥ ādityāsaḥ ṛtam yate
na atra avakhādaḥ asti vaḥ
yam yajñam nayathā naraḥ ādityāḥ ṛjunā pathā
pra vaḥ sa dhītaye naśat
sa ratnam martyaḥ vasu viśvam tokam uta tmanā
acchā gacchati astṛtaḥ
kathā rādhāma sakhāyaḥ stomam mitrasya aryamṇaḥ
mahi psaraḥ varuṇasya
mā vaḥ ghnantam mā śapantam prati voce devayantam
sumnaiḥ id vaḥ ā vivāse
caturaḥ cit dadamānāt bibhīyāt ā nidhātoḥ
na duruktāya spṛhayet
sam pūṣan adhvanaḥ tira vi aṃhaḥ vimucaḥ napāt
sakṣva deva pra ṇaḥ puras
yaḥ naḥ pūṣan aghaḥ vṛkaḥ duḥśevaḥ ādideśati
apa sma tam pathaḥ jahi
apa tyam paripanthinam muṣīvāṇam huraścitam
dūram adhi sruteḥ aja
tvam tasya dvayāvinaḥ agha śaṃsasya kasyacid
padā abhi tiṣṭha tapuṣim
ā tat te dasra mantumas pūṣan avaḥ vṛṇīmahe
yena pitṝn acodayaḥ
adha naḥ viśva saubhaga hiraṇya vāśīmattama
dhanāni suṣaṇā kṛdhi
ati naḥ saścataḥ naya su gā naḥ su pathā kṛṇu
pūṣan iha kratum vidaḥ
abhi sū yavasam naya na nava jvāraḥ adhvane
pūṣan iha kratum vidaḥ
śagdhi pūrdhi pra yaṃsi ca śiśīhi prāsi udaram
pūṣan iha kratum vidaḥ
na pūṣaṇam methāmasi sūktaiḥ abhi gṛṇīmasi
vasūni dasmam īmahe
kad rudrāya pracetase mīḍhuṣṭamāya tavyase
vocema śantamam hṛde
yathā naḥ aditiḥ karat paśve nṛbhyaḥ yathā gave
yathā tokāya rudriyam
yathā naḥ mitraḥ varuṇaḥ yathā rudraḥ ciketati
yathā viśve sajoṣasaḥ
gātha patim medha patim rudram jalāṣa bheṣajam
tat śaṃyoḥ sumnam īmahe
yaḥ śukraḥ iva sūryaḥ hiraṇyam iva rocate
śreṣṭhaḥ devānām vasuḥ
śam naḥ karati arvate sugam meṣāya meṣye
nṛbhyaḥ nāribhyaḥ gave
asme soma śriyam adhi ni dhehi śatasya nṛṇām
mahi śravaḥ tuvi nṛmṇam
mā naḥ soma paribādhaḥ mā arātayaḥ juhuranta
ā naḥ indo vāje bhaja
yāḥ te prajāḥ amṛtasya parasmin dhāman ṛtasya
mūrdhā nābhā soma venaḥ ābhūṣantīḥ soma vedaḥ
agne vivasvat uṣasaḥ citram rādhaḥ amartya
ā dāśuṣe jātavedaḥ vahā tvam adyā devāṁ uṣarbudhaḥ
juṣṭaḥ hi dūtaḥ asi havyavāhanaḥ agne rathīḥ adhvarāṇām
sajūs aśvibhyām uṣasā su vīryam asme dhehi śravaḥ bṛhat
adya dūtam vṛṇīmahe vasum agnim puru priyam
dhūma ketum bhāṛjīkam vyuṣṭiṣu yajñānām adhvara śriyam
śreṣṭham yaviṣṭham atithim su āhutam juṣṭam janāya dāśuṣe
devāṁ acchā yātave jātavedasam agnim īḍe vyuṣṭiṣu
staviṣyāmi tvām aham viśvasya amṛta bhojana
agne trātāram amṛtam miyedhya yajiṣṭham havyavāhana
su śaṃsaḥ bodhi gṛṇate yaviṣṭhya madhu jihvaḥ su āhutaḥ
praskaṇvasya pratiran āyuḥ jīvase namasyā daivyam janam
hotāram viśva vedasam sam hi tvā viśaḥ indhate
saḥ ā vaha puru hūta pracetasaḥ agne devāṁ iha dravat
savitāram uṣasam aśvinā bhagam agnim vyuṣṭiṣu kṣapaḥ
kaṇvāsaḥ tvā suta somāsaḥ indhate havyavāham su adhvara
patiḥ hi adhvarāṇām agne dūtaḥ viśām asi
uṣarbudhaḥ ā vaha soma pītaye devāṁ adya svar dṛśaḥ
agne pūrvāḥ anu uṣasaḥ vibhāvaso dīdetha viśva darśataḥ
asi grāmeṣu avitā purohitaḥ asi yajñeṣu mānuṣaḥ
ni tvā yajñasya sādhanam agne hotāram ṛtvijam
manuṣvat deva dhīmahi pracetasam jīram dūtam amartyam
yat devānām mitra mahaḥ purohitaḥ antaraḥ yāsi dūtyam
sindhoḥ iva prasvanitāsaḥ ūrmayaḥ agneḥ bhrājante arcayaḥ
śrudhi śrut karṇa vahnibhiḥ devaiḥ agne sa yāvabhiḥ
ā sīdantu barhiṣi mitraḥ aryamā prātar yāvāṇaḥ adhvaram
śṛṇvantu stomam marutaḥ sudānavaḥ agni jihvāḥ ṛtāvṛdhaḥ
pibatu somam varuṇaḥ dhṛta vrataḥ aśvibhyām uṣasā sajūs
tvam agne vasūṃr iha rudrāṁ ādityāṁ uta
yaja su adhvaram janam manu jātam ghṛta pruṣam
śruṣṭīvānaḥ hi dāśuṣe devāḥ agne vicetasaḥ
tān rohit aśva girvaṇaḥ trayastriṃśatam ā vaha
priyamedha vat atri vat jātavedaḥ virūpa vat
aṅgiras vat mahi vrata praskaṇvasya śrudhi havam
mahikeravaḥ ūtaye priyamedhāḥ ahūṣata
rājantam adhvarāṇām agnim śukreṇa śociṣā
ghṛtāhavana santya imāḥ u su śrudhī giraḥ
yābhiḥ kaṇvasya sūnavaḥ havante avase tvā
tvām citraśravastama havante vikṣu jantavaḥ
śociṣkeśam puru priya agne havyāya voḍhave
ni tvā hotāram ṛtvijam dadhire vasu vittamam
śrut karṇam saprathastamam viprāḥ agne diviṣṭiṣu
ā tvā viprāḥ acucyavuḥ suta somāḥ abhi prayaḥ
bṛhat bhās bibhrataḥ haviḥ agne martāya dāśuṣe
prātar yāvṇaḥ sahaskṛta soma peyāya santya
iha adya daivyam janam barhiḥ ā sādaya vaso
arvāñcam daivyam janam agne yakṣva sahūtibhiḥ
ayam somaḥ sudānavaḥ tam pāta tiroahnyam
eṣā u uṣāḥ apūrvyā vi ucchati priyā divaḥ
stuṣe vām aśvinā bṛhat
yā dasrā sindhu mātarā manotarā rayīṇām
dhiyā devā vasu vidā
vacyante vām kakuhāsaḥ jūrṇāyām adhi viṣṭapi
yat vām rathaḥ vibhiṣ patāt
haviṣā jāraḥ apām piparti papuriḥ narā
pitā kuṭasya carṣaṇiḥ
ādāraḥ vām matīnām nāsatyā mata vacasā
pātam somasya dhṛṣṇuyā
yā naḥ pīparat aśvinā jyotiṣmatī tamaḥ tiras
tām asme rāsāthām iṣam
ā naḥ nāvā matīnām yātam pārāya gantave
yuñjāthām aśvinā ratham
aritram vām divas pṛthu tīrthe sindhūnām rathaḥ
dhiyā yuyujre indavaḥ
divas kaṇvāsaḥ indavaḥ vasu sindhūnām pade
svam vavrim kuha dhitsathaḥ
abhūt u bhās u aṃśave hiraṇyam prati sūryaḥ
vi akhyat jihvayā asitaḥ
abhūt u pāram etave panthāḥ ṛtasya sādhuyā
adarśi vi srutiḥ divaḥ
tat tat id aśvinoḥ avaḥ jaritā prati bhūṣati
made somasya pipratoḥ
vāvasānā vivasvati somasya pītyāḥ girā
manuṣvat śambhū ā gatam
yuvoḥ uṣāḥ anu śriyam parijmanoḥ upācarat
ṛtā vanathaḥ aktubhiḥ
ubhā pibatam aśvinā ubhā naḥ śarma yacchatam
avidriyābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
ayam vām madhumattamaḥ sutaḥ somaḥ ṛtāvṛdhā
tam aśvinā pibatam tiroahnyam dhattam ratnāni dāśuṣe
tri vandhureṇa trivṛtā su peśasā rathena ā yātam aśvinā
kaṇvāsaḥ vām brahma kṛṇvanti adhvare teṣām su śṛṇutam havam
aśvinā madhumattamam pātam somam ṛtāvṛdhā
atha adya dasrā vasu bibhratā rathe dāśvāṃsam upa gacchatam
triṣadhasthe barhiṣi viśva vedasā madhvā yajñam mimikṣatam
kaṇvāsaḥ vām suta somāḥ abhidyavaḥ yuvām havante aśvinā
yābhiḥ kaṇvam abhiṣṭibhiḥ prāvatam yuvam aśvinā
tābhiḥ ṣu asmāṁ avatam śubhas patī pātam somam ṛtāvṛdhā
sudāse dasrā vasu bibhratā rathe pṛkṣaḥ vahatam aśvinā
rayim samudrāt uta vā divas pari asme dhattam puruspṛham
yat nāsatyā parāvati yat vā sthaḥ adhi turvaśe
atas rathena suvṛtā naḥ ā gatam sākam sūryasya raśmibhiḥ
arvāñcā vām saptayaḥ adhvara śriyaḥ vahantu savanā id upa
iṣam pṛñcantā su kṛte sudānavaḥ ā barhiḥ sīdatam narā
tena nāsatyā gatam rathena sūrya tvacā
yena śaśvat ūhathuḥ dāśuṣe vasu madhvaḥ somasya pītaye
ukthebhiḥ arvāk avase purūvasū arkaiḥ ca ni hvayāmahe
śaśvat kaṇvānām sadasi priye hi kam somam papathuḥ aśvinā
saha vāmena naḥ uṣaḥ vi ucchā duhitar divaḥ
saha dyumnena bṛhatā vibhāvari rāyā devi dāsvatī
aśvāvatīḥ gomatīḥ viśva su vidaḥ bhūri cyavanta vastave
ud īraya prati mā sūnṛtā uṣaḥ coda rādhaḥ maghonām
uvāsa uṣāḥ ucchāt ca nu devī jīrā rathānām
ye asyāḥ ācaraṇeṣu dadhrire samudre na śravasyavaḥ
uṣaḥ ye te pra yāmeṣu yuñjate manaḥ dānāya sūrayaḥ
atra aha tat kaṇvaḥ eṣām kaṇvatamaḥ nāma gṛṇāti nṛṇām
ā ghā yoṣā iva sūnarī uṣāḥ yāti prabhuñjatī
jarayantī vṛjanam padvat īyate ud pātayati pakṣiṇaḥ
vi yā sṛjati samanam vi arthinaḥ padam na veti odatī
vayaḥ nakir ṭe paptivāṃsaḥ āsate vyuṣṭau vājinīvati
eṣā ayukta parāvataḥ sūryasya udayanāt adhi
śatam rathebhiḥ subhagā uṣāḥ iyam vi yāti abhi mānuṣān
viśvam asyāḥ nānāma cakṣase jagat jyotiṣ kṛṇoti sūnarī
apa dveṣaḥ maghonī duhitā divaḥ uṣāḥ ucchat apa sridhaḥ
uṣe ā bhāhi bhānunā candreṇa duhitar divaḥ
āvahantī bhūri asmabhyam saubhagam vyucchantī diviṣṭiṣu
viśvasya hi prāṇanam jīvanam tve vi yat ucchasi sūnari
sā naḥ rathena bṛhatā vibhāvari śrudhi citrāmaghe havam
uṣaḥ vājam hi vaṃsva yaḥ citraḥ mānuṣe jane
tena ā vaha su kṛtaḥ adhvarāṁ upa ye tvā gṛṇanti vahnayaḥ
viśvān devāṁ ā vaha soma pītaye antarikṣāt uṣaḥ tvam
sā asmāsu dhāḥ gomat aśvāvat ukthyam uṣaḥ vājam su vīryam
yasyāḥ ruśantaḥ arcayaḥ prati bhadrāḥ adṛkṣata
sā naḥ rayim viśva vāram su peśasam uṣāḥ dadātu sugmyam
ye cit hi tvām ṛṣayaḥ pūrve ūtaye juhūre avase mahi
sā na stomāṁ abhi gṛṇīhi rādhasā uṣaḥ śukreṇa śociṣā
uṣaḥ yat adya bhānunā vi dvārau ṛṇavaḥ divaḥ
pra naḥ yacchatāt avṛkam pṛthu chardiḥ pra devi gomatīḥ iṣaḥ
sam naḥ rāyā bṛhatā viśva peśasā mimikṣvā sam iḍābhiḥ ā
sam dyumnena viśva turā uṣaḥ mahi sam vājaiḥ vājinīvati
uṣaḥ bhadrebhiḥ ā gahi divaḥ cit rocanāt adhi
vahantu aruṇapsavaḥ upa tvā sominaḥ gṛham
su peśasam sukham ratham yam adhyasthāḥ uṣaḥ tvam
tena su śravasam janam prāva adya duhitar divaḥ
vayaḥ cit te patatriṇaḥ dvipad catuṣpad arjuni
uṣaḥ prāran ṛtūṃr anu divaḥ antebhyaḥ pari
vyucchantī hi raśmibhiḥ viśvam ābhāsi rocanam
tām tvām uṣar vasūyavaḥ gīrbhiḥ kaṇvāḥ ahūṣata
ud u tyam jātavedasam devam vahanti ketavaḥ
dṛśe viśvāya sūryam
apa tye tāyavaḥ yathā nakṣatrā yanti aktubhiḥ
sūrāya viśva cakṣase
adṛśram asya ketavaḥ vi raśmayaḥ janāṁ anu
bhrājantaḥ agnayaḥ yathā
taraṇiḥ viśva darśataḥ jyotiṣkṛt asi sūrya
viśvam ā bhāsi rocanam
pratyaṅ devānām viśaḥ pratyaṅ ud eṣi mānuṣān
pratyaṅ viśvam svar dṛśe
yenā pāvaka cakṣasā bhuraṇyantam janāṁ anu
tvam varuṇa paśyasi
vi dyām eṣi rajas pṛthū ahā mimānaḥ aktubhiḥ
paśyan janmāni sūrya
sapta tvā haritaḥ rathe vahanti deva sūrya
śociṣkeśam vicakṣaṇa
ayukta sapta śundhyuvaḥ sūraḥ rathasya naptyaḥ
tābhiḥ yāti sva yuktibhiḥ
ud vayam tamasas pari jyotiṣ paśyantaḥ uttaram
devam devatrā sūryam aganma jyotiḥ uttamam
udyan adya mitra maha ārohan uttarām divam
hṛd rogam mama sūrya harimāṇam ca nāśaya
śukeṣu me harimāṇam ropaṇākāsu dadhmasi
atho hāridraveṣu me harimāṇam ni dadhmasi
ud agāt ayam ādityaḥ viśvena sahasā saha
dviṣantam mahyam randhayan mā u aham dviṣate radham
abhi tyam meṣam puruhūtam ṛgmiyam indram gīrbhiḥ madatā vasvaḥ arṇavam
yasya dyāvaḥ na vicaranti mānuṣāḥ bhuje maṃhiṣṭham abhi vipram arcata
abhi īm avanvan su abhiṣṭim ūtayaḥ antarikṣa prām taviṣībhiḥ āvṛtam
indram dakṣāsaḥ ṛbhavaḥ mada cyutam śatakratum javanī sūnṛtā āruhat
tvam gotram aṅgirobhyaḥ avṛṇoḥ apa uta atraye śata dureṣu gātu vid
sasena cit vimadāya avahaḥ vasū ājau adrim vāvasānasya nartayan
tvam apām apidhānā avṛṇoḥ apādhārayaḥ parvate dānumat vasu
vṛtram yat indra śavasā avadhīḥ ahim āt id sūryam divi ārohayaḥ dṛśe
tvam māyābhiḥ apa māyinaḥ adhamaḥ svadhābhiḥ ye adhi śuptau ajuhvata
tvam piproḥ nṛmaṇaḥ prārujaḥ puraḥ pra ṛjiśvānam dasyu hatyeṣu āvitha
tvam kutsam śuṣṇa hatyeṣu āvitha arandhayaḥ atithigvāya śambaram
mahāntam cit arbudam ni kramīḥ padā sanāt eva dasyu hatyāya jajñiṣe
tve viśvā taviṣī sadhryak hitā tava rādhaḥ soma pīthāya harṣate
tava vajraḥ cikite bāhvoḥ hitaḥ vṛśca śatroḥ ava viśvāni vṛṣṇyā
vi jānīhi āryān ye ca dasyavaḥ barhiṣmate randhayā śāsat avratān
śākī bhava yajamānasya coditā viśvā id tā te sadhamādeṣu cākana
anuvratāya randhayan apavratān ābhūbhiḥ indraḥ śnathayan an ābhuvaḥ
vṛddhasya cit vardhataḥ dyām inakṣata stavānaḥ vamraḥ vi jaghāna saṃdihaḥ
takṣat yat te uśanā sahasā sahaḥ vi rodasī majmanā bādhate śavaḥ
ā tvā vātasya nṛmaṇaḥ manaḥ yujaḥ ā pūryamāṇam avahan abhi śravaḥ
mandiṣṭa yat uśane kāvye sacāṁ indraḥ vaṅkū vaṅkutarā adhi tiṣṭhati
ugraḥ yayim niḥ apaḥ srotasā asṛjat vi śuṣṇasya dṛṃhitāḥ airayat puraḥ
ā smā ratham vṛṣa pāṇeṣu tiṣṭhasi śāryātasya prabhṛtāḥ yeṣu mandase
indra yathā suta someṣu cākanaḥ anarvāṇam ślokam ā rohase divi
adadāḥ arbhām mahate vacasyave kakṣīvate vṛcayām indra sunvate
menā abhavaḥ vṛṣaṇaśvasya su krato viśvā id tā te savaneṣu pravācyā
indraḥ aśrāyi su dhyaḥ nireke pajreṣu stomaḥ duryaḥ na yūpaḥ
aśvayuḥ gavyuḥ rathayuḥ vasūyuḥ indraḥ id rāyaḥ kṣayati prayantā
idam namaḥ vṛṣabhāya sva rāje satya śuṣmāya tavase avāci
asmin indra vṛjane sarva vīrāḥ smat sūribhiḥ tava śarman syāma
tyam su meṣam mahaya svar vidam śatam yasya su bhvaḥ sākam īrate
atyam na vājam havanasyadam ratham ā indram vavṛtyām avase suvṛktibhiḥ
sa parvataḥ na dharuṇeṣu acyutaḥ sahasram ūtiḥ taviṣīṣu vāvṛdhe
indraḥ yat vṛtram avadhīt nadīvṛtam ubjan arṇāṃsi jarhṛṣāṇaḥ andhasā
sa hi dvaraḥ dvariṣu vavraḥ ūdhani candra budhnaḥ mada vṛddhaḥ manīṣibhiḥ
indram tam ahve svapasyayā dhiyā maṃhiṣṭha rātim sa hi papriḥ andhasaḥ
ā yam pṛṇanti divi sadma barhiṣaḥ samudram na su bhvaḥ svāḥ abhiṣṭayaḥ
tam vṛtra hatye anu tasthuḥ ūtayaḥ śuṣmāḥ indram avātāḥ ahrutapsavaḥ
abhi sva vṛṣṭim made asya yudhyataḥ raghvīḥ iva pravaṇe sasruḥ ūtayaḥ
indraḥ yat vajrī dhṛṣamāṇaḥ andhasā bhinat valasya paridhīṃr iva tritaḥ
pari īm ghṛṇā carati titviṣe śavaḥ apaḥ vṛtvī rajasaḥ budhnam āśayat
vṛtrasya yat pravaṇe durgṛbhiśvanaḥ nijaghantha hanvoḥ indra tanyatum
hradam na hi tvā nyṛṣanti ūrmayaḥ brahmāṇi indra tava yāni vardhanā
tvaṣṭā cit te yujyam vāvṛdhe śavaḥ tatakṣa vajram abhibhūti ojasam
jaghanvāṁ u haribhiḥ sambhṛta krato indra vṛtram manuṣe gātuyan apaḥ
ayacchathāḥ bāhvoḥ vajram āyasam adhārayaḥ divi ā sūryam dṛśe
bṛhat svaścandram amavat yat ukthyam akṛṇvata bhiyasā rohaṇam divaḥ
yat mānuṣa pradhanāḥ indram ūtayaḥ svar nṛṣācaḥ marutaḥ amadan anu
dyauḥ cit asya amavāṁ aheḥ svanāt ayoyavīt bhiyasā vajre indra te
vṛtrasya yat badbadhānasya rodasī made sutasya śavasā abhinat śiraḥ
yat id nu indra pṛthivī daśabhujiḥ ahāni viśvā tatananta kṛṣṭayaḥ
atrā ha te maghavan viśrutam sahaḥ dyām anu śavasā barhaṇā bhuvat
tvam asya pāre rajasaḥ vyomanaḥ sva bhūti ojāḥ avase dhṛṣat manaḥ
cakṛṣe bhūmim pratimānam ojasaḥ apaḥ svar paribhūḥ eṣi ā divam
tvam bhuvaḥ pratimānam pṛthivyāḥ ṛṣva vīrasya bṛhataḥ patiḥ bhūḥ
viśvam āprāḥ antarikṣam mahitvā satyam addhā nakir anyaḥ tvāvān
na yasya dyāvāpṛthivī anu vyacaḥ na sindhavaḥ rajasaḥ antam ānaśuḥ
na uta sva vṛṣṭim made asya yudhyataḥ ekaḥ anyat cakṛṣe viśvam ānuṣak
ārcan atra marutaḥ sasmin ājau viśve devāsaḥ amadan anu tvā
vṛtrasya yat bhṛṣṭimatā vadhena ni tvam indra prati ānam jaghantha
ni ū ṣu vācam pra mahe bharāmahe giraḥ indrāya sadane vivasvataḥ
nū cit hi ratnam sasatām iva avidat na duṣṭutiḥ draviṇaḥ deṣu śasyate
duraḥ aśvasya duraḥ indra goḥ asi duraḥ yavasya vasunaḥ inas patiḥ
śikṣā naraḥ pradivaḥ a kāma karśanaḥ sakhā sakhibhyaḥ tam idam gṛṇīmasi
śacīvas indra puru kṛt dyumattama tava id idam abhitas cekite vasu
atas saṃgṛbhya abhibhūtaḥ ā bhara mā tvāyataḥ jarituḥ kāmam ūnayīḥ
ebhiḥ dyubhiḥ sumanāḥ ebhiḥ indubhiḥ nirundhānaḥ amatim gobhiḥ aśvinā
indreṇa dasyum darayantaḥ indubhiḥ yuta dveṣasaḥ sam iṣā rabhemahi
sam indra rāyā sam iṣā rabhemahi sam vājebhiḥ puru ścandraiḥ abhidyubhiḥ
sam devyā pramatyā vīra śuṣmayā go agrayā aśvāvatyā rabhemahi
te tvā madāḥ amadan tāni vṛṣṇyā te somāsaḥ vṛtra hatyeṣu satpate
yat kārave daśa vṛtrāṇi aprati barhiṣmate ni sahasrāṇi barhayaḥ
yudhā yudham upa gha id eṣi dhṛṣṇuyā purā puram sam idam haṃsi ojasā
namyā yat indra sakhyā parāvati nibarhayaḥ namucim nāma māyinam
tvam karañjam uta parṇayam vadhīḥ tejiṣṭhayā atithigvasya vartanī
tvam śatā vaṅgṛdasya abhinat puraḥ anānudaḥ pariṣūtāḥ ṛjiśvanā
tvam etān jana rājñaḥ dvis daśa abandhunā suśravasā upajagmuṣaḥ
ṣaṣṭim sahasrā navatim nava śrutaḥ ni cakreṇa rathyā duṣpadā avṛṇak
tvam āvitha suśravasam tava ūtibhiḥ tava trāmabhiḥ indra tūrvayāṇam
tvam asmai kutsam atithigvam āyum mahe rājñe yūne arandhanāyaḥ
ye udṛci indra deva gopāḥ sakhāyaḥ te śivatamāḥ asāma
tvām stoṣāma tvayā su vīrāḥ drāghīyaḥ āyuḥ prataram dadhānāḥ
mā naḥ asmin maghavan pṛtsu aṃhasi nahi te antaḥ śavasaḥ parīṇaśe
akrandayaḥ nadyaḥ roruvat vanā kathā na kṣoṇīḥ bhiyasā sam ārata
arcā śakrāya śākine śacīvate śṛṇvantam indram mahayan abhi ṣṭuhi
yaḥ dhṛṣṇunā śavasā rodasī ubhe vṛṣā vṛṣa tvā vṛṣabhaḥ nyṛñjate
arcā dive bṛhate śūṣyam vacaḥ svakṣatram yasya dhṛṣataḥ dhṛṣat manaḥ
bṛhat śravāḥ asuraḥ barhaṇā kṛtaḥ puras haribhyām vṛṣabhaḥ rathaḥ hi ṣaḥ
tvam divaḥ bṛhataḥ sānu kopayaḥ ava tmanā dhṛṣatā śambaram bhinat
yat māyinaḥ vrandinaḥ mandinā dhṛṣat śitām gabhastim aśanim pṛtanyasi
ni yat vṛṇakṣi śvasanasya mūrdhani śuṣṇasya cit vrandinaḥ roruvat vanā
prācīnena manasā barhaṇāvatā yat adyā cit kṛṇavaḥ kaḥ tvā pari
tvam āvitha naryam turvaśam yadum tvam turvītim vayyam śatakrato
tvam ratham etaśam kṛtvye dhane tvam puraḥ navatim dambhayaḥ nava
sa ghā rājā sat patiḥ śūśuvat janaḥ rāta havyaḥ prati yaḥ śāsam invati
ukthā vā yaḥ abhigṛṇāti rādhasā dānuḥ asmai uparā pinvate divaḥ
asamam kṣatram asamā manīṣā pra soma pāḥ apasā santu neme
ye te indra daduṣaḥ vardhayanti mahi kṣatram sthaviram vṛṣṇyam ca
tubhya id ete bahulāḥ adri dugdhāḥ camūṣadaḥ camasāḥ indra pānāḥ
vi aśnuhi tarpaya kāmam eṣām athā manaḥ vasu deyāya kṛṣva
apām atiṣṭhat dharuṇahvaram tamaḥ antar vṛtrasya jaṭhareṣu parvataḥ
abhi īm indraḥ nadyaḥ vavriṇā hitāḥ viśvāḥ anuṣṭhāḥ pravaṇeṣu jighnate
sa śevṛdham adhi dhāḥ dyumnam asme mahi kṣatram janāṣāh indra tavyam
rakṣā ca naḥ maghonaḥ pāhi sūrīn rāye ca naḥ su apatyā iṣe dhāḥ
divaḥ cit asya varimā vi paprathe indram na mahnā pṛthivī cana prati
bhīmaḥ tuviṣmān carṣaṇibhyaḥ ātapaḥ śiśīte vajram tejase na vaṃsagaḥ
saḥ arṇavaḥ na nadyaḥ samudriyaḥ prati gṛbhṇāti viśritāḥ varīmabhiḥ
indraḥ somasya pītaye vṛṣāyate sanāt sa yudhmaḥ ojasā panasyate
tvam tam indra parvatam na bhojase mahaḥ nṛmṇasya dharmaṇām irajyasi
pra vīryeṇa devatāti cekite viśvasmai ugraḥ karmaṇe purohitaḥ
saḥ id vane namasyubhiḥ vacasyate cāru janeṣu prabruvāṇaḥ indriyam
vṛṣā chanduḥ bhavati haryataḥ vṛṣā kṣemeṇa dhenām maghavā yat invati
saḥ id mahāni samithāni majmanā kṛṇoti yudhmaḥ ojasā janebhyaḥ
adhā cana śraddadhati tviṣīmate indrāya vajram nighanighnate vadham
sa hi śravasyuḥ sadanāni kṛtrimā kṣmayā vṛdhānaḥ ojasā vināśayan
jyotīṃṣi kṛṇvan avṛkāṇi yajyave ava su kratuḥ sartavai apaḥ sṛjat
dānāya manaḥ soma pāvan astu te arvāñcā harī vandana śrut ā kṛdhi
yamiṣṭhāsaḥ sārathayaḥ ye indra te na tvā ketāḥ ā dabhnuvanti bhūrṇayaḥ
a prakṣitam vasu bibharṣi hastayoḥ a ṣāḍham sahaḥ tanvi śrutaḥ dadhe
āvṛtāsaḥ avatāsaḥ na kartṛbhiḥ tanūṣu te kratavaḥ indra bhūrayaḥ
eṣa pra pūrvīḥ ava tasya camriṣaḥ atyaḥ na yoṣām ud ayaṃsta bhurvaṇiḥ
dakṣam mahe pāyayate hiraṇyayam ratham āvṛtyā hari yogam ṛbhvasam
tam gūrtayaḥ nemanniṣaḥ parīṇasaḥ samudram na saṃcaraṇe saniṣyavaḥ
patim dakṣasya vidathasya nū sahaḥ girim na venāḥ adhi roha tejasā
sa turvaṇiḥ mahāṁ areṇu pauṃsye gireḥ bhṛṣṭiḥ na bhrājate tujā śavaḥ
yena śuṣṇam māyinam āyasaḥ made dudhraḥ ābhūṣu rāmayan ni dāmani
devī yadi taviṣī tvāvṛdhā ūtaye indram siṣakti uṣasam na sūryaḥ
yaḥ dhṛṣṇunā śavasā bādhate tamaḥ iyarti reṇum bṛhat arhariṣvaṇiḥ
vi yat tiras dharuṇam acyutam rajaḥ atiṣṭhipaḥ divaḥ ātāsu barhaṇā
svar mīḍhe yat made indra harṣya ahan vṛtram niḥ apām aubjaḥ arṇavam
tvam divaḥ dharuṇam dhiṣe ojasā pṛthivyāḥ indra sadaneṣu māhinaḥ
tvam sutasya made ariṇāḥ apaḥ vi vṛtrasya samayā pāṣyā arujaḥ
pra maṃhiṣṭhāya bṛhate bṛhadraye satya śuṣmāya tavase matim bhare
apām iva pravaṇe yasya durdharam rādhaḥ viśvāyu śavase apāvṛtam
adha te viśvam anu ha asat iṣṭaye āpaḥ nimnā iva savanā haviṣmataḥ
yat parvate na samaśīta haryataḥ indrasya vajraḥ śnathitā hiraṇyayaḥ
asmai bhīmāya namasā sam adhvare uṣaḥ na śubhraḥ ā bhara panīyase
yasya dhāma śravase nāma indriyam jyotiḥ akāri haritaḥ na ayase
ime te indra te vayam puruṣṭuta ye tvā ārabhya carāmasi prabhūvaso
nahi tvat anyaḥ girvaṇaḥ giraḥ saghat kṣoṇīḥ iva prati naḥ harya tat vacaḥ
bhūri te indra vīryam tava smasi asya stotuḥ maghavan kāmam ā pṛṇa
anu te dyauḥ bṛhatī vīryam mame iyam ca te pṛthivī neme ojase
tvam tam indra parvatam mahāṁ urum vajreṇa vajrin parvaśas cakartitha
avāsṛjaḥ nivṛtāḥ sartavai apaḥ satrā viśvam dadhiṣe kevalam sahaḥ
nū cit sahaḥ jāḥ amṛtaḥ ni tundate hotā yat dūtaḥ abhavat vivasvataḥ
vi sādhiṣṭhebhiḥ pathibhiḥ rajaḥ mame ā devatātā haviṣā vivāsati
ā svam adma yuvamānaḥ ajaraḥ tṛṣū aviṣyan ataseṣu tiṣṭhati
atyaḥ na pṛṣṭham pruṣitasya rocate divaḥ na sānu stanayan acikradat
krāṇā rudrebhiḥ vasubhiḥ purohitaḥ hotā niṣattaḥ rayiṣāh amartyaḥ
rathaḥ na vikṣu ṛñjasānaḥ āyuṣu vi ānuṣak vāryā devaḥ ṛṇvati
vi vāta jūtaḥ ataseṣu tiṣṭhate vṛthā juhūbhiḥ sṛṇyā tuviṣvaṇiḥ
tṛṣu yat agne vaninaḥ vṛṣāyase kṛṣṇam te ema ruśat ūrme ajara
tapuḥ jambhaḥ vane ā vāta coditaḥ yūthe na sāhvāṁ ava vāti vaṃsagaḥ
abhivrajan akṣitam pājasā raja sthātuḥ caratham bhayate patatriṇaḥ
dadhuḥ ṭvā bhṛgavaḥ mānuṣeṣu ā rayim na cārum su havam janebhyaḥ
hotāram agne atithim vareṇyam mitram na śevam divyāya janmane
hotāram sapta juhvaḥ yajiṣṭham yam vāghataḥ vṛṇate adhvareṣu
agnim viśveṣām aratim vasūnām saparyāmi prayasā yāmi ratnam
acchidrā sūno sahasaḥ naḥ adya stotṛbhyaḥ mitra mahas śarma yaccha
agne gṛṇantam aṃhasaḥ uruṣyā ūrjaḥ napāt pūrbhiḥ āyasībhiḥ
bhava varūtham gṛṇate vibhāvaḥ bhavā maghavan maghavadbhyaḥ śarma
uruṣya agne aṃhasaḥ gṛṇantam prātar makṣū dhiyāvasuḥ jagamyāt
vayāḥ id agne agnayaḥ te anye tve viśve amṛtāḥ mādayante
vaiśvānara nābhiḥ asi kṣitīnām sthūṇā iva janāṁ upamit yayantha
mūrdhā divaḥ nābhiḥ agniḥ pṛthivyāḥ athā bhavat aratiḥ rodasyoḥ
tam tvā devāsaḥ ajanayanta devam vaiśvānara jyotiḥ id āryāya
ā sūrye na raśmayaḥ dhruvāsaḥ vaiśvānare dadhire agnā vasūni
yā parvateṣu oṣadhīṣu apsu yā mānuṣeṣu asi tasya rājā
bṛhatī iva sūnave rodasī giraḥ hotā manuṣyaḥ na dakṣaḥ
svarvate satya śuṣmāya pūrvīḥ vaiśvānarāya nṛtamāya yahvīḥ
divaḥ cit te bṛhataḥ jātavedaḥ vaiśvānara pra ririce mahi tvam
rājā kṛṣṭīnām asi mānuṣīṇām yudhā devebhyaḥ varivaḥ cakartha
pra nū mahi tvam vṛṣabhasya vocam yam pūravaḥ vṛtra haṇam sacante
vaiśvānaraḥ dasyum agniḥ jaghanvāṁ adhūnot kāṣṭhāḥ ava śambaram bhet
vaiśvānaraḥ mahimnā viśva kṛṣṭiḥ bharadvājeṣu yajataḥ vibhāvā
śātavaneye śatinībhiḥ agniḥ puruṇīthe jarate sūnṛtāvān
vahnim yaśasam vidathasya ketum suprāvyam dūtam sadyoartham
dvijanmānam rayim iva praśastam rātim bharat bhṛgave mātariśvā
asya śāsuḥ ubhayāsaḥ sacante haviṣmantaḥ uśijaḥ ye ca martāḥ
divaḥ cit pūrvaḥ ni asādi hotā āpṛcchyaḥ viśpatiḥ vikṣu vedhāḥ
tam navyasī hṛdaḥ ā jāyamānam asmat su kīrtiḥ madhu jihvam aśyāḥ
yam ṛtvijaḥ vṛjane mānuṣāsaḥ prayasvantaḥ āyavaḥ jījananta
uśij pāvakaḥ vasuḥ mānuṣeṣu vareṇyaḥ hotā adhāyi vikṣu
damūnāḥ gṛhapatiḥ dame ām agniḥ bhuvat rayi patiḥ rayīṇām
tam tvā vayam patim agne rayīṇām pra śaṃsāmaḥ matibhiḥ gotamāsaḥ
āśum na vājambharam marjayantaḥ prātar makṣū dhiyāvasuḥ jagamyāt
asmai id u pra tavase turāya prayaḥ na harmi stomam māhināya
ṛcīṣamāya adhrigave oham indrāya brahmāṇi rātatamā
asmai id u prayaḥ iva pra yaṃsi bharāmi āṅgūṣam bādhe suvṛkti
indrāya hṛdā manasā manīṣā pratnāya patye dhiyaḥ marjayanta
asmai id u tyam upamam svarṣām bharāmi āṅgūṣam āsyena
maṃhiṣṭham acchoktibhiḥ matīnām suvṛktibhiḥ sūrim vāvṛdhadhyai
asmai id u stomam sam hinomi ratham na taṣṭā iva tatsināya
giraḥ ca girvāhase suvṛktī indrāya viśvaminvam medhirāya
asmai id u saptim iva śravasyā indrāya arkam juhvā sam añje
vīram dāna okasam vandadhyai purām gūrta śravasam darmāṇam
asmai id u tvaṣṭā takṣat vajram su apastamam svaryam raṇāya
vṛtrasya cit vidat yena marma tujan īśānaḥ tujatā kiyedhāḥ
asya id u mātuḥ savaneṣu sadyas mahaḥ pitum papivān cārū annā
muṣāyat viṣṇuḥ pacatam sahīyān vidhyat varāham tiras adrim astā
asmai id u gnāḥ cit deva patnīḥ indrāya arkam ahi hatye ūvuḥ
pari dyāvāpṛthivī jabhre urvī na asya te mahimānam pari staḥ
asya id eva pra ririce mahi tvam divaḥ pṛthivyāḥ pari antarikṣāt
svarāj indraḥ dame ā viśva gūrtaḥ svariḥ amatraḥ vavakṣe raṇāya
asya id eva śavasā śuṣantam vi vṛścat vajreṇa vṛtram indraḥ
gāḥ na vrāṇāḥ avanīḥ amuñcat abhi śravaḥ dāvane sacetāḥ
asya id u tveṣasā ranta sindhavaḥ pari yat vajreṇa sīm ayacchat
īśāna kṛt dāśuṣe daśasyan turvītaye gādham turvaṇiḥ kaḥ
asmai id u pra bhara tūtujānaḥ vṛtrāya vajram īśānaḥ kiyedhāḥ
goḥ na parva vi rada tiraścā iṣyan arṇāṃsi apām caradhyai
asya id u pra brūhi pūrvyāṇi turasya karmāṇi navyaḥ ukthaiḥ
yudhe yat iṣṇānaḥ āyudhāni ṛghāyamāṇaḥ niriṇāti śatrūn
asya id u bhiyā girayaḥ ca dṛḍhāḥ dyāvā ca bhūmā januṣaḥ tujete
upa u venasya joguvānaḥ oṇim sadyas bhuvat vīryāya nodhāḥ
asmai id u tyad anu dāyi eṣām ekaḥ yat vavne bhūreḥ īśānaḥ
pra etaśam sūrye paspṛdhānam sauvaśvye suṣvim āvat indraḥ
evā te hāriyojanā suvṛktī indra brahmāṇi gotamāsaḥ akran
ā eṣu viśva peśasam dhiyam dhāḥ prātar makṣū dhiyāvasuḥ jagamyāt
pra manmahe śavasānāya śūṣam āṅgūṣam girvaṇase aṅgirasvat
suvṛktibhi stuvate ṛgmiyāya ārcāma arkam nare viśrutāya
pra vaḥ mahe mahi namaḥ bharadhvam āṅgūṣyam śavasānāya sāma
yenā naḥ pūrve pitaraḥ pada jñāḥ arcantaḥ aṅgirasaḥ gāḥ avindan
indrasya aṅgirasām ca iṣṭau vidat saramā tanayāya dhāsim
bṛhaspatiḥ bhinat adrim vidat gāḥ sam usriyābhiḥ vāvaśanta naraḥ
sa suṣṭubhā sa stubhā sapta vipraiḥ svareṇa adrim svaryaḥ navagvaiḥ
saraṇyubhiḥ phaligam indra śakra valam raveṇa darayaḥ daśagvaiḥ
gṛṇānaḥ aṅgirobhiḥ dasma vi var uṣasā sūryeṇa gobhiḥ andhaḥ
vi bhūmyāḥ aprathayaḥ indra sānu divaḥ rajaḥ uparam astabhāyaḥ
tat u prayakṣatamam asya karma dasmasya cārutamam asti daṃsaḥ
upahvare yat uparāḥ apinvat madhu arṇasaḥ nadyaḥ catasraḥ
dvitā vi vavre sanajā sanīḍe ayāsya stavamānebhiḥ arkaiḥ
bhagaḥ na mene parame vyoman adhārayat rodasī su daṃsāḥ
sanāt divam pari bhūmā virūpe punarbhuvā yuvatī svebhiḥ evaiḥ
kṛṣṇebhiḥ aktā uṣāḥ ruśadbhiḥ vapurbhiḥ ā carataḥ anyā anyā
sanemi sakhyam svapasyamānaḥ sūnuḥ dādhāra śavasā su daṃsāḥ
āmāsu cit dadhiṣe pakvam antar payaḥ kṛṣṇāsu ruśat rohiṇīṣu
sanāt sanīḍāḥ avanīḥ a vātāḥ vratā rakṣante amṛtāḥ sahobhiḥ
purū sahasrā janayaḥ na patnīḥ duvasyanti svasāraḥ ahrayāṇam
sanāyuvaḥ namasā navyaḥ arkaiḥ vasūyavaḥ matayaḥ dasma dadruḥ
patim na patnīḥ uśatīḥ uśantam spṛśanti tvā śavasāvat manīṣāḥ
sanāt eva tava rāyaḥ gabhastau na kṣīyante na upa dasyanti dasma
dyumāṁ asi kratumāṁ indra dhīraḥ śikṣā śacīvas tava naḥ śacībhiḥ
sanāyate gotamaḥ indra navyam atakṣat brahma hariyojanāya
su nīthāya naḥ śavasāna nodhāḥ prātar makṣū dhiyāvasuḥ jagamyāt
tvam mahāṁ indra yaḥ ha śuṣmaiḥ dyāvā jajñānaḥ pṛthivī ame dhāḥ
yat ha te viśvā girayaḥ cit abhvā bhiyā dṛḍhāsaḥ kiraṇāḥ na aijan
ā yat harī indra vivratā veḥ ā te vajram jaritā bāhvoḥ dhāt
yena a viharyata krato amitrān puraḥ iṣṇāsi puruhūta pūrvīḥ
tvam satyaḥ indra dhṛṣṇuḥ etān tvam ṛbhukṣāḥ naryaḥ tvam ṣāṭ
tvam śuṣṇam vṛjane pṛkṣe āṇau yūne kutsāya dyumate sacā ahan
tvam ha tyad indra codīḥ sakhā vṛtram yat vajrin vṛṣa karman ubhnāḥ
yat ha śūra vṛṣamaṇaḥ parācais vi dasyūṃr yonau akṛtaḥ vṛthā aṣāṭ
tvam ha tyad indra a riṣaṇyan dṛḍhasya cit martānām ajuṣṭau
vi asmat ā kāṣṭhāḥ arvate var ghanā iva vajrin śnathihi amitrān
tvām ha tyad indra arṇa sātau svar mīḍhe naraḥ ājā havante
tava svadhāvas iyam ā samarye ūtiḥ vājeṣu atasāyyā bhūt
tvam ha tyad indra sapta yudhyan puraḥ vajrin purukutsāya dardar
barhiḥ na yat sudāse vṛthā vark aṃhaḥ rājan varivaḥ pūrave kaḥ
tvam tyām naḥ indra deva citrām iṣam āpaḥ na pīpayaḥ parijman
yayā śūra prati asmabhyam yaṃsi tmanam ūrjam na viśvadha kṣaradhyai
akāri te indra gotamebhiḥ brahmāṇi oktā namasā haribhyām
su peśasam vājam ā bhara naḥ prātar makṣū dhiyāvasuḥ jagamyāt
vṛṣṇe śardhāya su makhāya vedhase nodhaḥ suvṛktim pra bhara marudbhyaḥ
apaḥ na dhīraḥ manasā suhastyaḥ giraḥ sam añje vidatheṣu ābhuvaḥ
te jajñire divaḥ ṛṣvāsaḥ ukṣaṇaḥ rudrasya maryāḥ asurāḥ arepasaḥ
pāvakāsaḥ śucayaḥ sūryāḥ iva satvānaḥ na drapsinaḥ ghora varpasaḥ
yuvānaḥ rudrāḥ ajarāḥ abhoj hanaḥ vavakṣuḥ adhrigāvaḥ parvatāḥ iva
dṛḍhā cit viśvā bhuvanāni pārthivā pra cyāvayanti divyāni majmanā
citraiḥ añjibhiḥ vapuṣe vi añjate vakṣassu rukmāṁ adhi yetire śubhe
aṃseṣu eṣām ni mimṛkṣuḥ ṛṣṭayaḥ sākam jajñire svadhayā divaḥ naraḥ
īśāna kṛtaḥ dhunayaḥ riśādasaḥ vātān vidyutaḥ taviṣībhiḥ akrata
duhanti ūdhar divyāni dhūtayaḥ bhūmim pinvanti payasā parijrayaḥ
pinvanti apaḥ marutaḥ sudānavaḥ payaḥ ghṛtavat vidatheṣu ābhuvaḥ
atyam na mihe vi nayanti vājinam utsam duhanti stanayantam a kṣitam
mahiṣāsaḥ māyinaḥ citra bhānavaḥ girayaḥ na sva tavasaḥ raghuṣyadaḥ
mṛgāḥ iva hastinaḥ khādathā vanā yat āruṇīṣu taviṣīḥ ayugdhvam
siṃhāḥ iva nānadati pracetasaḥ piśāḥ iva supiśaḥ viśva vedasaḥ
kṣapaḥ jinvantaḥ pṛṣatībhiḥ ṛṣṭibhiḥ sam id sabādhaḥ śavasā ahi manyavaḥ
rodasī ā vadata gaṇa śriyaḥ nṛṣācaḥ śūrāḥ śavasā ahi manyavaḥ
ā vandhureṣu amatiḥ na darśatā vidyut na tasthau marutaḥ ratheṣu vaḥ
viśva vedasaḥ rayibhiḥ samokasaḥ sammiślāsaḥ taviṣībhiḥ virapśinaḥ
astāraḥ iṣum dadhire gabhastyoḥ ananta śuṣmāḥ vṛṣa khādayaḥ naraḥ
hiraṇyayebhiḥ pavibhiḥ payaḥ vṛdhaḥ ujjighnantaḥ āpathyaḥ na parvatān
makhāḥ ayāsaḥ svasṛtaḥ dhruva cyutaḥ dudhra kṛtaḥ marutaḥ bhrājat ṛṣṭayaḥ
ghṛṣum pāvakam vaninam vicarṣaṇim rudrasya sūnum havasā gṛṇīmasi
rajasturam tavasam mārutam gaṇam ṛjīṣiṇam vṛṣaṇam saścata śriye
pra nu sa martaḥ śavasā janāṁ ati tasthau vaḥ ūtī marutaḥ yam āvata
arvadbhiḥ vājam bharate dhanā nṛbhiḥ āpṛcchyam kratum ā kṣeti puṣyati
carkṛtyam marutaḥ pṛtsu duṣṭaram dyumantam śuṣmam maghavatsu dhattana
dhana spṛtam ukthyam viśvacarṣaṇim tokam puṣyema tanayam śatam himāḥ
nu ṣṭhiram marutaḥ vīravantam ṛtīṣāham rayim asmāsu dhatta
sahasriṇam śatinam śūśuvāṃsam prātar makṣū dhiyāvasuḥ jagamyāt
paśvā na tāyum guhā catantam namaḥ yujānam namaḥ vahantam
sa joṣāḥ dhīrāḥ padaiḥ anu gman upa tvā sīdan viśve yajatrāḥ
ṛtasya devāḥ anu vratā guḥ bhuvat pariṣṭiḥ dyauḥ na bhūma
vardhanti īm āpaḥ panvā suśiśvim ṛtasya yonā garbhe su jātam
puṣṭiḥ na raṇvā kṣitiḥ na pṛthvī giriḥ na bhujma kṣodaḥ na śambhu
atyaḥ na ajman sarga prataktaḥ sindhuḥ na kṣodaḥ kaḥ īm varāte
jāmiḥ sindhūnām bhrātā iva svasrām ibhyān na rājā vanāni atti
yat vāta jūtaḥ vanā vi asthāt agniḥ ha dāti romā pṛthivyāḥ
śvasiti apsu haṃsaḥ na sīdan kratvā cetiṣṭhaḥ viśām uṣarbhut
somaḥ na vedhāḥ ṛta prajātaḥ paśuḥ na śiśvā vibhuḥ dūrebhāḥ
rayiḥ na citrā sūraḥ na saṃdṛś āyuḥ na prāṇaḥ nityaḥ na sūnuḥ
takvā na bhūrṇiḥ vanā siṣakti payaḥ na dhenuḥ śuciḥ vibhāvā
dādhāra kṣemam okaḥ na raṇvaḥ yavaḥ na pakvaḥ jetā janānām
ṛṣiḥ na stubhvā vikṣu praśastaḥ vājī na prītaḥ vayaḥ dadhāti
duroka śociḥ kratuḥ na nityaḥ jāyā iva yonau aram viśvasmai
citraḥ yat abhrāṭ chvetaḥ na vikṣu rathaḥ na rukmī tveṣaḥ samatsu
senā iva sṛṣṭā amam dadhāti astuḥ na didyut tveṣa pratīkā
yamaḥ ha jātaḥ yamaḥ janitvam jāraḥ kanīnām patiḥ janīnām
tam vaḥ carāthā vayam vasatyā astam na gāvaḥ nakṣante iddham
sindhuḥ na kṣodaḥ pra nīcīḥ ainot navanta gāvaḥ svar dṛśīke
vaneṣu jāyuḥ marteṣu mitraḥ vṛṇīte śruṣṭim rājā iva ajuryam
kṣemaḥ na sādhuḥ kratuḥ na bhadraḥ bhuvat svādhīḥ hotā havyavāṭ
haste dadhānaḥ nṛmṇā viśvāni ame devān dhāt guhā niṣīdan
vidanti īm atra naraḥ dhiyaṃdhāḥ hṛdā yat taṣṭān mantrāṁ aśaṃsan
ajaḥ na kṣām dādhāra pṛthivīm tastambha dyām mantrebhiḥ satyaiḥ
priyā padāni paśvaḥ ni pāhi viśvāyuḥ agne guhā guham gāḥ
yaḥ īm ciketa guhā bhavantam ā yaḥ sasāda dhārām ṛtasya
vi ye cṛtanti ṛtā sapantaḥ āt id vasūni pra vavāca asmai
vi yaḥ vīrutsu rodhan mahi tvā uta prajāḥ uta prasūṣu antar
cittiḥ apām dame viśvāyuḥ sadma iva dhīrāḥ saṃmāya cakruḥ
śrīṇan upa sthāt divam bhuraṇyu sthātuḥ caratham aktūn vi ūrṇot
pari yat eṣām ekaḥ viśveṣām bhuvat devaḥ devānām mahi tvā
āt id te viśve kratum juṣanta śuṣkāt yat deva jīvaḥ janiṣṭhāḥ
bhajanta viśve deva tvam nāma ṛtam sapantaḥ amṛtam evaiḥ
ṛtasya preṣāḥ ṛtasya dhītiḥ viśva āyuḥ viśve apāṃsi cakruḥ
yaḥ tubhyam dāśāt yaḥ vā te śikṣāt tasmai cikitvān rayim dayasva
hotā niṣattaḥ manoḥ apatye sa cit nu āsām patiḥ rayīṇām
icchanta retaḥ mithas tanūṣu sam jānata svaiḥ dakṣaiḥ amūrāḥ
pituḥ na putrāḥ kratum juṣanta śroṣan ye asya śāsam turāsaḥ
vi rāyaḥ aurṇot duraḥ purukṣuḥ pipeśa nākam stṛbhiḥ damūnāḥ
śukraḥ śuśukvāṁ uṣaḥ na jāraḥ paprā samīcī divaḥ na jyotiḥ
pari prajātaḥ kratvā babhūtha bhuvaḥ devānām pitā putraḥ san
vedhāḥ a dṛptaḥ agniḥ vijānan ūdhar na gonām svādmā pitūnām
jane na śevaḥ āhūryaḥ san madhye niṣattaḥ raṇvaḥ duroṇe
putraḥ na jātaḥ raṇvaḥ duroṇe vājī na prītaḥ viśaḥ vi tārīt
viśaḥ yat ahve nṛbhiḥ sanīḍāḥ agniḥ deva tvā viśvāni aśyāḥ
nakir ṭe etā vratā minanti nṛbhyaḥ yat ebhyaḥ śruṣṭim cakartha
tat tu te daṃsaḥ yat ahan samānaiḥ nṛbhiḥ yat yuktaḥ viveḥ rapāṃsi
uṣaḥ na jāraḥ vibhāvā usraḥ saṃjñāta rūpaḥ ciketat asmai
tmanā vahantaḥ duraḥ vi ṛṇvan navanta viśve svar dṛśīke
vanema pūrvīḥ aryaḥ manīṣāḥ agniḥ su śokaḥ viśvāni aśyāḥ
ā daivyāni vratā cikitvān ā mānuṣasya janasya janma
garbhaḥ yaḥ apām garbhaḥ vanānām garbhaḥ ca sthātām garbhaḥ carathām
adrau cit asmai antar duroṇe viśām na viśvaḥ amṛtaḥ svādhīḥ
sa hi kṣapāvāṁ agniḥ rayīṇām dāśat yaḥ asmai aram sūktaiḥ
etā cikitvaḥ bhūmā ni pāhi devānām janma martān ca vidvān
vardhān yam pūrvīḥ kṣapaḥ virūpā sthātuḥ ca ratham ṛta pravītam
arādhi hotā svar niṣattaḥ kṛṇvan viśvāni apāṃsi satyā
goṣu praśastim vaneṣu dhiṣe bharanta viśve balim svar ṇaḥ
vi tvā naraḥ purutrā saparyan pituḥ na jivreḥ vi vedaḥ bharanta
sādhuḥ na gṛdhnuḥ astā iva śūraḥ yātā iva bhīmaḥ tveṣaḥ samatsu
upa pra jinvan uśatīḥ uśantam patim na nityam janayaḥ sanīḍāḥ
svasāraḥ śyāvīm aruṣīm ajuṣran citram ucchantīm uṣasam na gāvaḥ
vīḍu cit dṛḍhā pitaraḥ naḥ ukthaiḥ adrim rujan aṅgirasaḥ raveṇa
cakruḥ divaḥ bṛhataḥ gātum asme ahar svar vividuḥ ketum usrāḥ
dadhan ṛtam dhanayan asya dhītim āt id aryaḥ didhiṣvaḥ vibhṛtrāḥ
a tṛṣyantīḥ apasaḥ yanti acchā devān janma prayasā vardhayantīḥ
mathīt yat īm vibhṛtaḥ mātariśvā gṛhe gṛhe śyetaḥ jenyaḥ bhūt
āt īm rājñe na sahīyase sacā san ā dūtyam bhṛgavāṇaḥ vivāya
mahe yat pitre īm rasam dive kaḥ ava tsarat pṛśanyaḥ cikitvān
sṛjat astā dhṛṣatā didyum asmai svāyām devaḥ duhitari tviṣim dhāt
sve ā yaḥ tubhyam dame ā vibhāti namaḥ vā dāśāt uśataḥ anu dyūn
vardha u agne vayaḥ asya dvibarhāḥ yāsat rāyā sa ratham yam junāsi
agnim viśvāḥ abhi pṛkṣaḥ sacante samudram na sravataḥ sapta yahvīḥ
na jāmibhiḥ vi cikite vayaḥ naḥ vidāḥ deveṣu pramatim cikitvān
ā yat iṣe nṛpatim tejaḥ ānaṭ śuci retaḥ niṣiktam dyauḥ abhīke
agniḥ śardham anavadyam yuvānam svādhyam janayat sūdayat ca
manaḥ na yaḥ adhvanaḥ sadyas eti ekaḥ satrā sūraḥ vasvaḥ īśe
rājānā mitrāvaruṇā su pāṇī goṣu priyam amṛtam rakṣamāṇā
mā naḥ agne sakhyā pitryāṇi pra marṣiṣṭhāḥ abhi viduṣ kaviḥ san
nabhaḥ na rūpam jarimā mināti purā tasyāḥ abhiśasteḥ adhīhi
ni kāvyā vedhasaḥ śaśvataḥ kaḥ haste dadhānaḥ naryā purūṇi
agniḥ bhuvat rayi patiḥ rayīṇām satrā cakrāṇaḥ amṛtāni viśvā
asme vatsam pari ṣantam na vindan icchantaḥ viśve amṛtāḥ amūrāḥ
śramayuvaḥ padavyaḥ dhiyandhāḥ tasthuḥ pade parame cāru agneḥ
tisraḥ yat agne śaradaḥ tvām id śucim ghṛtena śucayaḥ saparyān
nāmāni cit dadhire yajñiyāni asūdayanta tanvaḥ su jātāḥ
ā rodasī bṛhatī vevidānāḥ pra rudriyāḥ jabhrire yajñiyāsaḥ
vidat martaḥ nemadhitā cikitvān agnim pade parame tasthivāṃsam
saṃjānānāḥ upa sīdan abhijñu patnīvantaḥ namasyam namasyan
ririkvāṃsaḥ tanvaḥ kṛṇvata svāḥ sakhā sakhyuḥ nimiṣi rakṣamāṇāḥ
tris sapta yat guhyāni tve id padā avidan nihitā yajñiyāsaḥ
tebhiḥ rakṣante amṛtam sa joṣāḥ paśūn ca sthātṝn caratham ca pāhi
vidvāṁ agne vayunāni kṣitīnām vi ānuṣak churudhaḥ jīvase dhāḥ
antar vidvāṁ adhvanaḥ deva yānān atandraḥ dūtaḥ abhavaḥ haviḥ vāh
su ādhyaḥ divaḥ ā sapta yahvī rāyaḥ duraḥ vi ṛta jñāḥ ajānan
vidat gavyam saramā dṛḍham ūrvam yena ā nu kam mānuṣī bhojate viś
ā ye viśvā su apatyāni tasthuḥ kṛṇvānāsaḥ amṛta tvāya gātum
mahnā mahadbhiḥ pṛthivī vi tasthe mātā putraiḥ aditiḥ dhāyase veḥ
adhi śriyam ni dadhuḥ cārum asmin divaḥ yat akṣī amṛtāḥ akṛṇvan
adha kṣaranti sindhavaḥ na sṛṣṭāḥ pra nīcīḥ agne aruṣīḥ ajānan
rayiḥ na yaḥ pitṛ vittaḥ vayodhāḥ su praṇītiḥ cikituṣaḥ na śāsuḥ
syonaśīḥ atithiḥ na prīṇānaḥ hotā iva sadma vidhataḥ vi tārīt
devaḥ na yaḥ savitā satya manmā kratvā nipāti vṛjanāni viśvā
puru praśastaḥ amatiḥ na satyaḥ ātmā iva śevaḥ didhiṣāyyaḥ bhūt
devaḥ na yaḥ pṛthivīm viśvadhāyāḥ upakṣeti hita mitraḥ na rājā
puraḥsadaḥ śarma sadaḥ na vīrāḥ anavadyā pati juṣṭā iva nārī
tam tvā naraḥ dame ā nityam iddham agne sacanta kṣitiṣu dhruvāsu
adhi dyumnam ni dadhuḥ bhūri asmin bhavā viśvāyuḥ dharuṇaḥ rayīṇām
vi pṛkṣaḥ agne maghavānaḥ aśyuḥ vi sūrayaḥ dadataḥ viśvam āyuḥ
sanema vājam samitheṣu aryaḥ bhāgam deveṣu śravase dadhānāḥ
ṛtasya hi dhenavaḥ vāvaśānāḥ smadūdhnīḥ pīpayanta dyu bhaktāḥ
parāvataḥ sumatim bhikṣamāṇāḥ vi sindhavaḥ samayā sasruḥ adrim
tve agne sumatim bhikṣamāṇāḥ divi śravaḥ dadhire yajñiyāsaḥ
naktā ca cakruḥ uṣasā virūpe kṛṣṇam ca varṇam aruṇam ca sam dhuḥ
yān rāye martān suṣūdaḥ agne te syāma maghavānaḥ vayam ca
chāyā iva viśvam bhuvanam sisakṣi āpaprivān rodasī antarikṣam
arvadbhiḥ agne arvataḥ nṛbhiḥ nṝn vīraiḥ vīrān vanuyāmā tvotāḥ
īśānāsaḥ pitṛ vittasya rāyaḥ vi sūrayaḥ śata himā naḥ aśyuḥ
etā te agne ucathāni vedhaḥ juṣṭāni santu manase hṛde ca
śakema rāyaḥ su dhuraḥ yamam te adhi śravaḥ deva bhaktam dadhānāḥ
upaprayantaḥ adhvaram mantram vocema agnaye

kā te upetiḥ manasaḥ varāya bhuvat agne śantamā kā manīṣā
kaḥ vā yajñaiḥ pari dakṣam te āpa kena vā te manasā dāśema
ehi agne iha hotā ni ṣīda adabdhaḥ su puraetā bhavā naḥ
avatām tvā rodasī viśvaminve yajā mahe saumanasāya devān
pra su viśvān rakṣasaḥ dhakṣi agne bhava yajñānām abhiśasti pāvā
atha ā vaha soma patim haribhyām ātithyam asmai cakṛma su dāvne
prajāvatā vacasā vahniḥ āsā ca huve ni ca satsi iha devaiḥ
veṣi hotram uta potram yajatra bodhi prayantar janitar vasūnām
yathā viprasya manuṣaḥ havirbhiḥ devāṁ ayajaḥ kavibhiḥ kaviḥ san
evā hotar satyatara tvam adya agne mandrayā juhvā yajasva
kathā dāśema agnaye kā asmai deva juṣṭā ucyate bhāmine gīḥ
yaḥ martyeṣu amṛtaḥ ṛtāvā hotā yajiṣṭhaḥ id kṛṇoti devān
yaḥ adhvareṣu śantamaḥ ṛtāvā hotā tam ū namobhiḥ ā kṛṇudhvam
agniḥ yat veḥ martāya devān sa ca ā bodhāti manasā yajāti
sa hi kratuḥ sa maryaḥ sa sādhuḥ mitraḥ na bhūt adbhutasya rathīḥ
tam medheṣu prathamam devayantīḥ viśaḥ upa bruvate dasmam ārīḥ
sa naḥ nṛṇām nṛtamaḥ riśādāḥ agniḥ giraḥ avasā vetu dhītim
tanā ca ye maghavānaḥ śaviṣṭhāḥ vāja prasūtāḥ iṣayanta manma
evā agniḥ gotamebhiḥ ṛtāvā viprebhiḥ astoṣṭa jātavedāḥ

agnīṣomā yaḥ āhutim yaḥ vām dāśāt haviṣkṛtim

agnīṣomā ceti tat vīryam vām yat amuṣṇītam avasam paṇim gāḥ

asme balāni maghavatsu dhattam kṛṇutam naḥ adhvaram śruṣṭimantam
imam stomam arhate jātavedase ratham iva sam mahemā manīṣayā
bhadrā hi naḥ pramatiḥ asya saṃsadi agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
yasmai tvam āyajase sa sādhati anarvā kṣeti dadhate su vīryam
sa tūtāva nā enam aśnoti aṃhatiḥ agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
śakema tvā samidham sādhayā dhiyaḥ tve devāḥ haviḥ adanti āhutam
tvam ādityāṁ ā vaha tān hi uśmasi agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
bharāma idhmam kṛṇavāmā havīṃṣi te citayantaḥ parvaṇā parvaṇā vayam
jīvātave prataram sādhayā dhiyaḥ agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
viśām gopāḥ asya caranti jantavaḥ dvipad ca yat uta catuṣpad aktubhiḥ
citraḥ praketaḥ uṣasaḥ mahāṁ asi agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
tvam adhvaryuḥ uta hotā asi pūrvyaḥ praśāstā potā januṣā purohitaḥ
viśvā vidvāṁ ārtvijyā dhīra puṣyasi agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
yaḥ viśvatas su pratīkaḥ sadṛṅṅ asi dūre cit san taḍit iva ati rocase
rātryāḥ cit andhaḥ ati deva paśyasi agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
pūrvaḥ devāḥ bhavatu sunvataḥ rathaḥ asmākam śaṃsaḥ abhī astu dūḍhyaḥ
tat ā jānīta uta puṣyatā vacaḥ agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
vadhaiḥ duḥśaṃsāṁ apa dūḍhyaḥ jahi dūre vā ye anti vā kecid atriṇaḥ
athā yajñāya gṛṇate sugam kṛdhi agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
yat ayukthāḥ aruṣā rohitā rathe vāta jūtā vṛṣabhasya iva te ravaḥ
āt invasi vaninaḥ dhūma ketunā agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
adha svanāt uta bibhyuḥ patatriṇaḥ drapsāḥ yat te yavasādaḥ vi asthiran
sugam tat te tāvakebhyaḥ rathebhyaḥ agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
ayam mitrasya varuṇasya dhāyase _ marutām heḍaḥ adbhutaḥ
mṛḍā su naḥ bhūtu eṣām manaḥ punar agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
devaḥ devānām asi mitraḥ adbhutaḥ vasuḥ vasūnām asi cāruḥ adhvare
śarman syāma tava saprathastame agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
tat te bhadram yat samiddhaḥ sve dame soma āhutaḥ jarase mṛḍayattamaḥ
dadhāsi ratnam draviṇam ca dāśuṣe agne sakhye mā riṣāmā vayam tava
yasmai tvam su draviṇaḥ dadāśaḥ anāgāstvam adite sarvatātā
yam bhadreṇa śavasā codayāsi prajāvatā rādhasā te syāma
sa tvam agne saubhaga tvasya vidvān asmākam āyuḥ pra tira iha deva
tat naḥ mitraḥ varuṇaḥ māmahantām aditiḥ sindhuḥ pṛthivī uta dyauḥ
dve virūpe carataḥ su arthe anyā anyā vatsam upa dhāpayete
hariḥ anyasyām bhavati svadhāvān śukraḥ anyasyām dadṛśe su varcāḥ
daśa imam tvaṣṭuḥ janayanta garbham atandrāsaḥ yuvatayaḥ vibhṛtram
tigma anīkam sva yaśasam janeṣu virocamānam pari ṣīm nayanti
trīṇi jānā pari bhūṣanti asya samudre ekam divi ekam apsu
pūrvām anu pra diśam pārthivānām ṛtūn praśāsat vi dadhau anuṣṭhu
kaḥ imam vaḥ niṇyam ā ciketa vatsaḥ mātṝr janayata svadhābhiḥ
bahvīnām garbhaḥ apasām upasthāt mahān kaviḥ niḥ carati svadhāvān
āviṣṭyaḥ vardhate cāruḥ āsu jihmānām ūrdhvaḥ sva yaśāḥ upasthe
ubhe tvaṣṭuḥ bibhyatuḥ jāyamānāt pratīcī siṃham prati joṣayete
ubhe bhadre joṣayete na mene gāvaḥ na vāśrāḥ upa tasthuḥ evaiḥ
sa dakṣāṇām dakṣa patiḥ babhūva añjanti yam dakṣiṇatas havirbhiḥ
ud yaṃyamīti savitā iva bāhū ubhe sicau yatate bhīmaḥ ṛñjan
ud śukram atkam ajate simasmāt navā mātṛbhyaḥ vasanā jahāti
tveṣam rūpam kṛṇute uttaram yat saṃpṛñcānaḥ sadane gobhiḥ adbhiḥ
kaviḥ budhnam pari marmṛjyate dhīḥ sā devatātā samitiḥ babhūva
uru te jrayaḥ pari eti budhnam virocamānam mahiṣasya dhāma
viśvebhiḥ agne sva yaśobhiḥ iddhaḥ adabdhebhiḥ pāyubhiḥ pāhi asmān
dhanvan srotaḥ kṛṇute gātum ūrmim śukraiḥ ūrmibhiḥ abhi nakṣati kṣām
viśvā sanāni jaṭhareṣu dhatte antar navāsu carati prasūṣu
eva ā naḥ agne samidhā vṛdhānaḥ revat pāvaka śravase vi bhāhi
tat naḥ mitraḥ varuṇaḥ māmahantām aditiḥ sindhuḥ pṛthivī uta dyauḥ
sa pratnathā sahasā jāyamānaḥ sadyas kāvyāni baṭ adhatta viśvā
āpaḥ ca mitram dhiṣaṇā ca sādhan devāḥ agnim dhārayan draviṇaḥ dām
sa pūrvayā nividā kavya tā āyoḥ imāḥ prajāḥ ajanayat manūnām
vivasvatā cakṣasā dyām apaḥ ca devāḥ agnim dhārayan draviṇaḥ dām
tam īḍata prathamam yajñasādham viśaḥ ārīḥ āhutam ṛñjasānam
ūrjaḥ putram bharatam sṛpra dānum devāḥ agnim dhārayan draviṇaḥ dām
sa mātariśvā puru vāra puṣṭiḥ vidat gātum tanayāya svar vid
viśām gopāḥ janitā rodasyoḥ devāḥ agnim dhārayan draviṇaḥ dām
naktoṣāsāḥ varṇam _ dhāpayete śiśum ekam samīcī
dyāvākṣāmā rukmaḥ antar vi bhāti devāḥ agnim dhārayan draviṇaḥ dām
rāyaḥ budhnaḥ saṃgamanaḥ vasūnām yajñasya ketuḥ manma sādhanaḥ veḥ
amṛta tvam rakṣamāṇāsaḥ enam devāḥ agnim dhārayan draviṇaḥ dām
nū ca purā ca sadanam rayīṇām jātasya ca jāyamānasya ca kṣām
sataḥ ca gopām bhavataḥ ca bhūreḥ devāḥ agnim dhārayan draviṇaḥ dām
draviṇaḥ dāḥ draviṇasaḥ turasya draviṇaḥ dāḥ sa narasya pra yaṃsat
