nitye cit nu yam sadane jagṛbhre praśastibhiḥ dadhire yajñiyāsaḥ
pra sū nayanta gṛbhayantaḥ iṣṭau aśvāsaḥ na rathyaḥ rārahāṇāḥ
purūṇi dasmaḥ ni riṇāti jambhaiḥ āt rocate vane ā vibhāvā
āt asya vātaḥ anu vāti śociḥ astuḥ na śaryām asanām anu dyūn
na yam ripavaḥ na riṣaṇyavaḥ garbhe santam reṣaṇāḥ reṣayanti
andhāḥ apaśyāḥ na dabhan abhikhyā nityāsaḥ īm pretāraḥ arakṣan
mahaḥ sa rāyaḥ eṣate patiḥ dan inaḥ inasya vasunaḥ pade ā
upa dhrajantam adrayaḥ vidhan id
sa yaḥ vṛṣā narām na rodasyoḥ śravobhiḥ asti jīva pīta sargaḥ
pra yaḥ sasrāṇaḥ śiśrīta yonau
ā yaḥ puram nārmiṇīm adīdet atyaḥ kaviḥ nabhanyaḥ nā arvā
sūraḥ na rurukvān śata ātmā
abhi dvi janmā trī rocanāni viśvā rajāṃsi śuśucānaḥ asthāt
hotā yajiṣṭhaḥ apām sadhasthe
ayam sa hotā yaḥ dvijanmā viśvā dadhe vāryāṇi śravasyā
martaḥ yaḥ asmai sutukaḥ dadāśa
puru tvā dāśvān voce ariḥ agne tava svid ā
todasya iva śaraṇe ā mahasya
vi aninasya dhaninaḥ prahoṣe cit a raruṣaḥ
kadā cana prajigataḥ a devayoḥ
sa candraḥ vipra martyaḥ mahaḥ vrādhantamaḥ divi
pra pra id te agne vanuṣaḥ syāma
mitram na yam śimyā goṣu gavyavaḥ svādhyaḥ vidathe apsu jījanan
arejetām rodasī pājasā girā prati priyam yajatam januṣām avaḥ
yat ha tyad vām purumīﾱhasya sominaḥ pra mitrāsaḥ na dadhire su ābhuvaḥ
adha kratum vidatam gātum arcate uta śrutam vṛṣaṇā pastyāvataḥ
ā vām bhūṣan kṣitayaḥ janma rodasyoḥ pravācyam vṛṣaṇā dakṣase mahe
yat īm ṛtāya bharathaḥ yat arvate pra hotrayā śimyā vīthaḥ adhvaram
pra sā kṣitiḥ asura yā mahi priyaḥ ṛtāvānau ṛtam ā ghoṣathaḥ bṛhat
yuvam divaḥ bṛhataḥ dakṣam ābhuvam gām na dhuri upa yuñjāthe apaḥ
mahī atra mahinā vāram ṛṇvathaḥ areṇavaḥ tujaḥ ā sadman dhenavaḥ
svaranti tāḥ uparatāti sūryam ā nimrucaḥ uṣasaḥ takvavīḥ iva
ā vām ṛtāya keśinīḥ anūṣata mitra yatra varuṇa gātum arcathaḥ
ava tmanā sṛjatam pinvatam dhiyaḥ yuvam viprasya manmanām irajyathaḥ
yaḥ vām yajñaiḥ śaśamānaḥ ha dāśati kaviḥ hotā yajati manma sādhanaḥ
upa aha tam gacchathaḥ vīthaḥ adhvaram acchā giraḥ sumatim gantam asmayū
yuvām yajñaiḥ prathamā gobhiḥ añjataḥ ṛtāvānā manasaḥ na prayuktiṣu
bharanti vām manmanā saṃyatāḥ giraḥ a dṛpyatā manasā revat āśāthe
revat vayaḥ dadhāthe revat āśāthe narā māyābhiḥ itaūti māhinam
na vām dyāvaḥ ahabhiḥ na uta sindhavaḥ na deva tvam paṇayaḥ nā ānaśuḥ magham
yuvam vastrāṇi pīvasā vasāthe yuvoḥ acchidrāḥ mantavaḥ ha sargāḥ
avātiratam anṛtāni viśve ṛtena mitrāvaruṇā sacethe
etat cana tvaḥ vi ciketat eṣām satyaḥ mantraḥ kavi śastaḥ ṛghāvān
triraśrim hanti catur aśriḥ ugraḥ deva nidaḥ ha prathamāḥ ajūryan
a pād eti prathamā padvatīnām kaḥ tat vām mitrāvaruṇā ciketa
garbhaḥ bhāram bharati ā cit asya ṛtam piparti anṛtam ni tārīt
prayantam id pari jāram kanīnām paśyāmasi na upanipadyamānam
an avapṛgṇā vitatā vasānam priyam mitrasya varuṇasya dhāma
an aśvaḥ jātaḥ an abhīśuḥ arvā kanikradat patayat ūrdhva sānuḥ
acittam brahma jujuṣuḥ yuvānaḥ pra mitre dhāma varuṇe gṛṇantaḥ
ā dhenavaḥ māmateyam avantīḥ brahma priyam pīpayan sasmin ūdhan
pitvaḥ bhikṣeta vayunāni vidvān āsā āvivāsan aditim uruṣyet
ā vām mitrāvaruṇāḥ havya juṣṭim namasā devau avasā vavṛtyām
asmākam brahma pṛtanāsu sahyāḥ asmākam vṛṣṭiḥ divyā su pārā
yajāmahe vām mahaḥ sajoṣāḥ havyebhiḥ mitrāvaruṇā namobhiḥ
ghṛtaiḥ ghṛtasnū adha yat vām asme adhvaryavaḥ na dhītibhiḥ bharanti
prastutiḥ vām dhāma na prayuktiḥ ayāmi mitrāvaruṇā suvṛktiḥ
anakti yat vām vidatheṣu hotā sumnam vām sūriḥ vṛṣaṇau iyakṣan
pīpāya dhenuḥ aditiḥ ṛtāya janāya mitrāvaruṇā haviḥ de
hinoti yat vām vidathe saparyan sa rāta havyaḥ mānuṣaḥ na hotā
uta vām vikṣu madyāsu andhaḥ gāvaḥ āpaḥ ca pīpayanta devīḥ
uta u naḥ asya pūrvyaḥ patiḥ _ vītam pātam payasaḥ usriyāyāḥ
viṣṇoḥ nu kam vīryāṇi pra vocam yaḥ pārthivāni vimame rajāṃsi
yaḥ askabhāyat uttaram sadhastham vicakramāṇaḥ tredhā uru gāyaḥ
pra tat viṣṇuḥ stavate vīryeṇa mṛgaḥ na bhīmaḥ kucaraḥ giriṣṭhāḥ
yasya uruṣu triṣu vikramaṇeṣu adhikṣiyanti bhuvanāni viśvā
pra viṣṇave śūṣam etu manma giri kṣite uru gāyāya vṛṣṇe
yaḥ idam dīrgham prayatam sadhastham ekaḥ vimame tribhiḥ id padebhiḥ
yasya trī pūrṇā madhunā padāni a kṣīyamāṇā svadhayā madanti
ye u tridhātu pṛthivīm uta dyām ekaḥ dādhāra bhuvanāni viśvā
tat asya priyam abhi pāthaḥ aśyām naraḥ yatra devayavaḥ madanti
urukramasya sa hi bandhuḥ itthā viṣṇoḥ pade parame madhvaḥ utsaḥ
tā vām vāstūni uśmasi gamadhyai yatra gāvaḥ bhūri śṛṅgāḥ ayāsaḥ
atra aha tat uru gāyasya vṛṣṇaḥ paramam padam ava bhāti bhūri
pra vaḥ _ andhasaḥ dhiyāyate mahe śūrāya viṣṇave ca arcata
yā sānuni parvatānām adābhyā mahaḥ tasthatuḥ arvatā iva sādhunā
tveṣam itthā samaraṇam śimīvatoḥ indrāviṣṇū suta pā vām uruṣyati
yā martyāya pratidhīyamānam id kṛśānoḥ astuḥ asanām uruṣyathaḥ
tau īm vardhanti mahi asya pauṃsyam ni mātarā nayati retase bhuje
dadhāti putraḥ avaram param pituḥ nāma tṛtīyam adhi rocane divaḥ
tat tat id asya pauṃsyam gṛṇīmasi inasya trātuḥ avṛkasya mīḍhuṣaḥ
yaḥ pārthivāni tribhiḥ id vigāmabhiḥ uru kramiṣṭa uru gāyāya jīvase
dve id asya kramaṇe svar dṛśaḥ abhikhyāya martyaḥ bhuraṇyati
tṛtīyam asya nakir ā dadharṣati vayaḥ cana patayantaḥ patatriṇaḥ
caturbhiḥ sākam navatim ca nāmabhiḥ cakram na vṛttam vyatīn avīvipat
bṛhat śarīraḥ vimimānaḥ ṛkvabhiḥ yuvā a kumāraḥ prati eti āhavam
bhava mitraḥ na śevyaḥ ghṛta āsutiḥ vibhūta dyumnaḥ eva yāḥ u saprathāḥ
adhā te viṣṇo viduṣā cit ardhya stomaḥ yajñaḥ ca rādhyaḥ haviṣmatā
yaḥ pūrvyāya vedhase navīyase sumat jānaye viṣṇave dadāśati
yaḥ jātam asya mahataḥ mahi bravat sa id u śravobhiḥ yujyam cit abhī asat
tam u stotāraḥ pūrvyam yathā vida ṛtasya garbham januṣā pipartana
ā asya jānantaḥ nāma cit vivaktana mahaḥ te viṣṇo sumatim bhajāmahe
tam asya rājā varuṇaḥ tam aśvinā kratum sacanta mārutasya vedhasaḥ
dādhāra dakṣam uttamam ahar vidam vrajam ca viṣṇuḥ sakhivāṁ aporṇute
ā yaḥ vivāya sacathāya daivyaḥ indrāya viṣṇuḥ su kṛte sukṛttaraḥ
vedhāḥ ajinvat triṣadhasthaḥ āryam ṛtasya bhāge yajamānam ābhajat
abodhi agniḥ jmaḥ ud eti sūryaḥ vi uṣāḥ candrā mahī āvaḥ arciṣā
āyukṣātām aśvinā yātave ratham prāsāvīt devaḥ savitā jagat pṛthak
yat yuñjāthe vṛṣaṇam aśvinā ratham ghṛtena naḥ madhunā kṣatram ukṣatam
asmākam brahma pṛtanāsu jinvatam vayam dhanā śūrasātā bhajemahi
arvāṅ tri cakraḥ madhu vāhanaḥ rathaḥ jīra aśvaḥ aśvinoḥ yātu suṣṭutaḥ
tri vandhuraḥ maghavā viśva saubhagaḥ śam naḥ ā vakṣat dvipade catuṣpade
ā naḥ ūrjam vahatam aśvinā yuvam madhumatyā naḥ kaśayā mimikṣatam
pra āyuḥ tāriṣṭam niḥ rapāṃsi mṛkṣatam sedhatam dveṣaḥ bhavatam sacābhuvā
yuvam ha garbham jagatīṣu dhatthaḥ yuvam viśveṣu bhuvaneṣu antar
yuvam agnim ca vṛṣaṇau apaḥ ca vanaspatīn aśvinau airayethām
yuvam ha sthaḥ bhiṣajā bheṣajebhiḥ atho ha sthaḥ rathyā rāthyebhiḥ
atho ha kṣatram adhi dhattha ugrā yaḥ vām haviṣmān manasā dadāśa
vasū rudrā puru mantū vṛdhantā daśasyatam naḥ vṛṣaṇau abhiṣṭau
dasrā ha yat rekṇaḥ aucathyaḥ vām pra yat sasrāthe akavābhiḥ ūtī
kaḥ vām dāśat sumataye cit asyai vasū yat dhethe namasā pade goḥ
jigṛtam asme revatīḥ purandhīḥ kāmapreṇa iva manasā carantā
yuktaḥ ha yat vām taugryāya peruḥ vi madhye arṇasaḥ dhāyi pajraḥ
upa vām avaḥ śaraṇam gameyam śūraḥ nā ajma patayadbhiḥ evaiḥ
upastutiḥ aucathyam uruṣyet mā mām ime patatriṇī vi dugdhām
mā mām edhaḥ daśatayaḥ citaḥ dhāk pra yat vām baddhaḥ tmani khādati kṣām
na mā garan nadyaḥ mātṛtamāḥ dāsāḥ yat īm su samubdham avādhuḥ
śiraḥ yat asya traitanaḥ vitakṣat svayam dāsaḥ uraḥ aṃsau api _
dīrghatamāḥ māmateyaḥ jujurvān daśame yuge
apām artham yatīnām brahmā bhavati sārathiḥ
pra dyāvā yajñaiḥ pṛthivī ṛtāvṛdhā mahī stuṣe vidatheṣu pracetasā
devebhiḥ ye deva putre su daṃsasā itthā dhiyā vāryāṇi prabhūṣataḥ
uta manye pituḥ adruhaḥ manaḥ mātuḥ mahi sva tavaḥ tat havīmabhiḥ
su retasā pitarā bhūma cakratuḥ uru prajāyai amṛtam varīmabhiḥ
te sūnavaḥ su apasaḥ su daṃsasaḥ mahī jajñuḥ mātarā pūrvacittaye
sthātuḥ ca satyam jagataḥ ca dharmaṇi putrasya pāthaḥ padam a dvayāvinaḥ
te māyinaḥ mamire su pracetasaḥ jāmī sayonī mithunā samokasā
navyam navyam tantum _ tanvate divi samudre antar kavayaḥ su dītayaḥ
tat rādhaḥ adya savituḥ vareṇyam vayam devasya prasave manāmahe
asmabhyam dyāvāpṛthivī su cetunā rayim dhattam vasumantam śatagvinam
te hi dyāvāpṛthivī viśva śambhuvaḥ ṛtāvarī rajasaḥ dhārayat kavī
su janmanī dhiṣaṇe antar īyate devaḥ devī dharmaṇā sūryaḥ śuciḥ
uru vyacasā mahinī asaścatā pitā mātā ca bhuvanāni rakṣataḥ
sudhṛṣṭame vapuṣye na rodasī pitā yat sīm abhi rūpaiḥ avāsayat
sa vahniḥ putraḥ pitroḥ pavitravān punāti dhīraḥ bhuvanāni māyayā
dhenum ca pṛśnim vṛṣabham su retasam viśvāhā śukram payaḥ asya dukṣata
ayam devānām apasām apastamaḥ yaḥ jajāna rodasī viśva śambhuvā
vi yaḥ mame rajasī sukratūyayā ajarebhiḥ skambhanebhiḥ sam ānṛce
te naḥ gṛṇāne mahinī mahi śravaḥ kṣatram dyāvāpṛthivī dhāsathaḥ bṛhat
yena abhi kṛṣṭīḥ tatanāma viśvahā panāyyam ojaḥ asme sam invatam
kim u śreṣṭhaḥ kim yaviṣṭhaḥ naḥ ājagan kim īyate dūtyam kad yat ūcima
na nindima camasam yaḥ mahā kulaḥ agne bhrātar druṇaḥ id bhūtim ūdima
ekam camasam caturaḥ kṛṇotana tat vaḥ devāḥ abruvan tat vaḥ āgamam
saudhanvanāḥ yadī evā kariṣyatha sākam devaiḥ yajñiyāsaḥ bhaviṣyatha
agnim dūtam prati yat abravītana aśvaḥ kartvaḥ rathaḥ uta iha kartvaḥ
dhenuḥ kartvā yuvaśā kartvā dvā tāni bhrātar anu vaḥ kṛtvī emasi
cakṛvāṃsaḥ ṛbhavaḥ tat apṛcchata kva id abhūt yaḥ sya dūtaḥ naḥ ājagan
yadā avākhyat camasān caturaḥ kṛtān āt id tvaṣṭā gnāsu antar ni ānaje
hanāma enām iti tvaṣṭā yat abravīt camasam ye deva pānam anindiṣuḥ
anyā nāmāni kṛṇvate sute sacāṁ anyaiḥ enān kanyā nāmabhiḥ sparat
indraḥ harī yuyuje aśvinā ratham bṛhaspatiḥ viśvarūpām upājata
ṛbhuḥ vibhvā vājaḥ devāṁ agacchata su apasaḥ yajñiyam bhāgam aitana
niḥ carmaṇaḥ gām ariṇīta dhītibhiḥ yā jarantā yuvaśā tā akṛṇotana
saudhanvanāḥ aśvāt aśvam atakṣata yuktvā ratham upa devāṁ ayātana
idam udakam pibata iti abravītana idam vā ghā pibata muñja nejanam
saudhanvanāḥ yadi tat nā iva haryatha tṛtīye ghā savane mādayādhvai
āpaḥ bhūyiṣṭhāḥ iti ekaḥ abravīt agniḥ bhūyiṣṭhaḥ iti anyaḥ abravīt
vadharyantīm bahubhyaḥ pra ekaḥ abravīt ṛtā vadantaḥ camasāṁ apiṃśata
śroṇām ekaḥ udakam gām avājati māṃsam ekaḥ piṃśati sūnayā ābhṛtam
ā nimrucaḥ śakṛt ekaḥ apābharat kim svid putrebhyaḥ pitarau upāvatuḥ
udvatsu asmai akṛṇotana tṛṇam nivatsu apaḥ svapasyayā naraḥ
agohyasya yat asastana gṛhe tat adyā idam ṛbhavaḥ na anu gacchatha
saṃmīlya yat bhuvanā paryasarpata kva svid tātyā pitarā vaḥ āsatuḥ
aśapata yaḥ karasnam vaḥ ādade yaḥ prābravīt pra u tasmai abravītana
suṣupvāṃsaḥ ṛbhavaḥ tat apṛcchata agohya kaḥ idam naḥ abūbudhat
śvānam bastaḥ bodhayitāram abravīt saṃvatsare idam adyā vi akhyata
divā yānti marutaḥ bhūmyā agniḥ ayam vātaḥ antarikṣeṇa yāti
adbhiḥ yāti varuṇaḥ samudraiḥ yuṣmān icchantaḥ śavasaḥ napātaḥ
mā naḥ mitraḥ varuṇaḥ aryamā āyuḥ indraḥ ṛbhukṣāḥ marutaḥ pari khyan
yat vājinaḥ deva jātasya sapteḥ pravakṣyāmaḥ vidathe vīryāṇi
yat nirṇijā rekṇasā prāvṛtasya rātim gṛbhītām mukhatas nayanti
su prāṅ ajaḥ memyat viśva rūpaḥ indra pūṣṇoḥ priyam api eti pāthaḥ
eṣa chāgaḥ puras aśvena vājinā pūṣṇaḥ bhāgaḥ nīyate viśvadevyaḥ
abhi priyam yat puroﾱāśam arvatā tvaṣṭā id enam sauśravasāya jinvati
yat haviṣyam ṛtuśas deva yānam tris mānuṣāḥ pari aśvam nayanti
atrā pūṣṇaḥ prathamaḥ bhāgaḥ eti yajñam devebhyaḥ prativedayan ajaḥ
hotā adhvaryuḥ āvayāḥ agnimindhaḥ grāvagrābhaḥ uta śaṃstā su vipraḥ
tena yajñena su araṃkṛtena su iṣṭena vakṣaṇāḥ ā pṛṇadhvam
yūpavraskāḥ uta ye yūpa vāhāḥ caṣālam ye aśva yūpāya takṣati
ye ca arvate pacanam saṃbharanti uta u teṣām abhigūrtiḥ naḥ invatu
upa prāgāt sumat me adhāyi manma devānām āśāḥ upa vīta pṛṣṭhaḥ
anu enam viprāḥ ṛṣayaḥ madanti devānām puṣṭe cakṛmā su bandhum
yat vājinaḥ dāma saṃdānam arvataḥ yā śīrṣaṇyā raśanā rajjuḥ asya
yat vā gha asya prabhṛtam āsye tṛṇam sarvā tā te api deveṣu astu
yat aśvasya kraviṣaḥ makṣikā āśa yat vā svarau svadhitau riptam asti
yat hastayoḥ śamituḥ yat nakheṣu sarvā tā te api deveṣu astu
yat ūvadhyam udarasya apavāti yaḥ āmasya kraviṣaḥ gandhaḥ asti
su kṛtā tat śamitāraḥ kṛṇvantu uta medham śṛta pākam pacantu
yat te gātrāt agninā pacyamānāt abhi śūlam nihatasya avadhāvati
mā tat bhūmyām ā śriṣat mā tṛṇeṣu devebhyaḥ tat uśadbhyaḥ rātam astu
ye vājinam paripaśyanti pakvam ye īm āhuḥ surabhiḥ niḥ hara iti
ye ca arvataḥ māṃsa bhikṣām upāsate uta u teṣām abhigūrtiḥ naḥ invatu
yat nīkṣaṇam māṃspacanyāḥ ukhāyāḥ yā pātrāṇi yūṣṇaḥ āsecanāni
ūṣmaṇyā apidhānā carūṇām aṅkāḥ sūnāḥ pari bhūṣanti aśvam
nikramaṇam niṣadanam vivartanam yat ca paḍbīśam arvataḥ
yat ca papau yat ca ghāsim jaghāsa sarvā tā te api deveṣu astu
mā tvā agniḥ dhvanayīt dhūma gandhiḥ mā ukhā bhrājantī abhi vikta jaghriḥ
iṣṭam vītam abhigūrtam vaṣaṭkṛtam tam devāsaḥ prati gṛbhṇanti aśvam
yat aśvāya vāsaḥ upastṛṇanti adhīvāsam yā hiraṇyāni asmai
saṃdānam arvantam paḍbīśam priyā deveṣu ā yāmayanti
yat te sāde mahasā śūkṛtasya pārṣṇyā vā kaśayā vā tutoda
srucā iva tā haviṣaḥ adhvareṣu sarvā tā te brahmaṇā sūdayāmi
catustriṃśat vājinaḥ deva bandhoḥ vaṅkrīḥ aśvasya svadhitiḥ sam eti
acchidrā gātrā vayunā kṛṇota paruḥ paruḥ anughuṣya vi śasta
ekaḥ tvaṣṭuḥ aśvasya viśastā dvā yantārā bhavataḥ tathā ṛtuḥ
yā te gātrāṇām ṛtuthā kṛṇomi tā tā piṇḍānām pra juhomi agnau
mā tvā tapat priyaḥ ātmā apiyantam mā svadhitiḥ tanve ā tiṣṭhipat te
mā te gṛdhnuḥ aviśastā atihāya chidrā gātrāṇi asinā mithū kaḥ
na vai u etat mriyase na riṣyasi devāṁ id eṣi pathibhiḥ su gebhiḥ
harī te _ pṛṣatī abhūtām upāsthāt vājī dhuri rāsabhasya
su gavyam naḥ vājī su aśvyam puṃsaḥ putrāṁ uta viśvāpuṣam rayim
anāgāstvam naḥ aditiḥ kṛṇotu kṣatram naḥ aśvaḥ vanatām haviṣmān
yat akrandaḥ prathamam jāyamānaḥ udyan samudrāt uta vā purīṣāt
śyenasya pakṣāḥ hariṇasya bāhū upastutyam mahi jātam te arvan
yamena dattam tritaḥ enam āyunak indraḥ eṇam prathamaḥ adhi atiṣṭhat
gandharvaḥ asya raśanām agṛbhṇāt sūrāt aśvam vasavaḥ niḥ ataṣṭa
asi yamaḥ asi ādityaḥ arvan asi tritaḥ guhyena vratena
asi somena samayā vipṛktaḥ āhuḥ te trīṇi divi bandhanāni
trīṇi te āhuḥ divi bandhanāni trīṇi apsu trīṇi antar samudre
uta iva me varuṇaḥ chantsi arvan yatrā te āhuḥ paramam janitram
imā te vājin avamārjanāni imā śaphānām sanituḥ nidhānā
atrā te bhadrāḥ raśanāḥ apaśyam ṛtasya yāḥ abhirakṣanti gopāḥ
ātmānam te manasā ārāt ajānām avas divā patayantam pataṅgam
śiraḥ apaśyam pathibhiḥ su gebhiḥ areṇubhiḥ jehamānam patatri
atrā te rūpam uttamam apaśyam jigīṣamāṇam iṣaḥ ā pade goḥ
yadā te martaḥ anu bhogam ānaṭ āt id grasiṣṭhaḥ oṣadhīḥ ajīgaḥ
anu tvā rathaḥ anu maryaḥ arvan anu gāvaḥ anu bhagaḥ kanīnām
anu vrātāsaḥ tava sakhyam īyuḥ anu devāḥ mamire vīryam te
hiraṇya śṛṅgaḥ ayaḥ asya pādā manaḥ javāḥ avaraḥ indraḥ āsīt
devāḥ id asya haviḥ adyam āyan yaḥ arvantam prathamaḥ adhyatiṣṭhat
īrmāntāsaḥ silikamadhyamāsaḥ sam śūraṇāsaḥ divyāsaḥ atyāḥ
haṃsāḥ iva śreṇiśas yatante yat ākṣiṣuḥ divyam ajmam aśvāḥ
tava śarīram patayiṣṇu arvan tava cittam vātaḥ iva dhrajīmān
tava śṛṅgāṇi viṣṭhitā purutrā araṇyeṣu jarbhurāṇā caranti
upa prāgāt śasanam vājī arvā devadrīcā manasā dīdhyānaḥ
ajaḥ puras nīyate nābhiḥ asya anu paścāt kavayaḥ yanti rebhāḥ
upa prāgāt paramam yat sadhastham arvān acchā pitaram mātaram ca
adyā devān juṣṭatamaḥ hi gamyāḥ athā śāste dāśuṣe vāryāṇi
asya vāmasya palitasya hotuḥ tasya bhrātā madhyamaḥ asti aśnaḥ
tṛtīyaḥ bhrātā ghṛta pṛṣṭhaḥ asya atra apaśyam viśpatim sapta putram
sapta yuñjanti ratham eka cakram ekaḥ aśvaḥ vahati sapta nāmā
tri nābhi cakram ajaram anarvam yatra imā viśvā bhuvanā adhi tasthuḥ
imam ratham adhi ye sapta tasthuḥ sapta cakram sapta vahanti aśvāḥ
sapta svasāraḥ abhi sam navante yatra gavām nihitā sapta nāma
kaḥ dadarśa prathamam jāyamānam asthanvantam yat anasthā bibharti
bhūmyāḥ asuḥ asṛk ātmā kva svid kaḥ vidvāṃsam upa gāt praṣṭum etat
pākaḥ pṛcchāmi manasā a vijānan devānām enā nihitā padāni
vatse baṣkaye adhi sapta tantūn vi tatnire kavayaḥ otavai u
a cikitvān cikituṣaḥ cit atra kavīn pṛcchāmi vidmane na vidvān
vi yaḥ tastambha ṣaṣ imā rajāṃsi ajasya rūpe kim api svid ekam
iha bravītu yaḥ īm aṅga veda asya vāmasya nihitam padam veḥ
śīrṣṇaḥ kṣīram duhrate gāvaḥ asya vavrim vasānāḥ udakam padā apuḥ
mātā pitaram ṛte ā babhāja dhītī agre manasā sam hi jagme
sā bībhatsuḥ garbha rasā nividdhā namasvantaḥ id upavākam īyuḥ
yuktā mātā āsīt dhuri dakṣiṇāyāḥ atiṣṭhat garbhaḥ vṛjanīṣu antar
amīmet vatsaḥ anu gām apaśyat viśvarūpyam triṣu yojaneṣu
tisraḥ mātṝḥ trīn pitṝn bibhrat ekaḥ ūrdhvaḥ tasthau na īm ava glāpayanti
mantrayante divaḥ amuṣya pṛṣṭhe viśva vidam vācam a viśvaminvām
dvādaśa aram nahi tat jarāya varvarti cakram pari dyām ṛtasya
ā putrāḥ agne mithunāsaḥ atra sapta śatāni viṃśatiḥ ca tasthuḥ
pañca pādam pitaram dvādaśa ākṛtim divaḥ āhuḥ pare ardhe purīṣiṇam
athā ime anye upare vicakṣaṇam sapta cakre ṣaṣ are āhuḥ arpitam
pañca are cakre parivartamāne tasmin ā tasthuḥ bhuvanāni viśvā
tasya na akṣaḥ tapyate bhūri bhāraḥ sanāt eva na śīryate sa nābhiḥ
sa nemi cakram ajaram vi vāvṛte uttānāyām daśa yuktāḥ vahanti
sūryasya cakṣuḥ rajasā eti āvṛtam tasmin ā arpitā bhuvanāni viśvā
sākañjānām saptatham āhuḥ ekajam ṣaḍ id yamāḥ ṛṣayaḥ deva jāḥ iti
teṣām iṣṭāni vihitāni dhāmaśas sthātre rejante vikṛtāni rūpaśas
striyaḥ satīḥ tām u me puṃsaḥ āhuḥ paśyat akṣaṇvān na vi cetat andhaḥ
kaviḥ yaḥ putraḥ saḥ īm ā ciketa yaḥ tāḥ vijānāt sa pituḥ pitā asat
avas pareṇa paras enā avareṇa padā vatsam bibhratī gauḥ ud asthāt
sā kadrīcī kam svid ardham parāgāt kva svid sūte nahi yūthe antar
avas pareṇa pitaram yaḥ asya anuveda paras enā avareṇa
kavīyamānaḥ ke iha pra vocat devam manaḥ kutas adhi prajātam
ye arvāñcaḥ tān u parācaḥ āhuḥ ye parāñcaḥ tān u arvācaḥ āhuḥ
indraḥ ca yā cakrathuḥ soma tāni dhurā na yuktā rajasaḥ vahanti
dvā suparṇā sayujā sakhāyā samānam vṛkṣam pari sasvajāte
tayoḥ anyaḥ pippalam svādu atti an aśnan anyaḥ abhi cākaśīti
yatrā suparṇau amṛtasya bhāgam animeṣam vidathā abhisvaranti
inaḥ viśvasya bhuvanasya gopāḥ sa mā dhīraḥ pākam atra ā viveśa
yasmin vṛkṣe madhvadaḥ suparṇāḥ niviśante suvate ca adhi viśve
tasya id āhuḥ pippalam svādu agre tat nā ud naśat yaḥ pitaram na veda
yat gāyatre adhi gāyatram āhitam traiṣṭubhāt vā traiṣṭubham niratakṣata
yat vā jagat jagati āhitam padam ye id tat viduḥ te amṛta tvam ānaśuḥ
gāyatreṇa prati mimīte arkam arkeṇa sāma traiṣṭubhena vākam
vākena vākam dvipadā catuṣpadā akṣareṇa mimate sapta vāṇīḥ
jagatā sindhum divi astabhāyat rathantare sūryam pari apaśyat
gāyatrasya samidhaḥ tisraḥ āhuḥ tatas mahnā pra ririce mahi tvā
upa hvaye su dughām dhenum etām su hastaḥ go duh uta dohat enām
śreṣṭham savam savitā sāviṣat naḥ abhīddhaḥ gharmaḥ tat u su pra vocam
hiṃkṛṇvatī vasu patnī vasūnām vatsam icchantī manasā abhi āgāt
duhām aśvibhyām payaḥ aghnyā iyam sā vardhatām mahate saubhagāya
gauḥ amīmet anu vatsam miṣantam mūrdhānam hiṃ akṛṇot mātavai u
sṛkvāṇam gharmam abhi vāvaśānā mimāti māyum payate payobhiḥ
ayam sa śiṅkte yena gauḥ abhīvṛtā mimāti māyum dhvasanau adhi śritā
sā cittibhiḥ ni hi cakāra martyam vidyut bhavantī prati vavrim auhata
anat śaye tura gātu jīvam ejat dhruvam madhye ā pastyānām
jīvaḥ mṛtasya carati svadhābhiḥ amartyaḥ martyena sayoniḥ
apaśyam gopām a nipadyamānam ā ca parā ca pathibhiḥ carantam
sa sadhrīcīḥ sa viṣūcīḥ vasānaḥ ā varīvarti bhuvaneṣu antar
yaḥ īm cakāra na saḥ asya veda yaḥ īm dadarśa hiruk id nu tasmāt
sa mātuḥ yonā parivītaḥ antar bahuprajāḥ nirṛtim ā viveśa
dyauḥ me pitā janitā nābhiḥ atra bandhuḥ me mātā pṛthivī mahī iyam
uttānayoḥ camvoḥ yoniḥ antar atrā pitā duhituḥ garbham ādhāt
pṛcchāmi tvā param antam pṛthivyāḥ pṛcchāmi yatra bhuvanasya nābhiḥ
pṛcchāmi tvā vṛṣṇaḥ aśvasya retaḥ pṛcchāmi vācaḥ paramam vyoma
iyam vediḥ paraḥ antaḥ pṛthivyāḥ ayam yajñaḥ bhuvanasya nābhiḥ
ayam somaḥ vṛṣṇaḥ aśvasya retaḥ brahmā ayam vācaḥ paramam vyoma
sapta ardha garbhāḥ bhuvanasya retaḥ viṣṇoḥ tiṣṭhanti pradiśā vidharmaṇi
te dhītibhiḥ manasā te vipaścitaḥ paribhuvaḥ pari bhavanti viśvatas
na vi jānāmi yat iva idam asmi niṇyaḥ saṃnaddhaḥ manasā carāmi
yadā mā agan prathama jāḥ ṛtasya āt id vācaḥ aśnuve bhāgam asyāḥ
apāṅ prāṅ eti svadhayā gṛbhītaḥ amartyaḥ martyena sayoniḥ
tā śaśvantā viṣūcīnā viyantā ni anyam cikyuḥ na ni cikyuḥ anyam
ṛcaḥ akṣare parame vyoman yasmin devāḥ adhi viśve niṣeduḥ
yaḥ tat na veda kim ṛcā kariṣyati ye id tat viduḥ te ime sam āsate
su yavasāt bhagavatī hi bhūyāḥ atho vayam bhagavantaḥ syāma
addhi tṛṇam aghnye viśvadānīm piba śuddham udakam ācarantī
gaurīḥ mimāya salilāni takṣatī ekapadī dvipadī sā catuṣpadī
aṣṭāpadī navapadī babhūvuṣī sahasra akṣarā parame vyoman
tasyāḥ samudrāḥ adhi vi kṣaranti tena jīvanti pradiśaḥ catasraḥ
tatas kṣarati akṣaram tat viśvam upa jīvati
śaka mayam dhūmam ārāt apaśyam viṣūvatā paras enā avareṇa
ukṣāṇam pṛśnim apacanta vīrāḥ tāni dharmāṇi prathamāni āsan
trayaḥ keśinaḥ ṛtuthā vi cakṣate saṃvatsare vapate ekaḥ eṣām
viśvam ekaḥ abhi caṣṭe śacībhiḥ dhrājiḥ ekasya dadṛśe na rūpam
catvāri vāc parimitā padāni tāni viduḥ brāhmaṇāḥ ye manīṣiṇaḥ
guhā trīṇi nihitā nā iṅgayanti turīyam vācaḥ manuṣyāḥ vadanti
indram mitram varuṇam agnim āhuḥ atho divyaḥ sa suparṇaḥ garutmān
ekam sat viprāḥ bahudhā vadanti agnim yamam mātariśvānam āhuḥ
kṛṣṇam niyānam harayaḥ suparṇāḥ apaḥ vasānāḥ divam ud patanti
te āvavṛtran sadanāt ṛtasya āt id ghṛtena pṛthivī vi udyate
dvādaśa pradhayaḥ cakram ekam trīṇi nabhyāni kaḥ u tat ciketa
tasmin sākam tri śatā na śaṅkavaḥ arpitāḥ ṣaṣṭiḥ na calācalāsaḥ
yaḥ te stanaḥ śaśayaḥ yaḥ mayaḥ bhūḥ yena viśvā puṣyasi vāryāṇi
yaḥ ratna dhāḥ vasu vid yaḥ su datraḥ sarasvati tam iha dhātave kaḥ
yajñena yajñam ayajanta devāḥ tāni dharmāṇi prathamāni āsan
te ha nākam mahimānaḥ sacanta yatra pūrve sādhyāḥ santi devāḥ
samānam etat udakam ud ca eti ava ca ahabhiḥ
bhūmim parjanyāḥ jinvanti divam jinvanti agnayaḥ
divyam suparṇam vāyasam bṛhantam apām garbham darśatam oṣadhīnām
abhīpatas vṛṣṭibhiḥ tarpayantam sarasvantam avase johavīmi
kayā śubhā savayasaḥ sanīﾱāḥ samānyā marutaḥ sam mimikṣuḥ
kayā matī kutas etāsaḥ ete arcanti śuṣmam vṛṣaṇaḥ vasūyā
kasya brahmāṇi jujuṣuḥ yuvānaḥ kaḥ adhvare marutaḥ ā vavarta
śyenāṁ iva dhrajataḥ antarikṣe kena mahā manasā rīramāma
kutas tvam indra māhinaḥ san ekaḥ yāsi satpate kim te itthā
sam pṛcchase samarāṇaḥ śubhānaiḥ voceḥ tat naḥ harivas yat te asme
brahmāṇi me matayaḥ śam sutāsaḥ śuṣmaḥ iyarti prabhṛtaḥ me adriḥ
ā śāsate prati haryanti ukthā imā harī vahataḥ tā naḥ accha
atas vayam antamebhiḥ yujānāḥ svakṣatrebhiḥ tanvaḥ śumbhamānāḥ
mahobhiḥ etāṁ upa yujmahe nu indra svadhām anu hi naḥ babhūtha
kva syā vaḥ marutaḥ svadhā āsīt yat mām ekam samadhatta ahi hatye
aham hi ugraḥ taviṣaḥ tuviṣmān viśvasya śatroḥ anamam vadhasnaiḥ
bhūri cakartha yujyebhiḥ asme samānebhiḥ vṛṣabha pauṃsyebhiḥ
bhūrīṇi hi kṛṇavāmā śaviṣṭha indra kratvā marutaḥ yat vaśāma
vadhīm vṛtram marutaḥ indriyeṇa svena bhāmena taviṣaḥ babhūvān
aham etāḥ manave viśva ścandrāḥ su gāḥ apaḥ cakara vajra bāhuḥ
anuttam ā te maghavan nakir nu na tvāvāṁ asti devatā vidānaḥ
na jāyamānaḥ naśate na jātaḥ yāni kariṣyāḥ kṛṇuhi pravṛddha
ekasya cit me vibhu astu ojaḥ yā nu dadhṛṣvān kṛṇavai manīṣā
aham hi ugraḥ marutaḥ vidānaḥ yāni cyavam indraḥ id īśe eṣām
amandan mā marutaḥ stomaḥ atra yat me naraḥ śrutyam brahma cakra
indrāya vṛṣṇe su makhāya mahyam sakhye sakhāyaḥ tanve tanūbhiḥ
eva id ete prati mā rocamānāḥ anedyaḥ śravaḥ ā iṣaḥ dadhānāḥ
saṃcakṣya marutaḥ candra varṇāḥ acchānta me chadayātha ca nūnam
kaḥ nu atra marutaḥ māmahe vaḥ pra yātana sakhīn acchā sakhāyaḥ
manmāni citrā apivātayanta eṣām bhūta navedāḥ me ṛtānām
ā yat duvasyāt duvase na kāruḥ asmān cakre mānyasya medhā
ā u su vartta marutaḥ vipram accha imā brahmāṇi jaritā vaḥ arcat
eṣa vaḥ stomaḥ marutaḥ iyam gīḥ māndāryasya mānyasya kāroḥ
ā iṣā _ tanve vayām vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
tat nu vocāma rabhasāya janmane pūrvam mahitvam vṛṣabhasya ketave
aidhā iva yāman marutaḥ tuviṣvaṇaḥ yudhā iva śakrāḥ taviṣāṇi kartana
nityam na sūnum madhu bibhrataḥ upa krīḍanti krīḍāḥ vidatheṣu ghṛṣvayaḥ
nakṣanti rudrāḥ avasā namasvinam na mardhanti sva tavasaḥ haviṣkṛtam
yasmai ūmāsaḥ amṛtāḥ arāsata rāyaḥ poṣam ca haviṣā dadāśuṣe
ukṣanti asmai marutaḥ hitāḥ iva purū rajāṃsi payasā mayobhuvaḥ
ā ye rajāṃsi taviṣībhiḥ avyata pra vaḥ evāsaḥ sva yatāsaḥ adhrajan
bhayante viśvā bhuvanāni harmyā citraḥ vaḥ yāmaḥ prayatāsu ṛṣṭiṣu
yat tveṣa yāmāḥ nadayanta parvatān divaḥ vā pṛṣṭham naryāḥ acucyavuḥ
viśvaḥ vaḥ ajman bhayate vanaspatiḥ rathīyantī iva pra jihīte oṣadhiḥ
yūyam naḥ ugrāḥ marutaḥ sucetunā ariṣṭa grāmāḥ sumatim pipartana
yatrā vaḥ didyut radati krivirdatī riṇāti paśvaḥ sudhitā iva barhaṇā
pra skambha deṣṇāḥ anavabhra rādhasaḥ alātṛṇāsaḥ vidatheṣu suṣṭutāḥ
arcanti arkam madirasya pītaye viduḥ vīrasya prathamāni pauṃsyā
śata bhujibhiḥ tam abhihruteḥ aghāt pūrbhiḥ rakṣata marutaḥ yam āvata
janam yam ugrāḥ tavasaḥ virapśinaḥ pāthana śaṃsāt tanayasya puṣṭiṣu
viśvāni bhadrā marutaḥ ratheṣu vaḥ mithaspṛdhyā iva taviṣāṇi āhitā
aṃseṣu ā vaḥ prapatheṣu khādayaḥ akṣaḥ vaḥ cakrā samayā vi vāvṛte
bhūrīṇi bhadrā naryeṣu bāhuṣu vakṣassu rukmā rabhasāsaḥ añjayaḥ
aṃseṣu etāḥ paviṣu kṣurāḥ adhi vayaḥ na pakṣān vi anu śriyaḥ _
mahāntaḥ mahnā vibhvaḥ vibhūtayaḥ dūredṛśaḥ ye divyāḥ iva stṛbhiḥ
mandrāḥ su jihvāḥ svaritāraḥ āsabhiḥ sammiślāḥ indre marutaḥ pariṣṭubhaḥ
tat vaḥ su jātāḥ marutaḥ mahitvanam dīrgham vaḥ dātram aditeḥ iva vratam
indraḥ cana tyajasā vi hruṇāti tat janāya yasmai su kṛte arādhvam
tat vaḥ jāmi tvam marutaḥ pare yuge purū yat śaṃsam amṛtāsaḥ āvata
ayā dhiyā manave śruṣṭim āvyā sākam naraḥ daṃsanaiḥ ā cikitrire
yena dīrgham marutaḥ śūśavāma yuṣmākena parīṇasā turāsaḥ
ā yat tatanan vṛjane janāsaḥ ebhiḥ yajñebhiḥ tat abhīṣṭim aśyām
eṣa vaḥ stomaḥ marutaḥ iyam gīḥ māndāryasya mānyasya kāroḥ
ā iṣā _ tanve vayām vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
sahasram te indra ūtayaḥ naḥ sahasram iṣaḥ harivas gūrtatamāḥ
sahasram rāyaḥ mādayadhyai sahasriṇaḥ upa naḥ yantu vājāḥ
ā naḥ avobhiḥ marutaḥ yāntu acchā jyeṣṭhebhiḥ vā bṛhaddivaiḥ su māyāḥ
adha yat eṣām niyutaḥ paramāḥ samudrasya cit dhanayanta pāre
mimyakṣa yeṣu sudhitā ghṛtācī hiraṇya nirṇij uparā na ṛṣṭiḥ
guhā carantī manuṣaḥ na yoṣā sabhāvatī vidathyā iva sam vāc
parā śubhrāḥ ayāsaḥ yavyā sādhāraṇyā iva marutaḥ mimikṣuḥ
na rodasī apa nudanta ghorāḥ juṣanta vṛdham sakhyāya devāḥ
joṣat yat īm asuryā sacadhyai viṣita stukā rodasī nṛmaṇāḥ
ā sūryaḥ iva vidhataḥ ratham gāt tveṣa pratīkā nabhasaḥ nā ityā
āsthāpayanta yuvatim yuvānaḥ śubhe nimiślām vidatheṣu pajrām
arkaḥ yat vaḥ marutaḥ haviṣmān gāyat gātham suta somaḥ duvasyan
pra tam vivakmi vakmyaḥ yaḥ eṣām marutām mahimā satyaḥ asti
sacā yat īm vṛṣamaṇāḥ ahaṃyu sthirā cit janīḥ vahate subhāgāḥ
pānti mitrāvaruṇau avadyāt cayate īm aryamā u apraśastān
uta cyavante acyutā dhruvāṇi vāvṛdhe īm marutaḥ dāti vāraḥ
nahi nu vaḥ marutaḥ anti asme ārāttāt cit śavasaḥ antam āpuḥ
te dhṛṣṇunā śavasā śūśuvāṃsaḥ arṇaḥ na dveṣaḥ dhṛṣatā pari sthuḥ
vayam adyā indrasya preṣṭhāḥ vayam śvas vocemahi samarye
vayam purā mahi ca naḥ anu dyūn tat naḥ ṛbhukṣāḥ narām anu syāt
eṣa vaḥ stomaḥ marutaḥ iyam gīḥ māndāryasya mānyasya kāroḥ
ā iṣā _ tanve vayām vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
yajñāḥ yajñāḥ vaḥ samanā tuturvaṇiḥ dhiyam dhiyam vaḥ deva yāḥ u dadhidhve
ā vaḥ arvācaḥ suvitāya rodasyoḥ mahe vavṛtyām avase suvṛktibhiḥ
vavrāsaḥ na ye sva jāḥ sva tavasaḥ iṣam svar abhijāyanta dhūtayaḥ
sahasriyāsaḥ apām nā ūrmayaḥ āsā gāvaḥ vandyāsaḥ nā ukṣaṇaḥ
somāsaḥ na ye sutāḥ tṛpta aṃśavaḥ hṛtsu pītāsaḥ duvasaḥ nā āsate
ā eṣām aṃseṣu rambhiṇī iva rārabhe hasteṣu khādiḥ ca kṛtiḥ ca sam dadhe
ava sva yuktāḥ divaḥ ā vṛthā yayuḥ amartyāḥ kaśayā codata tmanā
areṇavaḥ tuvi jātāḥ acucyavuḥ dṛﾱhāni cit marutaḥ bhrājat ṛṣṭayaḥ
kaḥ vaḥ antar marutaḥ ṛṣṭi vidyutaḥ rejati tmanā hanvā iva jihvayā
dhanva cyutaḥ iṣām na yāmani puru praiṣāḥ ahanyaḥ nā etaśaḥ
kva svid asya rajasaḥ mahaḥ param kva avaram marutaḥ yasmin āyaya
yat cyāvayatha vithurā iva saṃhitam vi adriṇā patatha tveṣam arṇavam
sātiḥ na vaḥ amavatī svarvatī tveṣā vipākā marutaḥ pipiṣvatī
bhadrā vaḥ rātiḥ pṛṇataḥ na dakṣiṇā pṛthujrayī asuryā iva jañjatī
prati stobhanti sindhavaḥ pavibhyaḥ yat abhriyām vācam udīrayanti
ava smayanta vidyutaḥ pṛthivyām yadī ghṛtam marutaḥ pruṣṇuvanti
asūta pṛśniḥ mahate raṇāya tveṣam ayāsām marutām anīkam
te sapsarāsaḥ ajanayanta abhvam āt id svadhām iṣirām pari apaśyan
eṣa vaḥ stomaḥ marutaḥ iyam gīḥ māndāryasya mānyasya kāroḥ
ā iṣā yāsīṣṭa tanve vayām vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
mahaḥ cit tvam indra yataḥ etān mahaḥ cit asi tyajasaḥ varūtā
sa naḥ vedhaḥ marutām cikitvān sumnā vanuṣva tava hi preṣṭhā
ayujran te indra viśvakṛṣṭīḥ vidānāsaḥ niṣṣidhaḥ martyatrā
marutām pṛtsutiḥ hāsamānā svarmīﾱhasya pradhanasya sātau
amyak sā te indra ṛṣṭiḥ asme sanemi abhvam marutaḥ junanti
agniḥ cit hi sma atase śuśukvān āpaḥ na dvīpam dadhati prayāṃsi
tvam tu naḥ indra tam rayim dāḥ ojiṣṭhayā dakṣiṇayā iva rātim
stutaḥ ca yāḥ te _ vāyoḥ stanam na madhvaḥ pīpayanta vājaiḥ
tve rāyaḥ indra tośatamāḥ praṇetāraḥ kasya cit ṛtāyoḥ
te su naḥ marutaḥ mṛḍayantu ye smā purā gātuyanti iva devāḥ
prati pra yāhi indra mīḍhuṣaḥ nṝn mahaḥ pārthive sadane yatasva
adha yat eṣām pṛthu budhnāsaḥ etāḥ tīrthe na aryaḥ pauṃsyāni tasthuḥ
prati ghorāṇām etānām ayāsām marutām śṛṇve āyatām upabdiḥ
ye martyam pṛtanāyantam ūmaiḥ ṛṇāvānam na patayanta sargaiḥ
tvam mānebhyaḥ indra viśvajanyāḥ rada marudbhiḥ śurudhaḥ go agrāḥ
stavānebhiḥ stavase deva devaiḥ vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
na nūnam asti na u śvas kaḥ tat veda yat adbhutam
anyasya cittam abhi saṃcareṇyam uta adhītam vi naśyati
kim naḥ indra jighāṃsasi bhrātaraḥ marutaḥ tava
tebhiḥ kalpasva sādhuyā mā naḥ samaraṇe vadhīḥ
kim naḥ bhrātar agastya sakhā san ati manyase
vidma hi te yathā manaḥ asmabhyam id na ditsasi
aram kṛṇvantu vedim sam agnim indhatām puras
tatra amṛtasya cetanam yajñam te tanavāvahai
tvam īśiṣe vasu pate vasūnām tvam mitrāṇām mitra pate dheṣṭhaḥ
indra tvam marudbhiḥ sam vadasva adha prāśāna ṛtuthā havīṃṣi
prati vaḥ enā namasā aham emi sūktena bhikṣe sumatim turāṇām
rarāṇatā marutaḥ vedyābhiḥ ni heﾱaḥ dhatta vi mucadhvam aśvān
eṣa vaḥ stomaḥ marutaḥ namasvān hṛdā taṣṭaḥ manasā dhāyi devāḥ
upa īm ā yāta manasā juṣāṇāḥ yūyam hi ṣṭhā namasaḥ id vṛdhāsaḥ
stutāsaḥ naḥ marutaḥ mṛḍayantu uta stutaḥ maghavā śambhaviṣṭhaḥ
ūrdhvā naḥ santu komyā vanāni ahāni viśvā marutaḥ jigīṣā
asmāt aham taviṣāt īṣamāṇaḥ indrāt bhiyā marutaḥ rejamānaḥ
yuṣmabhyam havyā niśitāni āsan tāni āre cakṛmā mṛḍata naḥ
yena mānāsaḥ citayante usrāḥ vyuṣṭiṣu śavasā śaśvatīnām
sa naḥ marudbhiḥ vṛṣabha śravaḥ dhāḥ ugraḥ ugrebhiḥ sthaviraḥ sahaḥ dāḥ
tvam pāhi indra sahīyasaḥ nṝn bhava marudbhiḥ avayāta heﾱāḥ
su praketebhiḥ sāsahiḥ dadhānaḥ vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
citraḥ vaḥ astu yāmaḥ citraḥ ūtī sudānavaḥ
marutaḥ ahi bhānavaḥ
āre sā vaḥ sudānavaḥ marutaḥ ṛñjatī śaruḥ
āre aśmā yam asyatha
tṛṇaskandasya nu viśaḥ pari vṛṅkta sudānavaḥ
ūrdhvān naḥ karta jīvase
gāyat sāma nabhanyam yathā veḥ arcāma tat vāvṛdhānam svarvat
gāvaḥ dhenavaḥ barhiṣi adabdhāḥ ā yat sadmānam divyam vivāsān
arcat vṛṣā vṛṣabhiḥ sveduhavyaiḥ mṛgaḥ nā aśnaḥ ati yat juguryāt
pra mandayuḥ manām gūrta hotā bharate maryaḥ mithunā yajatraḥ
nakṣat hotā pari sadma mitā yan bharat garbham ā śaradaḥ pṛthivyāḥ
krandat aśvaḥ nayamānaḥ ruvat gauḥ antar dūtaḥ na rodasī carat vāc
tā karma aṣatarā asmai pra cyautnāni devayantaḥ bharante
jujoṣat indraḥ dasma varcāḥ nāsatyā iva sugmyaḥ ratheṣṭhāḥ
tam u stuhi indram yaḥ ha satvā yaḥ śūraḥ maghavā yaḥ ratheṣṭhāḥ
pratīcaḥ cit yodhīyān vṛṣaṇvān vavavruṣaḥ cit tamasaḥ vihantā
pra yat itthā mahinā nṛbhyaḥ asti aram rodasī kakṣye nā asmai
sam vivye indraḥ vṛjanam na bhūmā bharti svadhāvāṁ opaśam iva dyām
samatsu tvā śūra satām urāṇam prapathintamam paritaṃsayadhyai
sajoṣasaḥ indram made kṣoṇīḥ sūrim cit ye anumadanti vājaiḥ
evā hi te śam savanā samudre āpaḥ yat te āsu madanti devīḥ
viśvā te anu joṣyā bhūt gauḥ sūrīn cit yadi dhiṣā veṣi janān
asāma yathā su sakhāyaḥ enā su abhiṣṭayaḥ narām na śaṃsaiḥ
asat yathā naḥ indraḥ vandaneṣṭhāḥ turaḥ na karma nayamānaḥ ukthā
viṣpardhasaḥ narām na śaṃsaiḥ asmāka asat indraḥ vajra hastaḥ
mitrāyuvaḥ na pūrpatim su śiṣṭau madhyāyuvaḥ upa śikṣanti yajñaiḥ
yajñaḥ hi sma indram kaścid ṛndhan juhurāṇaḥ cit manasā pariyan
tīrthe nā acchā tātṛṣāṇam okaḥ dīrghaḥ na sidhram ā kṛṇoti adhvā
mā u su naḥ indra atra pṛtsu devaiḥ asti hi sma te śuṣmin avayāḥ
mahaḥ cit yasya mīḍhuṣaḥ yavyā haviṣmataḥ marutaḥ vandate gīḥ
eṣa stomaḥ indra tubhyam asme etena gātum harivas vidaḥ naḥ
ā naḥ vavṛtyāḥ suvitāya deva vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
tvam rājā indra ye ca devāḥ rakṣā nṝn pāhi asura tvam asmān
tvam satpatiḥ maghavā naḥ tarutraḥ tvam satyaḥ vasavānaḥ sahaḥ dāḥ
danaḥ viśaḥ indra mṛdhravācaḥ sapta yat puraḥ śarma śāradīḥ dart
ṛṇoḥ apaḥ anavadya arṇāḥ yūne vṛtram purukutsāya randhīḥ
aja vṛtaḥ indra śūra patnīḥ dyām ca yebhiḥ puruhūta nūnam
rakṣaḥ agnim aśuṣam tūrvayāṇam siṃhaḥ na dame apāṃsi vastoḥ
śeṣan nu te indra sasmin yonau praśastaye pavīravasya mahnā
sṛjat arṇāṃsi ava yat yudhā gāḥ tiṣṭhat harī dhṛṣatā mṛṣṭa vājān
vaha kutsam indra yasmin cākan syūmanyū ṛjrā vātasya aśvā
pra sūraḥ cakram vṛhatāt abhīke abhi spṛdhaḥ yāsiṣat vajra bāhuḥ
jaghanvāṁ indra mitrerūn coda pravṛddhaḥ harivas a dāśūn
pra ye paśyan aryamaṇam sacā āyoḥ tvayā śūrtāḥ vahamānāḥ apatyam
rapat kaviḥ indra arka sātau kṣām dāsāya upabarhaṇīm kaḥ
karat tisraḥ maghavā dānu citrāḥ ni duryoṇe kuyavācam mṛdhi śret
sanā tā te indra navyā āguḥ sahaḥ nabhaḥ aviraṇāya pūrvīḥ
bhinat puraḥ na bhidaḥ adevīḥ nanamaḥ vadhar adevasya pīyoḥ
tvam dhuniḥ indra dhunimatīḥ ṛṇoḥ apaḥ sīrāḥ na sravantīḥ
pra yat samudram ati śūra parṣi pāraya turvaśam yadum svasti
tvam asmākam indra viśvadha syāḥ avṛkatamaḥ narām nṛ pātā
sa naḥ viśvāsām spṛdhām sahaḥ dāḥ vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
matsi apāyi te mahaḥ pātrasya iva harivas matsaraḥ madaḥ
vṛṣā te vṛṣṇaḥ induḥ vājī sahasra sātamaḥ
ā naḥ te gantu matsaraḥ vṛṣā madaḥ vareṇyaḥ
sahāvāṁ indra sānasiḥ pṛtanāṣāh amartyaḥ
tvam hi śūraḥ sanitā codayaḥ manuṣaḥ ratham
sahāvān dasyum avratam oṣaḥ pātram na śociṣā
muṣāya sūryam kave cakram īśānaḥ ojasā
vaha śuṣṇāya vadham kutsam vātasya aśvaiḥ
śuṣmintamaḥ hi te madaḥ dyumnintamaḥ uta kratuḥ
vṛtra ghnā varivaḥ vidā maṃsīṣṭhāḥ aśva sātamaḥ
yathā pūrvebhyaḥ jaritṛbhyaḥ indra mayaḥ iva apaḥ na tṛṣyate babhūtha
tām anu tvā nividam johavīmi vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
matsi naḥ vasyaiṣṭaye indram indo vṛṣā viśa
ṛghāyamāṇaḥ invasi śatrum anti na vindasi
tasmin ā veśaya giraḥ yaḥ ekaḥ carṣaṇīnām
anu svadhā yam upyate yavam na carkṛṣat vṛṣā
yasya viśvāni hastayoḥ pañca kṣitīnām vasu
spāśayasva yaḥ asmadhruk divyā iva aśaniḥ jahi
a sunvantam samam jahi dūṇāśam yaḥ na te mayaḥ
asmabhyam asya vedanam daddhi sūriḥ cit ohate
āvaḥ yasya dvibarhasaḥ arkeṣu sānuṣak asat
ājau indrasya indo prāvaḥ vājeṣu vājinam
yathā pūrvebhyaḥ jaritṛbhyaḥ indra mayaḥ iva apaḥ na tṛṣyate babhūtha
tām anu tvā nividam johavīmi vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
ā carṣaṇi prāḥ vṛṣabhaḥ janānām rājā kṛṣṭīnām puruhūtaḥ indraḥ
stutaḥ śravasyan avasā upa madrik yuktvā harī vṛṣaṇā yāhi arvāṅ
ye te vṛṣaṇaḥ vṛṣabhāsaḥ indra brahma yujaḥ vṛṣa rathāsaḥ atyāḥ
tāṁ ā tiṣṭha tebhiḥ ā yāhi arvāṅ havāmahe tvā sute indra some
ā tiṣṭha ratham vṛṣaṇam vṛṣā te sutaḥ somaḥ pariṣiktā madhūni
yuktvā vṛṣabhyām vṛṣabha kṣitīnām haribhyām yāhi pravatā upa madrik
ayam yajñaḥ deva yāḥ ayam miyedhaḥ imā brahmāṇi ayam indra somaḥ
stīrṇam barhiḥ ā tu śakra pra yāhi pibā niṣadya vi muca harī iha
ā u suṣṭutaḥ indra yāhi arvāṅ upa brahmāṇi mānyasya kāroḥ
vidyāma vastoḥ avasā gṛṇantaḥ vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
yat ha _ te indra śruṣṭiḥ asti yayā babhūtha jaritṛbhyaḥ ūtī
mā naḥ kāmam mahayantam ā dhak viśvā te aśyām pari āpe āyoḥ
na ghā rājā indra ā dabhat naḥ yā nu svasārā kṛṇavanta yonau
āpaḥ cit asmai sutukāḥ aveṣan gamat naḥ indraḥ sakhyā vayaḥ ca
jetā nṛbhiḥ indraḥ pṛtsu śūraḥ śrotā havam nādhamānasya kāroḥ
prabhartā ratham dāśuṣaḥ upākaḥ udyantā giraḥ yadi ca tmanā bhūt
evā nṛbhiḥ indraḥ su śravasyā prakhādaḥ pṛkṣaḥ abhi mitriṇaḥ bhūt
samarye iṣaḥ stavate vivāci satrākaraḥ yajamānasya śaṃsaḥ
tvayā vayam maghavan indra śatrūn abhi syāma mahataḥ manyamānān
tvam trātā tvam u naḥ vṛdhe bhūḥ vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
pūrvīḥ aham śaradaḥ śaśramāṇā doṣā vastoḥ uṣasaḥ jarayantīḥ
mināti śriyam jarimā tanūnām api u nu patnīḥ vṛṣaṇaḥ jagamyuḥ
ye cit hi pūrve ṛtasāpaḥ āsan sākam devebhiḥ avadan ṛtāni
te cit ava āsuḥ nahi antam āpuḥ sam u nu patnīḥ vṛṣabhiḥ jagamyuḥ
na mṛṣā śrāntam yat avanti devāḥ viśvāḥ id spṛdhaḥ abhī aśnavāva
jayāva id atra śata nītham ājim yat samyañcā mithunau abhī ajāva
nadasya mā rudhataḥ kāmaḥ āgan itas ājātaḥ amutas kutaścid
lopāmudrā vṛṣaṇam niḥ riṇāti dhīram adhīrā dhayati śvasantam
imam nu somam antitas hṛtsu pītam upa bruve
yat sīm āgaḥ cakṛmā tat su mṛḍatu pulu kāmaḥ hi martyaḥ
agastyaḥ khanamānaḥ khanitraiḥ prajām apatyam balam icchamānaḥ
ubhau varṇau ṛṣiḥ ugraḥ pupoṣa satyāḥ deveṣu āśiṣaḥ jagāma
yuvoḥ rajāṃsi su yamāsaḥ aśvāḥ rathaḥ yat vām pari arṇāṃsi dīyat
hiraṇyayāḥ vām pavayaḥ pruṣāyan madhvaḥ pibantau uṣasaḥ sacethe
yuvam atyasya ava nakṣathaḥ yat vipatmanaḥ naryasya prayajyoḥ
svasā yat vām viśva gūrtī bharāti vājāya īṭṭe madhu pau iṣe ca
yuvam payaḥ usriyāyām adhattam pakvam āmāyām ava pūrvyam goḥ
antar yat vaninaḥ vām ṛtapsū hvāraḥ na śuciḥ yajate haviṣmān
yuvam ha gharmam madhumantam atraye apaḥ na kṣodaḥ avṛṇītam eṣe
tat vām narau aśvinā paśvaiṣṭiḥ rathyā iva cakrā prati yanti madhvaḥ
ā vām dānāya vavṛtīya dasrā goḥ oheṇa taugryaḥ na jivriḥ
apaḥ kṣoṇī sacate māhinā vām jūrṇaḥ vām akṣuḥ aṃhasaḥ yajatrā
ni yat yuvethe niyutaḥ su dānū upa svadhābhiḥ sṛjathaḥ purandhim
_ veṣat vātaḥ na sūriḥ ā mahe dade suvrataḥ na vājam
vayam cit hi vām jaritāraḥ satyāḥ vipanyāmahe vi paṇiḥ hitāvān
adhā cit hi sma aśvinau anindyā pāthaḥ hi sma vṛṣaṇau antidevam
yuvām cit hi sma aśvinau anu dyūn virudrasya prasravaṇasya sātau
agastyaḥ narām nṛṣu praśastaḥ kārādhunī iva citayat sahasraiḥ
pra yat vahethe mahinā rathasya pra syandrā yāthaḥ manuṣaḥ na hotā
dhattam sūribhyaḥ uta vā su aśvyam nāsatyā rayiṣācaḥ syāma
tam vām ratham vayam adyā huvema stomaiḥ aśvinā suvitāya navyam
ariṣṭa nemim pari dyām iyānam vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
kad u preṣṭhau iṣām rayīṇām adhvaryantā yat unninīthaḥ apām
ayam vām yajñaḥ akṛta praśastim vasu dhitī avitārā janānām
ā vām aśvāsaḥ śucayaḥ payaspāḥ vāta raṃhasaḥ divyāsaḥ atyāḥ
manaḥ juvaḥ vṛṣaṇaḥ vīta pṛṣṭhāḥ ā iha svarājaḥ aśvinā vahantu
ā vām rathaḥ avaniḥ na pravatvān sṛpra vandhuraḥ suvitāya gamyāḥ
vṛṣṇaḥ sthātārā manasaḥ javīyān ahampūrvaḥ yajataḥ dhiṣṇyā yaḥ
iha iha jātā sam avāvaśītām arepasā tanvā nāmabhiḥ svaiḥ
jiṣṇuḥ vām anyaḥ su makhasya sūriḥ divaḥ anyaḥ subhagaḥ putraḥ ūhe
pra vām niceruḥ kakuhaḥ vaśāṁ anu piśaṅga rūpaḥ sadanāni gamyāḥ
harī anyasya pīpayanta vājaiḥ mathrā rajāṃsi aśvinā vi ghoṣaiḥ
pra vām śaradvān vṛṣabhaḥ na niṣṣāh pūrvīḥ iṣaḥ carati madhvaḥ iṣṇan
evaiḥ anyasya pīpayanta vājaiḥ veṣantīḥ ūrdhvāḥ nadyaḥ naḥ āguḥ
asarji vām sthavirā vedhasā gīḥ bāḍhe aśvinā tredhā kṣarantī
upastutau avatam nādhamānam yāman a yāman śṛṇutam havam me
uta syā vām ruśataḥ vapsasaḥ gīḥ tri barhiṣi sadasi pinvate nṝn
vṛṣā vām meghaḥ vṛṣaṇā pīpāya goḥ na seke manuṣaḥ daśasyan
yuvām pūṣā iva aśvinā purandhiḥ agnim uṣām na jarate haviṣmān
huve yat vām varivasyā gṛṇānaḥ vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
abhūt idam vayunam ā u su bhūṣata rathaḥ vṛṣaṇvān madata manīṣiṇaḥ
dhiyañjinvā dhiṣṇyā viśpalā vasū divaḥ napātā sukṛte śuci vratā
indratamā hi dhiṣṇyā maruttamā dasrā daṃsiṣṭhā rathyā rathītamā
pūrṇam ratham vahethe madhvaḥ ācitam tena dāśvāṃsam upa yāthaḥ aśvinā
kim atra dasrā kṛṇuthaḥ kim āsāthe janaḥ yaḥ kaḥ cit a haviḥ mahīyate
ati kramiṣṭam juratam paṇeḥ asum jyotiḥ viprāya kṛṇutam vacasyave
jambhayatam abhitas _ śunaḥ hatam mṛdhaḥ vidathuḥ tāni aśvinā
vācam vācam jarituḥ ratninīm kṛtam ubhā śaṃsam nāsatyā āvatam mama
yuvam etam cakrathuḥ sindhuṣu plavam ātmanvantam pakṣiṇam taugryāya kam
yena devatrā manasā nirūhathuḥ supaptanī petathuḥ kṣodasaḥ mahaḥ
avaviddham taugryam apsu antar anārambhaṇe tamasi praviddham
catasraḥ nāvaḥ jaṭhalasya juṣṭāḥ ud aśvibhyām iṣitāḥ pārayanti
kaḥ svid vṛkṣaḥ niṣṭhitaḥ madhye arṇasaḥ yam taugryaḥ nādhitaḥ paryaṣasvajat
parṇā mṛgasya pataroḥ iva ārabhe ud aśvinau ūhathuḥ śromatāya kam
tat vām narā nāsatyau anu syāt yat vām mānāsaḥ ucatham avocan
asmāt adya sadasaḥ somyāt ā vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
tam yuñjāthām manasaḥ yaḥ javīyān tri vandhuraḥ vṛṣaṇā yaḥ tri cakraḥ
yena upayāthaḥ su kṛtaḥ duroṇam tri dhātunā patathaḥ viḥ na parṇaiḥ
suvṛt rathaḥ vartate yan abhi kṣām yat tiṣṭhathaḥ kratumantā anu pṛkṣe
vapuḥ vapuṣyā sacatām iyam gīḥ divaḥ duhitrā uṣasā sacethe
ā tiṣṭhatam suvṛtam yaḥ rathaḥ vām anu vratāni vartate haviṣmān
yena narā nāsatyā iṣayadhyai vartiḥ yāthaḥ tanayāya tmane ca
mā vām vṛkaḥ mā vṛkīḥ ā dadharṣīt mā pari varktam uta mā ati dhaktam
ayam vām bhāgaḥ nihitaḥ iyam gīḥ dasrau ime vām nidhayaḥ madhūnām
yuvām gotamaḥ purumīﾱhaḥ atriḥ dasrāḥ havate avase haviṣmān
diśam na diṣṭām ṛjūyā iva yantā me havam nāsatyā upa yātam
atāriṣma tamasaḥ pāram asya prati vām stomaḥ aśvinau adhāyi
ā iha yātam pathibhiḥ deva yānaiḥ vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
tā vām adya tau aparam huvema ucchantyām uṣasi vahniḥ ukthaiḥ
nāsatyā kuha cit santau aryaḥ divaḥ napātā sudāstarāya
asme u su vṛṣaṇā mādayethām ud paṇīn hatam ūrmyā madantā
śrutam me acchoktibhiḥ matīnām eṣṭā narā nicetārā ca karṇaiḥ
śriye pūṣan iṣukṛtā iva devā nāsatyā vahatum sūryāyāḥ
vacyante vām kakuhāḥ apsu jātāḥ yugā jūrṇā iva varuṇasya bhūreḥ
asme sā vām mādhvī rātiḥ astu stomam hinotam mānyasya kāroḥ
anu yat vām śravasyā su dānū su vīryāya carṣaṇayaḥ madanti
eṣa vām stomaḥ aśvinau akāri mānebhiḥ maghavānā suvṛkti
yātam vartiḥ tanayāya tmane ca agastye nāsatyāḥ madantā
atāriṣma tamasaḥ pāram asya prati vām stomaḥ aśvinau adhāyi
ā iha yātam pathibhiḥ deva yānaiḥ vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
katarā pūrvā katarā aparā ayoḥ kathā jāte kavayaḥ kaḥ vi veda
viśvam tmanā bibhṛtaḥ yat ha nāma vi vartete ahanī cakriyā iva
bhūrim dve a carantī carantam padvantam garbham apadī dadhāte
nityam na sūnum pitroḥ upasthe dyāvā rakṣatam pṛthivī naḥ abhvāt
anehaḥ dātram aditeḥ anarvam huve svarvat avadham namasvat
tat rodasī janayatam jaritre dyāvā rakṣatam pṛthivī naḥ abhvāt
a tapyamāne avasā avantī anu syāma rodasī deva putre
ubhe devānām ubhayebhiḥ ahnām dyāvā rakṣatam pṛthivī naḥ abhvāt
saṃgacchamāne yuvatī samante svasārā jāmī pitroḥ upasthe
abhijighrantī bhuvanasya nābhim dyāvā rakṣatam pṛthivī naḥ abhvāt
urvī sadmanī bṛhatī ṛtena huve devānām avasā janitrī
dadhāte ye amṛtam su pratīke dyāvā rakṣatam pṛthivī naḥ abhvāt
urvī pṛthvī bahule dūreante upa bruve namasā yajñe asmin
dadhāte ye subhage su pratūrtī dyāvā rakṣatam pṛthivī naḥ abhvāt
devān vā yat cakṛmā kaccit āgaḥ sakhāyam vā sadam id jāspatim vā
iyam dhīḥ bhūyāḥ avayānam eṣām dyāvā rakṣatam pṛthivī naḥ abhvāt
ubhā śaṃsā naryā mām aviṣṭām ubhe mām ūtī avasā sacetām
bhūri cit aryaḥ sudāstarāya iṣā madantaḥ iṣayema devāḥ
ṛtam dive tat avocam pṛthivyai abhiśrāvāya prathamam sumedhāḥ
pātām avadyāt duritāt abhīke pitā mātā ca rakṣatām avobhiḥ
idam dyāvāpṛthivī satyam astu pitar mātar yat iha upabruve vām
bhūtam devānām avame avobhiḥ vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
ā naḥ iﾱābhiḥ vidathe su śasti viśvānaraḥ savitā devaḥ etu
api yathā yuvānaḥ matsatha naḥ viśvam jagat abhipitve manīṣā
ā naḥ viśve āskrāḥ gamantu devāḥ mitraḥ aryamā varuṇaḥ sajoṣāḥ
bhuvan yathā naḥ viśve vṛdhāsaḥ karan _ vithuram na śavaḥ
preṣṭham vaḥ atithim gṛṇīṣe agnim śastibhiḥ turvaṇiḥ sajoṣāḥ
asat yathā naḥ varuṇaḥ su kīrtiḥ iṣaḥ ca parṣat ari gūrtaḥ sūriḥ
upa vaḥ eṣe namasā jigīṣā uṣāsānaktā su dughā iva dhenuḥ
samāne ahan vimimānaḥ arkam viṣurūpe payasi sasmin ūdhan
uta naḥ ahiḥ budhnyaḥ mayaḥ kaḥ śiśum na pipyuṣī iva veti sindhuḥ
yena napātam apām junāma manaḥ juvaḥ vṛṣaṇaḥ yam vahanti
uta naḥ īm tvaṣṭā gantu acchā smat sūribhiḥ abhipitve sajoṣāḥ
ā vṛtrahā indraḥ carṣaṇi prāḥ tuviṣṭamaḥ narām naḥ iha gamyāḥ
uta naḥ īm matayaḥ aśva yogāḥ śiśum na gāvaḥ taruṇam rihanti
tam īm giraḥ janayaḥ na patnīḥ surabhiṣṭamam narām nasanta
uta naḥ īm marutaḥ vṛddha senāḥ smat rodasī samanasaḥ sadantu
pṛṣat aśvāsaḥ avanayaḥ na rathāḥ riśādasaḥ mitra yujaḥ na devāḥ
pra nu yat eṣām mahinā cikitre pra yuñjate prayujaḥ te suvṛkti
adha yat eṣām sudine na śaruḥ viśvam ā iriṇam pruṣāyanta senāḥ
pra u aśvinau avase kṛṇudhvam pra pūṣaṇam sva tavasaḥ hi santi
a dveṣaḥ viṣṇuḥ vātaḥ ṛbhukṣāḥ acchā sumnāya vavṛtīya devān
iyam sā vaḥ asme dīdhitiḥ yajatrā apiprāṇī ca sadanī ca bhūyāḥ
ni yā deveṣu yatate vasūyuḥ vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
pitum nu stoṣam mahaḥ dharmāṇam taviṣīm
yasya tritaḥ vi ojasā vṛtram viparvam ardayat
svādo pitaḥ madho pitaḥ vayam tvā vavṛmahe
asmākam avitā bhava
upa naḥ pito ā cara śivaḥ śivābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
mayobhuḥ adviṣeṇyaḥ sakhā su śevaḥ advayāḥ
tava tye pito rasāḥ rajāṃsi anu viṣṭhitāḥ
divi vātāḥ iva śritāḥ
tava tye pito dadataḥ tava svādiṣṭha te pito
pra svādmānaḥ rasānām tuvi grīvāḥ iva īrate
tve pito mahānām devānām manaḥ hitam
akāri cāru ketunā tava ahim avasā avadhīt
yat adaḥ pito ajagan vivasva parvatānām
atrā cit naḥ madho pito aram bhakṣāya gamyāḥ
yat apām oṣadhīnām pariṃśam āriśāmahe
vāta āpe pīvaḥ id bhava
yat te soma gava āśiraḥ yava āśiraḥ bhajāmahe
vāta āpe pīvaḥ id bhava
karambhaḥ oṣadhe bhava pīvaḥ vṛkkaḥ udārathiḥ
vāta āpe pīvaḥ id bhava
tam tvā vayam pito vacobhiḥ gāvaḥ na havyā suṣūdima
devebhyaḥ tvā sadhamādam asmabhyam tvā sadhamādam
samiddhaḥ adya rājasi devaḥ devaiḥ sahasra jit
dūtaḥ havyā kaviḥ vaha
tanūnapād ṛtam yate madhvā yajñaḥ sam ajyate
dadhat sahasriṇīḥ iṣaḥ
ājuhvānaḥ naḥ īḍyaḥ devāṁ ā vakṣi yajñiyān
agne sahasra sāḥ asi
prācīnam barhiḥ ojasā sahasra vīram astṛṇan
yatra ādityāḥ virājatha
virāj samrāj vibhvīḥ prabhvīḥ bahvīḥ ca bhūyasīḥ ca yāḥ
duraḥ ghṛtāni akṣaran
su rukme hi supeśasā adhi śriyā virājataḥ
uṣāsau ā iha sīdatām
prathamā hi suvācasā hotārā daivyā kavī
yajñam naḥ yakṣatām imam
bhārati iﾱe sarasvati yāḥ vaḥ sarvāḥ upabruve
tāḥ naḥ codayata śriye
tvaṣṭā rūpāṇi hi prabhuḥ paśūn viśvān samānaje
teṣām naḥ sphātim ā yaja
upa tmanyā vanaspate pāthaḥ devebhyaḥ sṛja
agniḥ havyāni siṣvadat
purogāḥ agniḥ devānām gāyatreṇa sam ajyate
svāhākṛtīṣu rocate
agne naya su pathā rāye asmān viśvāni deva vayunāni vidvān
yuyodhi asmat juhurāṇam enaḥ bhūyiṣṭhām te namauktim vidhema
agne tvam pāraya navyaḥ asmān svastibhiḥ ati durgāṇi viśvā
pūḥ ca pṛthvī bahulā naḥ urvī bhava tokāya tanayāya śam yoḥ
agne tvam asmat yuyodhi amīvāḥ an agni trāḥ abhī amanta kṛṣṭīḥ
punar asmabhyam suvitāya deva kṣām viśvebhiḥ amṛtebhiḥ yajatra
pāhi naḥ agne pāyubhiḥ ajasraiḥ uta priye sadane ā śuśukvān
mā te bhayam jaritāram yaviṣṭha nūnam vidat mā aparam sahasvas
mā naḥ agne ava sṛjaḥ aghāya aviṣyave ripave ducchunāyai
mā datvate daśate mā adate naḥ mā rīṣate sahasāvan parā dāḥ
vi gha tvāvāṁ ṛta jāta yaṃsat gṛṇānaḥ agne tanve varūtham
viśvāt ririkṣoḥ uta vā ninitsoḥ abhihrutām asi hi deva viṣpaś
tvam tāṁ agne ubhayān vi vidvān veṣi prapitve manuṣaḥ yajatra
abhipitve manave śāsyaḥ bhūḥ marmṛjenyaḥ uśigbhiḥ na akraḥ
avocāma nivacanāni asmin mānasya sūnuḥ sahasāne agnau
vayam sahasram ṛṣibhiḥ sanema vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
anarvāṇam vṛṣabham mandra jihvam bṛhaspatim vardhaya navyam arkaiḥ
gāthānyaḥ su rucaḥ yasya devāḥ āśṛṇvanti navamānasya martāḥ
tam ṛtviyāḥ upa vācaḥ sacante sargaḥ na yaḥ devayatām asarji
bṛhaspatiḥ sa hi añjas varāṃsi vibhva abhavat sam ṛte mātariśvā
upastutim namasaḥ udyatim ca ślokam yaṃsat savitā iva pra bāhū
asya kratvā ahanyaḥ yaḥ asti mṛgaḥ na bhīmaḥ arakṣasaḥ tuviṣmān
asya ślokaḥ divi iyate pṛthivyām atyaḥ na yaṃsat yakṣa bhṛt vicetāḥ
mṛgāṇām na hetayaḥ yanti ca imāḥ bṛhaspateḥ ahi māyāṁ abhi dyūn
ye tvā deva usrikam manyamānāḥ pāpāḥ bhadram upajīvanti pajrāḥ
na dūḍhye anu dadāsi vāmam bṛhaspate cayase id piyārum
supraituḥ su yavasaḥ na panthāḥ durniyantuḥ pariprītaḥ na mitraḥ
anarvāṇaḥ abhi ye cakṣate naḥ apīvṛtāḥ aporṇuvantaḥ asthuḥ
sam yam stubhaḥ avanayaḥ na yanti samudram na sravataḥ rodha cakrāḥ
sa vidvāṁ ubhayam caṣṭe antar bṛhaspatiḥ taraḥ āpaḥ ca gṛdhraḥ
evā mahaḥ tuvi jātaḥ tuviṣmān bṛhaspatiḥ vṛṣabhaḥ dhāyi devaḥ
sa naḥ stutaḥ vīravat dhātu gomat vidyāma iṣam vṛjanam jīra dānum
kaṅkataḥ na kaṅkataḥ atho satīna kaṅkataḥ
dvau iti pluṣī iti ni adṛṣṭāḥ alipsata
adṛṣṭān hanti āyatī atho hanti parāyatī
atho avaghnatī hanti atho pinaṣṭi piṃṣatī
śarāsaḥ kuśarāsaḥ darbhāsaḥ sairyāḥ uta
mauñjāḥ adṛṣṭāḥ vairiṇāḥ sarve sākam ni alipsata
ni gāvaḥ goṣṭhe asadan ni mṛgāsaḥ avikṣata
ni ketavaḥ janānām ni adṛṣṭāḥ alipsata
ete u tye prati adṛśran pradoṣam taskarāḥ iva
adṛṣṭāḥ viśva dṛṣṭāḥ pratibuddhāḥ abhūtana
dyauḥ vaḥ pitā pṛthivī mātā somaḥ bhrātā aditiḥ svasā
adṛṣṭāḥ viśva dṛṣṭāḥ tiṣṭhata ilayata su kam
ye aṃsyāḥ ye aṅgyāḥ sūcīkāḥ ye prakaṅkatāḥ
adṛṣṭāḥ kim cana iha vaḥ sarve sākam ni jasyata
ud purastāt sūryaḥ eti viśva dṛṣṭaḥ adṛṣṭa hā
adṛṣṭān sarvān jambhayan sarvāḥ ca yātudhānyaḥ
ud apaptat asau sūryaḥ puru viśvāni jūrvan
ādityaḥ parvatebhyaḥ viśva dṛṣṭaḥ adṛṣṭa hā
sūrye viṣam ā sajāmi dṛtim surāvataḥ gṛhe
sa u cit nu na marāti na u vayam marāma āre asya yojanam hariṣṭhāḥ madhu tvā madhulā cakāra
iyattikā śakuntikā sakā jaghāsa te viṣam
sa u cit nu na marāti na u vayam marāma āre asya yojanam hariṣṭhāḥ madhu tvā madhulā cakāra
tris sapta viṣpuliṅgakā viṣasya puṣyam akṣan
tāḥ cit nu na maranti na u vayam marāma āre asya yojanam hariṣṭhāḥ madhu tvā madhulā cakāra
navānām navatīnām viṣasya ropuṣīṇām
sarvāsām agrabham nāma āre asya yojanam hariṣṭhāḥ madhu tvā madhulā cakāra
tris sapta mayūryaḥ sapta svasāraḥ agruvaḥ
tāḥ te viṣam vi jabhrire udakam kumbhinīḥ iva
iyattakaḥ kuṣumbhakaḥ takam bhinadmi aśmanā
tatas viṣam pra vāvṛte parācīḥ anu saṃvataḥ
kuṣumbhakaḥ tat abravīt gireḥ pravartamānakaḥ
vṛścikasya arasam viṣam arasam vṛścika te viṣam
tvam agne dyubhiḥ tvam āśuśukṣaṇiḥ tvam adbhyaḥ tvam aśmanas pari
tvam vanebhyaḥ tvam oṣadhībhyaḥ tvam nṛṇām nṛpate jāyase śuciḥ
tava agne hotram tava potram ṛtviyam tava neṣṭram tvam agnidh ṛtāyataḥ
tava praśāstram tvam adhvarīyasi brahmā ca asi gṛhapatiḥ ca naḥ dame
tvam agne indraḥ vṛṣabhaḥ satām asi tvam viṣṇuḥ urugāyaḥ namasyaḥ
tvam brahmā rayi vid brahmaṇaspate tvam vidhartar sacase purandhyā
tvam agne rājā varuṇaḥ dhṛta vrataḥ tvam mitraḥ bhavasi dasmaḥ īḍyaḥ
tvam aryamā sat patiḥ yasya saṃbhujam tvam aṃśaḥ vidathe deva bhājayuḥ
tvam agne tvaṣṭā vidhate su vīryam tava gnāvas mitra mahas sajātyam
tvam āśuhemā rariṣe su aśvyam tvam narām śardhaḥ asi purūvasuḥ
tvam agne rudraḥ asuraḥ mahaḥ divaḥ tvam śardhaḥ mārutam pṛkṣaḥ īśiṣe
tvam vātaiḥ aruṇaiḥ yāsi śaṅgayaḥ tvam pūṣā vidhataḥ pāsi nu tmanā
tvam agne draviṇaḥ dāḥ araṅkṛte tvam devaḥ savitā ratna dhāḥ asi
tvam bhagaḥ nṛpate vasvaḥ īśiṣe tvam pāyuḥ dame yaḥ te avidhat
tvām agne dame ā viśpatim viśaḥ tvām rājānam suvidatram ṛñjate
tvam viśvāni su anīka patyase tvam sahasrāṇi śatā daśa prati
tvām agne pitaram iṣṭibhiḥ naraḥ tvām bhrātrāya śamyā tanūrucam
tvam putraḥ bhavasi yaḥ te avidhat tvam sakhā su śevaḥ pāsi ādhṛṣaḥ
tvam agne ṛbhuḥ āke namasyaḥ tvam vājasya kṣumataḥ rāyaḥ īśiṣe
tvam vi bhāsi anu _ dāvane tvam viśikṣuḥ asi yajñam ātaniḥ
tvam agne aditiḥ deva dāśuṣe tvam hotrā bhāratī vardhase girā
tvam iḍā śata himā asi dakṣase tvam vṛtra hāḥ vasu pate sarasvatī
tvam agne su bhṛtaḥ uttamam vayaḥ tava spārhe varṇe ā saṃdṛśi śriyaḥ
tvam vājaḥ prataraṇaḥ bṛhan asi tvam rayiḥ bahulaḥ viśvatas pṛthuḥ
tvām agne ādityāsaḥ āsyam tvām jihvām śucayaḥ cakrire kave
tvām rātiṣācaḥ adhvareṣu saścire tve devāḥ haviḥ adanti āhutam
tve agne viśve amṛtāsaḥ adruhaḥ āsā devāḥ haviḥ adanti āhutam
tvayā martāsaḥ svadante āsutim tvam garbhaḥ vīrudhām jajñiṣe śuciḥ
tvam tān sam ca prati ca asi majmanā agne su jāta pra ca deva ricyase
pṛkṣaḥ yat atra mahinā vi te bhuvat anu dyāvāpṛthivī rodasī ubhe
ye stotṛbhyaḥ go agrām aśva peśasam agne rātim upasṛjanti sūrayaḥ
asmān ca tān ca pra hi neṣi vasyaḥ ā bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
yajñena vardhata jātavedasam agnim yajadhvam haviṣā tanā girā
samidhānam su prayasam svarṇaram dyukṣam hotāram vṛjaneṣu dhūrṣadam
abhi tvā naktīḥ uṣasaḥ vavāśire agne vatsam na svasareṣu dhenavaḥ
divaḥ iva id aratiḥ mānuṣā yugā kṣapaḥ bhāsi puru vāra saṃyataḥ
tam devāḥ budhne rajasaḥ su daṃsasam divaspṛthivyoḥ aratim ni erire
ratham iva vedyam śukra śociṣam agnim mitram na kṣitiṣu praśaṃsyam
tam ukṣamāṇam rajasi sve ā dame candram iva su rucam hvāre ā dadhuḥ
pṛśnyāḥ pataram citayantam akṣabhiḥ pāthaḥ na pāyum janasī ubhe anu
sa hotā viśvam pari bhūtu adhvaram tam u havyaiḥ manuṣaḥ ṛñjate girā
hiriśipraḥ _ jarbhurat dyauḥ na stṛbhiḥ citayat rodasī anu
sa naḥ revat samidhānaḥ svastaye saṃdadasvān rayim asmāsu dīdihi
ā naḥ kṛṇuṣva suvitāya rodasī agne havyā manuṣaḥ deva vītaye
dāḥ naḥ agne bṛhataḥ dāḥ sahasriṇaḥ duraḥ na vājam śrutyai apā vṛdhi
prācī dyāvāpṛthivī brahmaṇā kṛdhi svar na śukram uṣasaḥ vi didyutaḥ
saḥ idhānaḥ uṣasaḥ rāmyāḥ anu svar na dīdet aruṣeṇa bhānunā
hotrābhiḥ agniḥ manuṣaḥ su adhvaraḥ rājā viśām atithiḥ cāruḥ āyave
evā naḥ agne amṛteṣu pūrvya dhīṣ pīpāya bṛhat diveṣu mānuṣā
duhānā dhenuḥ vṛjaneṣu kārave tmanā śatinam puru rūpam iṣaṇi
vayam agne arvatā vā su vīryam brahmaṇā vā citayemā janāṁ ati
asmākam dyumnam adhi pañca kṛṣṭiṣu uccā svar na śuśucīta duṣṭaram
sa naḥ bodhi sahasya praśaṃsyaḥ yasmin su jātāḥ iṣayanta sūrayaḥ
yam agne yajñam upayanti vājinaḥ nitye toke dīdivāṃsam sve dame
ubhayāsaḥ jātavedaḥ syāma te stotāraḥ agne sūrayaḥ ca śarmaṇi
vasvaḥ rāyaḥ puru ścandrasya bhūyasaḥ prajāvataḥ su apatyasya śagdhi naḥ
ye stotṛbhyaḥ go agrām aśva peśasam agne rātim upasṛjanti sūrayaḥ
asmān ca tān ca pra hi neṣi vasyaḥ ā bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
samiddhaḥ agniḥ nihitaḥ pṛthivyām pratyaṅ viśvāni bhuvanāni asthāt
hotā pāvakaḥ pradivaḥ su medhāḥ devaḥ devān yajatu agniḥ arhan
narāśaṃsaḥ prati dhāmāni añjan tisraḥ divaḥ prati mahnā su arciḥ
ghṛta pruṣā manasā havyam undan mūrdhan yajñasya sam anaktu devān
īḍitaḥ agne manasā naḥ arhan devān yakṣi mānuṣāt pūrvaḥ adya
saḥ ā vaha marutām śardhaḥ acyutam indram naraḥ barhiṣadam yajadhvam
deva barhiḥ vardhamānam su vīram stīrṇam rāye subharam vedī asyām
ghṛtena aktam vasavaḥ sīdata idam viśve devāḥ ādityāḥ yajñiyāsaḥ
vi śrayantām urviyā hūyamānāḥ dvāraḥ devīḥ su prāyaṇāḥ namobhiḥ
vyacasvatīḥ vi prathantām ajuryāḥ varṇam punānāḥ yaśasam su vīram
sādhu apāṃsi sanatā naḥ ukṣite uṣāsānaktā vayyā iva raṇvite
tantum tatam saṃvayantī samīcī yajñasya peśaḥ sudughe payasvatī
daivyā hotārā prathamā viduṣṭaraḥ ṛju yakṣataḥ sam ṛcā vapuṣṭarā
devān yajantau ṛtuthā sam añjataḥ nābhā pṛthivyāḥ adhi sānuṣu triṣu
sarasvatī sādhayantī dhiyam naḥ iḍā devī bhāratī viśvatūrtiḥ
tisraḥ devīḥ svadhayā barhiḥ ā idam acchidram pāntu śaraṇam niṣadya
piśaṅga rūpaḥ subharaḥ vayodhāḥ śruṣṭī vīraḥ jāyate deva kāmaḥ
prajām tvaṣṭā vi ṣyatu nābhim asme athā devānām api etu pāthaḥ
vanaspatiḥ avasṛjan upa sthāt agniḥ haviḥ sūdayāti pra dhībhiḥ
tridhā samaktam nayatu prajānan devebhyaḥ daivyaḥ śamitā upa havyam
ghṛtam mimikṣe ghṛtam asya yoniḥ ghṛte śritaḥ ghṛtam u asya dhāma
anuṣvadham ā vaha mādayasva svāhākṛtam vṛṣabha vakṣi havyam
huve vaḥ sudyotmānam suvṛktim viśām agnim atithim su prayasam
mitraḥ iva yaḥ didhiṣāyyaḥ bhūt devaḥ ādeve jane jātavedāḥ
imam vidhantaḥ apām sadhasthe dvitā adhuḥ bhṛgavaḥ vikṣu āyoḥ
eṣa viśvāni abhī astu bhūmā devānām agniḥ aratiḥ jīra aśvaḥ
agnim devāsaḥ mānuṣīṣu vikṣu priyam dhuḥ kṣeṣyantaḥ na mitram
sa dīdayat uśatīḥ ūrmyāḥ ā dakṣāyyaḥ yaḥ dāsvate dame ā
asya raṇvā svasya iva puṣṭiḥ saṃdṛṣṭiḥ asya hiyānasya dakṣoḥ
vi yaḥ bharibhrat oṣadhīṣu jihvām atyaḥ na rathyaḥ dodhavīti vārān
ā yat me abhvam vanadaḥ pananta uśigbhyaḥ na amimīta varṇam
sa citreṇa cikite raṃsu bhāsā jujurvāṁ yaḥ muhur ā yuvā bhūt
ā yaḥ vanā tātṛṣāṇaḥ na bhāti vār ṇa pathā rathyā iva svānīt
kṛṣṇa adhvā tapuḥ raṇvaḥ ciketa dyauḥ iva smayamānaḥ nabhobhiḥ
sa yaḥ vi asthāt abhi dakṣat urvīm paśuḥ nā eti svayuḥ a gopāḥ
agniḥ śociṣmāṁ atasāni uṣṇan kṛṣṇa vyathiḥ asvadayat na bhūma
nū te pūrvasya avasaḥ adhītau tṛtīye vidathe manma śaṃsi
asme agne saṃyat vīram bṛhantam kṣumantam vājam su apatyam rayim dāḥ
tvayā yathā gṛtsamadāsaḥ agne guhā vanvanta uparāṁ abhi ṣyuḥ
su vīrāsaḥ abhimātiṣāhaḥ smat sūribhyaḥ gṛṇate tat vayaḥ dhāḥ
hotā ajaniṣṭa cetanaḥ pitā pitṛbhyaḥ ūtaye
prayakṣan jenyam vasu śakema vājinaḥ yamam
ā yasmin sapta raśmayaḥ tatāḥ yajñasya netari
manuṣvat daivyam aṣṭamam potā viśvam tat invati
dadhanve vā yat īm anu vocat brahmāṇi veḥ u tat
pari viśvāni kāvyā nemiḥ cakram iva abhavat
sākam hi śucinā śuciḥ praśāstā kratunā ajani
vidvāṁ asya vratā dhruvā vayāḥ iva anu rohate
tāḥ asya varṇam āyuvaḥ neṣṭuḥ sacanta dhenavaḥ
kuvid tisṛbhyaḥ ā varam svasāraḥ yāḥ idam yayuḥ
yadī mātuḥ upa svasā ghṛtam bharantī asthita
tāsām adhvaryuḥ āgatau yavaḥ vṛṣṭī iva modate
svaḥ svāya dhāyase kṛṇutām ṛtvij ṛtvijam
stomam yajñam ca āt aram vanemā rarimā vayam
yathā vidvāṁ aram karat viśvebhyaḥ yajatebhyaḥ
ayam agne tve api yam yajñam cakṛma vayam
imām me agne samidham imām upasadam vaneḥ
imāḥ u ṣu śrudhī giraḥ
ayā te agne vidhema ūrjaḥ napāt aśvamiṣṭe
enā sūktena su jāta
tam tvā gīrbhiḥ girvaṇasam draviṇasyum draviṇaḥ daḥ
saparyema saparyavaḥ
sa bodhi sūriḥ maghavā vasu pate vasu dāvan
yuyodhi asmat dveṣāṃsi
sa naḥ vṛṣṭim divaḥ pari sa naḥ vājam anarvāṇam
sa naḥ sahasriṇīḥ iṣaḥ
īḍānāya avasyave yaviṣṭha dūta naḥ girā
yajiṣṭha hotar ā gahi
antar hi agne īyase vidvān janmā ubhayā kave
dūtaḥ janyā iva mitryaḥ
sa vidvāṁ ā ca piprayaḥ yakṣi cikitvaḥ ānuṣak
ā ca asmin satsi barhiṣi
śreṣṭham yaviṣṭha bhārata agne dyumantam ā bhara
vaso puruspṛham rayim
mā naḥ arātiḥ īśata devasya martyasya ca
parṣi tasyāḥ uta dviṣaḥ
viśvāḥ uta tvayā vayam dhārāḥ udanyāḥ iva
ati gāhemahi dviṣaḥ
śuciḥ pāvaka vandyaḥ agne bṛhat vi rocase
tvam ghṛtebhiḥ āhutaḥ
tvam naḥ asi bhārata agne vaśābhiḥ ukṣabhiḥ
aṣṭāpadībhiḥ āhutaḥ
dru annaḥ sarpiḥ āsutiḥ pratnaḥ hotā vareṇyaḥ
sahasas putraḥ adbhutaḥ
vājayan iva nū rathān yogāṁ agneḥ upa stuhi
yaśastamasya mīḍhuṣaḥ
yaḥ su nīthaḥ dadāśuṣe ajuryaḥ jarayan arim
cāru pratīkaḥ āhutaḥ
yaḥ u śriyā dameṣu ā doṣā uṣasi praśasyate
yasya vratam na mīyate
ā yaḥ svar ṇa bhānunā citraḥ vibhāti arciṣā
añjānaḥ ajaraiḥ abhi
atrim anu sva rājyam agnim ukthāni vāvṛdhuḥ
viśvāḥ adhi śriyaḥ dadhe
agneḥ indrasya somasya devānām ūtibhiḥ vayam
a riṣyantaḥ sacemahi abhi ṣyāma pṛtanyataḥ
ni hotā hotṛṣadane vidānaḥ tveṣaḥ dīdivāṁ asadat su dakṣaḥ
adabdha vrata pramatiḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ sahasrambharaḥ śuci jihvaḥ agniḥ
tvam dūtaḥ tvam u naḥ paraspāḥ tvam vasyaḥ ā vṛṣabha praṇetā
agne tokasya naḥ tane tanūnām aprayucchan dīdyat bodhi gopāḥ
vidhema te parame janman agne vidhema stomaiḥ avare sadhasthe
yasmāt yoneḥ udāritha yaje tam pra tve havīṃṣi juhure samiddhe
agne yajasva haviṣā yajīyān śruṣṭī deṣṇam abhi gṛṇīhi rādhaḥ
tvam hi asi rayi patiḥ rayīṇām tvam śukrasya vacasaḥ manotā
ubhayam te na kṣīyate vasavyam dive dive jāyamānasya dasma
kṛdhi kṣumantam jaritāram agne kṛdhi patim su apatyasya rāyaḥ
sainānīkena suvidatraḥ asme yaṣṭā devāṁ āyajiṣṭhaḥ svasti
adabdhaḥ gopāḥ uta naḥ paraspāḥ agne dyumat uta revat didīhi
johūtraḥ agniḥ prathamaḥ _ pade manuṣā yat samiddhaḥ
śriyam vasānaḥ amṛtaḥ vicetāḥ marmṛjenyaḥ śravasyaḥ sa vājī
śrūyāḥ agniḥ citrabhānuḥ havam me viśvābhiḥ gīrbhiḥ amṛtaḥ vicetāḥ
śyāvā ratham vahataḥ rohitāḥ _ cakre vibhṛtraḥ
uttānāyām ajanayan suṣūtam bhuvat agniḥ puru peśāsu garbhaḥ
śiriṇāyām cit aktunā mahobhiḥ a parīvṛtaḥ vasati pracetāḥ
jigharmi agnim haviṣā ghṛtena pratikṣiyantam bhuvanāni viśvā
pṛthum _ vayasā bṛhantam vyaciṣṭham annaiḥ rabhasam dṛśānam
_ viśvatas pratyañcam jigharmi arakṣasā manasā tat juṣeta
marya śrī spṛhayat varṇaḥ agniḥ na abhimṛśe tanvā jarbhurāṇaḥ
jñeyāḥ bhāgam sahasānaḥ vareṇa tvādūtāsaḥ manu vat vadema
anūnam agnim juhvā vacasyā madhupṛcam dhanasāḥ johavīmi
śrudhī havam indra mā riṣaṇyaḥ syāma te dāvane vasūnām
imāḥ hi tvām ūrjaḥ vardhayanti vasūyavaḥ sindhavaḥ na kṣarantaḥ
sṛjaḥ mahīḥ indra yāḥ apinvaḥ pariṣṭhitāḥ ahinā śūra pūrvīḥ
amartyam cit dāsam manyamānam avābhinat ukthaiḥ vāvṛdhānaḥ
uktheṣu id nu śūra yeṣu cākan stomeṣu indra rudriyeṣu ca
tubhyā id etāḥ yāsu mandasānaḥ pra vāyave sisrate na śubhrāḥ
śubhram nu te śuṣmam vardhayantaḥ śubhram vajram bāhvoḥ dadhānāḥ
śubhraḥ tvam indra vāvṛdhānaḥ asme dāsīḥ viśaḥ sūryeṇa sahyāḥ
guhā hitam guhyam gūḍham apsu apīvṛtam māyinam kṣiyantam
uta u apaḥ dyām tastabhvāṃsam ahan ahim śūra vīryeṇa
stavā nu te indra pūrvyā mahāni uta stavāma nūtanā kṛtāni
stavā vajram bāhvoḥ uśantam stavā harī sūryasya ketū
harī nu te indra vājayantā ghṛtaścutam svāram asvārṣṭām
vi samanā bhūmiḥ aprathiṣṭa araṃsta parvataḥ cit sariṣyan
ni parvataḥ sādi aprayucchan sam mātṛbhiḥ vāvaśānaḥ akrān
dūre pāre vāṇīm vardhayantaḥ indra iṣitām dhamanim paprathat ni
indraḥ mahāṁ sindhum āśayānam māyāvinam vṛtram asphurat niḥ
arejetām rodasī bhiyāne kanikradataḥ vṛṣṇaḥ asya vajrāt
aroravīt vṛṣṇaḥ asya vajraḥ amānuṣam yat mānuṣaḥ nijūrvāt
ni māyinaḥ dānavasya māyāḥ apādayat papivān sutasya
pibā piba id indra śūra somam mandantu tvā mandinaḥ sutāsaḥ
pṛṇantaḥ te kukṣī vardhayantu itthā sutaḥ pauraḥ indram āva
tve indra api abhūma viprāḥ dhiyam vanema ṛtayā sapantaḥ
avasyavaḥ dhīmahi praśastim sadyas te rāyaḥ dāvane syāma
syāma te te indra ye te ūtī avasyavaḥ ūrjam vardhayantaḥ
śuṣmintamam yam cākanāma deva asme rayim rāsi vīravantam
rāsi kṣayam rāsi mitram asme rāsi śardhaḥ indra mārutam naḥ
sajoṣasaḥ ye ca mandasānāḥ pra vāyavaḥ pānti agraṇītim
vyantu id nu yeṣu mandasānaḥ tṛpat somam pāhi drahyat indra
asmān su pṛtsu ā tarutra avardhayaḥ dyām bṛhadbhiḥ arkaiḥ
bṛhantaḥ id nu ye te tarutra ukthebhiḥ vā sumnam āvivāsān
stṛṇānāsaḥ barhiḥ pastyāvat tvotāḥ id indra vājam agman
ugreṣu id nu śūra mandasānaḥ trikadrukeṣu pāhi somam indra
pradodhuvat śmaśruṣu prīṇānaḥ yāhi haribhyām sutasya pītim
dhiṣvā śavaḥ śūra yena vṛtram avābhinat dānum aurṇavābham
apāvṛṇoḥ jyotiḥ āryāya ni savyatas sādi dasyuḥ indra
sanema ye te ūtibhiḥ tarantaḥ viśvā spṛdhaḥ āryeṇa dasyūn
asmabhyam tat tvāṣṭram viśvarūpam arandhayaḥ sākhyasya tritāya
asya suvānasya mandinaḥ tritasya ni arbudam vāvṛdhānaḥ astaḥ
avartayat sūryaḥ na cakram bhinat valam indraḥ aṅgirasvān
nūnam sā te prati varam jaritre duhīyat indra dakṣiṇā maghonī
śikṣa stotṛbhyaḥ mā ati dhak bhagaḥ naḥ bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
yaḥ jātaḥ eva prathamaḥ manasvān devaḥ devān kratunā paryabhūṣat
yasya śuṣmāt rodasī abhyasetām nṛmṇasya mahnā sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yaḥ pṛthivīm vyathamānām adṛṃhat yaḥ parvatān prakupitāṁ aramṇāt
yaḥ antarikṣam vimame varīyaḥ yaḥ dyām astabhnāt sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yaḥ hatvā ahim ariṇāt sapta sindhūn yaḥ gāḥ udājat apadhā valasya
yaḥ aśmanoḥ antar agnim jajāna saṃvṛj samatsu sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yena imā viśvā cyavanā kṛtāni yaḥ dāsam varṇam adharam guhā akaḥ
śvaghnī iva yaḥ jigīvān lakṣam ādat aryaḥ puṣṭāni sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yam smā pṛcchanti kuha sa iti ghoram uta īm āhuḥ nā eṣaḥ asti iti enam
saḥ aryaḥ puṣṭīḥ vijaḥ ivā mināti śrad asmai dhatta sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yaḥ radhrasya coditā yaḥ kṛśasya yaḥ brahmaṇaḥ nādhamānasya kīreḥ
yukta grāvṇaḥ yaḥ avitā su śipraḥ suta somasya sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yasya aśvāsaḥ pradiśi yasya gāvaḥ yasya grāmāḥ yasya viśve rathāsaḥ
yaḥ sūryam yaḥ uṣasam jajāna yaḥ apām netā sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yam krandasī saṃyatī vihvayete pare avare ubhayāḥ amitrāḥ
samānam cit ratham ātasthivāṃsā nānā havete sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yasmāt na ṛte vijayante janāsaḥ yam yudhyamānāḥ avase havante
yaḥ viśvasya pratimānam babhūva yaḥ acyuta cyut sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yaḥ śaśvataḥ mahi enaḥ dadhānān a manyamānān śarvā jaghāna
yaḥ śardhate na anudadāti śṛdhyām yaḥ dasyoḥ hantā sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yaḥ śambaram parvateṣu kṣiyantam catvāriṃśyām śaradi anvavindat
ojāyamānam yaḥ ahim jaghāna dānum śayānam sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yaḥ sapta raśmiḥ vṛṣabhaḥ tuviṣmān avāsṛjat sartave sapta sindhūn
yaḥ rauhiṇam asphurat vajra bāhuḥ dyām ārohantam sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
dyāvā cit asmai pṛthivī namete śuṣmāt cit asya parvatāḥ bhayante
yaḥ soma pāḥ nicitaḥ vajra bāhuḥ yaḥ vajra hastaḥ sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yaḥ sunvantam avati yaḥ pacantam yaḥ śaṃsantam yaḥ śaśamānam ūtī
yasya brahma vardhanam yasya somaḥ yasya idam rādhaḥ sa janāsaḥ indraḥ
yaḥ sunvate pacate dudhraḥ ā cit vājam dardarṣi sa kila asi satyaḥ
vayam te indra viśvaha priyāsaḥ su vīrāsaḥ vidatham ā vadema
ṛtuḥ janitrī tasyāḥ apas pari makṣū jātaḥ āviśat yāsu vardhate
tat āhanāḥ abhavat pipyuṣī payaḥ aṃśoḥ pīyūṣam prathamam tat ukthyam
sadhrīm ā yanti pari bibhratīḥ payaḥ viśvapsnyāya pra bharanta bhojanam
samānaḥ adhvā pravatām anuṣyade yaḥ tā akṛṇoḥ prathamam sa asi ukthyaḥ
anu ekaḥ vadati yat dadāti tat rūpā minan tad apāḥ ekaḥ īyate
viśvāḥ ekasya vinudaḥ titikṣate yaḥ tā akṛṇoḥ prathamam sa asi ukthyaḥ
prajābhyaḥ puṣṭim vibhajantaḥ āsate rayim iva pṛṣṭham prabhavantam āyate
asinvan daṃṣṭraiḥ pituḥ atti bhojanam yaḥ tā akṛṇoḥ prathamam sa asi ukthyaḥ
adha akṛṇoḥ pṛthivīm saṃdṛśe dive yaḥ dhautīnām ahi han āriṇak pathaḥ
tam tvā stomebhiḥ udabhiḥ na vājinam devam devāḥ ajanan sa asi ukthyaḥ
yaḥ bhojanam ca dayase ca vardhanam ārdrāt ā śuṣkam madhumat dudohitha
sa śevadhim ni dadhiṣe vivasvati viśvasya ekaḥ īśiṣe sa asi ukthyaḥ
yaḥ puṣpiṇīḥ ca prasvaḥ ca dharmaṇā adhi dāne vi avanīḥ adhārayaḥ
yaḥ ca asamāḥ ajanaḥ didyutaḥ divaḥ uruḥ ūrvām abhitas sa asi ukthyaḥ
yaḥ nārmaram sahavasum nihantave pṛkṣāya ca dāsaveśāya ca avahaḥ
ūrjayantyāḥ apariviṣṭam āsyam uta eva adya puru kṛt sa asi ukthyaḥ
śatam vā yasya daśa sākam ādyaḥ ekasya śruṣṭau yat ha codam āvitha
a rajjau dasyūn sam unap dabhītaye suprāvyaḥ abhavaḥ sā asi ukthyaḥ
viśvā id anu rodhanā asya pauṃsyam daduḥ asmai dadhire kṛtnave dhanam
ṣaḍ astabhnāḥ viṣṭiraḥ pañca saṃdṛśaḥ pari paras abhavaḥ sa asi ukthyaḥ
su pravācanam tava vīra vīryam yat ekena kratunā vindase vasu
jātūṣṭhirasya pra vayaḥ sahasvataḥ yā cakartha sa indra viśvā asi ukthyaḥ
aramayaḥ sarapasaḥ tarāya kam turvītaye ca vayyāya ca srutim
nīcā santam ud anayaḥ parāvṛjam pra andham śroṇam śravayan sa asi ukthyaḥ
asmabhyam tat vaso dānāya rādhaḥ sam arthayasva bahu te vasavyam
indra yat citram śravasyāḥ anu dyūn bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
adhvaryavaḥ bharata indrāya somam ā amatrebhiḥ siñcatā madyam andhaḥ
kāmī hi vīraḥ sadam asya pītim juhota vṛṣṇe tat id eṣa vaṣṭi
adhvaryavaḥ yaḥ apaḥ vavrivāṃsam vṛtram jaghāna aśanyā iva vṛkṣam
tasmai etam bharata _ eṣaḥ indraḥ arhati pītim asya
adhvaryavaḥ yaḥ dṛbhīkam jaghāna yaḥ gāḥ udājat apa hi valam var
tasmai etam antarikṣe na vātam indram somaiḥ ā ūrṇuta jūḥ na vastraiḥ
adhvaryavaḥ yaḥ uraṇam jaghāna nava cakhvāṃsam navatim ca bāhūn
yaḥ arbudam ava nīcā babādhe tam indram somasya bhṛthe hinota
adhvaryavaḥ yaḥ su aśnam jaghāna yaḥ śuṣṇam aśuṣam yaḥ vyaṃsam
yaḥ piprum namucim yaḥ rudhikrām tasmai indrāya andhasaḥ juhota
adhvaryavaḥ yaḥ śatam śambarasya puraḥ bibheda aśmanā iva pūrvīḥ
yaḥ varcinaḥ śatam indraḥ sahasram apāvapat bharatā somam asmai
adhvaryavaḥ yaḥ śatam ā sahasram bhūmyāḥ upasthe avapat jaghanvān
kutsasya āyoḥ atithigvasya vīrān ni āvṛṇak bharatā somam asmai
adhvaryavaḥ yat naraḥ kāmayādhve śruṣṭī vahantaḥ naśathā tat indre
gabhasti pūtam bharata śrutāya indrāya somam yajyavaḥ juhota
adhvaryavaḥ kartanā śruṣṭim asmai vane nipūtam vane ud nayadhvam
juṣāṇaḥ hastyam abhi vāvaśe vaḥ indrāya somam madiram juhota
adhvaryavaḥ payasā udhar yathā goḥ somebhiḥ īm pṛṇata bhojam indram
veda aham asya nibhṛtam me etat ditsantam bhūyas yajataḥ ciketa
adhvaryavaḥ yaḥ divyasya vasvaḥ yaḥ pārthivasya kṣamyasya rājā
tam ūrdaram na pṛṇata yavena indram somebhiḥ tat apaḥ vaḥ astu
asmabhyam tat vaso dānāya rādhaḥ sam arthayasva bahu te vasavyam
indra yat citram śravasyāḥ anu dyūn bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
pra ghā nu asya mahataḥ mahāni satyā satyasya karaṇāni vocam
trikadrukeṣu apibat sutasya asya made ahim indraḥ jaghāna
avaṃśe dyām astabhāyat bṛhantam ā rodasī apṛṇat antarikṣam
sa dhārayat pṛthivīm paprathat ca somasya tā made indraḥ cakāra
sadma iva prācaḥ vi mimāya mānaiḥ vajreṇa khāni atṛṇat nadīnām
vṛthā sṛjat pathibhiḥ dīrghayāthaiḥ somasya tā made indraḥ cakāra
sa pravoḍhṝn parigatyā dabhīteḥ viśvam adhāk āyudham iddhe agnau
sam gobhiḥ aśvaiḥ asṛjat rathebhiḥ somasya tā made indraḥ cakāra
saḥ īm mahīm dhunim etoḥ aramṇāt saḥ asnātṝn apārayat svasti
te utsnāya rayim abhi pra tasthuḥ somasya tā made indraḥ cakāra
sa udañcam sindhum ariṇāt mahitvā vajreṇa anaḥ uṣasaḥ sam pipeṣa
ajavasaḥ javinībhiḥ vivṛścan somasya tā made indraḥ cakāra
sa vidvāṁ apagoham kanīnām āvis bhavan ud atiṣṭhat parāvṛj
prati śroṇa sthāt vi anak acaṣṭa somasya tā made indraḥ cakāra
bhinat valam aṅgirobhiḥ gṛṇānaḥ vi parvatasya dṛṃhitāni airat
riṇak rodhāṃsi kṛtrimāṇi eṣām somasya tā made indraḥ cakāra
svapnena abhyupya cumurim dhunim ca jaghantha dasyum pra dabhītim āvaḥ
rambhī cit atra vivide hiraṇyam somasya tā made indraḥ cakāra
nūnam sā te prati varam jaritre duhīyat indra dakṣiṇā maghonī
śikṣā stotṛbhyaḥ mā ati dhak bhagaḥ naḥ bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
pra vaḥ satām jyeṣṭhatamāya suṣṭutim agnau iva samidhāne haviḥ bhare
indram ajuryam jarayantam ukṣitam sanāt yuvānam avase havāmahe
yasmāt indrāt bṛhataḥ kiṃcana īm ṛte viśvāni asmin saṃbhṛtā adhi vīryā
jaṭhare somam tanvī sahaḥ mahaḥ haste vajram bharati śīrṣaṇi kratum
na kṣoṇībhyām paribhve te indriyam na samudraiḥ parvataiḥ indra te rathaḥ
na te vajram anu aśnoti kaścana yat āśubhiḥ patasi yojanā puru
viśve hi asmai yajatāya dhṛṣṇave kratum bharanti vṛṣabhāya saścate
vṛṣā yajasva haviṣā viduṣṭaraḥ piba indra somam vṛṣabheṇa bhānunā
vṛṣṇaḥ kośaḥ pavate madhvaḥ ūrmiḥ vṛṣabha annāya vṛṣabhāya pātave
vṛṣaṇā adhvaryū vṛṣabhāsaḥ adrayaḥ vṛṣaṇam somam vṛṣabhāya _
vṛṣā te vajraḥ uta te vṛṣā rathaḥ vṛṣaṇā harī vṛṣabhāṇi āyudhā
vṛṣṇaḥ madasya vṛṣabha tvam īśiṣe indra somasya vṛṣabhasya tṛpṇuhi
pra te nāvam na samane vacasyuvam brahmaṇā yāmi savaneṣu dādhṛṣiḥ
kuvid naḥ asya vacasaḥ nibodhiṣat indram utsam na vasunaḥ sicāmahe
purā sambādhāt abhī ā vavṛtsva naḥ dhenuḥ na vatsam yavasasya pipyuṣī
sakṛt su te sumatibhiḥ śatakrato sam patnībhiḥ na vṛṣaṇaḥ nasīmahi
nūnam sā te prati varam jaritre duhīyat indra dakṣiṇā maghonī
śikṣā stotṛbhyaḥ mā ati dhak bhagaḥ naḥ bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
tat asmai navyam aṅgirasvat arcata śuṣmāḥ yat asya pratnathā udīrate
viśvā yat gotrā sahasā parīvṛtā made somasya dṛṃhitāni airayat
sa bhūtu yaḥ ha prathamāya dhāyasaḥ ojaḥ mimānaḥ mahimānam ātirat
śūraḥ yaḥ yutsu tanvam parivyata śīrṣaṇi dyām mahinā prati amuñcata
adha akṛṇoḥ prathamam vīryam mahat yat asya agre brahmaṇā śuṣmam airayaḥ
ratheṣṭhena hari aśvena vicyutāḥ pra jīrayaḥ sisrate sadhryak pṛthak
adhā yaḥ viśvā bhuvanā abhi majmanā īśāna kṛt pravayāḥ abhī avardhata
āt rodasī jyotiṣā vahniḥ ātanot sīvyan tamāṃsi dudhitā sam avyayat
sa prācīnān parvatān dṛṃhat ojasā adharācīnam akṛṇot apām apaḥ
adhārayat pṛthivīm viśva dhāyasam astabhnāt māyayā dyām avasrasaḥ
sa asmai aram bāhubhyām yam pitā akṛṇot viśvasmāt ā januṣaḥ vedasas pari
yenā pṛthivyām ni krivim śayadhyai vajreṇa hatvī avṛṇak tuviṣvaṇiḥ
amājūr iva pitroḥ sacā satī samānāt ā sadasaḥ tvām iye bhagam
kṛdhi praketam upa māsi ā bhara daddhi bhāgam tanvaḥ yena māmahaḥ
bhojam tvām indra vayam huvema dadiḥ ṭvam indra apāṃsi vājān
aviḍḍhi indra citrayā naḥ ūtī kṛdhi vṛṣan indra vasyasaḥ naḥ
nūnam sā te prati varam jaritre duhīyat indra dakṣiṇā maghonī
śikṣā stotṛbhyaḥ mā ati dhak bhagaḥ naḥ bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
prātar rathaḥ navaḥ yoji sasniḥ catur yugaḥ tri kaśaḥ sapta raśmiḥ
daśa aritraḥ manuṣyaḥ svarṣāḥ saḥ iṣṭibhiḥ matibhiḥ raṃhyaḥ bhūt
sa asmai aram prathamam sa dvitīyam uta u tṛtīyam manuṣaḥ sa hotā
anyasyāḥ garbham anye ū jananta saḥ anyebhiḥ sacate jenyaḥ vṛṣā
harī nu kam rathe indrasya yojam āyai su uktena vacasā navena
mā u ṣu tvām atra bahavaḥ hi viprāḥ ni rīraman yajamānāsaḥ anye
ā dvābhyām haribhyām indra yāhi ā caturbhiḥ ā ṣaḍbhiḥ hūyamānaḥ
ā aṣṭābhiḥ daśabhiḥ soma peyam ayam sutaḥ su makha mā mṛdhaḥ kaḥ
ā viṃśatyā triṃśatā yāhi arvāṅ ā catvāriṃśatā haribhiḥ yujānaḥ
ā pañcāśatā su rathebhiḥ indra ā ṣaṣṭyā saptatyā soma peyam
ā aśītyā navatyā yāhi arvāṅ ā śatena haribhiḥ uhyamānaḥ
ayam hi te śunahotreṣu somaḥ indra tvāyā pariṣiktaḥ madāya
mama brahma indra yāhi acchā viśvāḥ harī dhuri dhiṣvā rathasya
purutrā hi vihavyaḥ babhūtha asmin śūra savane mādayasva
na me indreṇa sakhyam vi yoṣat asmabhyam asya dakṣiṇā duhīta
upa jyeṣṭhe varūthe gabhastau prāye prāye jigīvāṃsaḥ syāma
nūnam sā te prati varam jaritre duhīyat indra dakṣiṇā maghonī
śikṣā stotṛbhyaḥ mā ati dhak bhagaḥ naḥ bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
apāyi asya andhasaḥ madāya manīṣiṇaḥ suvānasya prayasaḥ
yasmin indraḥ pradivi vāvṛdhānaḥ okaḥ dadhe brahmaṇyantaḥ ca naraḥ
asya mandānaḥ madhvaḥ vajrahastaḥ ahim indraḥ arṇovṛtam vi vṛścat
pra yat vayaḥ na svasarāṇi acchā prayāṃsi ca nadīnām cakramanta
sa māhinaḥ indraḥ arṇaḥ apām prairayat ahi hā acchā samudram
ajanayat sūryam vidat gāḥ aktunā ahnām vayunāni sādhat
saḥ apratīni manave purūṇi indraḥ dāśat dāśuṣe hanti vṛtram
sadyas yaḥ nṛbhyaḥ atasāyyaḥ bhūt paspṛdhānebhyaḥ sūryasya sātau
sa sunvate indraḥ sūryam ā devaḥ riṇak martyāya stavān
ā yat rayim guhat avadyam asmai bharat aṃśam nā etaśaḥ daśasyan
sa randhayat sadivas sārathaye śuṣṇam aśuṣam kuyavam kutsāya
divodāsāya navatim ca nava indraḥ puraḥ vi airat śambarasya
eva te indra ucatham ahema śravasyā na tmanā vājayantaḥ
aśyāma tat sāptam āśuṣāṇāḥ nanamaḥ vadhar a devasya pīyoḥ
eva te gṛtsamadāḥ śūra manma avasyavaḥ na vayunāni takṣuḥ
brahmaṇyantaḥ indra te navīyaḥ iṣam ūrjam su kṣitim sumnam aśyuḥ
nūnam sā te prati varam jaritre duhīyat indra dakṣiṇā maghonī
śikṣa stotṛbhyaḥ mā ati dhak bhagaḥ naḥ bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
vayam te vayaḥ indra viddhi ṣu ṇaḥ pra bharāmahe vājayuḥ na ratham
vipanyavaḥ dīdhyataḥ manīṣā sumnam iyakṣantaḥ tvāvataḥ nṝn
tvam naḥ indra _ ūtī tvāyataḥ abhiṣṭi pā asi janān
tvam inaḥ dāśuṣaḥ varūtā itthā dhīḥ abhi yaḥ nakṣati tvā
sa naḥ yuvā indraḥ johūtraḥ sakhā śivaḥ narām astu pātā
yaḥ śaṃsantam yaḥ śaśamānam ūtī pacantam ca stuvantam ca praṇeṣat
tam u stuṣe indram tam gṛṇīṣe yasmin purā vāvṛdhuḥ śāśaduḥ ca
sa vasvaḥ kāmam pīparat iyānaḥ brahmaṇyataḥ nūtanasya āyoḥ
saḥ aṅgirasām ucathā jujuṣvān brahmā tūtot indraḥ gātum iṣṇan
muṣṇan uṣasaḥ sūryeṇa stavān aśnasya cit śiśnathat pūrvyāṇi
sa ha śrutaḥ indraḥ nāma devaḥ ūrdhvaḥ bhuvat manuṣe dasmatamaḥ
ava priyam arśasānasya sāhvān śiraḥ bharat dāsasya svadhāvān
sa vṛtrahā indraḥ kṛṣṇa yonīḥ purandaraḥ dāsīḥ airayat vi
ajanayat manave kṣām apaḥ ca satrā śaṃsam yajamānasya tūtot
tasmai tavasyam anu dāyi satrā indrāya devebhiḥ arṇa sātau
prati yat asya vajram bāhvoḥ dhuḥ hatvī dasyūn puraḥ āyasīḥ ni tārīt
nūnam sā te prati varam jaritre duhīyat indra dakṣiṇā maghonī
śikṣā stotṛbhyaḥ mā ati dhak bhagaḥ naḥ bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
viśva jite dhana jite svar jite satrā jite nṛ jite urvarā jite
aśva jite go jite ap jite bhara indrāya somam yajatāya haryatam
_ abhibhaṅgāya vanvate a ṣāḍhāya sahamānāya vedhase
tuvigraye vahnaye duṣṭarītave satrā sāhe namaḥ indrāya vocata
satrā sāhaḥ jana bhakṣaḥ janaṃsahaḥ cyavanaḥ yudhmaḥ anu joṣam ukṣitaḥ
vṛtañcayaḥ sahuriḥ vikṣu āritaḥ indrasya vocam pra kṛtāni vīryā
anānudaḥ vṛṣabhaḥ dodhataḥ vadhaḥ gambhīraḥ ṛṣvaḥ a samaṣṭa kāvyaḥ
radhra codaḥ śnathanaḥ vīḍitas pṛthuḥ indraḥ su yajñaḥ uṣasaḥ svar janat
yajñena gātum apturaḥ vividrire dhiyaḥ hinvānāḥ uśijaḥ manīṣiṇaḥ
abhisvarāḥ niṣadāḥ gāḥ avasyavaḥ indre hinvānāḥ draviṇāni āśata
indra śreṣṭhāni draviṇāni dhehi cittim dakṣasya subhaga tvam asme
poṣam rayīṇām ariṣṭim tanūnām svādmānam vācaḥ sudina tvam ahnām
trikadrukeṣu mahiṣaḥ yava āśiram tuvi śuṣmaḥ tṛpat somam apibat viṣṇunā sutam yathā avaśat
saḥ īm mamāda mahi karma kartave mahām urum sa enam saścat devaḥ devam satyam indram satyaḥ induḥ
adha tviṣīmāṁ abhī ojasā krivim yudhā abhavat ā rodasī apṛṇat asya majmanā pra vāvṛdhe
adhatta anyam jaṭhare pra īm aricyata sa enam saścat devaḥ devam satyam indram satyaḥ induḥ
sākam jātaḥ kratunā sākam ojasā vavakṣitha sākam vṛddhaḥ vīryaiḥ sāsahiḥ mṛdhaḥ vicarṣaṇiḥ
dātā rādha stuvate kāmyam vasu sa enam saścat devaḥ devam satyam indram satyaḥ induḥ
tava tyad naryam nṛto apaḥ indra prathamam pūrvyam divi pravācyam kṛtam
yat devasya śavasā prāriṇāḥ asum riṇan apaḥ
bhuvat viśvam abhī ā a devam ojasā vidāt ūrjam śatakratuḥ vidāt iṣam
gaṇānām tvā gaṇapatim havāmahe kavim kavīnām upamaśravastamam
jyeṣṭha rājam brahmaṇām brahmaṇaspate ā naḥ śṛṇvan ūtibhiḥ sīda sādanam
devāḥ cit te asurya pracetasaḥ bṛhaspate yajñiyam bhāgam ānaśuḥ
usrāḥ iva sūryaḥ jyotiṣā mahaḥ viśveṣām id janitā brahmaṇām asi
ā vibādhyā parirāpaḥ tamāṃsi ca jyotiṣmantam ratham ṛtasya tiṣṭhasi
bṛhaspate bhīmam amitra dambhanam rakṣaḥ haṇam gotra bhidam svar vidam
sunītibhiḥ nayasi trāyase janam yaḥ tubhyam dāśāt na tam aṃhaḥ aśnavat
brahma dviṣaḥ tapanaḥ manyumīḥ asi bṛhaspate mahi tat te mahitvanam
na tam aṃhaḥ na duritam kutaścana na arātayaḥ titiruḥ na dvayāvinaḥ
viśvāḥ id asmāt dhvarasaḥ vi bādhase yam su gopāḥ rakṣasi brahmaṇaspate
tvam naḥ gopāḥ pathikṛt vicakṣaṇaḥ tava vratāya matibhiḥ jarāmahe
bṛhaspate yaḥ naḥ abhi hvaraḥ dadhe svā tam marmartu ducchunā harasvatī
uta vā yaḥ naḥ marcayāt anāgasaḥ arātīvā martaḥ sānukaḥ vṛkaḥ
bṛhaspate apa tam vartayā pathaḥ sugam naḥ asyai deva vītaye kṛdhi
trātāram tvā tanūnām havāmahe avaspartar adhivaktāram asmayum
bṛhaspate deva nidaḥ ni barhaya mā durevāḥ uttaram sumnam ud naśan
tvayā vayam su vṛdhā brahmaṇaspate spārhā vasu manuṣyā dadīmahi
yāḥ naḥ dūre taḍitas yāḥ arātayaḥ abhi santi jambhayā tāḥ anapnasaḥ
tvayā vayam uttamam _ vayaḥ bṛhaspate papriṇā sasninā yujā
mā naḥ duḥśaṃsaḥ abhidipsuḥ īśata pra su śaṃsāḥ matibhiḥ tāriṣīmahi
anānudaḥ vṛṣabhaḥ jagmiḥ āhavam niṣṭaptā śatrum pṛtanāsu sāsahiḥ
asi satya ṛṇayāḥ brahmaṇaspate ugrasya cit damitā vīḍu harṣiṇaḥ
a devena manasā yaḥ riṣaṇyati śāsām ugraḥ manyamānaḥ jighāṃsati
bṛhaspate mā praṇak tasya naḥ vadhaḥ ni karma manyum durevasya śardhataḥ
bhareṣu havyaḥ namasā upasadyaḥ gantā vājeṣu sanitā dhanam dhanam
viśvāḥ id aryaḥ abhidipsvaḥ mṛdhaḥ bṛhaspatiḥ vi vavarhā rathāṁ iva
tejiṣṭhayā tapanī rakṣasaḥ tapa ye tvā nide dadhire dṛṣṭa vīryam
āvis tat kṛṣva yat asat te ukthyam bṛhaspate vi parirāpaḥ ardaya
bṛhaspate ati yat aryaḥ arhāt dyumat vibhāti kratumat janeṣu
yat dīdayat śavasaḥ ṛta prajāta tat asmāsu draviṇam dhehi citram
mā naḥ stenebhyaḥ ye abhi druhas pade nirāmiṇaḥ ripavaḥ anneṣu jāgṛdhuḥ
ā devānām ohate vi vrayaḥ hṛdi bṛhaspate na paras sāmnaḥ viduḥ
viśvebhyaḥ hi tvā bhuvanebhyas pari tvaṣṭā ajanat sāmnaḥ sāmnaḥ kaviḥ
saḥ ṛṇacit ṛṇayāḥ brahmaṇaspatiḥ druhaḥ hantā mahaḥ ṛtasya dhartari
tava śriye vi ajihīta parvataḥ gavām gotram udasṛjaḥ yat aṅgiraḥ
indreṇa yujā tamasā parīvṛtam bṛhaspate niḥ apām aubjaḥ arṇavam
brahmaṇaspate tvam asya yantā sūktasya bodhi tanayam ca jinva
viśvam tat bhadram yat avanti devāḥ bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
sa imām aviḍḍhi prabhṛtim yaḥ īśiṣe ayā vidhema navayā mahā girā
yathā naḥ mīḍhvān stavate sakhā tava bṛhaspate sīṣadhaḥ sa uta naḥ matim
yaḥ nantvāni anamat ni ojasā uta adardar manyunā śambarāṇi vi
prācyāvayat acyutā brahmaṇaspatiḥ ā ca aviśat vasumantam vi parvatam
tat devānām devatamāya kartvam aśrathnan dṛḍhā avradanta vīḍitā
ud gāḥ ājat abhinat brahmaṇā valam agūhat tamaḥ vi acakṣayat svar
aśma āsyam avatam brahmaṇaspatiḥ madhu dhāram abhi yam ojasā atṛṇat
tam eva viśve papire svar dṛśaḥ bahu sākam sisicuḥ utsam udriṇam
sanā tā kācid bhuvanā bhavītvā mādbhiḥ śaradbhiḥ duraḥ varanta vaḥ
a yatantā carataḥ anyat anyat id yā cakāra vayunā brahmaṇaspatiḥ
abhinakṣantaḥ abhi ye tam ānaśuḥ nidhim paṇīnām paramam guhā hitam
te vidvāṃsaḥ praticakṣya anṛtā punar yatas u āyan tat ud īyuḥ āviśam
ṛtāvānaḥ praticakṣya anṛtā punar ā atas ā tasthuḥ kavayaḥ mahaḥ pathaḥ
te bāhubhyām dhamitam agnim aśmani nakir ṣaḥ asti araṇaḥ jahuḥ hi tam
ṛta jyena kṣipreṇa brahmaṇaspatiḥ yatra vaṣṭi pra tat aśnoti dhanvanā
tasya sādhvīḥ iṣavaḥ yābhiḥ asyati nṛ cakṣasaḥ dṛśaye karṇa yonayaḥ
sa saṃnayaḥ sa vinayaḥ purohitaḥ sa suṣṭutaḥ sa yudhi brahmaṇaspatiḥ
cākṣmaḥ yat vājam bharate matī dhanāt id sūryaḥ tapati tapyatuḥ vṛthā
vibhu prabhu prathamam mehanāvataḥ bṛhaspateḥ suvidatrāṇi rādhyā
imā sātāni venyasya vājinaḥ yena janau ubhaye bhuñjate viśaḥ
yaḥ avare vṛjane viśvathā vibhuḥ mahāṁ u raṇvaḥ śavasā vavakṣitha
sa devaḥ devān prati paprathe pṛthu viśvā id u tā paribhūḥ brahmaṇaspatiḥ
viśvam satyam maghavānā yuvoḥ id āpaḥ cana pra minanti vratam vām
acchā indrābrahmaṇaspatī haviḥ naḥ annam yuj eva vājinā jigātam

asmai tisraḥ avyathyāya nārīḥ devāya devīḥ didhiṣanti annam
