ṛtasya hi śurudhaḥ santi pūrvīḥ ṛtasya dhītiḥ vṛjināni hanti
ṛtasya ślokaḥ badhirā tatarda karṇā budhānaḥ śucamānaḥ āyoḥ
ṛtasya dṛﾱhā dharuṇāni santi purūṇi candrā vapuṣe vapūṃṣi
ṛtena dīrgham iṣaṇanta pṛkṣaḥ ṛtena gāvaḥ ṛtam ā viveśuḥ
ṛtam yemānaḥ ṛtam id vanoti ṛtasya śuṣmaḥ tura yāḥ u gavyuḥ
ṛtāya pṛthvī bahule gabhīre ṛtāya dhenū parame duhāte
nu stutaḥ indra nu gṛṇānaḥ iṣam jaritre nadyaḥ na pīpeḥ
akāri te harivas brahma navyam dhiyā syāma rathyaḥ sadāsāḥ
kā suṣṭutiḥ śavasaḥ sūnum indram arvācīnam rādhase ā vavartat
dadiḥ hi vīraḥ gṛṇate vasūni sa go patiḥ niṣṣidhām naḥ janāsaḥ
sa vṛtra hatye havyaḥ saḥ īḍyaḥ sa suṣṭutaḥ indraḥ satya rādhāḥ
sa yāman ā maghavā martyāya brahmaṇyate suṣvaye varivaḥ dhāt
tam id naraḥ vi hvayante samīke ririkvāṃsaḥ tanvaḥ kṛṇvata trām
mithas yat tyāgam ubhayāsaḥ agman naraḥ tokasya tanayasya sātau
kratūyanti kṣitayaḥ yoge ugra āśuṣāṇāsaḥ mithas arṇa sātau
sam yat viśaḥ avavṛtranta yudhmāḥ āt id neme indrayante abhīke
āt id ha neme indriyam yajante āt id paktiḥ puroﾱāśam riricyāt
āt id somaḥ vi papṛcyāt a suṣvīn āt id jujoṣa vṛṣabham yajadhyai
kṛṇoti asmai varivaḥ yaḥ itthā indrāya somam uśate sunoti
sadhrīcīnena manasā a vivenan tam id sakhāyam kṛṇute samatsu
yaḥ indrāya sunavat somam adya pacāt paktīḥ uta bhṛjjāti dhānāḥ
prati manāyoḥ ucathāni haryan tasmin dadhat vṛṣaṇam śuṣmam indraḥ
yadā samaryam vi acet ṛghāvā dīrgham yat ājim abhī akhyat aryaḥ
acikradat vṛṣaṇam patnī acchā duroṇe ā niśitam soma sudbhiḥ
bhūyasā vasnam acarat kanīyaḥ a vikrītaḥ akāniṣam punar yan
sa bhūyasā kanīyaḥ na arirecīt dīnāḥ dakṣāḥ vi duhanti pra vāṇam
kaḥ imam daśabhiḥ mama indram krīṇāti dhenubhiḥ
yadā vṛtrāṇi jaṅghanat athā enam me punar dadat
nu stutaḥ indra nu gṛṇānaḥ iṣam jaritre nadyaḥ na pīpeḥ
akāri te harivas brahma navyam dhiyā syāma rathyaḥ sadāsāḥ
kaḥ adya naryaḥ deva kāmaḥ uśan indrasya sakhyam jujoṣa
kaḥ vā mahe avase pāryāya samiddhe agnau suta somaḥ īṭṭe
kaḥ nānāma vacasā somyāya manāyuḥ vā bhavati _ usrāḥ
kaḥ indrasya yujyam kaḥ sakhi tvam kaḥ bhrātram vaṣṭi kavaye kaḥ ūtī
kaḥ devānām avaḥ adyā vṛṇīte kaḥ ādityāṁ aditim jyotiḥ īṭṭe
kasya aśvinau indraḥ agniḥ sutasya aṃśoḥ pibanti manasā avivenam
tasmai agniḥ bhārataḥ śarma yaṃsat jyok paśyāt sūryam uccarantam
yaḥ indrāya sunavāma iti āha nare naryāya nṛtamāya nṛṇām
na tam jinanti bahavaḥ na dabhrāḥ uru asmai aditiḥ śarma yaṃsat
priyaḥ su kṛt priyaḥ indre manāyuḥ priyaḥ su prāvīḥ priyaḥ asya somī
suprāvyaḥ prāśuṣāṭ eṣa vīraḥ suṣveḥ paktim kṛṇute kevala indraḥ
na a suṣveḥ āpiḥ na sakhā na jāmiḥ duṣprāvyaḥ avahantā id avācaḥ
na revatā paṇinā sakhyam indraḥ a sunvatā suta pāḥ sam gṛṇīte
ā asya vedaḥ khidati hanti nagnam vi suṣvaye paktaye kevalaḥ bhūt
indram pare avare madhyamāsaḥ indram yāntaḥ avasitāsaḥ indram
indram kṣiyantaḥ uta yudhyamānāḥ indram naraḥ vājayantaḥ havante
aham manuḥ abhavam sūryaḥ ca aham kakṣīvān ṛṣiḥ asmi vipraḥ
aham kutsam ārjuneyam ni ṛñje aham kaviḥ uśanā paśyata mā
aham bhūmim adadām āryāya aham vṛṣṭim dāśuṣe martyāya
aham apaḥ anayam vāvaśānāḥ mama devāsaḥ anu ketam āyan
aham puraḥ mandasānaḥ vi airam nava sākam navatīḥ śambarasya
śatatamam veśyam sarvatātā divodāsam atithigvam yat āvam
pra su sa vibhyaḥ marutaḥ viḥ astu pra śyenaḥ śyenebhyaḥ āśu patvā
a cakrayā yat svadhayā suparṇaḥ havyam bharat manave deva juṣṭam
bharat yadi viḥ atas vevijānaḥ pathā uruṇā manaḥ javāḥ asarji
tūyam yayau madhunā somyena uta śravaḥ vivide śyenaḥ atra
ṛjīpī śyenaḥ dadamānaḥ aṃśum parāvataḥ śakunaḥ mandram madam
somam bharat dādṛhāṇaḥ devāvān divaḥ amuṣmāt uttarāt ādāya
ādāya śyenaḥ abharat somam sahasram savāṁ ayutam ca sākam
atra purandhiḥ ajahāt arātīḥ made somasya mūrāḥ a mūraḥ
garbhe nu san anu eṣām avedam aham devānām janimāni viśvā
śatam mā puraḥ āyasīḥ arakṣan adha śyenaḥ javasā niḥ adīyam
na ghā sa mām apa joṣam jabhāra abhi īm āsa tvakṣasā vīryeṇa
īrmā purandhiḥ ajahāt arātīḥ uta vātāṁ atarat śūśuvānaḥ
ava yat śyenaḥ asvanīt adha dyoḥ vi yat yadi vā atas ūhuḥ purandhim
sṛjat yat asmai ava ha kṣipat jyām kṛśānuḥ astā manasā bhuraṇyan
ṛjipyaḥ īm indrāvataḥ na bhujyum śyenaḥ jabhāra bṛhataḥ adhi snoḥ
antar patat patatri asya parṇam adha yāmani prasitasya tat veḥ
adha śvetam kalaśam gobhiḥ aktam āpipyānam maghavā śukram andhaḥ
adhvaryubhiḥ prayatam madhvaḥ agram indraḥ madāya prati dhat pibadhyai śūraḥ madāya prati dhat pibadhyai
ā naḥ stutaḥ upa vājebhiḥ ūtī indra yāhi haribhiḥ mandasānaḥ
tiras cit aryaḥ savanā purūṇi āṅgūṣebhiḥ gṛṇānaḥ satya rādhāḥ
ā hi sma yāti naryaḥ cikitvān hūyamānaḥ sotṛbhiḥ upa yajñam
su aśvaḥ yaḥ abhīruḥ manyamānaḥ suṣvāṇebhiḥ madati sam ha vīraiḥ
śrāvayet asya karṇā vājayadhyai juṣṭām anu pra diśam mandayadhyai
udvāvṛṣāṇaḥ rādhase tuviṣmān karat naḥ indraḥ su tīrthā abhayam ca
acchā yaḥ gantā nādhamānam ūtī itthā vipram havamānam gṛṇantam
upa tmani dadhānaḥ dhuri āśūn sahasrāṇi śatāni vajra bāhuḥ
tvotāsaḥ maghavan indra viprāḥ vayam te syāma sūrayaḥ gṛṇantaḥ
bhejānāsaḥ bṛhat divasya rāyaḥ ākāyyasya dāvane purukṣoḥ
nakir indra tvat uttaraḥ na jyāyān asti vṛtrahan
nakir evā yathā tvam
satrā te anu kṛṣṭayaḥ viśvā cakrā iva vāvṛtuḥ
satrā mahāṁ asi śrutaḥ
viśve cana id anā tvā devāsaḥ indra yuyudhuḥ
yat ahā naktam ātiraḥ
yatra uta bādhitebhyaḥ cakram kutsāya yudhyate
muṣāyaḥ indra sūryam
yatra devāṁ ṛghāyataḥ viśvān ayudhyaḥ ekaḥ id
tvam indra vanūn ahan
yatra uta martyāya kam ariṇāḥ indra sūryam
prāvaḥ śacībhiḥ etaśam
kim āt uta asi vṛtrahan maghavan manyumattamaḥ
atra aha dānum ātiraḥ
etat gha id uta vīryam indra cakartha pauṃsyam
striyam yat durhaṇāyuvam vadhīḥ duhitaram divaḥ
divaḥ cit ghā duhitaram mahān mahīyamānām
uṣāsam indra sam piṇak
apa uṣāḥ anasaḥ sarat sampiṣṭāt aha bibhyuṣī
ni yat sīm śiśnathat vṛṣā
etat asyāḥ anaḥ śaye su sampiṣṭam vipāśi ā
sasāra sīm parāvataḥ
uta sindhum vibālyam vitasthānām adhi kṣami
pari ṣṭhā indra māyayā
uta śuṣṇasya dhṛṣṇuyā pra mṛkṣaḥ abhi vedanam
puraḥ yat asya saṃpiṇak
uta dāsam kaulitaram bṛhataḥ parvatāt adhi
avāhan indra śambaram
uta dāsasya varcinaḥ sahasrāṇi śatā avadhīḥ
adhi pañca pradhīn iva
uta tyam putram agruvaḥ parāvṛktam śatakratuḥ
uktheṣu indraḥ ābhajat
uta tyā turvaśa yadū a snātārā śacīpatiḥ
indraḥ vidvāṁ apārayat
uta tyā sadyas āryā sarayoḥ indra pāratas
arṇā citrarathā vadhīḥ
anu dvā jahitā nayaḥ andham śroṇam ca vṛtrahan
na tat te sumnam aṣṭave
śatam aśmanmayīnām purām indraḥ vi āsyat
divodāsāya dāśuṣe
asvāpayat dabhītaye sahasrā triṃśatam hathaiḥ
dāsānām indraḥ māyayā
sa gha id uta asi vṛtrahan samānaḥ indra go patiḥ
yaḥ tā viśvāni cicyuṣe
uta nūnam yat indriyam kariṣyāḥ indra pauṃsyam
adyā nakir tat ā minat
vāmam vāmam te ādure devaḥ dadātu aryamā
vāmam pūṣā vāmam bhagaḥ vāmam devaḥ karūḍatī
kayā naḥ citraḥ ā bhuvat ūtī sadāvṛdhaḥ sakhā
kayā śaciṣṭhayā vṛtā
kaḥ tvā satyaḥ madānām maṃhiṣṭhaḥ matsat andhasaḥ
dṛﾱhā cit āruje vasu
abhī su naḥ sakhīnām avitā jaritṝṇām
śatam bhavāsi ūtibhiḥ
abhī naḥ ā vavṛtsva cakram na vṛttam arvataḥ
niyudbhiḥ carṣaṇīnām
pravatā hi kratūnām ā ha padā iva gacchasi
abhakṣi sūrye sacā
sam yat te indra manyavaḥ sam cakrāṇi dadhanvire
adha tve adha sūrye
uta smā hi tvām āhuḥ id maghavānam śacīpate
dātāram avidīdhayum
uta smā sadyas id pari śaśamānāya sunvate
purū cit maṃhase vasu
na hi sma te śatam cana rādhaḥ varante āmuraḥ
na cyautnāni kariṣyataḥ
asmāṁ avantu te śatam asmān sahasram ūtayaḥ
asmān viśvāḥ abhiṣṭayaḥ
asmāṁ iha ā vṛṇīṣva sakhyāya svastaye
mahaḥ rāye divitmate
asmāṁ aviḍḍhi viśvahā indra rāyā parīṇasā
asmān viśvābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
asmabhyam tāṁ apa ā vṛdhi vrajāṁ astā iva gomataḥ
navābhiḥ indra ūtibhiḥ
asmākam dhṛṣṇuyā rathaḥ dyumāṁ indra an apacyutaḥ
gavyuḥ aśvayuḥ īyate
asmākam uttamam kṛdhi śravaḥ deveṣu sūrya
varṣiṣṭham dyām iva upari
ā tu naḥ indra vṛtrahan asmākam ardham ā gahi
mahān mahībhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
bhṛmiḥ cit ghā asi tūtujiḥ ā citra citriṇīṣu ā
citram kṛṇoṣi ūtaye
dabhrebhiḥ cit śaśīyāṃsam haṃsi vrādhantam ojasā
sakhibhiḥ ye tve sacā
vayam indra tve sacā vayam tvā abhi nonumaḥ
asmān asmān id ud ava
sa naḥ citrābhiḥ adrivas anavadyābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
anādhṛṣṭābhiḥ ā gahi
bhūyāma u su tvāvataḥ sakhāyaḥ indra gomataḥ
yujaḥ vājāya ghṛṣvaye
tvam hi ekaḥ īśiṣe indra vājasya gomataḥ
sa naḥ yandhi mahīm iṣam
na tvā varante anyathā yat ditsasi stutaḥ magham
stotṛbhyaḥ indra girvaṇaḥ
abhi tvā gotamāḥ girā anūṣata pra dāvane
indra vājāya ghṛṣvaye
pra te vocāma vīryā yāḥ mandasānaḥ ārujaḥ
puraḥ dāsīḥ abhītya
tā te gṛṇanti vedhasaḥ yāni cakartha pauṃsyā
suteṣu indra girvaṇaḥ
avīvṛdhanta gotamāḥ indra tve stoma vāhasaḥ
ā eṣu dhāḥ vīravat yaśaḥ
yat cit hi śaśvatām asi indra sādhāraṇaḥ tvam
tam tvā vayam havāmahe
arvācīnaḥ vaso bhava asme su matsva andhasaḥ
somānām indra soma pāḥ
asmākam tvā matīnām ā stomaḥ indra yacchatu
arvāk ā vartaya harī
puroﾱāśam ca naḥ ghasaḥ joṣayāse giraḥ ca naḥ
vadhūyuḥ iva yoṣaṇām
sahasram vyatīnām yuktānām indram īmahe
śatam somasya khāryaḥ
sahasrā te śatā vayam gavām ā cyāvayāmasi
asmatrā rādhaḥ etu te
daśa te kalaśānām hiraṇyānām adhīmahi
bhūri dāḥ asi vṛtrahan
bhūri dāḥ bhūri dehi naḥ mā dabhram bhūri ā bhara
bhūri gha id indra ditsasi
bhūri dāḥ hi asi śrutaḥ purutrā śūra vṛtrahan
ā naḥ bhajasva rādhasi
pra te babhrū vicakṣaṇa śaṃsāmi goṣaṇaḥ napāt
mā ābhyām gāḥ anu śiśrathaḥ
kanīnakā iva vidradhe nave drupade arbhake
babhrū yāmeṣu śobhete
aram me usra yāmṇe aram an usra yāmṇe
babhrū yāmeṣu asridhā
pra ṛbhubhyaḥ dūtam iva vācam iṣye upastire śvaitarīm dhenum īḍe
ye vāta jūtāḥ taraṇibhiḥ evaiḥ pari dyām sadyas apasaḥ babhūvuḥ
yadā aram akran ṛbhavaḥ pitṛbhyām pariviṣṭī veṣaṇā daṃsanābhiḥ
āt id devānām upa sakhyam āyan dhīrāsaḥ puṣṭim avahan manāyai
punar ye cakruḥ pitarā yuvānā sanā yūpā iva jaraṇā śayānā
te vājaḥ vibhvāṁ ṛbhuḥ indravantaḥ madhu psarasaḥ naḥ avantu yajñam
yat saṃvatsam ṛbhavaḥ gām arakṣan yat saṃvatsam ṛbhavaḥ māḥ apiṃśan
yat saṃvatsam abharan bhāsaḥ asyāḥ tābhiḥ śamībhiḥ amṛta tvam āśuḥ
jyeṣṭhaḥ āha camasā dvā karā iti kanīyān trīn kṛṇavāmā iti āha
kaniṣṭhaḥ āha caturaḥ karā iti tvaṣṭa ṛbhavaḥ tat panayat vacaḥ vaḥ
satyam ūcuḥ naraḥ evā hi cakruḥ anu svadhām ṛbhavaḥ jagmuḥ etām
vibhrājamānān camasāṁ aha iva avenat tvaṣṭā caturaḥ dadṛśvān
dvādaśa dyūn yat agohyasya ātithye raṇan ṛbhavaḥ sasantaḥ
su kṣetrā akṛṇvan anayanta sindhūn dhanva atiṣṭhan oṣadhīḥ nimnam āpaḥ
ratham ye cakruḥ suvṛtam nareṣṭhām ye dhenum viśva juvam viśva rūpām
te ā takṣantu ṛbhavaḥ rayim naḥ su avasaḥ su apasaḥ su hastāḥ
apaḥ hi eṣām ajuṣanta devāḥ abhi kratvā manasā dīdhyānāḥ
vājaḥ devānām abhavat sukarma indrasya ṛbhukṣāḥ varuṇasya vibhvā
ye harī medhayā ukthā madantaḥ indrāya cakruḥ su yujā ye aśvā
te rāyaḥ poṣam draviṇāni asme dhatta ṛbhavaḥ kṣemayantaḥ na mitram
idā ahnaḥ pītim uta vaḥ madam dhuḥ na ṛte śrāntasya sakhyāya devāḥ
te nūnam asme ṛbhavaḥ vasūni tṛtīye asmin savane dadhāta
ṛbhuḥ vibhvā vājaḥ indraḥ naḥ acchā imam yajñam ratna dheyā upa yāta
idā hi vaḥ dhiṣaṇā devī ahnām adhāt pītim sam madāḥ agmata vaḥ
vidānāsaḥ janmanaḥ vāja ratnāḥ uta ṛtubhiḥ ṛbhavaḥ mādayadhvam
sam vaḥ madāḥ agmata sam purandhiḥ su vīrām asme rayim erayadhvam
ayam vaḥ yajñaḥ ṛbhavaḥ akāri yam ā manuṣvat pradivaḥ dadhidhve
pra vaḥ acchā jujuṣāṇāsaḥ asthuḥ abhūta viśve agriyā uta vājāḥ
abhūt u vaḥ vidhate ratna dheyam idā naraḥ dāśuṣe martyāya
pibata vājāḥ ṛbhavaḥ dade vaḥ mahi tṛtīyam savanam madāya
ā vājāḥ yātā upa naḥ ṛbhukṣāḥ mahaḥ naraḥ draviṇasaḥ gṛṇānāḥ
ā vaḥ pītayaḥ abhipitve ahnām imāḥ astam nava svaḥ iva gman
ā napātaḥ śavasaḥ yātana upa imam yajñam namasā hūyamānāḥ
sajoṣasaḥ sūrayaḥ yasya ca stha madhvaḥ pāta ratna dhāḥ indravantaḥ
sajoṣāḥ indra varuṇena somam sajoṣāḥ pāhi girvaṇaḥ marudbhiḥ
agre pābhiḥ ṛtu pābhiḥ sajoṣāḥ gnāspatnībhiḥ ratna dhābhiḥ sajoṣāḥ
sajoṣasaḥ ādityaiḥ mādayadhvam sajoṣasaḥ ṛbhavaḥ parvatebhiḥ
sajoṣasaḥ daivyena savitrā sajoṣasaḥ sindhubhiḥ ratna dhebhiḥ
ye aśvinā ye pitarā ye ūtī dhenum tatakṣuḥ ṛbhavaḥ ye aśvā
ye aṃsatrā ye ṛdhak rodasī ye vibhvaḥ naraḥ su apatyāni cakruḥ
ye gomantam vājavantam su vīram rayim dhattha vasumantam purukṣum
te agre pāḥ ṛbhavaḥ mandasānāḥ asme dhatta ye ca rātim gṛṇanti
na apābhūta na vaḥ atītṛṣāma a niḥśastāḥ ṛbhavaḥ yajñe asmin
sam indreṇa madatha sam marudbhiḥ sam rājabhiḥ ratna dheyāya devāḥ
iha upa yāta śavasaḥ napātaḥ saudhanvanāḥ ṛbhavaḥ mā apa bhūta
asmin hi vaḥ savane ratna dheyam gamantu indram anu vaḥ madāsaḥ
āgan ṛbhūṇām iha ratna dheyam abhūt somasya suṣutasya pītiḥ
su kṛtyayā yat su apasyayā _ ekam vicakra camasam caturdhā
vi akṛṇota camasam caturdhā sakhe vi śikṣā iti abravīta
athā eta vājāḥ amṛtasya panthām gaṇam devānām ṛbhavaḥ su hastāḥ
kimmayaḥ svid camasaḥ eṣaḥ āsa yam kāvyena caturaḥ vicakra
athā sunudhvam savanam madāya pāta ṛbhavaḥ madhunaḥ somyasya
śacyā akarta pitarā yuvānā śacyā akarta camasam deva pānam
śacyā harī dhanutarau ataṣṭa indra vāhau ṛbhavaḥ vāja ratnāḥ
yaḥ vaḥ sunoti abhipitve ahnām tīvram vājāsaḥ savanam madāya
tasmai rayim ṛbhavaḥ sarva vīram ā takṣata vṛṣaṇaḥ mandasānāḥ
prātar sutam apibaḥ hari aśva mādhyandinam savanam kevalam te
sam ṛbhubhiḥ pibasva ratna dhebhiḥ sakhīn yāṁ indra cakṛṣe su kṛtyā
ye devāsaḥ abhavata su kṛtyā śyenāḥ iva id adhi divi niṣeda
te ratnam dhāta śavasaḥ napātaḥ saudhanvanāḥ abhavata amṛtāsaḥ
yat tṛtīyam savanam ratna dheyam akṛṇudhvam su apasyā su hastāḥ
tat ṛbhavaḥ pariṣiktam vaḥ etat sam madebhiḥ indriyebhiḥ pibadhvam
an aśvaḥ jātaḥ an abhīśuḥ ukthyaḥ rathaḥ tri cakraḥ pari vartate rajaḥ
mahat tat vaḥ devyasya pravācanam dyām ṛbhavaḥ pṛthivīm yat ca puṣyatha
ratham ye cakruḥ suvṛtam su cetasaḥ a vihvarantam manasaḥ pari dhyayā
tāṁ u nu asya savanasya pītaye ā vaḥ vājāḥ ṛbhavaḥ vedayāmasi
tat vaḥ vājāḥ ṛbhavaḥ su pravācanam deveṣu vibhvaḥ abhavat mahitvanam
jivrī yat santā pitarā sanā jurā punar yuvānā carathāya takṣatha
ekam vi cakra camasam caturvayam niḥ carmaṇaḥ gām ariṇīta dhītibhiḥ
athā deveṣu amṛta tvam ānaśa śruṣṭī vājāḥ ṛbhavaḥ tat vaḥ ukthyam
ṛbhutaḥ rayiḥ prathama śravastamaḥ vāja śrutāsaḥ yam ajījanat naraḥ
vibhva taṣṭaḥ vidatheṣu pravācyaḥ yam devāsaḥ avatha sa vicarṣaṇiḥ
sa vājī arvā saḥ ṛṣiḥ vacasyayā sa śūraḥ astā pṛtanāsu duṣṭaraḥ
sa rāyaḥ poṣam sa su vīryam dadhe yam vājaḥ vibhvāṁ ṛbhavaḥ yam āviṣuḥ
śreṣṭham vaḥ peśaḥ adhi dhāyi darśatam stomaḥ vājāḥ ṛbhavaḥ tam jujuṣṭana
dhīrāsaḥ hi ṣṭhā kavayaḥ vipaścitaḥ tān vaḥ enā brahmaṇā vedayāmasi
yūyam asmabhyam dhiṣaṇābhyaḥ pari vidvāṃsaḥ viśvā naryāṇi bhojanā
dyumantam vājam vṛṣa śuṣmam uttamam ā naḥ rayim ṛbhavaḥ takṣata vayaḥ
iha prajām iha rayim rarāṇāḥ iha śravaḥ vīravat takṣata naḥ
yena vayam citayema ati anyān tam vājam citram ṛbhavaḥ dada naḥ
upa naḥ vājāḥ adhvaram ṛbhukṣā devāḥ yāta pathibhiḥ deva yānaiḥ
yathā yajñam manuṣaḥ vikṣu āsu dadhidhve raṇvāḥ sudineṣu ahnām
te vaḥ hṛde manase santu yajñāḥ juṣṭāsaḥ adya ghṛta nirṇijaḥ guḥ
pra vaḥ sutāsaḥ harayanta pūrṇāḥ kratve dakṣāya harṣayanta pītāḥ
tri udāyam deva hitam yathā vaḥ stomaḥ vājāḥ ṛbhukṣaṇaḥ dade vaḥ
juhve manuṣvat uparāsu vikṣu yuṣme sacā bṛhat diveṣu somam
pīvaḥ aśvāḥ śucat rathāḥ hi bhūta ayaḥ śiprāḥ vājinaḥ su niṣkāḥ
indrasya sūno śavasaḥ napātaḥ anu vaḥ ceti agriyam madāya
ṛbhum ṛbhukṣaṇaḥ rayim vāje vājintamam yujam
indrasvantam havāmahe sadā sātamam aśvinam
sa id ṛbhavaḥ yam avatha yūyam indraḥ ca martyam
sa dhībhiḥ astu sanitā medha sātā saḥ arvatā
vi naḥ vājāḥ ṛbhukṣaṇaḥ pathaḥ citana yaṣṭave
asmabhyam sūrayaḥ stutāḥ viśvāḥ āśāḥ tarīṣaṇi
tam naḥ vājāḥ ṛbhukṣaṇaḥ indra nāsatyā rayim
sam aśvam carṣaṇibhyaḥ ā puru śasta maghattaye
uta u hi vām dātrā santi pūrvā yā pūrubhyaḥ trasadasyuḥ nitośe
kṣetrāsām dadathuḥ urvarā sām ghanam dasyubhyaḥ abhibhūtim ugram
uta vājinam puru niṣṣidhvānam dadhikrām u dadathuḥ viśvakṛṣṭim
ṛjipyam śyenam pruṣitapsum āśum carkṛtyam aryaḥ nṛpatim na śūram
yam sīm anu pravatā iva dravantam viśvaḥ pūruḥ madati harṣamāṇaḥ
paḍbhiḥ gṛdhyantam medhayum na śūram rathaturam vātam iva dhrajantam
yaḥ sma ārundhānaḥ gadhyā samatsu sanutaraḥ carati goṣu gacchan
āvirṛjīkaḥ vidathā nicikyat tiras aratim pari āpe āyoḥ
uta smā enam vastramathim na tāyum anu krośanti kṣitayaḥ bhareṣu
_ jasurim na śyenam śravaḥ ca acchā paśumat ca yūtham
uta sma āsu prathamaḥ sariṣyan ni veveti śreṇibhiḥ rathānām
srajam kṛṇvānaḥ janyaḥ na śubhvā reṇum rerihat kiraṇam dadaśvān
uta sya vājī sahuriḥ ṛtāvā śuśrūṣamāṇaḥ tanvā samarye
turam yatīṣu turayan ṛjipyaḥ adhi bhruvoḥ kirate reṇum ṛñjan
uta sma asya tanyatoḥ iva dyoḥ ṛghāyataḥ abhiyujaḥ bhayante
yadā sahasram abhi sīm ayodhīt durvartuḥ smā bhavati bhīmaḥ ṛñjan
uta sma asya panayanti janāḥ jūtim kṛṣṭi praḥ abhibhūtim āśoḥ
uta enam āhuḥ samithe viyantaḥ parā dadhikrāḥ asarat sahasraiḥ
ā dadhikrāḥ śavasā pañca kṛṣṭīḥ sūryaḥ iva jyotiṣā apaḥ tatāna
sahasra sāḥ śata sāḥ vājī arvā pṛṇaktu madhvā sam imā vacāṃsi
āśum dadhikrām tam u nu stavāma divaḥ pṛthivyāḥ uta carkirāma
ucchantīḥ mām uṣasaḥ sūdayantu ati viśvāni duritāni parṣan
mahaḥ carkarmi arvataḥ kratu prāḥ dadhikrāvṇaḥ puru vārasya vṛṣṇaḥ
yam pūrubhyaḥ dīdivāṃsam nā agnim dadathuḥ mitrāvaruṇā taturim
yaḥ aśvasya dadhikrāvṇaḥ akārīt samiddhe agnau uṣasaḥ vyuṣṭau
anāgasam tam aditiḥ kṛṇotu sa mitreṇa varuṇena sajoṣāḥ
dadhikrāvṇaḥ iṣaḥ ūrjaḥ mahaḥ yat amanmahi marutām nāma bhadram
svastaye varuṇam mitram agnim havāmahe indram vajra bāhum
indram iva id ubhaye vi hvayante udīrāṇāḥ yajñam upaprayantaḥ
dadhikrām u sūdanam martyāya dadathuḥ mitrāvaruṇā naḥ aśvam
dadhikrāvṇaḥ akāriṣam jiṣṇoḥ aśvasya vājinaḥ
surabhi naḥ mukhā karat pra naḥ āyūṃṣi tāriṣat
indrā kaḥ vām varuṇā sumnam āpa stomaḥ haviṣmāṁ amṛtaḥ na hotā
yaḥ vām hṛdi kratumāṁ asmat uktaḥ pasparśat indrāvaruṇāḥ namasvān
indrā ha yaḥ varuṇā cakre āpī devau martaḥ sakhyāya prayasvān
sa hanti vṛtrā samitheṣu śatrūn avobhiḥ vā mahadbhiḥ sa pra śṛṇve
indrā ha ratnam varuṇā dheṣṭhā itthā nṛbhyaḥ śaśamānebhyaḥ tā
yadī sakhāyā sakhyāya somaiḥ sutebhiḥ su prayasā mādayaite
indrā yuvam varuṇā didyum asmin ojiṣṭham ugrā ni vadhiṣṭam vajram
yaḥ naḥ durevaḥ vṛkatiḥ dabhītiḥ tasmin mimāthām abhibhūti ojaḥ
indrā yuvam varuṇā bhūtam asyāḥ dhiyaḥ pretārā vṛṣabhā iva dhenoḥ
sā naḥ duhīyat yavasā iva gatvī sahasra dhārā payasā mahī gauḥ
toke hite tanaye urvarāsu sūraḥ dṛśīke vṛṣaṇaḥ ca pauṃsye
indrā naḥ atra varuṇā syātām avobhiḥ dasmā paritakmyāyām
yuvām id hi avase pūrvyāya pari prabhūtī gaviṣaḥ su āpī
vṛṇīmahe sakhyāya priyāya śūrā maṃhiṣṭhā pitarā iva śambhū
tāḥ vām dhiyaḥ avase vājayantīḥ ājim na jagmuḥ yuvayūḥ sudānū
śriye na gāvaḥ upa somam asthuḥ indram giraḥ varuṇam me manīṣāḥ
imāḥ indram varuṇam me manīṣāḥ agman upa draviṇam icchamānāḥ
upa īm asthuḥ joṣṭāraḥ iva vasvaḥ raghvīḥ iva śravasaḥ bhikṣamāṇāḥ
aśvyasya tmanā rathyasya puṣṭeḥ nityasya rāyaḥ patayaḥ syāma
tā cakrāṇau ūtibhiḥ navyasībhiḥ asmatrā rāyaḥ niyutaḥ sacantām
ā naḥ bṛhantā bṛhatībhiḥ ūtī indra yātam varuṇa vājasātau
yat didyavaḥ pṛtanāsu prakrīḍān tasya vām syāma sanitāraḥ ājeḥ
mama dvitā rāṣṭram kṣatriyasya viśvāyoḥ viśve amṛtāḥ yathā naḥ
kratum sacante varuṇasya devāḥ rājāmi kṛṣṭeḥ upamasya vavreḥ
aham rājā varuṇaḥ mahyam tāni asuryāṇi prathamā dhārayanta
kratum sacante varuṇasya devāḥ rājāmi kṛṣṭeḥ upamasya vavreḥ
aham indraḥ varuṇaḥ te mahitvā urvī gabhīre rajasī sumeke
tvaṣṭā iva viśvā bhuvanāni vidvān sam airayam rodasī dhārayam ca
aham apaḥ apinvam ukṣamāṇāḥ dhārayam divam sadane ṛtasya
ṛtena putraḥ aditeḥ ṛtāvā uta tridhātu prathayat vi bhūma
mām naraḥ su aśvāḥ vājayantaḥ mām vṛtāḥ samaraṇe havante
kṛṇomi ājim maghavā aham indraḥ iyarmi reṇum abhibhūti ojāḥ
aham tā viśvā cakaram nakir mā daivyam sahaḥ varate apratītam
yat mā somāsaḥ mamadan yat ukthā ubhe bhayete rajasī apāre
viduḥ te viśvā bhuvanāni tasya tā pra bravīṣi varuṇāya vedhaḥ
tvam vṛtrāṇi śṛṇviṣe jaghanvān tvam vṛtāṁ ariṇāḥ indra sindhūn
asmākam atra pitaraḥ te āsan sapta ṛṣayaḥ daurgahe badhyamāne
te āyajanta trasadasyum asyāḥ indram na vṛtra turam ardha devam
purukutsānī hi vām adāśat havyebhiḥ indrāvaruṇā namobhiḥ
athā rājānam trasadasyum asyāḥ vṛtra haṇam dadathuḥ ardha devam
rāyā vayam sasavāṃsaḥ madema havyena devāḥ yavasena gāvaḥ
tām dhenum indrāvaruṇāḥ yuvam naḥ viśvāhā dhattam an apasphurantīm
kaḥ u śravat katamaḥ yajñiyānām vandāru devaḥ katamaḥ juṣāte
kasya imām devīm amṛteṣu preṣṭhām hṛdi śreṣāma suṣṭutim su havyām
kaḥ mṛḍāti katamaḥ āgamiṣṭhaḥ devānām u katamaḥ śambhaviṣṭhaḥ
ratham kam āhuḥ dravat aśvam āśum yam sūryasya duhitā avṛṇīta
makṣū hi sma gacchathaḥ īvataḥ dyūn indraḥ na śaktim paritakmyāyām
divaḥ ājātā divyā suparṇā kayā śacīnām bhavathaḥ śaciṣṭhā
kā vām bhūt upamātiḥ kayā naḥ āśvinā gamathaḥ hūyamānā
kaḥ vām mahaḥ cit tyajasaḥ abhīke uruṣyatam mādhvī dasrā naḥ ūtī
uru vām rathaḥ pari nakṣati dyām ā yat samudrāt abhi vartate vām
madhvā mādhvī madhu vām pruṣāyan yat sīm vām pṛkṣaḥ bhurajanta pakvāḥ
sindhuḥ ha vām rasayā siñcat aśvān ghṛṇāḥ vayaḥ aruṣāsaḥ pari gman
tat u su vām ajiram ceti yānam yena patī bhavathaḥ sūryāyāḥ
iha iha yat vām samanā _ sā iyam asme sumatiḥ vāja ratnā
uruṣyatam jaritāram yuvam ha śritaḥ kāmaḥ nāsatyāḥ yuvadrik
tam vām ratham vayam adya ā huvema pṛthujrayam aśvinā saṃgatim goḥ
yaḥ sūryām vahati vandhurāyuḥ gir vāhasam purutamam vasūyum
yuvam śriyam aśvinā devatā tām divaḥ napātā vanathaḥ śacībhiḥ
yuvoḥ vapuḥ abhi pṛkṣaḥ sacante vahanti yat kakuhāsaḥ rathe vām
kaḥ vām adya ā karate rāta havyaḥ ūtaye vā suta peyāya vā arkaiḥ
ṛtasya vā vanuṣe pūrvyāya namaḥ yemānaḥ aśvinā vavartat
hiraṇyayena puru bhū rathena imam yajñam nāsatyā upa yātam
pibāthaḥ id madhunaḥ somyasya dadhathaḥ ratnam vidhate janāya
ā naḥ yātam divaḥ acchā pṛthivyāḥ hiraṇyayena suvṛtā rathena
mā vām anye ni yaman devayantaḥ sam yat dade nābhiḥ pūrvyā vām
nu naḥ rayim puru vīram bṛhantam dasrā mimāthām ubhayeṣu asme
naraḥ yat vām aśvinā stomam āvan sadhastutim ājamīḍhāsaḥ agman
iha iha yat vām samanā _ sā iyam asme sumatiḥ vāja ratnā
uruṣyatam jaritāram yuvam ha śritaḥ kāmaḥ nāsatyāḥ yuvadrik
eṣa sya bhānuḥ ud iyarti yujyate rathaḥ parijmā divaḥ asya sānavi
pṛkṣāsaḥ asmin mithunāḥ adhi trayaḥ dṛtiḥ turīyaḥ madhunaḥ vi rapśate
ud vām pṛkṣāsaḥ madhumantaḥ īrate rathāḥ aśvāsaḥ uṣasaḥ vyuṣṭiṣu
aporṇuvantaḥ tamaḥ ā parīvṛtam svar na śukram tanvantaḥ ā rajaḥ
madhvaḥ pibatam madhu pebhiḥ āsabhiḥ uta priyam madhune yuñjāthām ratham
ā vartanim madhunā jinvathaḥ pathaḥ dṛtim vahethe madhumantam aśvinā
haṃsāsaḥ ye vām madhumantaḥ asridhaḥ hiraṇya parṇāḥ uhuvaḥ uṣarbudhaḥ
uda prutaḥ mandinaḥ mandinispṛśaḥ madhvaḥ na makṣaḥ savanāni gacchathaḥ
su adhvarāsaḥ madhumantaḥ agnayaḥ usrāḥ jarante prati vastoḥ aśvinā
yat nikta hastaḥ taraṇiḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ somam suṣāva madhumantam adribhiḥ
ākenipāsaḥ ahabhiḥ davidhvataḥ svar na śukram tanvantaḥ ā rajaḥ
sūraḥ cit aśvān yuyujānaḥ īyate viśvāṁ anu svadhayā cetathaḥ pathaḥ
pra vām avocam aśvinā dhiyandhāḥ rathaḥ su aśvaḥ ajaraḥ yaḥ asti
yena sadyas pari rajāṃsi yāthaḥ haviṣmantam taraṇim bhojam accha
agram pibā madhūnām sutam vāyo diviṣṭiṣu
tvam hi pūrva pāḥ asi
śatena ā naḥ abhiṣṭibhiḥ niyutvāṁ indra sārathiḥ
vāyo sutasya tṛmpatam
ā vām sahasram harayaḥ indra vāyū abhi prayaḥ
vahantu soma pītaye
ratham hiraṇya vandhuram indra vāyū su adhvaram
ā hi sthāthaḥ divispṛśam
rathena pṛthu pājasā dāśvāṃsam upa gacchatam
indra vāyū iha ā gatam
indra vāyū ayam sutaḥ tam devebhiḥ sajoṣasā
pibatam dāśuṣaḥ gṛhe
iha prayāṇam astu vām indra vāyū vimocanam
iha vām soma pītaye
vāyo śukraḥ ayāmi te madhvaḥ agram diviṣṭiṣu
ā yāhi soma pītaye spārhaḥ deva niyutvatā
indraḥ ca vāyo eṣām somānām pītim arhathaḥ
yuvām hi yanti indavaḥ nimnam āpaḥ na sadhryak
vāyo indraḥ ca śuṣmiṇā sa ratham śavasaḥ patī
niyutvantā naḥ ūtaye ā yātam soma pītaye
yāḥ vām santi puruspṛhaḥ niyutaḥ dāśuṣe narā
asme tāḥ yajña vāhasā indra vāyū ni yacchatam
vihi hotrā a vītāḥ vipaḥ na rāyaḥ aryaḥ
vāyo ā candreṇa rathena yāhi sutasya pītaye
niryuvāṇaḥ aśastīḥ niyutvāṁ indra sārathiḥ
vāyo ā candreṇa rathena yāhi sutasya pītaye
anu kṛṣṇe vasu dhitī yemāte viśva peśasā
vāyo ā candreṇa rathena yāhi sutasya pītaye
vahantu tvā manaḥ yujaḥ yuktāsaḥ navatiḥ nava
vāyo ā candreṇa rathena yāhi sutasya pītaye
vāyo śatam harīṇām yuvasva poṣyāṇām
uta vā te sahasriṇaḥ rathaḥ ā yātu pājasā
idam vām āsye haviḥ priyam indrābṛhaspatī
uktham madaḥ ca śasyate
ayam vām pari sicyate somaḥ indrābṛhaspatī
cāruḥ madāya pītaye
ā naḥ indrābṛhaspatī gṛham indraḥ ca gacchatam
soma pā soma pītaye
asme indrābṛhaspatī rayim dhattam śatagvinam
aśvāvantam sahasriṇam
indrābṛhaspatī vayam sute gīrbhiḥ havāmahe
asya somasya pītaye
somam indrābṛhaspatī pibatam dāśuṣaḥ gṛhe
mādayethām tad okasā
yaḥ tastambha sahasā vi jmaḥ antān bṛhaspatiḥ triṣadhasthaḥ raveṇa
tam pratnāsaḥ ṛṣayaḥ dīdhyānāḥ puras viprāḥ dadhire mandra jihvam
dhunetayaḥ su praketam madantaḥ bṛhaspate abhi ye naḥ tatasre
pṛṣantam sṛpram adabdham ūrvam bṛhaspate rakṣatāt asya yonim
bṛhaspate yā paramā parāvat atas ā te ṛta spṛśaḥ ni seduḥ
tubhyam khātāḥ avatāḥ adri dugdhāḥ madhoḥ ścotanti abhitas virapśam
bṛhaspatiḥ prathamam jāyamānaḥ mahaḥ jyotiṣaḥ parame vyoman
sapta āsyaḥ tuvi jātaḥ raveṇa vi sapta raśmiḥ adhamat tamāṃsi
sa suṣṭubhā saḥ ṛkvatā gaṇena valam ruroja phaligam raveṇa
bṛhaspatiḥ usriyāḥ havyasūdaḥ kanikradat vāvaśatīḥ ud ājat
evā pitre viśva devāya vṛṣṇe yajñaiḥ vidhema namasā havirbhiḥ
bṛhaspate su prajāḥ vīravantaḥ vayam syāma patayaḥ rayīṇām
saḥ id rājā pratijanyāni viśvā śuṣmeṇa tasthau abhi vīryeṇa
bṛhaspatim yaḥ su bhṛtam bibharti valgūyati vandate pūrvabhājam
saḥ id kṣeti sudhite okasi sve tasmai iﾱā pinvate viśvadānīm
tasmai viśaḥ svayam evā namante yasmin brahmā rājani pūrvaḥ eti
apratītaḥ jayati sam dhanāni pratijanyāni uta yā sajanyā
avasyave yaḥ varivaḥ kṛṇoti brahmaṇe rājā tam avanti devāḥ
indraḥ ca somam pibatam bṛhaspate asmin yajñe mandasānā vṛṣaṇvasū
ā vām viśantu indavaḥ su ābhuvaḥ asme rayim sarva vīram ni yacchatam
bṛhaspate indra vardhatam naḥ sacā sā vām sumatiḥ bhūtu asme
aviṣṭam dhiyaḥ jigṛtam purandhīḥ jajastam aryaḥ vanuṣām arātīḥ
idam u tyad purutamam purastāt jyotiḥ tamasaḥ vayunāvat asthāt
nūnam divaḥ duhitaraḥ vibhātīḥ gātum kṛṇavan uṣasaḥ janāya
asthuḥ u citrāḥ uṣasaḥ purastāt mitāḥ iva svaravaḥ adhvareṣu
vi ū vrajasya tamasaḥ dvārā ucchantīḥ avran śucayaḥ pāvakāḥ
ucchantīḥ adya citayanta bhojān rādhaḥ deyāya uṣasaḥ maghonīḥ
a citre antar paṇayaḥ sasantu a budhyamānāḥ tamasaḥ vimadhye
kuvid sa devīḥ sanayaḥ navaḥ vā yāmaḥ babhūyāt uṣasaḥ vaḥ adya
yena navagve aṅgire daśagve sapta āsye revatīḥ revat ūṣa
yūyam hi devīḥ ṛta yugbhiḥ aśvaiḥ pariprayātha bhuvanāni sadyas
prabodhayantīḥ uṣasaḥ sasantam dvipāt catuṣpād carathāya jīvam
kva svid āsām katamā purāṇī yayā vidhānā vidadhuḥ ṛbhūṇām
śubham yat śubhrāḥ uṣasaḥ caranti na vi jñāyante sadṛśīḥ ajuryāḥ
tāḥ ghā tāḥ bhadrāḥ uṣasaḥ purā āsuḥ abhiṣṭi dyumnāḥ ṛta jāta satyāḥ

yat sūryasya haritaḥ patantīḥ puras satīḥ uparāḥ etaśe kaḥ
nava yat asya navatim ca bhogān sākam vajreṇa maghavā vivṛścat
arcanti indram marutaḥ sadhasthe traiṣṭubhena vacasā bādhata dyām
sakhā sakhye apacat tūyam agniḥ asya kratvā mahiṣā trī śatāni
trī sākam indraḥ manuṣaḥ sarāṃsi sutam pibat vṛtra hatyāya somam
trī yat śatā mahiṣāṇām aghaḥ trī sarāṃsi maghavā somyā apāḥ
kāram na viśve ahvanta devāḥ bharam indrāya yat ahim jaghāna
uśanā yat sahasyaiḥ ayātam gṛham indra jūjuvānebhiḥ aśvaiḥ
vanvānaḥ atra sa ratham yayātha kutsena devaiḥ avanoḥ ha śuṣṇam
pra anyat cakram avṛhaḥ sūryasya kutsāya anyat varivaḥ yātave akaḥ
an āsaḥ dasyūṃr amṛṇaḥ vadhena ni duryoṇe āvṛṇak mṛdhra vācaḥ
stomāsaḥ tvā gaurivīteḥ avardhan arandhayaḥ vaidathināya piprum
ā tvām ṛjiśvā sakhyāya cakre pacan paktīḥ apibaḥ somam asya
navagvāsaḥ suta somāsaḥ indram daśagvāsaḥ abhī arcanti arkaiḥ
gavyam cit ūrvam apidhānavantam tam cit naraḥ śaśamānāḥ apa vran
kathā u nu te pari carāṇi vidvān vīryā maghavan yā cakartha
yā ca u nu navyā kṛṇavaḥ śaviṣṭha pra id u tā te vidatheṣu bravāma
etā viśvā cakṛvāṁ indra bhūri aparītaḥ januṣā vīryeṇa
yā cit nu vajrin kṛṇavaḥ dadhṛṣvān na te vartā taviṣyāḥ asti tasyāḥ
indra brahma kriyamāṇā juṣasva yā te śaviṣṭha navyā akarma
vastrā iva bhadrā su kṛtā vasūyū ratham na dhīraḥ su apāḥ atakṣam
kva sya vīraḥ kaḥ apaśyat indram sukha ratham īyamānam haribhyām
yaḥ rāyā vajrī suta somam icchan tat okaḥ gantā puruhūtaḥ ūtī
avācacakṣam padam asya sasvar ugram nidhātuḥ anu āyam icchan
apṛccham anyāṁ uta te me āhuḥ indram naraḥ bubudhānāḥ aśema
pra nu vayam sute yā te kṛtāni indra bravāma yāni naḥ jujoṣaḥ
vedat a vidvān śṛṇavat ca vidvān vahate ayam maghavā sarva senaḥ
sthiram manaḥ cakṛṣe jātaḥ indra veṣi id ekaḥ yudhaye bhūyasaḥ cit
aśmānam cit śavasā didyutaḥ vi vidaḥ gavām ūrvam usriyāṇām
paras yat tvam paramaḥ ājaniṣṭhāḥ parāvati śrutyam nāma bibhrat
atas cit indrāt abhayanta devāḥ viśvāḥ apaḥ ajayat dāsa patnīḥ
tubhya id ete marutaḥ su śevāḥ arcanti arkam sunvanti andhaḥ
ahim ohānam apaḥ āśayānam pra māyābhiḥ māyinam sakṣat indraḥ
vi ṣū mṛdhaḥ januṣā dānam invan ahan gavā maghavan saṃcakānaḥ
atrā dāsasya namuceḥ śiraḥ yat avartayaḥ manave gātum icchan
yujam hi mām akṛthāḥ āt id indra śiraḥ dāsasya namuceḥ mathāyan
aśmānam cit svaryam vartamānam pra cakriyā iva rodasī marudbhyaḥ
striyaḥ hi dāsaḥ āyudhāni cakre kim mā karan abalāḥ asya senāḥ
antar hi akhyat ubhe asya dhene athā upa prait yudhaye dasyum indraḥ
sam atra gāvaḥ abhitas anavanta iha iha vatsaiḥ viyutāḥ yat āsan
sam tāḥ indraḥ asṛjat asya śākaiḥ yat īm somāsaḥ suṣutāḥ amandan
yat īm somāḥ babhru dhūtāḥ amandan aroravīt vṛṣabhaḥ sādaneṣu
purandaraḥ papivāṁ indraḥ asya punar gavām adadāt usriyāṇām
bhadram idam ruśamāḥ agne akran gavām catvāri dadataḥ sahasrā
ṛṇañcayasya prayatā maghāni prati agrabhīṣma nṛtamasya nṛṇām
supeśasam mā ava sṛjanti astam gavām sahasraiḥ ruśamāsaḥ agne
tīvrāḥ indram amamanduḥ sutāsaḥ aktoḥ vyuṣṭau paritakmyāyāḥ
aucchat sā rātrī paritakmyā yām ṛṇañcaye rājani ruśamānām
atyaḥ na vājī raghuḥ ajyamānaḥ babhruḥ catvāri asanat sahasrā
catur sahasram gavyasya paśvaḥ prati agrabhīṣma ruśameṣu agne
gharmaḥ cit taptaḥ pravṛje yaḥ āsīt ayasmayaḥ tam u ādāma viprāḥ
indraḥ rathāya pravatam kṛṇoti yam adhyasthāt maghavā vājayantam
yūthā iva paśvaḥ vi unoti gopāḥ ariṣṭaḥ yāti prathamaḥ siṣāsan
ā pra drava harivas mā vi venaḥ piśaṅga rāte abhi naḥ sacasva
nahi tvat indra vasyaḥ anyat asti amenān cit janivataḥ cakartha
ud yat sahaḥ sahasaḥ ājaniṣṭa dediṣṭa indraḥ indriyāṇi viśvā
prācodayat su dughāḥ vavre antar vi jyotiṣā saṃvavṛtvat tamaḥ avaḥ
anavaḥ te ratham aśvāya takṣan tvaṣṭā vajram puruhūta dyumantam
brahmāṇaḥ indram mahayantaḥ arkaiḥ avardhayan ahaye hantavai u
vṛṣṇe yat te vṛṣaṇaḥ arkam arcān indra grāvāṇaḥ aditiḥ sajoṣāḥ
an aśvāsaḥ ye pavayaḥ a rathāḥ indra iṣitāḥ abhī avartanta dasyūn
pra te pūrvāṇi karaṇāni vocam pra nūtanā maghavan yā cakartha
śaktīvas yat vibharāḥ rodasī ubhe jayan apaḥ manave dānu citrāḥ
tat id nu te karaṇam dasma vipra ahim yat ghnan ojaḥ atra mimīthāḥ
śuṣṇasya cit pari māyāḥ agṛbhṇāḥ prapitvam yan apa dasyūṃr asedhaḥ
tvam apaḥ yadave turvaśāya aramayaḥ su dughāḥ pāraḥ indra
ugram ayātam avahaḥ ha kutsam sam ha yat vām uśanā ranta devāḥ
indrākutsāḥ vahamānā rathena ā vām atyāḥ api karṇe vahantu
niḥ sīm adbhyaḥ dhamathaḥ niḥ ṣadhasthāt maghonaḥ hṛdaḥ varathaḥ tamāṃsi
vātasya yuktān su yujaḥ cit aśvān kaviḥ cit eṣaḥ ajagan avasyuḥ
viśve te atra marutaḥ sakhāyaḥ indra brahmāṇi taviṣīm avardhan
sūraḥ cit ratham paritakmyāyām pūrvam karat uparam jūjuvāṃsam
bharat cakram etaśaḥ sam riṇāti puras dadhat saniṣyati kratum naḥ
āyan janāḥ abhicakṣe jagāma indraḥ sakhāyam suta somam icchan
vadan grāvā ava vedim bhriyāte yasya jīram adhvaryavaḥ caranti
ye cākananta cākananta nū te martāḥ amṛta mā u te aṃhaḥ āran
vāvandhi yajyūṃr uta teṣu dhehi ojaḥ janeṣu yeṣu te syāma
adardar utsam asṛjaḥ vi khāni tvam arṇavān badbadhānāṁ aramṇāḥ
mahāntam indra parvatam vi yat var sṛjaḥ vi dhārāḥ ava dānavam han
tvam utsāṁ ṛtubhiḥ badbadhānāṁ araṃhaḥ ūdhaḥ parvatasya vajrin
ahim cit ugra prayutam śayānam jaghanvāṁ indra taviṣīm adhatthāḥ
tyasya cit mahataḥ niḥ mṛgasya vadhar jaghāna taviṣībhiḥ indraḥ
yaḥ ekaḥ id apratiḥ manyamānaḥ āt asmāt anyaḥ ajaniṣṭa tavyān
tyam cit eṣām svadhayā madantam mihaḥ napātam suvṛdham tamaḥ gām
vṛṣa prabharmā dānavasya bhāmam vajreṇa vajrī ni jaghāna śuṣṇam
tyam cit asya kratubhiḥ niṣattam amarmaṇaḥ vidat id asya marma
yat īm su kṣatra prabhṛtā madasya yuyutsantam tamasi harmye dhāḥ
tyam cit itthā katpayam śayānam asūrye tamasi vāvṛdhānam
tam cit mandānaḥ vṛṣabhaḥ sutasya uccais indraḥ apagūryā jaghāna
ud yat indraḥ mahate dānavāya vadhar yamiṣṭa sahaḥ apratītam
yat īm vajrasya prabhṛtau dadābha viśvasya jantoḥ adhamam cakāra
tyam cit arṇam madhupam śayānam asinvam vavram mahi ādat ugraḥ
a pādam atram mahatā vadhena ni duryoṇe āvṛṇak mṛdhra vācam
kaḥ asya śuṣmam taviṣīm varāte ekaḥ dhanā bharate apratītaḥ
ime cit asya jrayasaḥ nu devī indrasya ojasaḥ bhiyasā jihāte
ni asmai devī svadhitiḥ jihīte indrāya gātuḥ uśatī iva yeme
sam yat ojaḥ yuvate viśvam ābhiḥ anu svadhāvne kṣitayaḥ namanta
ekam nu tvā sat patim pāñcajanyam jātam śṛṇomi yaśasam janeṣu
tam me jagṛbhre āśasaḥ naviṣṭham doṣā vastoḥ havamānāsaḥ indram
evā hi tvām ṛtuthā yātayantam maghā viprebhyaḥ dadatam śṛṇomi
kim te brahmāṇaḥ _ sakhāyaḥ ye tvāyā nidadhuḥ kāmam indra
mahi mahe tavase dīdhye nṝn indrāya itthā tavase a tavyān
yaḥ asmai sumatim vājasātau stutaḥ jane samaryaḥ ciketa
sa tvam naḥ indra dhiyasānaḥ arkaiḥ harīṇām vṛṣan yoktram aśreḥ
yāḥ itthā maghavan anu joṣam vakṣaḥ abhi pra aryaḥ sakṣi janān
na te te indra abhi asmat ṛṣvā a yuktāsaḥ a brahma tā yat asan
tiṣṭhā ratham adhi tam vajra hasta ā raśmim deva yamase su aśvaḥ
purū yat te indra santi ukthā gave cakartha urvarāsu yudhyan
tatakṣe sūryāya cit okasi sve vṛṣā samatsu dāsasya nāma cit
vayam te te indra ye ca naraḥ śardhaḥ jajñānāḥ yātāḥ ca rathāḥ
ā asmān jagamyāt ahi śuṣma satvā bhagaḥ na havyaḥ prabhṛtheṣu cāruḥ
papṛkṣeṇyam indra tve hi ojaḥ nṛmṇāni ca nṛtamānaḥ amartaḥ
sa na enīm vasavānaḥ rayim dāḥ pra aryaḥ stuṣe tuvi maghasya dānam
evā naḥ indra ūtibhiḥ ava pāhi gṛṇataḥ śūra kārūn
uta tvacam dadataḥ vājasātau piprīhi madhvaḥ suṣutasya cāroḥ
uta tye mā paurukutsyasya sūreḥ trasadasyoḥ hiraṇinaḥ rarāṇāḥ
vahantu mā daśa śyetāsaḥ asya gairikṣitasya kratubhiḥ nu saśce
uta tye mā mārutāśvasya śoṇāḥ kratvāmaghāsaḥ vidathasya rātau
sahasrā me cyavatānaḥ dadānaḥ ānūkam aryaḥ vapuṣe na ārcat
uta tye mā dhvanyasya juṣṭāḥ lakṣmaṇyasya su rucaḥ yatānāḥ
mahnā rāyaḥ saṃvaraṇasya ṛṣeḥ vrajam na gāvaḥ prayatāḥ api gman
ajāta śatrum ajarā svarvatī anu svadhā amitā dasmam īyate
sunotana pacata brahma vāhase puruṣṭutāya prataram dadhātana
ā yaḥ somena jaṭharam apiprata amandata maghavā madhvaḥ andhasaḥ
yat īm mṛgāya hantave mahā vadhaḥ sahasra bhṛṣṭim uśanāḥ vadham yamat
yaḥ asmai ghraṃse uta vā yaḥ ūdhani somam sunoti bhavati dyumāṁ aha
apa apa śakraḥ tatanuṣṭim ūhati tanū śubhram maghavā yaḥ kavāsakhaḥ
yasya avadhīt pitaram yasya mātaram yasya śakraḥ bhrātaram na atas īṣate
veti id u asya prayatā yataṅkaraḥ na kilbiṣāt īṣate vasvaḥ ākaraḥ
na pañcabhiḥ daśabhiḥ vaṣṭi ārabham na a sunvatā sacate puṣyatā cana
jināti vā id amuyā hanti vā dhuniḥ ā devayum bhajati gomati vraje
vitvakṣaṇaḥ samṛtau cakramāsajaḥ a sunvataḥ viṣuṇaḥ sunvataḥ vṛdhaḥ
indraḥ viśvasya damitā vibhīṣaṇaḥ yathāvaśam nayati dāsam āryaḥ
sam īm paṇeḥ ajati bhojanam muṣe vi dāśuṣe bhajati sūnaram vasu
durge cana dhriyate viśvaḥ ā puru janaḥ yaḥ asya taviṣīm acukrudhat
sam yat janau su dhanau viśva śardhasau avet indraḥ maghavā goṣu śubhriṣu
yujam hi anyam akṛta pravepanī ud īm gavyam sṛjate satvabhiḥ dhuniḥ
sahasra sām āgniveśim gṛṇīṣe śatrim agne upamām ketum aryaḥ
tasmai āpaḥ saṃyataḥ pīpayanta tasmin kṣatram amavat tveṣam astu
yaḥ te sādhiṣṭhaḥ avase indra kratuḥ ṭam ā bhara
asmabhyam carṣaṇī saham sasnim vājeṣu duṣṭaram
yat indra te catasraḥ yat śūra santi tisraḥ
yat vā pañca kṣitīnām avaḥ tat su naḥ ā bhara
ā te avaḥ vareṇyam vṛṣantamasya hūmahe
vṛṣa jūtiḥ hi jajñiṣe ābhūbhiḥ indra turvaṇiḥ
vṛṣā hi asi rādhase jajñiṣe vṛṣṇi te śavaḥ
svakṣatram te dhṛṣat manaḥ satrāham indra pauṃsyam
tvam tam indra martyam amitrayantam adrivas
sarvarathā śatakrato ni yāhi śavasas pate
tvām id vṛtra hantama janāsaḥ vṛkta barhiṣaḥ
ugram pūrvīṣu pūrvyam havante vājasātaye
asmākam indra duṣṭaram puras yāvānam ājiṣu
sa yāvānam dhane dhane vājayantam avā ratham
asmākam indra ihi naḥ ratham avā purandhyā
vayam śaviṣṭha vāryam divi śravaḥ dadhīmahi divi stomam manāmahe
saḥ ā gamat indraḥ yaḥ vasūnām ciketat dātum dāmanaḥ rayīṇām
dhanva caraḥ na vaṃsagaḥ tṛṣāṇaḥ cakamānaḥ pibatu dugdham aṃśum
ā te hanū harivas śūra śipre ruhat somaḥ na parvatasya pṛṣṭhe
anu tvā rājan arvataḥ na hinvan gīrbhiḥ madema puruhūta viśve
cakram na vṛttam puruhūta vepate manaḥ bhiyā me amateḥ id adrivas
rathāt adhi tvā jaritā sadāvṛdha kuvid nu stoṣat maghavan purūvasuḥ
eṣa grāvā iva jaritā te indra iyarti vācam bṛhat āśuṣāṇaḥ
pra savyena maghavan yaṃsi rāyaḥ pra dakṣiṇit harivas mā vi venaḥ
vṛṣā tvā vṛṣaṇam vardhatu dyauḥ vṛṣā vṛṣabhyām vahase haribhyām
sa naḥ vṛṣā vṛṣa rathaḥ su śipra vṛṣa krato vṛṣāḥ vajrin bhare dhāḥ
yaḥ rohitau vājinau vājinīvān tribhiḥ śataiḥ sacamānau adiṣṭa
yūne sam asmai kṣitayaḥ namantām śruta rathāya marutaḥ duvoyā
sam bhānunā yatate sūryasya ājuhvānaḥ ghṛtapṛṣṭhaḥ svañcāḥ
tasmai amṛdhrāḥ uṣasaḥ vi ucchān yaḥ indrāya sunavāma iti āha
samiddha agniḥ vanavat stīrṇa barhiḥ yukta grāvā suta somaḥ jarāte
grāvāṇaḥ yasya iṣiram vadanti ayat adhvaryuḥ haviṣā ava sindhum
vadhūḥ iyam patim icchantī eti yaḥ īm vahāte mahiṣīm iṣirām
ā asya śravasyāt rathaḥ ā ca ghoṣāt purū sahasrā pari vartayāte
na sa rājā vyathate yasmin indraḥ tīvram somam pibati go sakhāyam
ā satvanaiḥ ajati hanti vṛtram kṣeti kṣitīḥ subhagaḥ nāma puṣyan
puṣyāt kṣeme abhi yoge bhavāti ubhe vṛtau saṃyatī sam jayāti
priyaḥ sūrye priyaḥ agnā bhavāti yaḥ indrāya suta somaḥ dadāśat
uroḥ ṭe indra rādhasaḥ vibhvī rātiḥ śatakrato
adhā naḥ viśvacarṣaṇe dyumnā su kṣatra maṃhaya
yat īm indra śravāyyam iṣam śaviṣṭha dadhiṣe
paprathe dīrghaśruttamam hiraṇya varṇa duṣṭaram
śuṣmāsaḥ ye te adrivas mehanā ketasāpaḥ
ubhā devau abhiṣṭaye divaḥ ca gmaḥ ca rājathaḥ
uta u naḥ asya kasya cit dakṣasya tava vṛtrahan
asmabhyam nṛmṇam ā bhara asmabhyam nṛmaṇasyase
nū te ābhiḥ abhiṣṭibhiḥ tava śarman śatakrato
indra syāma su gopāḥ śūra syāma su gopāḥ
yat indra citra mehanā asti tvādātam adrivas
rādhaḥ tat naḥ vidadvaso ubhayāhasti ā bhara
yat manyase vareṇyam indra dyukṣam tat ā bhara
vidyāma tasya te vayam akūpārasya dāvane
yat te ditsu prarādhyam manaḥ asti śrutam bṛhat
tena dṛﾱhā cit adrivas ā vājam darṣi sātaye
maṃhiṣṭham vaḥ maghonām rājānam carṣaṇīnām
indram upa praśastaye pūrvībhiḥ jujuṣe giraḥ
asmai id kāvyam vacaḥ uktham indrāya śaṃsyam
tasmai u brahma vāhase giraḥ vardhanti atrayaḥ giraḥ śumbhanti atrayaḥ
ā yāhi adribhiḥ sutam somam soma pate piba
vṛṣan indra vṛṣabhiḥ vṛtra hantama
vṛṣā grāvā vṛṣā madaḥ vṛṣā somaḥ ayam sutaḥ
vṛṣan indra vṛṣabhiḥ vṛtra hantama
vṛṣā tvā vṛṣaṇam huve vajrin citrābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
vṛṣan indra vṛṣabhiḥ vṛtra hantama
ṛjīṣī vajrī vṛṣabhaḥ turāṣāh chuṣmī rājā vṛtrahā soma pāvā
yuktvā haribhyām upa yāsat arvāṅ mādhyandine savane matsat indraḥ
yat tvā sūrya svarbhānuḥ tamasā vidhyat āsuraḥ
a kṣetra vid yathā mugdhaḥ bhuvanāni adīdhayuḥ
svarbhānoḥ adha yat indra māyāḥ avas divaḥ vartamānāḥ avāhan
gūﾱham sūryam tamasā apavratena turīyeṇa brahmaṇā avindat atriḥ
mā mām imam tava santam atre irasyā drugdhaḥ bhiyasā ni gārīt
tvam mitraḥ asi satya rādhāḥ tau mā iha avatam varuṇaḥ ca rājā
grāvṇaḥ brahmā yuyujānaḥ saparyan kīriṇā devān namasā upaśikṣan
atriḥ sūryasya divi cakṣuḥ ādhāt svarbhānoḥ apa māyāḥ aghukṣat
yam vai sūryam svarbhānuḥ tamasā vidhyat āsuraḥ
atrayaḥ tam anu avindat nahi anye aśaknuvan
kaḥ nu vām mitrāvaruṇau ṛtāyan divaḥ vā mahaḥ pārthivasya vā de
ṛtasya vā sadasi trāsīthām naḥ yajñāyate vā paśu ṣaḥ na vājān
te naḥ mitraḥ varuṇaḥ aryama āyuḥ indraḥ ṛbhukṣāḥ marutaḥ juṣanta
namobhiḥ vā ye dadhate suvṛktim stomam rudrāya mīḍhuṣe sa joṣāḥ
ā vām yeṣṭha aśvinā huvadhyai vātasya patman rathyasya puṣṭau
uta vā divaḥ asurāya manma pra andhāṃsi iva yajyave bharadhvam
pra sakṣaṇaḥ divyaḥ kaṇva hotā tritaḥ divaḥ sajoṣāḥ vātaḥ agniḥ
pūṣā bhagaḥ prabhṛthe viśva bhojāḥ ājim na jagmuḥ āśvaśvatamāḥ
pra vaḥ rayim yukta aśvam bharadhvam rāyaḥ eṣe avase dadhīta dhīḥ
su śevaḥ evaiḥ auśijasya hotā ye vaḥ evā marutaḥ turāṇām
pra vaḥ vāyum ratha yujam kṛṇudhvam pra devam vipram panitāram arkaiḥ
iṣudhyavaḥ ṛtasāpaḥ purandhīḥ vasvīḥ naḥ atra patnīḥ ā dhiye dhuḥ
upa vaḥ eṣe vandyebhiḥ śūṣaiḥ pra yahvī divaḥ citayadbhiḥ arkaiḥ
uṣāsānaktā viduṣī iva viśvam ā hā vahataḥ martyāya yajñam
abhi vaḥ arce poṣyāvataḥ nṝn vāstoṣpatim tvaṣṭāram rarāṇaḥ
dhanyā sajoṣāḥ dhiṣaṇā namobhiḥ vanaspatīṃr oṣadhīḥ rāyaḥ eṣe
tuje naḥ tane parvatāḥ santu svaitavaḥ ye vasavaḥ na vīrāḥ
panitaḥ āptyaḥ yajataḥ sadā naḥ vardhāt naḥ śaṃsam naryaḥ abhiṣṭau
vṛṣṇaḥ astoṣi bhūmyasya garbham tritaḥ napātam apām suvṛkti
gṛṇīte agniḥ etarī na śūṣaiḥ śociṣkeśaḥ ni riṇāti vanā
kathā mahe rudriyāya bravāma kad rāye cikituṣe bhagāya
āpaḥ oṣadhīḥ uta naḥ avantu dyauḥ vanā girayaḥ vṛkṣa keśāḥ
śṛṇotu naḥ ūrjām patiḥ giraḥ sa nabhaḥ tarīyān iṣiraḥ parijmā
śṛṇvantu āpaḥ puras na śubhrāḥ pari srucaḥ babṛhāṇasya adreḥ
vidā cit nu mahāntaḥ ye vaḥ evāḥ bravāma dasmāḥ vāryam dadhānāḥ
vayaḥ cana su bhvaḥ āva yanti kṣubhā martam anuyatam vadhasnaiḥ
ā daivyāni pārthivāni janmā apaḥ ca acchā su makhāya vocam
vardhantām dyāvaḥ giraḥ candra agrāḥ udā vardhantām abhiṣātāḥ arṇāḥ
pade pade me jarimā ni dhāyi varūtrī vā śakrā yā pāyubhiḥ ca
siṣaktu mātā mahī rasā naḥ smat sūribhiḥ ṛju hastaḥ ṛju vaniḥ
kathā dāśema namasā sudānūn eva yāḥ marutaḥ acchoktau praśravasaḥ marutaḥ acchoktau
mā naḥ ahiḥ budhnyaḥ riṣe dhāt asmākam bhūt upamāti vaniḥ
iti cit nu prajāyai paśumatyai devāsaḥ vanate martyaḥ vaḥ ā devāsaḥ vanate martyaḥ vaḥ
atrā śivām tanvaḥ dhāsim asyāḥ jarām cit me nirṛtiḥ jagrasīta
tām vaḥ devāḥ sumatim ūrjayantīm iṣam aśyāma vasavaḥ śasā goḥ
sā naḥ sudānuḥ mṛﾱayantī devī prati dravantī suvitāya gamyāḥ
abhi naḥ iﾱā yūthasya mātā smat nadībhiḥ urvaśī vā gṛṇātu
urvaśī vā bṛhat divā gṛṇānā abhyūrṇvānā prabhṛthasya āyoḥ
siṣaktu naḥ ūrjavyasya puṣṭeḥ
pra śantamā varuṇam dīdhitī gīḥ mitram bhagam aditim nūnam aśyāḥ
pṛṣat yoniḥ pañca hotā śṛṇotu a tūrta panthāḥ asuraḥ mayobhuḥ
prati me stomam aditiḥ jagṛbhyāt sūnum na mātā hṛdyam su śevam
brahma priyam deva hitam yat asti aham mitre varuṇe yat mayobhu
ud īraya kavitamam kavīnām unatta enam abhi madhvā ghṛtena
sa naḥ vasūni prayatā hitāni candrāṇi devaḥ savitā suvāti
sam indra naḥ manasā neṣi gobhiḥ sam sūribhiḥ harivas sam svasti
sam brahmaṇā deva hitam yat asti sam devānām sumatyā yajñiyānām
devaḥ bhagaḥ savitā rāyaḥ aṃśaḥ indraḥ vṛtrasya saṃjitaḥ dhanānām
ṛbhukṣāḥ vājaḥ uta vā purandhiḥ avantu naḥ amṛtāsaḥ turāsaḥ
marutvataḥ apratītasya jiṣṇoḥ a jūryataḥ pra bravāma kṛtāni
na te pūrve maghavan na aparāsaḥ na vīryam nūtanaḥ kaḥ cana āpa
upa stuhi prathamam ratna dheyam bṛhaspatim sanitāram dhanānām
yaḥ śaṃsate stuvate śambhaviṣṭhaḥ purūvasuḥ āgamat johuvānam
tava ūtibhiḥ sacamānāḥ ariṣṭāḥ bṛhaspate maghavānaḥ su vīrāḥ
ye aśva dāḥ uta vā santi go dāḥ ye vastra dāḥ subhagāḥ teṣu rāyaḥ
visarmāṇam kṛṇuhi vittam eṣām ye bhuñjate apṛṇantaḥ naḥ ukthaiḥ
apavratān prasave vāvṛdhānān brahma dviṣaḥ sūryāt yāvayasva
yaḥ ohate rakṣasaḥ deva vītau acakrebhiḥ tam marutaḥ ni yāta
yaḥ vaḥ śamīm śaśamānasya nindāt tucchyān kāmān karate siṣvidānaḥ
tam u stuhi yaḥ su iṣuḥ su dhanvā yaḥ viśvasya kṣayati bheṣajasya
yakṣva mahe saumanasāya rudram namobhiḥ devam asuram duvasya
damūnasaḥ apasaḥ ye su hastāḥ vṛṣṇaḥ patnīḥ nadyaḥ vibhva taṣṭāḥ
sarasvatī bṛhat divā uta rākā daśasyantīḥ varivasyantu śubhrāḥ
pra su mahe su śaraṇāya medhām giram bhare navyasīm jāyamānām
yaḥ āhanāḥ duhituḥ vakṣaṇāsu rūpā minānaḥ akṛṇot idam naḥ
pra suṣṭuti stanayantam ruvantam iḍaḥ patim jaritar nūnam aśyāḥ
yaḥ abdimāṁ udanimāṁ iyarti pra vidyutā rodasī ukṣamāṇaḥ
eṣa stomaḥ mārutam śardhaḥ acchā rudrasya sūnūn yuvanyūn ud aśyāḥ
kāmaḥ rāye havate mā svasti upa stuhi pṛṣat aśvāṁ ayāsaḥ
pra eṣa stomaḥ pṛthivīm antarikṣam vanaspatīn oṣadhī rāye aśyāḥ
devaḥ devaḥ su havaḥ bhūtu mahyam mā naḥ mātā pṛthivī durmatau dhāt
urau devāḥ anibādhe syāma
sam aśvinoḥ avasā nūtanena mayobhuvā su praṇītī gamema
ā naḥ rayim vahatam ā uta vīrān ā viśvāni amṛtā saubhagāni
ā dhenavaḥ payasā tūrṇi arthāḥ a mardhantīḥ upa naḥ yantu madhvā
mahaḥ rāye bṛhatīḥ sapta vipraḥ mayobhuvaḥ jaritā johavīti
ā suṣṭutī namasā vartayadhyai dyāvā vājāya pṛthivī amṛdhre
pitā mātā madhu vacāḥ su hastā bhare bhare naḥ yaśasau aviṣṭām
adhvaryavaḥ cakṛvāṃsaḥ madhūni pra vāyave bharata cāru śukram
hotā iva naḥ prathamaḥ pāhi asya deva madhvaḥ rarimā te madāya
daśa kṣipaḥ yuñjate bāhū adrim somasya yā śamitārā su hastā
madhvaḥ rasam su gabhastiḥ giriṣṭhām _ duduhe śukram aṃśuḥ
asāvi te jujuṣāṇāya somaḥ kratve dakṣāya bṛhate madāya
harī rathe su dhurā yoge arvāk indra priyā kṛṇuhi hūyamānaḥ
ā naḥ mahīm aramatim sajoṣāḥ gnām devīm namasā rāta havyām
madhoḥ madāya bṛhatīm ṛta jñām ā agne vaha pathibhiḥ deva yānaiḥ
añjanti yam prathayantaḥ na viprāḥ vapāvantam na agninā tapantaḥ
pituḥ na putraḥ upasi preṣṭhaḥ ā gharmaḥ agnim ṛtayan asādi
acchā mahī bṛhatī śantamā gīḥ dūtaḥ na gantu aśvinā huvadhyai
mayobhuvā sa rathā yātam arvāk gantam nidhim dhuram āṇiḥ na nābhim
pra tavyasaḥ namauktim turasya aham pūṣṇaḥ uta vāyoḥ adikṣi
yā rādhasā coditārā matīnām yā vājasya draviṇaḥ dā uta tman
ā nāmabhiḥ marutaḥ vakṣi viśvān ā rūpebhiḥ jātavedaḥ huvānaḥ
yajñam giraḥ jarituḥ suṣṭutim ca viśve ganta marutaḥ viśve ūtī
ā naḥ divaḥ bṛhataḥ parvatāt ā sarasvatī yajatā gantu yajñam
havam devī jujuṣāṇā ghṛtācī śagmām naḥ vācam uśatī śṛṇotu
ā vedhasam nīla pṛṣṭham bṛhantam bṛhaspatim sadane sādayadhvam
sādadyonim dame ā dīdivāṃsam hiraṇya varṇam aruṣam sapema
ā dharṇasiḥ bṛhat divaḥ rarāṇaḥ viśvebhiḥ gantu omabhiḥ huvānaḥ
gnāḥ vasānaḥ oṣadhīḥ amṛdhraḥ tri dhātu śṛṅgaḥ vṛṣabhaḥ vayodhāḥ
mātuṣ pade parame śukre āyoḥ vipanyavaḥ rāspirāsaḥ agman
su śevyam namasā rāta havyāḥ śiśum mṛjanti āyavaḥ na vāse
bṛhat vayaḥ bṛhate tubhyam agne dhiyā juraḥ mithunāsaḥ sacanta
devaḥ devaḥ su havaḥ bhūtu mahyam mā naḥ mātā pṛthivī durmatau dhāt
urau devāḥ anibādhe syāma
sam aśvinoḥ avasā nūtanena mayobhuvā su praṇītī gamema
ā naḥ rayim vahatam ā uta vīrān ā viśvāni amṛtā saubhagāni
tam pratnathā pūrvathā viśvathā imathā jyeṣṭhatātim barhiṣadam svarvidam
pratīcīnam vṛjanam dohase _ jayantam anu yāsu vardhase
śriye su dṛśīḥ uparasya yāḥ svar virocamānaḥ kakubhāṁ a codate
su gopāḥ asi na dabhāya sukrato paras māyābhiḥ ṛte āsa nāma te
atyam haviḥ sacate sat ca dhātu ca ariṣṭa gātuḥ sa hotā sahaḥ bhariḥ
prasarsrāṇaḥ anu barhiḥ vṛṣā śiśuḥ madhye yuvā ajaraḥ visruhā hitaḥ
pra vaḥ ete su yujaḥ yāman iṣṭaye nīcīḥ amuṣmai yamyaḥ ṛtāvṛdhaḥ
suyantubhiḥ sarva śāsaiḥ abhīśubhiḥ kriviḥ nāmāni pravaṇe muṣāyati
saṃjarbhurāṇaḥ tarubhiḥ sutegṛbham vayākinam citta garbhāsu susvaruḥ
dhāravākeṣu ṛju gātha śobhase vardhasva patnīḥ abhi jīvaḥ adhvare
yādṛś eva dadṛśe tādṛś ucyate sam chāyayā dadhire sidhrayā apsu ā
mahīm asmabhyam uru sām uru jrayaḥ bṛhat su vīram an apacyutam sahaḥ
veti agruḥ janivān vai ati spṛdhaḥ samaryatā manasā sūryaḥ kaviḥ
ghraṃsam rakṣantam pari viśvatas gayam asmākam śarma vanavat svāvasuḥ
jyāyāṃsam asya yatunasya ketuna ṛṣi svaram carati yāsu nāma te
yādṛśmin dhāyi tam apasyayā vidat yaḥ u svayam vahate saḥ aram karat
samudram āsām ava tasthe agrimā na riṣyati savanam yasmin āyatā
atrā na hārdi kravaṇasya rejate yatrā matiḥ vidyate pūta bandhanī
sa hi kṣatrasya manasasya cittibhiḥ evāvadasya yajatasya sadhreḥ
avatsārasya spṛṇavāma raṇvabhiḥ śaviṣṭham vājam viduṣā cit ardhyam
śyenaḥ āsām aditiḥ kakṣyaḥ madaḥ viśva vārasya yajatasya māyinaḥ
sam anyam anyam arthayanti etave viduḥ viṣāṇam paripānam anti te
sadāpṛṇaḥ yajataḥ vi dviṣaḥ vadhīt bāhuvṛktaḥ śrutavid taryaḥ vaḥ sacā
ubhā sa varā prati eti bhāti ca yat īm gaṇam bhajate suprayāvabhiḥ
sutambharaḥ yajamānasya sat patiḥ viśvāsām ūdhaḥ sa dhiyām _
bharat dhenuḥ rasavat śiśriye payaḥ anubruvāṇaḥ adhi eti na svapan
yaḥ jāgāra tam ṛcaḥ kāmayante yaḥ jāgāra tam u sāmāni yanti
yaḥ jāgāra tam ayam somaḥ āha tava aham asmi sakhye nyokāḥ
agniḥ jāgāra tam ṛcaḥ kāmayante agniḥ jāgāra tam u sāmāni yanti
agniḥ jāgāra tam ayam somaḥ āha tava aham asmi sakhye nyokāḥ
vidāḥ divaḥ viṣyan adrim ukthaiḥ āyatyāḥ uṣasaḥ arcinaḥ guḥ
apāvṛta vrajinīḥ ud svar gāt vi duraḥ mānuṣīḥ devaḥ āvaḥ
vi sūryaḥ amatim na śriyam sāt ā ūrvāt gavām mātā jānatī gāt
dhanu arṇasaḥ nadyaḥ khādoarṇā sthūṇā iva su mitā dṛṃhata dyauḥ
asmai ukthāya parvatasya garbhaḥ mahīnām januṣe pūrvyāya
vi parvataḥ jihīta sādhata dyauḥ āvivāsantaḥ dasayanta bhūma
sūktebhiḥ vaḥ vacobhiḥ deva juṣṭaiḥ indrā nu agnī avase huvadhyai
ukthebhiḥ hi sma kavayaḥ su yajñāḥ āvivāsantaḥ marutaḥ yajanti
_ nu adya sudhyaḥ bhavāma pra ducchunāḥ minavāma varīyaḥ
āre dveṣāṃsi sanutar dadhāma āyāma prāñcaḥ yajamānam accha
_ dhiyam kṛṇavāmā sakhāyaḥ apa yā mātā ṛṇuta vrajam goḥ
yayā manuḥ viśiśipram jigāya yayā vaṇij vaṅkuḥ āpa purīṣam
anūnot atra hasta yataḥ adriḥ ārcan yena daśa māsaḥ navagvāḥ
ṛtam yatī saramā gāḥ avindat viśvāni satyā aṅgirāḥ cakāra
viśve asyāḥ vyuṣi māhināyāḥ sam yat gobhiḥ aṅgirasaḥ navanta
utsaḥ āsām parame sadhasthe ṛtasya pathā saramā vidat gāḥ
ā sūryaḥ yātu sapta aśvaḥ kṣetram yat asya urviyā dīrgha yāthe
raghuḥ śyenaḥ patayat andhaḥ acchā yuvā kaviḥ dīdayat goṣu gacchan
ā sūryaḥ aruhat śukram arṇaḥ ayukta yat haritaḥ vīta pṛṣṭhāḥ
udnā na nāvam anayanta dhīrāḥ āśṛṇvatīḥ āpaḥ arvāk atiṣṭhan
dhiyam vaḥ apsu dadhiṣe svarṣām yayā ataran daśa māsaḥ navagvāḥ
ayā dhiyā syāma deva gopāḥ ayā dhiyā tuturyāma ati aṃhaḥ
hayaḥ na vidvāṁ ayuji svayam dhuri tām vahāmi prataraṇīm avasyuvam
na asyāḥ vaśmi vimucam na āvṛtam punar vidvān pathaḥ puraetar ṛju neṣati
agne indra varuṇa mitra devāḥ śardhaḥ pra yanta māruta uta viṣṇo
ubhā nāsatyā rudraḥ adha gnāḥ pūṣā bhagaḥ sarasvatī juṣanta
indra agnī mitrāvaruṇā aditim svar pṛthivīm dyām marutaḥ parvatāṁ apaḥ
huve viṣṇum pūṣaṇam brahmaṇaspatim bhagam nu śaṃsam savitāram ūtaye
uta naḥ viṣṇuḥ uta vātaḥ asridhaḥ draviṇaḥ dāḥ uta somaḥ mayaḥ karat
uta ṛbhavaḥ uta rāye naḥ aśvinā uta tvaṣṭā uta vibhvā anu maṃsate
uta tyad naḥ mārutam śardhaḥ ā gamat divikṣayam yajatam barhiḥ āsade
bṛhaspatiḥ śarma pūṣā uta naḥ yamat varūthyam varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā
uta tye naḥ parvatāsaḥ su śastayaḥ su dītayaḥ nadyaḥ trāmaṇe bhuvan
bhagaḥ vibhaktā śavasā avasā gamat uru vyacāḥ aditiḥ śrotu me havam
devānām patnīḥ uśatīḥ avantu naḥ prāvantu naḥ tujaye vājasātaye
yāḥ pārthivāsaḥ yāḥ apām api vrate tāḥ naḥ devīḥ su havāḥ śarma yacchata
uta gnāḥ vyantu deva patnīḥ indrāṇī agnāyī aśvinī rāj
ā rodasī varuṇānī śṛṇotu vyantu devīḥ yaḥ ṛtuḥ janīnām
prayuñjatī divaḥ eti bruvāṇā mahī mātā duhituḥ bodhayantī
āvivāsantī yuvatiḥ manīṣā pitṛbhyaḥ ā sadane johuvānā
ajirāsaḥ tad apaḥ īyamānāḥ ātasthivāṃsaḥ amṛtasya nābhim
anantāsaḥ uravaḥ viśvatas sīm pari dyāvāpṛthivī yanti panthāḥ
ukṣā samudraḥ aruṣaḥ suparṇaḥ pūrvasya yonim pituḥ ā viveśa
madhye divaḥ nihitaḥ pṛśniḥ aśmā vi cakrame rajasaḥ pāti antau
catvāraḥ īm bibhrati kṣemayantaḥ daśa garbham carase dhāpayante
tri dhātavaḥ paramāḥ asya gāvaḥ divaḥ caranti pari sadyas antān
idam vapuḥ nivacanam janāsaḥ caranti yat nadyaḥ tasthuḥ āpaḥ
dve yat īm bibhṛtaḥ mātuḥ anye iha iha jāte yamyā sabandhū
vi tanvate dhiyaḥ asmai apāṃsi vastrā putrāya mātaraḥ vayanti
upaprakṣe vṛṣaṇaḥ modamānāḥ divaḥ pathā vadhvaḥ yanti accha
tat astu mitrāvaruṇā tat agne śam yoḥ asmabhyam idam astu śastam
aśīmahi gādham uta pratiṣṭhām namaḥ dive bṛhate sādanāya
kad u priyāya dhāmne manāmahe sva kṣatrāya sva yaśase mahe vayam
āmenyasya rajasaḥ yat abhre _ apaḥ vṛṇānā vitanoti māyinī
tāḥ atnata vayunam vīra vakṣaṇam samānyā vṛtayā viśvam ā rajaḥ
apa u apācīḥ aparāḥ apejate pra pūrvābhiḥ tirate devayuḥ janaḥ
ā grāvabhiḥ ahanyebhiḥ aktubhiḥ variṣṭham vajram ā jigharti māyini
śatam vā yasya pracaran sve dame saṃvartayantaḥ vi ca vartayan ahā
tām asya rītim paraśoḥ iva prati anīkam akhyam bhuje asya varpasaḥ
sacā yadi pitumantam iva kṣayam ratnam dadhāti bharahūtaye viśe
sa jihvayā catur anīkaḥ ṛñjate cāru vasānaḥ varuṇaḥ yatan arim
na tasya vidma puruṣa tva tā vayam yatas bhagaḥ savitā dāti vāryam
devam vaḥ adya savitāram eṣe bhagam ca ratnam vibhajantam āyoḥ
ā vām narā puru bhujā vavṛtyām dive dive cit aśvinā sakhīyan
prati prayāṇam asurasya vidvān sūktaiḥ devam savitāram duvasya
upa bruvīta namasā vijānan jyeṣṭham ca ratnam vibhajantam āyoḥ
a datra yāḥ dayate vāryāṇi pūṣā bhagaḥ aditiḥ vastau usraḥ
indraḥ viṣṇuḥ varuṇaḥ mitraḥ agniḥ ahāni bhadrā janayanta dasmāḥ
tat naḥ anarvā savitā varūtham tat sindhavaḥ iṣayantaḥ anu gman
upa yat voce adhvarasya hotā rāyaḥ syāma patayaḥ vāja ratnāḥ
pra ye vasubhyaḥ īvat ā namaḥ duḥ ye mitre varuṇe sūkta vācaḥ
avaitu abhvam kṛṇuta varīyaḥ divaspṛthivyoḥ avasā madema
viśvaḥ devasya netuḥ martaḥ vurīta sakhyam
viśvaḥ rāyaḥ iṣudhyati dyumnam vṛṇīta puṣyase
te te deva netar ye ca imān anuśase
te rāyā te hi āpṛce sacemahi sacathyaiḥ
atas naḥ ā nṝn atithīn atas patnīḥ daśasyata
āre viśvam patheṣṭhām dviṣaḥ yuyotu yūyuviḥ
yatra vahniḥ abhihitaḥ dudravat droṇyaḥ paśuḥ
nṛmaṇāḥ vīra pastyaḥ arṇā dhīrā iva sanitā
eṣa te deva netar rathaspatiḥ śam rayiḥ
śam rāye śam svastaye iṣa stutaḥ manāmahe deva stutaḥ manāmahe
agne sutasya pītaye viśvaiḥ ūmebhiḥ ā gahi
devebhiḥ havya dātaye
ṛta dhītayaḥ ā gata satya dharmāṇaḥ adhvaram
agneḥ pibata jihvayā
viprebhiḥ vipra santya prātaryāvabhiḥ ā gahi
devebhiḥ soma pītaye
ayam somaḥ camū sutaḥ amatre pari sicyate
priyaḥ indrāya vāyave
vāyo ā yāhi vītaye juṣāṇaḥ havya dātaye
pibā sutasya andhasaḥ abhi prayaḥ
indraḥ ca vāyo eṣām sutānām pītim arhathaḥ
tān juṣethām arepasau abhi prayaḥ
sutāḥ indrāya vāyave somāsaḥ dadhi āśiraḥ

na sa jīyate marutaḥ na hanyate na sredhati na vyathate na riṣyati

na vaḥ aśvāḥ śrathayanta aha sisrataḥ sadyas asya adhvanaḥ pāram aśnutha

agni bhrājasaḥ vidyutaḥ gabhastyoḥ śiprāḥ śīrṣasu vitatāḥ hiraṇyayīḥ

sam acyanta vṛjanā atitviṣanta yat svaranti ghoṣam vitatam ṛtāyavaḥ

na yaḥ yucchati tiṣyaḥ yathā divaḥ asme rāranta marutaḥ sahasriṇam

yūyam arvantam bharatāya vājam yūyam dhattha rājānam śruṣṭimantam
tat vaḥ yāmi draviṇam sadyaūtayaḥ yena svar na tatanāma nṝn abhi
idam su me marutaḥ haryata vacaḥ yasya tarema tarasā śatam himāḥ

uta antarikṣam mamire vi ojasā śubham yātām anu rathāḥ avṛtsata

virokiṇaḥ sūryasya iva raśmayaḥ śubham yātām anu rathāḥ avṛtsata

ud īrayatha marutaḥ samudrataḥ yūyam vṛṣṭim varṣayatha purīṣiṇaḥ
na vaḥ dasrāḥ upa dasyanti dhenavaḥ śubham yātām anu rathāḥ avṛtsata

na parvatāḥ na nadyaḥ varanta vaḥ yatrā acidhvam marutaḥ gacchatha id u tat
uta dyāvāpṛthivī yāthana pari śubham yātām anu rathāḥ avṛtsata

ṛtena ṛtam apihitam dhruvam vām sūryasya yatra vimucanti aśvān

tat su vām mitrāvaruṇāḥ mahitvam īrmā tasthuṣīḥ ahabhiḥ duduhre
viśvāḥ pinvathaḥ svasarasya dhenāḥ anu vām ekaḥ paviḥ ā vavarta
adhārayatam pṛthivīm uta dyām mitra rājānā varuṇāḥ mahobhiḥ
vardhayatam oṣadhīḥ pinvatam gāḥ ava vṛṣṭim sṛjatam jīra dānū

ghṛtasya nirṇij anu vartate vām upa sindhavaḥ pradivi kṣaranti

hiraṇya nirṇij ayaḥ asya sthūṇā vi bhrājate divi aśvājanī iva
bhadre kṣetre nimitā tilvile vā sanema madhvaḥ adhigartyasya
hiraṇya rūpam uṣasaḥ vyuṣṭau aya sthūṇam uditā sūryasya

yat baṃhiṣṭham na atividhe sudānū acchidram śarma bhuvanasya gopā
tena naḥ mitrāvaruṇau aviṣṭam siṣāsantaḥ jigīvāṃsaḥ syāma
ṛtasya gopau adhi tiṣṭhathaḥ ratham satya dharmāṇā parame vyomani
yam atra mitrāvaruṇa avathaḥ yuvam tasmai vṛṣṭiḥ madhumat pinvate divaḥ
samrājau asya bhuvanasya rājathaḥ mitrāvaruṇā vidathe svar dṛśā
vṛṣṭim vām rādhaḥ amṛta tvam īmahe dyāvāpṛthivī vi caranti tanyavaḥ
samrājau ugrā vṛṣabhā divaḥ patī pṛthivyāḥ mitrāvaruṇā vicarṣaṇī
citrebhiḥ abhraiḥ upa tiṣṭhathaḥ ravam dyām varṣayathaḥ asurasya māyayā
māyā vām mitrāvaruṇāḥ divi śritā sūryaḥ jyotiḥ carati citram āyudham
tam abhreṇa vṛṣṭyā gūhathaḥ divi parjanya drapsāḥ madhumantaḥ īrate
ratham yuñjate marutaḥ śubhe sukham śūraḥ na mitrāvaruṇā gaviṣṭiṣu
rajāṃsi citrāḥ vi caranti tanyavaḥ divaḥ samrājā payasā naḥ ukṣatam
vācam su mitrāvaruṇau irāvatīm parjanyaḥ citrām vadati tviṣīmatīm
abhrā vasata marutaḥ su māyayā dyām varṣayatam aruṇām arepasam
dharmaṇā mitrāvaruṇāḥ vipaścitā vratā rakṣethe asurasya māyayā
ṛtena viśvam bhuvanam vi rājathaḥ sūryam ā dhatthaḥ divi citryam ratham
varuṇam vaḥ riśādasam ṛcā mitram havāmahe
pari vrajā iva bāhvoḥ jaganvāṃsā svarṇaram
tā bāhavā sucetunā pra yantam asmai arcate
śevam hi jāryam vām viśvāsu kṣāsu joguve
yat nūnam aśyām gatim mitrasya yāyām pathā
asya priyasya śarmaṇi a hiṃsānasya saścire
yuvābhyām mitrāvaruṇā upamam dheyām ṛcā
yat ha kṣaye maghonām stotṝṇām ca spūrdhase
ā naḥ mitra su dītibhiḥ varuṇaḥ ca sadhasthe ā
sve kṣaye maghonām sakhīnām ca vṛdhase
yuvam naḥ yeṣu varuṇa kṣatram bṛhat ca bibhṛthaḥ
uru naḥ vājasātaye kṛtam rāye svastaye
ucchantyām me yajatā devakṣatre ruśadgavi
sutam somam na hastibhiḥ ā paḍbhiḥ dhāvatam narā bibhratau arcanānasam
yaḥ ciketa sa su kratuḥ devatrā sa bravītu naḥ

tā sat patī ṛtāvṛdhaḥ ṛtāvānā jane jane
tā vām iyānaḥ avase pūrvau upa bruve sacā
su aśvāsaḥ su cetunā vājāṁ abhi pra dāvane
mitraḥ aṃhoḥ cit āt uru kṣayāya gātum vanate
mitrasya hi pratūrvataḥ sumatiḥ asti vidhataḥ
vayam mitrasya avasi syāma saprathastame
anehasaḥ tvotayaḥ satrā varuṇa śeṣasaḥ

varuṇāya ṛta peśase dadhīta prayase mahe
tā hi kṣatram a vihrutam samyak asuryam āśāte
adha vratā iva mānuṣam svar na dhāyi darśatam

rātahavyasya suṣṭutim dadhṛṣ stomaiḥ manāmahe
adhā hi kāvyā yuvam dakṣasya pūrbhiḥ adbhutā
ni ketunā janānām cikethe pūta dakṣasā
tat ṛtam pṛthivi bṛhat śravaḥ eṣe ṛṣīṇām
jrayasānau aram pṛthu ati kṣaranti yāmabhiḥ
ā yat vām īyacakṣasā mitra vayam ca sūrayaḥ
vyaciṣṭhe bahu pāyye yatemahi sva rājye
baṭ itthā deva niṣkṛtam ādityā yajatam bṛhat
varuṇa mitra aryaman varṣiṣṭham kṣatram āśāthe
ā yat yonim hiraṇyayam varuṇa mitra sadathaḥ
dhartārā carṣaṇīnām yantam sumnam riśādasā
viśve hi viśva vedasaḥ varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā

te hi satyāḥ ṛta spṛśaḥ ṛtāvānaḥ jane jane

mahi kṣatrau ṛtam bṛhat

yuñjate manaḥ uta yuñjate dhiyaḥ viprāḥ viprasya bṛhataḥ vipaścitaḥ
vi hotrā dadhe vayunā vid ekaḥ id mahī devasya savituḥ pariṣṭutiḥ
viśvā rūpāṇi prati muñcate kaviḥ prāsāvīt bhadram dvipade catuṣpade
vi nākam akhyat savitā vareṇyaḥ anu prayāṇam uṣasaḥ vi rājati
yasya prayāṇam anu anye id yayuḥ devāḥ devasya mahimānam ojasā
yaḥ pārthivāni vimame saḥ etaśaḥ rajāṃsi devaḥ savitā mahitvanā
uta yāsi savitar trīṇi rocanā uta sūryasya raśmibhiḥ sam ucyasi
uta rātrīm ubhayatas parīyase uta mitraḥ bhavasi deva dharmabhiḥ
uta īśiṣe prasavasya tvam ekaḥ id uta pūṣā bhavasi deva yāmabhiḥ
uta idam viśvam bhuvanam vi rājasi śyāvāśvaḥ te savitaḥ stomam ānaśe
tat savituḥ vṛṇīmahe vayam devasya bhojanam
śreṣṭham sarva dhātamam turam bhagasya dhīmahi
asya hi sva yaśastaram savituḥ kad cana priyam
na minanti sva rājyam
sa hi ratnāni dāśuṣe suvāti savitā bhagaḥ
tam bhāgam citram īmahe
adyā naḥ deva savitar prajāvat sāvīḥ saubhagam
parā duṣṣvapnyam suva
viśvāni deva savitar duritāni parā suva
yat bhadram tat naḥ ā suva
anāgasaḥ aditaye devasya savituḥ save
viśvā vāmāni dhīmahi
ā viśva devam sat patim sūktaiḥ adyā vṛṇīmahe
satya savam savitāram
yaḥ ime ubhe ahanī puras eti aprayucchan
svādhīḥ devaḥ savitā
yaḥ imā viśvā jātāni āśrāvayati ślokena
pra ca suvāti savitā
acchā vada tavasam gīrbhiḥ ā abhi stuhi parjanyam namasā vivāsa
kanikradat vṛṣabhaḥ jīra dānuḥ retaḥ dadhāti oṣadhīṣu garbham
vi vṛkṣān hanti uta hanti rakṣasaḥ viśvam bibhāya bhuvanam mahā vadhāt
uta anāgāḥ īṣate vṛṣṇyāvataḥ yat parjanya stanayan hanti duṣkṛtaḥ
rathī iva kaśayā aśvāṁ abhikṣipan āvis dūtān kṛṇute varṣyāṁ aha
dūrāt siṃhasya stanathāḥ ud īrate yat parjanyaḥ kṛṇute varṣyam nabhaḥ
pra vātāḥ vānti patayanti vidyutaḥ ud oṣadhīḥ jihate pinvate svar
irā viśvasmai bhuvanāya jāyate yat parjanyaḥ pṛthivīm retasā avati
yasya vrate pṛthivī nannamīti yasya vrate śaphavat jarbhurīti
yasya vrate oṣadhīḥ viśva rūpāḥ sa naḥ parjanya mahi śarma yaccha
divaḥ naḥ vṛṣṭim marutaḥ rarīdhvam pra pinvata vṛṣṇaḥ aśvasya dhārāḥ
arvāṅ etena stanayitnunā ihi apaḥ niṣiñcan asuraḥ pitā naḥ
abhi kranda stanaya garbham ā dhāḥ udanvatā pari dīya rathena
dṛtim su karṣa viṣitam nyañcam samāḥ bhavantu udvataḥ nipādāḥ
mahāntam kośam ud aca ni siñca syandantām kulyāḥ viṣitāḥ purastāt
ghṛtena dyāvāpṛthivī vi undhi su prapāṇam bhavatu aghnyābhyaḥ
yat parjanya kanikradat stanayan haṃsi duṣkṛtaḥ
prati idam viśvam modate yat kim ca pṛthivyām adhi
avarṣīḥ varṣam ud u su gṛbhāya akaḥ dhanvāni atyetavai u
ajījanaḥ oṣadhīḥ bhojanāya kam uta prajābhyaḥ avidaḥ manīṣām
baṭ itthā parvatānām khidram bibharṣi pṛthivi
pra yā bhūmim pravatvati mahnā jinoṣi mahini
stomāsaḥ tvā vicāriṇi prati stobhanti aktubhiḥ
pra yā vājam na heṣantam perum asyasi arjuni
dṛﾱhā cit yā vanaspatīn kṣmayā dardharṣi ojasā
yat te abhrasya vidyutaḥ divaḥ varṣanti vṛṣṭayaḥ
pra samrāje bṛhat arcā gabhīram brahma priyam varuṇāya śrutāya
vi yaḥ jaghāna śamitā iva carma upastire pṛthivīm sūryāya
vaneṣu vi antarikṣam tatāna vājam arvatsu payaḥ usriyāsu
hṛtsu kratum varuṇaḥ apsu agnim divi sūryam adadhāt somam adrau
nīcīna bāram varuṇaḥ kabandham pra sasarja rodasī antarikṣam
tena viśvasya bhuvanasya rājā yavam na vṛṣṭiḥ vi unatti bhūma
unatti bhūmim pṛthivīm uta dyām yadā dugdham varuṇaḥ vaṣṭi āt id
sam abhreṇa vasata parvatāsaḥ taviṣīyantaḥ śrathayanta vīrāḥ
imām u su āsurasya śrutasya mahīm māyām varuṇasya pra vocam
mānena iva tasthivān antarikṣe vi yaḥ mame pṛthivīm sūryeṇa
imām u nu kavitamasya māyām mahīm devasya nakir ā dadharṣa
ekam yat udnā na pṛṇanti enīḥ āsiñcantīḥ avanayaḥ samudram
aryamyam varuṇa mitryam vā sakhāyam vā sadam id bhrātaram vā
veśam vā nityam varuṇa araṇam vā yat sīm āgaḥ cakṛmā śiśrathaḥ tat
kitavāsaḥ yat riripuḥ na dīvi yat vā ghā satyam uta yat na vidma
sarvā tā vi sya śithirā iva deva adhā te syāma varuṇa priyāsaḥ
indra agnī yam avatha ubhā vājeṣu martyam
dṛﾱhā cit sa pra bhedati dyumnā vāṇīḥ iva tritaḥ
yā pṛtanāsu duṣṭarā yā vājeṣu śravāyyā
yā pañca carṣaṇīḥ abhi indra agnī tā havāmahe
tayoḥ id amavat śavaḥ tigmā didyut maghonoḥ
prati druṇā gabhastyoḥ gavām vṛtra ghne eṣate
tā vām eṣe rathānām indra agnī havāmahe
patī turasya rādhasaḥ vidvāṃsā girvaṇastamā
tā vṛdhantau anu dyūn martāya devau adabhā
arhantā cit puras dadhe aṃśā iva devau arvate
eva indra agnibhyām ahāvi havyam śūṣyam ghṛtam na pūtam adribhiḥ
tā sūriṣu śravaḥ bṛhat rayim gṛṇatsu didhṛtam iṣam gṛṇatsu didhṛtam
pra vaḥ mahe matayaḥ yantu viṣṇave marutvate giri jāḥ eva yā marut
pra śardhāya prayajyave su khādaye tavase bhandat iṣṭaye dhuni vratāya śavase
pra ye jātāḥ mahināḥ ye ca nu svayam pra vidmanā bruvate eva yā marut
kratvā tat vaḥ marutaḥ na ādhṛṣe śavaḥ dānā mahnā tat eṣām adhṛṣṭāsaḥ nā adrayaḥ
pra ye divaḥ bṛhataḥ śṛṇvire girā suśukvānaḥ su bhvaḥ eva yā marut
na yeṣām irī sadhasthe īṣṭe _ agnayaḥ na sva vidyutaḥ pra syandrāsaḥ dhunīnām
sa cakrame mahataḥ niḥ uru kramaḥ samānasmāt sadasaḥ eva yā marut
yadā ayukta tmanā svāt adhi snubhiḥ viṣpardhasaḥ vimahasaḥ jigāti śevṛdhaḥ nṛbhiḥ
svanaḥ na vaḥ amavān rejayat vṛṣā tveṣaḥ yayiḥ taviṣaḥ eva yā marut
yena sahantaḥ ṛñjata sva rociṣaḥ sthā raśmānaḥ hiraṇyayāḥ su āyudhāsaḥ iṣmiṇaḥ
apāraḥ vaḥ mahimā vṛddha śavasaḥ tveṣam śavaḥ avatu eva yā marut
sthātāraḥ hi prasitau saṃdṛśi sthana te naḥ uruṣyata nidaḥ śuśukvāṃsaḥ na agnayaḥ
te rudrāsaḥ su makhāḥ agnayaḥ yathā tuvi dyumnāḥ avantu eva yā marut
dīrgham pṛthu paprathe sadma pārthivam yeṣām ajmeṣu ā mahaḥ śardhāṃsi adbhuta enasām
a dveṣaḥ naḥ marutaḥ gātum etana śrota havam jarituḥ eva yā marut
viṣṇoḥ mahaḥ samanyavaḥ yuyotana smat rathyaḥ na daṃsanā apa dveṣāṃsi sanutar
ganta naḥ yajñam yajñiyāḥ suśami śrota havam arakṣaḥ eva yā marut
jyeṣṭhāsaḥ na parvatāsaḥ vyomani yūyam tasya pracetasaḥ syāta durdhartavaḥ nidaḥ
tvam hi agne prathamaḥ manotā asyāḥ dhiyaḥ abhavaḥ dasma hotā
tvam sīm vṛṣan akṛṇoḥ duṣṭarītu sahaḥ viśvasmai sahase sahadhyai
adhā hotā ni asīdaḥ yajīyān iﾱaḥ pade iṣayan īḍyaḥ san
tam tvā naraḥ prathamam devayantaḥ mahaḥ rāye citayantaḥ anu gman
vṛtā iva yantam bahubhiḥ vasavyaiḥ tve rayim jāgṛvāṃsaḥ anu gman
ruśantam agnim darśatam bṛhantam vapāvantam viśvahā dīdivāṃsam
padam devasya namasā vyantaḥ śravasyavaḥ śravaḥ āpan amṛktam
nāmāni cit dadhire yajñiyāni bhadrāyām te raṇayanta saṃdṛṣṭau
tvām vardhanti kṣitayaḥ pṛthivyām tvām rāyaḥ ubhayāsaḥ janānām
tvam trātā taraṇe cetyaḥ bhūḥ pitā mātā sadam id mānuṣāṇām
saparyeṇyaḥ sa priyaḥ vikṣu agniḥ hotā mandraḥ ni sasāda yajīyān
tam tvā vayam dame ā dīdivāṃsam upa jñubādhaḥ namasā sadema
tam tvā vayam sudhyaḥ navyam agne sumnāyavaḥ īmahe devayantaḥ
tvam viśaḥ anayaḥ dīdyānaḥ divaḥ agne bṛhatā rocanena
viśām kavim viśpatim śaśvatīnām nitośanam vṛṣabham carṣaṇīnām
pretīṣaṇim iṣayantam pāvakam rājantam agnim yajatam rayīṇām
saḥ agne īje śaśame ca martaḥ yaḥ te ānaṭ samidhā havya dātim
yaḥ āhutim pari veda namobhiḥ viśvā id sa vāmā dadhate tvotaḥ
asmai u te mahi mahe vidhema namobhiḥ agne samidhā uta havyaiḥ
vedī sūno sahasaḥ gīrbhiḥ ukthaiḥ ā te bhadrāyām sumatau yatema
ā yaḥ tatantha rodasī vi bhāsā śravobhiḥ ca śravasyaḥ tarutraḥ
bṛhadbhiḥ vājaiḥ sthavirebhiḥ asme revadbhiḥ agne vitaram vi bhāhi
nṛvat vaso sadam id dhehi asme bhūri tokāya tanayāya paśvaḥ
pūrvīḥ iṣaḥ bṛhatīḥ āreaghāḥ asme bhadrā sauśravasāni santu
purūṇi agne purudhā tvāyā vasūni rājan vasu tā te aśyām
purūṇi hi tve puru vāra santi agne vasu vidhate rājani tve
tvam hi kṣaitavat yaśaḥ agne mitraḥ na patyase
tvam vicarṣaṇe śravaḥ vaso puṣṭim na puṣyasi
tvām hi sma carṣaṇayaḥ yajñebhiḥ gīrbhiḥ īﾱate
tvām vājī yāti avṛkaḥ rajastūr viśvacarṣaṇiḥ
sajoṣaḥ tvā divaḥ naraḥ yajñasya ketum indhate
yat ha sya mānuṣaḥ janaḥ sumnāyuḥ juhve adhvare
ṛdhat yaḥ te sudānave dhiyā martaḥ śaśamate
ūtī sa bṛhataḥ divaḥ dviṣaḥ aṃhaḥ na tarati
samidhā yaḥ te āhutim niśitim martyaḥ naśat
vayāvantam sa puṣyati kṣayam agne śata āyuṣam
tveṣaḥ te dhūmaḥ ṛṇvati divi san śukraḥ ātataḥ
sūraḥ na hi dyutā tvam kṛpā pāvaka rocase
adhā hi vikṣu īḍyaḥ asi priyaḥ naḥ atithiḥ
raṇvaḥ puri iva jūryas sūnuḥ na trayayāyyaḥ
kratvā hi droṇe ajyase agne vājī na kṛtvyaḥ
parijmā iva svadhā gayaḥ atyaḥ na hvāryaḥ śiśuḥ
tvam tyā cit acyutā agne paśuḥ na yavase
dhāmā ha yat te ajara vanā vṛścanti śikvasaḥ
veṣi hi adhvarīyatām agne hotā dame viśām
samṛdhaḥ viśpate kṛṇu juṣasva havyam aṅgiraḥ
acchā naḥ mitra mahas deva devān agne vocaḥ sumatim rodasyoḥ
vīhi svastim su kṣitim divaḥ nṝn dviṣaḥ aṃhāṃsi duritā tarema tā tarema tava avasā tarema
agne sa kṣeṣat ṛta pāḥ ṛtejāḥ uru jyotiḥ naśate devayuḥ te
yam tvam mitreṇa varuṇaḥ sajoṣāḥ deva pāsi tyajasā martam aṃhaḥ
īje yajñebhiḥ śaśame śamībhiḥ ṛdhat vārāya agnaye dadāśa
evā cana tam yaśasām ajuṣṭiḥ na aṃhaḥ martam naśate na pradṛptiḥ
sūraḥ na yasya dṛśatiḥ arepāḥ bhīmā yat eti śucataḥ te ā dhīḥ
heṣasvataḥ śurudhaḥ na ayam aktoḥ kutra cit raṇvaḥ vasatiḥ vanejāḥ
tigmam cit ema mahi varpaḥ asya bhasat aśvaḥ na yamasānaḥ āsā
vijehamānaḥ paraśuḥ na jihvām draviḥ na drāvayati dāru dhakṣat
saḥ id astā iva prati dhāt asiṣyan śiśīta tejaḥ ayasaḥ na dhārām
citra dhrajatiḥ aratiḥ yaḥ aktoḥ veḥ na druṣadvā raghu patma jaṃhāḥ
saḥ īm rebhaḥ na prati vasto usrāḥ śociṣā rārapīti mitra mahāḥ
naktam yaḥ īm aruṣaḥ yaḥ divā nṝn amartyaḥ aruṣaḥ yaḥ divā nṝn
divaḥ na yasya vidhataḥ navīnot vṛṣā rukṣaḥ oṣadhīṣu nūnot
ghṛṇā na yaḥ dhrajasā patmanā yan ā rodasī vasunā _ su patnī
dhāyobhiḥ vā yaḥ yujyebhiḥ arkaiḥ vidyut na davidyot svebhiḥ śuṣmaiḥ
śardhaḥ vā yaḥ marutām tatakṣa ṛbhuḥ na tveṣaḥ rabhasānaḥ adyaut
yathā hotar manuṣaḥ devatātā yajñebhiḥ sūno sahasaḥ yajāsi
evā naḥ adya samanā samānān uśan agne uśataḥ yakṣi devān
sa naḥ vibhāvā cakṣaṇiḥ na vastoḥ agniḥ vandāru vedyaḥ canaḥ dhāt
viśvāyuḥ yaḥ amṛtaḥ martyeṣu uṣarbhut bhūt atithiḥ jātavedāḥ
dyāvaḥ na yasya panayanti abhvam bhāsāṃsi vaste sūryaḥ na śukraḥ
vi yaḥ inoti ajaraḥ pāvakaḥ aśnasya cit śiśnathat pūrvyāṇi
vadmā hi sūno asi adma sadvā cakre agniḥ januṣā ajma annam
sa tvam naḥ ūrja sane ūrjam dhāḥ rājā iva jeḥ avṛke kṣeṣi antar
nitikti yaḥ vāraṇam annam atti vāyuḥ na rāṣṭrī ati eti aktūn
turyāma yaḥ te ādiśām arātīḥ atyaḥ na hrutaḥ patataḥ parihrut
ā sūryaḥ na bhānumadbhiḥ arkaiḥ agne tatantha rodasī vi bhāsā
citraḥ nayat pari tamāṃsi aktaḥ śociṣā patman auśijaḥ na dīyan
tvām hi mandratamam arka śokaiḥ vavṛmahe mahi naḥ śroṣi agne
indram na tvā śavasā devatā vāyum pṛṇanti rādhasā nṛtamāḥ
nu naḥ agne avṛkebhiḥ svasti veṣi rāyaḥ pathibhiḥ parṣi aṃhaḥ
tā sūribhyaḥ gṛṇate rāsi sumnam madema śata himāḥ su vīrāḥ
huve vaḥ sūnum sahasaḥ yuvānam adrogha vācam matibhiḥ yaviṣṭham
yaḥ invati draviṇāni pracetāḥ viśva vārāṇi puru vāraḥ adhruk
tve vasūni purvaṇīka hotar doṣā vastoḥ erire yajñiyāsaḥ
kṣāma iva viśvā bhuvanāni yasmin sam saubhagāni dadhire pāvake
tvam vikṣu pradivaḥ sīdaḥ āsu kratvā rathīḥ abhavaḥ vāryāṇām
atas inoṣi vidhate cikitvaḥ vi ānuṣak jātavedaḥ vasūni
yaḥ naḥ sanutyaḥ abhidāsat agne yaḥ antaraḥ mitra mahas vanuṣyāt
tam ajarebhiḥ vṛṣabhiḥ tava svaiḥ tapa tapiṣṭha tapasā tapasvān
yaḥ te yajñena samidhā yaḥ ukthaiḥ arkebhiḥ sūno sahasaḥ dadāśat
sa martyeṣu amṛta pracetāḥ rāyā dyumnena śravasā vi bhāti
sa tat kṛdhi iṣitaḥ tūyam agne spṛdhaḥ bādhasva sahasā sahasvān
yat śasyase dyubhiḥ aktaḥ vacobhiḥ tat juṣasva jarituḥ ghoṣi manma
aśyāma tam kāmam agne tava ūtī aśyāma rayim rayivas su vīram
aśyāma vājam abhi vājayantaḥ aśyāma dyumnam ajara ajaram te
pra navyasā sahasaḥ sūnum acchā yajñena gātum avaḥ icchamānaḥ
vṛścat vanam kṛṣṇa yāmam ruśantam vītī hotāram divyam jigāti
sa śvitānaḥ tanyatuḥ rocana sthāḥ ajarebhiḥ nānadadbhiḥ yaviṣṭhaḥ
yaḥ pāvakaḥ purutamaḥ purūṇi pṛthūni agniḥ anuyāti bharvan
vi te viṣvak vāta jūtāsaḥ agne bhāmāsaḥ śuce śucayaḥ caranti
tuvi mrakṣāsaḥ divyāḥ navagvāḥ vanā vananti dhṛṣatā rujantaḥ
ye te śukrāsaḥ śucayaḥ śuciṣmas kṣām vapanti viṣitāsaḥ aśvāḥ
adha bhramaḥ te urviyā vi bhāti yātayamānaḥ adhi sānu pṛśneḥ
adha jihvā pāpatīti pra vṛṣṇaḥ goṣuyudhaḥ na aśaniḥ sṛjānā
śūrasya iva prasitiḥ kṣātiḥ agneḥ durvartuḥ bhīmaḥ dayate vanāni
ā bhānunā pārthivāni jrayāṃsi mahaḥ todasya dhṛṣatā tatantha
sa bādhasva apa bhayā sahobhi spṛdhaḥ vanuṣyan vanuṣaḥ ni jūrva
sa citra citram citayantam asme citra kṣatra citratamam vayaḥ dhām
candram rayim puru vīram bṛhantam candra candrābhiḥ gṛṇate yuvasva
mūrdhānam divaḥ aratim pṛthivyāḥ vaiśvānaram ṛte ā jātam agnim
kavim samrājam atithim janānām āsan ā pātram janayanta devāḥ
nābhim yajñānām sadanam rayīṇām mahām āhāvam abhi sam navanta
vaiśvānaram rathyam adhvarāṇām yajñasya ketum janayanta devāḥ
tvat vipraḥ jāyate vājī agne tvat vīrāsaḥ abhimātiṣāhaḥ
vaiśvānara tvam asmāsu dhehi vasūni rājan spṛhayāyyāṇi
tvām viśve amṛta jāyamānam śiśum na devāḥ abhi sam navante
tava kratubhiḥ amṛta tvam āyan vaiśvānara yat pitroḥ adīdeḥ
vaiśvānara tava tāni vratāni mahāni agne nakir ā dadharṣa
yat jāyamānaḥ pitroḥ upasthe avindaḥ ketum vayuneṣu ahnām
vaiśvānarasya vimitāni cakṣasā sānūni divaḥ amṛtasya ketunā
tasya id u viśvā bhuvanā adhi mūrdhani vayāḥ iva ruruhuḥ sapta visruhaḥ
vi yaḥ rajāṃsi amimīta sukratuḥ vaiśvānaraḥ vi divaḥ rocanā kaviḥ
pari yaḥ viśvā bhuvanāni paprathe adabdhaḥ gopāḥ amṛtasya rakṣitā
pṛkṣasya vṛṣṇaḥ aruṣasya nu sahaḥ pra nu vocam vidathā jātavedasaḥ
vaiśvānarāya matiḥ navyasī śuciḥ somaḥ iva pavate cāruḥ agnaye
sa jāyamānaḥ parame vyomani vratāni agniḥ vrata pāḥ arakṣata
vi antarikṣam amimīta sukratuḥ vaiśvānaraḥ mahinā nākam aspṛśat
vi astabhnāt rodasī mitraḥ adbhutaḥ antarvāvat akṛṇot jyotiṣā tamaḥ
vi carmaṇī iva dhiṣaṇe avartayat vaiśvānaraḥ viśvam adhatta vṛṣṇyam
apām upasthe mahiṣāḥ agṛbhṇata viśaḥ rājānam upa tasthuḥ ṛgmiyam
ā dūtaḥ agnim abharat vivasvataḥ vaiśvānaram mātariśvā parāvataḥ

pra tuvi dyumnasya sthavirasya ghṛṣveḥ divaḥ rarapśe mahimā pṛthivyāḥ
na asya śatruḥ na pratimānam asti na pratiṣṭhiḥ puru māyasya sahyoḥ
pra tat te adyā karaṇam kṛtam bhūt kutsam yat āyum atithigvam asmai
purū sahasrā ni śiśāḥ abhi kṣām ud tūrvayāṇam dhṛṣatā ninetha
anu tvā ahi ghne adha deva devāḥ madan viśve kavitamam kavīnām
karaḥ yatra varivaḥ bādhitāya dive janāya tanve gṛṇānaḥ
anu dyāvāpṛthivī tat te ojaḥ amartyāḥ jihate indra devāḥ
kṛṣva kṛtno a kṛtam yat te asti uktham navīyaḥ janayasva yajñaiḥ
mahāṁ indraḥ nṛ vat ā carṣaṇi prāḥ uta dvibarhāḥ aminaḥ sahobhiḥ
asmadryak vāvṛdhe vīryāya uruḥ pṛthuḥ su kṛtaḥ kartṛbhiḥ bhūt
indram eva dhiṣaṇā sātaye dhāt bṛhantam ṛṣvam ajaram yuvānam
a sāḍhena śavasā śūśuvāṃsam sadyas cit yaḥ vāvṛdhe asāmi
pṛthū karasnā bahulā gabhastī asmadryak sam mimīhi śravāṃsi
yūthā iva paśvaḥ paśu pāḥ damūnāḥ asmāṁ indra abhi ā vavṛtsva ājau
tam vaḥ indram catinam asya śākaiḥ iha nūnam vājayantaḥ huvema
yathā cit pūrve jaritāraḥ āsuḥ anedyāḥ anavadyāḥ ariṣṭāḥ
dhṛta vrataḥ dhana dāḥ soma vṛddhaḥ sa hi vāmasya vasunaḥ purukṣuḥ
sam jagmire pathyāḥ rāyaḥ asmin samudre na sindhavaḥ yādamānāḥ
śaviṣṭham naḥ ā bhara śūra śavaḥ ojiṣṭham ojaḥ abhibhūte ugram
viśvā dyumnā vṛṣṇyā mānuṣāṇām asmabhyam dāḥ harivas mādayadhyai
yaḥ te madaḥ pṛtanāṣāh amṛdhraḥ indra tam naḥ ā bhara śūśuvāṃsam
yena tokasya tanayasya sātau maṃsīmahi jigīvāṃsaḥ tvotāḥ
ā naḥ bhara vṛṣaṇam śuṣmam indra dhana spṛtam śūśuvāṃsam su dakṣam
yena vaṃsāma pṛtanāsu śatrūn tava ūtibhiḥ uta jāmīn ajāmīn
ā te śuṣmaḥ vṛṣabhaḥ etu paścāt ā uttarāt adharāt ā purastāt
ā viśvatas abhi sam etu arvāṅ indra dyumnam svarvat dhehi asme
nṛ vat te indra nṛtamābhiḥ ūtī vaṃsīmahi vāmam śromatebhiḥ
īkṣe hi vasvaḥ ubhayasya rājan dhāḥ ratnam mahi sthūram bṛhantam
marutvantam vṛṣabham vāvṛdhānam akava arim divyam śāsam indram
viśvāsāham avase nūtanāya ugram sahaḥ dām iha tam huvema
janam vajrin mahi cit manyamānam ebhyaḥ nṛbhyaḥ randhaya yeṣu asmi
adhā hi tvā pṛthivyām śūrasātau havāmahe tanaye goṣu apsu
vayam te ebhiḥ puruhūta sakhyaiḥ śatroḥ śatroḥ uttare id syāma
ghnantaḥ vṛtrāṇi ubhayāni śūra rāyā madema bṛhatā tvotāḥ
dyauḥ na yaḥ indra abhi bhūmā āryaḥ tasthau rayiḥ śavasā pṛtsu janān
tam naḥ sahasra bharam urvarā sām daddhi sūno sahasaḥ vṛtra turam
divaḥ na tubhyam anu indra satrā asuryam devebhiḥ dhāyi viśvam
ahim yat vṛtram apaḥ vavrivāṃsam han ṛjīṣin viṣṇunā sacānaḥ
tūrvan ojīyān tavasaḥ tavīyān kṛta brahmā indraḥ vṛddha mahāḥ
rājā abhavat madhunaḥ somyasya viśvāsām yat purām dartnum āvat
śataiḥ apadran paṇayaḥ indra atra daśoṇaye kavaye arka sātau
vadhaiḥ śuṣṇasya aśuṣasya māyāḥ pitvaḥ nā arirecīt kiṃcana pra
mahaḥ druhaḥ apa viśva āyu dhāyi vajrasya yat patane pādi śuṣṇaḥ
uru sa sa ratham sārathaye kaḥ indraḥ kutsāya sūryasya sātau
pra śyenaḥ na madiram aṃśum asmai śiraḥ dāsasya namuceḥ mathāyan
prāvat namīm sāpyam sasantam pṛṇak rāyā sam iṣā sam svasti
vi piproḥ ahi māyasya dṛﾱhāḥ puraḥ vajrin śavasā na dardar
su dāman tat rekṇaḥ a pramṛṣyam ṛjiśvane dātram dāśuṣe dāḥ
sa vetasum daśa māyam daśoṇim tūtujim indraḥ svabhiṣṭi sumnaḥ
ā tugram śaśvat ibham dyotanāya mātuḥ na sīm upa sṛjai iyadhyai
saḥ īm spṛdhaḥ vanate apratītaḥ bibhrat vajram vṛtra haṇam gabhastau
tiṣṭhat harī adhi astā iva garte vacaḥ yujā vahataḥ indram ṛṣvam
sanema te avasā navyaḥ indra pra pūravaḥ stavante enā yajñaiḥ
sapta yat puraḥ śarma śāradīḥ dart han dāsīḥ purukutsāya śikṣan
tvam vṛdhaḥ indra pūrvyaḥ bhūḥ varivasyan uśane kāvyāya
parā navavāstvam anudeyam mahe pitre dada atha svam napātam
tvam dhuniḥ indra dhunimatīḥ ṛṇoḥ apaḥ sīrāḥ na sravantīḥ
pra yat samudram ati śūra parṣi pāraya turvaśam yadum svasti
tava ha tyad indra viśvam ājau sastaḥ dhunī cumurī yā ha siṣvap
dīdayat id tubhyam somebhiḥ sunvan dabhītiḥ idhma bhṛtiḥ pakthī arkaiḥ
imāḥ u tvā purutamasya kāroḥ havyam vīra havyāḥ havante
dhiyaḥ ratheṣṭhām ajaram navīyaḥ rayiḥ vibhūtiḥ īyate vacasyā
tam u stuṣe indram yaḥ vidānaḥ gir vāhasam gīrbhiḥ yajña vṛddham
yasya divam ati mahnā pṛthivyāḥ puru māyasya ririce mahi tvam
saḥ id tamaḥ avayunam tatanvat sūryeṇa vayunavat cakāra
kadā te martāḥ amṛtasya dhāma iyakṣantaḥ na minanti svadhāvas
yaḥ tā cakāra sa kuha svid indraḥ kam ā janam carati kāsu vikṣu
kaḥ te yajñaḥ manase śam varāya kaḥ arkaḥ indra katamaḥ sa hotā
idā hi te veviṣataḥ purājāḥ pratnāsaḥ āsuḥ puru kṛt sakhāyaḥ
ye madhyamāsaḥ uta nūtanāsaḥ uta avamasya puruhūta bodhi
tam pṛcchantaḥ avarāsaḥ parāṇi pratnā te indra śrutya anu yemuḥ
arcāmasi vīra brahma vāhaḥ yāt eva vidma tāt tvā mahāntam
abhi tvā pājaḥ rakṣasaḥ vi tasthe mahi jajñānam abhi tat su tiṣṭha
tava pratnena yujyena sakhyā vajreṇa dhṛṣṇo apa tā nudasva
sa tu śrudhī indra nūtanasya brahmaṇyataḥ vīra kāru dhāyaḥ
tvam hi āpiḥ pradivi pitṝṇām śaśvat babhūtha su havaḥ eṣṭau
pra ūtaye varuṇam mitram indram marutaḥ kṛṣva avase naḥ adya
pra pūṣaṇam viṣṇum agnim purandhim savitāram oṣadhīḥ parvatān ca
ime u tvā puru śāka prayajyo jaritāraḥ abhī arcanti arkaiḥ
śrudhī havam ā huvataḥ huvānaḥ na tvāvāṁ anyaḥ amṛta tvat asti
nu me ā vācam upa yāhi vidvān viśvebhiḥ sūno sahasaḥ yajatraiḥ
ye agni jihvāḥ ṛtasāpaḥ āsuḥ ye manum cakruḥ uparam dasāya
sa naḥ bodhi puraetā sugeṣu uta durgeṣu pathikṛt vidānaḥ
ye a śramāsaḥ uravaḥ vahiṣṭhāḥ tebhiḥ na indra abhi vakṣi vājam
yaḥ ekaḥ id havyaḥ carṣaṇīnām indram tam gīrbhiḥ abhī arce ābhiḥ
yaḥ patyate vṛṣabhaḥ vṛṣṇyāvān satyaḥ satvā puru māyaḥ sahasvān
tam u naḥ pūrve pitaraḥ navagvāḥ sapta viprāsaḥ abhi vājayantaḥ
nakṣat dābham taturim parvateṣṭhām adrogha vācam matibhiḥ śaviṣṭham
tam īmahe indram asya rāyaḥ puru vīrasya nṛvataḥ purukṣoḥ
yaḥ askṛdhoyuḥ ajaraḥ svarvān tam ā bhara harivas mādayadhyai
tat naḥ vi vocaḥ yadi te purā cit jaritāraḥ ānaśuḥ sumnam indra
kaḥ te bhāgaḥ kim vayaḥ dudhra khidvaḥ puruhūta purūvaso asura ghnaḥ
tam pṛcchantī vajrahastam ratheṣṭhām indram vepī vakvarī yasya nu gīḥ
tuvi grābham tuvikūrmim rabhaḥ dām gātum iṣe nakṣate tumram accha
ayā ha tyam māyayā vāvṛdhānam manaḥ juvā svatavaḥ parvatena
acyutā cit vīḍitā su ojaḥ rujaḥ vi dṛﾱhā dhṛṣatā virapśin
tam vaḥ dhiyā navyasyā śaviṣṭham pratnam pratna vat paritaṃsayadhyai
sa naḥ vakṣat animānaḥ suvahmā indraḥ viśvāni ati durgahāṇi
ā janāya druhvaṇe pārthivāni divyāni dīpayaḥ antarikṣā
tapa vṛṣan viśvatas śociṣā tān brahma dviṣe śocaya kṣām apaḥ ca
bhuvaḥ janasya divyasya rājā pārthivasya jagataḥ tveṣa saṃdṛś
dhiṣva vajram dakṣiṇe indra haste viśvāḥ ajurya dayase vi māyāḥ
ā saṃyatam indra naḥ svastim śatru tūryāya bṛhatīm amṛdhrām
yayā dāsāni āryāṇi vṛtrā karaḥ vajrin sutukā nāhuṣāṇi
sa naḥ niyudbhiḥ puruhūta vedhaḥ viśva vārābhiḥ ā gahi prayajyo
na yāḥ adevaḥ varate na devaḥ ābhiḥ yāhi tūyam ā madryadrik
sute id tvam nimiślaḥ indra some stome brahmaṇi śasyamāne ukthe
yat vā yuktābhyām maghavan haribhyām bibhrat vajram bāhvoḥ indra yāsi
yat vā divi pārye suṣvim indra vṛtra hatye avasi śūrasātau
yat vā dakṣasya bibhyuṣaḥ a bibhyat arandhayaḥ śardhataḥ indra dasyūn
pātā sutam indraḥ astu somam praṇenīḥ ugraḥ jaritāram ūtī
kartā vīrāya suṣvaye u lokam dātā vasu stuvate kīraye cit
gantā iyānti savanā haribhyām babhriḥ vajram papiḥ somam dadiḥ gāḥ
kartā vīram naryam sarva vīram śrotā havam gṛṇataḥ stoma vāhāḥ
asmai vayam yat vāvāna tat viviṣmaḥ indrāya yaḥ naḥ pradivaḥ apaḥ kaḥ
sute some stumasi śaṃsat ukthā indrāya brahma vardhanam yathā asat
brahmāṇi hi cakṛṣe vardhanāni tāvat te indra matibhiḥ viviṣmaḥ
sute some suta pāḥ śantamāni rāṇḍyā kriyāsma vakṣaṇāni yajñaiḥ
sa naḥ bodhi puroﾱāśam rarāṇaḥ pibā tu somam goṛjīkam indra
ā idam barhiḥ yajamānasya sīda urum kṛdhi tvāyataḥ u lokam
sa mandasva hi anu joṣam ugra pra tvā yajñāsaḥ ime aśnuvantu
pra ime havāsaḥ puruhūtam asme ā tvā iyam dhīḥ avase indra yamyāḥ
tam vaḥ sakhāyaḥ sam yathā suteṣu somebhiḥ īm pṛṇata bhojam indram
kuvid tasmai asati naḥ bharāya na suṣvim indraḥ avase mṛdhāti
eva id indraḥ sute astāvi some bharadvājeṣu kṣayat id maghonaḥ
asat yathā jaritre uta sūriḥ indraḥ rāyaḥ viśva vārasya dātā
vṛṣā madaḥ indre ślokaḥ ukthā sacā someṣu suta pāḥ ṛjīṣī
arcatryaḥ maghavā nṛbhyaḥ ukthaiḥ dyukṣaḥ rājā girām akṣitotiḥ
taturiḥ vīraḥ naryaḥ vicetāḥ śrotā havam gṛṇataḥ urvyūtiḥ
vasuḥ śaṃsaḥ narām kāru dhāyāḥ vājī stutaḥ vidathe dāti vājam
akṣaḥ na cakryoḥ śūra bṛhan pra te mahnā ririce rodasyoḥ
vṛkṣasya nu te puruhūta vayāḥ vi ūtayaḥ ruruhuḥ indra pūrvīḥ
śacīvataḥ te puru śāka śākāḥ gavām iva srutayaḥ saṃcaraṇīḥ
vatsānām na tantayaḥ te indra dāmanvantaḥ a dāmānaḥ su dāman
anyat adya karvaram anyat u śvas asat ca sat muhur ācakriḥ indraḥ
mitraḥ naḥ atra varuṇaḥ ca pūṣā aryaḥ vaśasya paryetā asti
vi tvat āpaḥ na parvatasya pṛṣṭhāt ukthebhiḥ indra anayanta yajñaiḥ
tam tu ābhiḥ suṣṭutibhiḥ vājayantaḥ ājim na jagmuḥ girvāhaḥ aśvāḥ
na yam jaranti śaradaḥ na māsāḥ na dyāvaḥ indram avakarśayanti
vṛddhasya cit vardhatām asya tanū stomebhiḥ ukthaiḥ ca śasyamānā
na vīﾱave namate na sthirāya na śardhate dasyu jūtāya stavān
ajrāḥ indrasya girayaḥ cit ṛṣvāḥ gambhīre cit bhavati gādham asmai
gambhīreṇa naḥ uruṇā amatrin pra iṣaḥ yandhi suta pāvan vājān
sthāḥ u su ūrdhvaḥ ūtī a riṣaṇyan aktoḥ vyuṣṭau paritakmyāyām
sacasva nāyam avase abhīke itas vā tam indra pāhi riṣaḥ
amā ca enam araṇye pāhi riṣaḥ madema śata himāḥ su vīrāḥ
yā te ūtiḥ avamā yā paramā yā madhyamā indra śuṣmin asti
tābhiḥ u su vṛtra hatye avīḥ naḥ ebhiḥ ca vājaiḥ mahān naḥ ugra
ābhiḥ spṛdhaḥ mithatīḥ a riṣaṇyan amitrasya vyathaya manyum indra
ābhiḥ viśvāḥ abhiyujaḥ viṣūcīḥ āryāya viśaḥ ava tārīḥ dāsīḥ
indra jāmayaḥ uta ye ajāmayaḥ arvācīnāsaḥ vanuṣaḥ yuyujre
