trikadrukeṣu cetanam devāsaḥ yajñam atnata
tam id vardhantu naḥ giraḥ sadāvṛdham
stotā yat te anuvrataḥ ukthāni ṛtuthā dadhe
śuciḥ pāvakaḥ ucyate saḥ adbhutaḥ
tat id rudrasya cetati yahvam pratneṣu dhāmasu
manaḥ yatra vi tat dadhuḥ vicetasaḥ
yadi me sakhyam āvaraḥ imasya pāhi andhasaḥ
yena viśvāḥ ati dviṣaḥ atārima
kadā te indra girvaṇaḥ stotā bhavāti śantamaḥ
kadā naḥ gavye aśvye vasau dadhaḥ
uta te suṣṭutā harī vṛṣaṇā vahataḥ ratham
ajuryasya madintamam yam īmahe
tam īmahe puruṣṭutam yahvam pratnābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
ni barhiṣi priye sadat adha dvitā
vardhasva su puruṣṭuta ṛṣiṣṭutābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
dhukṣasva pipyuṣīm iṣam avā ca naḥ
indra tvam avitā id asi itthā stuvataḥ adrivas
ṛtāt iyarmi te dhiyam manaḥ yujam
iha tyā sadhamādyā yujānaḥ soma pītaye
harī indra pratadvasū abhi svara
abhi svarantu ye tava rudrāsaḥ sakṣata śriyam
uta u marutvatīḥ viśaḥ abhi prayaḥ
imāḥ asya pratūrtayaḥ padam juṣanta yat divi
nābhā yajñasya sam dadhuḥ yathā vide
ayam dīrghāya cakṣase prāci prayati adhvare
mimīte yajñam ānuṣak vicakṣya
vṛṣā ayam indra te rathaḥ uta u te vṛṣaṇā harī
vṛṣā tvam śatakrato vṛṣā havaḥ
vṛṣā grāvā vṛṣā madaḥ vṛṣā somaḥ ayam sutaḥ
vṛṣā yajñaḥ yam invasi vṛṣā havaḥ
vṛṣā tvā vṛṣaṇam huve vajrin citrābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
vāvantha hi pratiṣṭutim vṛṣāḥ havaḥ
yat indra aham yathā tvam īśīya vasvaḥ ekaḥ id
stotā me go sakhā syāt
śikṣeyam asmai ditseyam śacīpate manīṣiṇe
yat aham gopatiḥ syām
dhenuḥ te indra sūnṛtāḥ yajamānāya sunvate
gām aśvam pipyuṣī duhe
na te vartā asti rādhasaḥ indra devaḥ na martyaḥ
yat ditsasi stutaḥ magham
yajñaḥ indram avardhayat yat bhūmim vi avartayat
cakrāṇaḥ opaśam divi
vāvṛdhānasya te vayam viśvā dhanāni jigyuṣaḥ
ūtim indra vṛṇīmahe
vi antarikṣam atirat made somasya rocanā
indraḥ yat abhinat valam
ud gāḥ ājat aṅgirobhyaḥ āviṣkṛṇvan guhā satīḥ
arvāñcam nunude valam
indreṇa rocanā divaḥ dṛḍhāni dṛṃhitāni ca
sthirāṇi na parāṇude
apām ūrmiḥ madan iva stomaḥ indra ajirāyate
vi te madāḥ arājiṣuḥ
tvam hi stoma vardhana indra asi uktha vardhanaḥ
stotṝṇām uta bhadra kṛt
indram id keśinā harī soma peyāya vakṣataḥ
upa yajñam su rādhasam
apām phenena namuceḥ śiraḥ indra ud avartayaḥ
viśvāḥ yat ajayaḥ spṛdhaḥ
māyābhiḥ utsisṛpsataḥ indra dyām ārurukṣataḥ
ava dasyūṃr adhūnuthāḥ
asunvām indra saṃsadam viṣūcīm vi anāśayaḥ
soma pāḥ uttaraḥ bhavan
tam u abhi pra gāyata puruhūtam puruṣṭutam
indram gīrbhiḥ taviṣam ā vivāsata
yasya dvibarhasaḥ bṛhat sahaḥ dādhāra rodasī
girīṃr ajrāṁ apaḥ svar vṛṣatvanā
sa rājasi puruṣṭutam ekaḥ vṛtrāṇi jighnase
indra jaitrā śravasyā ca yantave
tam te madam gṛṇīmasi vṛṣaṇam pṛtsu sāsahim
u loka kṛtnum adrivas hari śriyam
yena jyotīṃṣi āyave manave ca viveditha
mandānaḥ asya barhiṣaḥ vi rājasi
tat adya cit te ukthinaḥ anu stuvanti pūrvathā
vṛṣa patnīḥ apaḥ jaya dive dive
tava tyad indriyam bṛhat tava śuṣmam uta kratum
vajram śiśāti dhiṣaṇā vareṇyam
tava dyauḥ indra pauṃsyam pṛthivī vardhati śravaḥ
tvām āpaḥ parvatāsaḥ ca hinvire
tvām viṣṇuḥ bṛhan kṣayaḥ mitraḥ gṛṇāti varuṇaḥ
tvām śardhaḥ madati anu mārutam
tvam vṛṣā janānām maṃhiṣṭhaḥ indra jajñiṣe
satrā viśvā su apatyāni dadhiṣe
satrā tvam puruṣṭutam ekaḥ vṛtrāṇi tośase
na anyaḥ indrāt karaṇam bhūyas invati
yat indra manmaśas tvā nānā havante ūtaye
asmākebhiḥ nṛbhiḥ atra svar jaya
aram kṣayāya naḥ mahe viśvā rūpāṇi āviśan
indram jaitrāya harṣaya śacīpatim
pra samrājam carṣaṇīnām indram stota navyam gīrbhiḥ
naram nṛṣāham maṃhiṣṭham
yasmin ukthāni raṇyanti viśvāni ca śravasyā
apām avaḥ na samudre
tam suṣṭutyā vivāse jyeṣṭha rājam bhare kṛtnum
mahaḥ vājinam sanibhyaḥ
yasya anūnāḥ gabhīrāḥ madāḥ uravaḥ tarutrāḥ
harṣumantaḥ śūrasātau
tam id dhaneṣu hiteṣu adhivākāya havante
yeṣām indraḥ te jayanti
tam id cyautnaiḥ āryanti tam kṛtebhiḥ carṣaṇayaḥ
eṣaḥ indraḥ varivaskṛt
indraḥ brahmā indraḥ ṛṣiḥ indraḥ purū puruhūtaḥ
mahān mahībhiḥ śacībhiḥ
sa stomyaḥ sa havyaḥ satyaḥ satvā tuvikūrmiḥ
ekaḥ cit san abhibhūtiḥ
tam arkebhiḥ tam sāmabhiḥ tam gāyatraiḥ carṣaṇayaḥ
indram vardhanti kṣitayaḥ
praṇetāram vasyaḥ acchā kartāram jyotiḥ samatsu
sāsahvāṃsam yudhā amitrān
sa naḥ papriḥ pārayāti svasti nāvā puruhūtaḥ
indraḥ viśvāḥ ati dviṣaḥ
sa tvam naḥ indra vājebhiḥ daśasya ca gātuya ca
acchā ca naḥ sumnam neṣi
ā yāhi suṣuma hi te indra somam pibā imam
ā idam barhiḥ sadaḥ mama
ā tvā brahma yujā harī vahatām indra keśinā
upa brahmāṇi naḥ śṛṇu
brahmāṇaḥ tvā vayam yujā soma pām indra sominaḥ
sutāvantaḥ havāmahe
ā naḥ yāhi sutāvataḥ asmākam suṣṭutīḥ upa
pibā su śiprin andhasaḥ
ā te siñcāmi kukṣyoḥ anu gātrā vi dhāvatu
gṛbhāya jihvayā madhu
svāduḥ te astu saṃsude madhumān tanve tava
somaḥ śam astu te hṛde
ayam u tvā vicarṣaṇe janīḥ iva abhi saṃvṛtaḥ
pra somaḥ indra sarpatu
tuvi grīvaḥ vapā udaraḥ su bāhuḥ andhasaḥ made
indraḥ vṛtrāṇi jighnate
indra prehi puras tvam viśvasya īśānaḥ ojasā
vṛtrāṇi vṛtrahan jahi
dīrghaḥ te astu aṅkuśaḥ yena vasu prayacchasi
yajamānāya sunvate
ayam te indra somaḥ nipūtaḥ adhi barhiṣi
ehi īm asya drava piba
śācigo śācipūjana ayam raṇāya te sutaḥ
ākhaṇḍala pra hūyase
yaḥ te śṛṅgavṛṣaḥ napāt praṇapāt kuṇḍapāyyaḥ
ni asmin dadhre ā manaḥ
vāstoṣpate dhruvā sthūṇā aṃsatram somyānām
drapsaḥ bhettā purām śaśvatīnām indraḥ munīnām sakhā
pṛdākusānuḥ yajataḥ gaveṣaṇaḥ ekaḥ san abhi bhūyasaḥ
bhūrṇim aśvam nayat tujā puras gṛbhā indram somasya pītaye
idam ha nūnam eṣām sumnam bhikṣeta martyaḥ
ādityānām apūrvyam savīmani
anarvāṇaḥ hi eṣām panthāḥ ādityānām
adabdhāḥ santi pāyavaḥ sugevṛdhaḥ
tat su naḥ savitā bhagaḥ varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā
śarma yacchantu saprathaḥ yat īmahe
devebhiḥ devi adite ariṣṭa bharman ā gahi
smat sūribhiḥ puru priye su śarmabhiḥ
te hi putrāsaḥ aditeḥ viduḥ dveṣāṃsi yotave
aṃhoḥ cit uru cakrayaḥ anehasaḥ
aditiḥ naḥ divā paśum aditiḥ naktam advayāḥ
aditiḥ pātu aṃhasaḥ sadā vṛdhā
uta syā naḥ divā matiḥ aditiḥ ūtyā gamat
sā śantāti mayaḥ karat apa sridhaḥ
uta tyā daivyā bhiṣajā śam naḥ karataḥ aśvinā
yuyuyātām itas rapaḥ apa sridhaḥ
śam agniḥ agnibhiḥ karat śam naḥ tapatu sūryaḥ
śam vātaḥ vātu arapāḥ apa sridhaḥ
apāḥ mīvām apa sridham apa sedhata durmatim
ādityāsaḥ yuyotana naḥ aṃhasaḥ
yuyota śarum asmat ām ādityāsaḥ uta amatim
ṛdhak dveṣaḥ kṛṇuta viśva vedasaḥ
tat su naḥ śarma yacchata ādityāḥ yat mumocati
enasvantam cit enasaḥ sudānavaḥ
yaḥ naḥ kaścid ririkṣati rakṣaḥ tvena martyaḥ
svaiḥ sa evaiḥ ririṣīṣṭa _ janaḥ
sam id tam agham aśnavat duḥśaṃsam martyam ripum
yaḥ asmatrā durhaṇāvāṁ upa dvayuḥ
pākatrā sthana devāḥ hṛtsu jānītha martyam
upa dvayum ca advayum ca vasavaḥ
ā śarma parvatānām ā uta apām vṛṇīmahe
dyāvākṣāmā āre asmat rapaḥ kṛtam
te naḥ bhadreṇa śarmaṇā yuṣmākam nāvā vasavaḥ
ati viśvāni duritā pipartana
tuce tanāya tat su naḥ drāghīyaḥ āyuḥ jīvase
ādityāsaḥ su mahasaḥ kṛṇotana
yajñaḥ hīḍaḥ vaḥ antare ādityāḥ asti mṛḍata
yuṣme id vaḥ api smasi sajātye
bṛhat varūtham marutām devam trātāram aśvinā
mitram īmahe varuṇam svastaye
anehaḥ mitra aryaman nṛvat varuṇa śaṃsyam
tri varūtham marutaḥ yanta naḥ chardiḥ
ye cit hi mṛtyu bandhavaḥ ādityāḥ manavaḥ smasi
pra su naḥ āyuḥ jīvase tiretana
tam gūrdhaya svarṇaram devāsaḥ devam aratim dadhanvire
devatrā havyam ohire
vibhūta rātim vipra citra śociṣam agnim īḍiṣva yanturam
asya medhasya somyasya sobhare pra īm adhvarāya pūrvyam
yajiṣṭham tvā vavṛmahe devam devatrā hotāram amartyam
asya yajñasya sukratum
ūrjaḥ napātam subhagam su dīditim agnim śreṣṭha śociṣam
sa naḥ mitrasya varuṇasya saḥ apām ā sumnam yakṣate divi
yaḥ samidhā yaḥ āhutī yaḥ vedena dadāśa martaḥ agnaye
yaḥ namasā su adhvaraḥ
tasya id arvantaḥ raṃhayanta āśavaḥ tasya dyumnitamam yaśaḥ
na tam aṃhaḥ deva kṛtam kutaścana na martya kṛtam naśat
su agnayaḥ vaḥ agnibhiḥ syāma sūno sahasaḥ ūrjām pate
su vīraḥ tvam asmayuḥ
praśaṃsamānaḥ atithiḥ na mitriyaḥ agniḥ rathaḥ na vedyaḥ
tve kṣemāsaḥ api santi sādhavaḥ tvam rājā rayīṇām
saḥ addhā dāśu adhvaraḥ agne martaḥ subhaga sa praśaṃsyaḥ
sa dhībhiḥ astu sanitā
yasya tvam ūrdhvaḥ adhvarāya tiṣṭhasi kṣayat vīraḥ sa sādhate
saḥ arvadbhiḥ sanitā sa vipanyubhiḥ sa śūraiḥ sanitā kṛtam
yasya agniḥ vapuḥ gṛhe stomam canaḥ dadhīta viśva vāryaḥ
havyā vā veviṣat viṣaḥ
viprasya vā stuvataḥ sahasaḥ yaho makṣūtamasya rātiṣu
avodevam uparimartyam kṛdhi vaso vividuṣaḥ vacaḥ
yaḥ agnim havya dātibhiḥ namobhiḥ vā su dakṣam āvivāsati
girā vā ajira śociṣam
samidhā yaḥ niśitī dāśat aditim dhāmabhiḥ asya martyaḥ
viśvā id sa dhībhiḥ subhagaḥ janāṁ ati dyumnaiḥ udnaḥ iva tāriṣat
tat agne dyumnam ā bhara yat sāsahat sadane kaṃcid atriṇam
manyum janasya dūḍhyaḥ
yena caṣṭe varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā yena nāsatyā bhagaḥ
vayam tat te śavasā gātu vittamāḥ indra tvotāḥ vidhemahi
te gha id agne svādhyaḥ ye tvā vipra nidadhire nṛ cakṣasam
viprāsaḥ deva sukratum
te id vedim subhaga te āhutim te sotum cakrire divi
te id vājebhiḥ jigyuḥ mahat dhanam ye tve kāmam nyerire
bhadraḥ naḥ agniḥ āhutaḥ bhadrā rātiḥ subhaga bhadraḥ adhvaraḥ
bhadrāḥ uta praśastayaḥ
bhadram manaḥ kṛṇuṣva vṛtratūrye yena samatsu sāsahaḥ
ava sthirā tanuhi bhūri śardhatām vanema te abhiṣṭibhiḥ
īḍe girā manuḥ hitam yam devāḥ dūtam aratim nyerire
yajiṣṭham havyavāhanam
tigma jambhāya taruṇāya rājate prayaḥ gāyasi agnaye
yaḥ piṃśate sūnṛtābhiḥ su vīryam agniḥ ghṛtebhiḥ āhutaḥ
yadi ghṛtebhiḥ āhutaḥ vāśīm agniḥ bharate ud ca ava ca
asuraḥ iva nirṇijam
yaḥ havyāni airayata manuḥ hitaḥ devaḥ āsā sugandhinā
vivāsate vāryāṇi su adhvaraḥ hotā devaḥ amartyaḥ
yat agne martyaḥ tvam syām aham mitra mahas amartyaḥ
sahasaḥ sūno āhuta
na tvā rāsīya abhiśastaye vaso na pāpa tvāya santya
na me stotā amatīvā na durhitaḥ syāt agne na pāpayā
pituḥ na putraḥ su bhṛtaḥ duroṇe ā devān etu pra naḥ haviḥ
tava aham agne ūtibhiḥ nediṣṭhābhiḥ saceya joṣam ā vaso
sadā devasya martyaḥ
tava kratvā saneyam tava rātibhiḥ agne tava praśastibhiḥ
tvām id āhuḥ pramatim vaso mama agne harṣasva dātave
pra saḥ agne tava ūtibhiḥ su vīrābhiḥ tirate vāja bharmabhiḥ
yasya tvam sakhyam āvaraḥ
tava drapsaḥ nīlavān vāśaḥ ṛtviyaḥ indhānaḥ siṣṇo ā dade
tvam mahīnām uṣasām asi priyaḥ kṣapaḥ vastuṣu rājasi
tam āganma sobharayaḥ sahasra muṣkam su abhiṣṭim avase
samrājam trāsadasyavam
yasya te agne anye agnayaḥ upakṣitaḥ vayāḥ iva
vipaḥ na dyumnā ni yuve janānām tava kṣatrāṇi vardhayan
yam ādityāsaḥ adruhaḥ pāram nayatha martyam
maghonām viśveṣām sudānavaḥ
yūyam rājānaḥ kaṃcid carṣaṇīsahaḥ kṣayantam mānuṣāṁ anu
vayam te vaḥ varuṇa mitra aryaman syāma id ṛtasya rathyaḥ
adāt me paurukutsyaḥ pañcāśatam trasadasyuḥ vadhūnām
maṃhiṣṭhaḥ aryaḥ sat patiḥ
uta me prayiyoḥ vayiyoḥ suvāstvāḥ adhi tugvani
tisṝṇām saptatīnām śyāvaḥ praṇetā bhuvat vasuḥ diyānām patiḥ
ā ganta mā riṣaṇyata prasthāvānaḥ mā apa sthāta samanyavaḥ
sthirā cit namayiṣṇavaḥ
vīﾱu pavibhiḥ marutaḥ ṛbhukṣaṇaḥ ā rudrāsaḥ su dītibhiḥ
iṣā naḥ adya gata puruspṛhaḥ yajñam ā sobharīyavaḥ
vidma hi rudriyāṇām śuṣmam ugram marutām śimīvatām
viṣṇoḥ eṣasya mīḍhuṣām
vi dvīpāni pāpatan tiṣṭhat ducchunā ubhe yujanta rodasī
pra dhanvāni airata śubhra khādayaḥ yat ejatha sva bhānavaḥ
acyutā cit vaḥ ajman ā nānadati parvatāsaḥ vanaspatiḥ
bhūmiḥ yāmeṣu rejate
amāya vaḥ marutaḥ yātave dyauḥ jihīte uttarā bṛhat
yatra naraḥ dediśate tanūṣu ā tvakṣāṃsi bāhu ojasaḥ
svadhām anu śriyam naraḥ mahi tveṣāḥ amavantaḥ vṛṣapsavaḥ
vahante ahrutapsavaḥ
gobhiḥ vāṇaḥ ajyate sobharīṇām rathe kośe hiraṇyaye
go bandhavaḥ sujātāsaḥ iṣe bhuje mahāntaḥ naḥ sparase nu
prati vaḥ vṛṣat añjayaḥ vṛṣṇe śardhāya mārutāya bharadhvam
havyā vṛṣa prayāvṇe
vṛṣaṇaśvena marutaḥ vṛṣapsunā rathena vṛṣa nābhinā
ā śyenāsaḥ na pakṣiṇaḥ vṛthā naraḥ havyā naḥ vītaye gata
samānam añji eṣām vi bhrājante rukmāsaḥ adhi bāhuṣu
davidyutati ṛṣṭayaḥ
te ugrāsaḥ vṛṣaṇaḥ ugra bāhavaḥ nakir tanūṣu yetire
sthirā dhanvāni āyudhā ratheṣu vaḥ anīkeṣu adhi śriyaḥ
yeṣām arṇaḥ na saprathaḥ nāma tveṣam śaśvatām ekam id bhuje
vayaḥ na pitryam sahaḥ
tān vandasva marutaḥ tāṁ upa stuhi teṣām hi dhunīnām
arāṇām na caramaḥ tat eṣām dānā mahnā tat eṣām
subhagaḥ sa vaḥ ūtiṣu āsa pūrvāsu marutaḥ vyuṣṭiṣu
yaḥ vā nūnam uta asati
yasya vā yūyam prati vājinaḥ naraḥ ā havyā vītaye _
abhi sa dyumnaiḥ uta vājasātibhiḥ sumnā vaḥ dhūtayaḥ naśat
yathā rudrasya sūnavaḥ divaḥ vaśanti asurasya vedhasaḥ
yuvānaḥ tathā id asat
ye ca arhanti marutaḥ sudānavaḥ smat mīḍhuṣaḥ caranti ye
atas cit ā naḥ upa vasyasā hṛdā yuvānaḥ ā _
yūnaḥ u su naviṣṭhayā vṛṣṇaḥ pāvakāṁ abhi sobhare girā
gāya gāḥ iva carkṛṣat
sāhāḥ ye santi muṣṭi hā iva havyaḥ viśvāsu pṛtsu hotṛṣu
vṛṣṇaḥ candrāt na su śravastamān girā vandasva marutaḥ aha
gāvaḥ cit gha samanyavaḥ sajātyena marutaḥ sa bandhavaḥ
rihate kakubhaḥ mithas
martaḥ cit vaḥ nṛtavaḥ rukma vakṣasaḥ upa bhrātṛ tvam āyati
adhi naḥ gāta marutaḥ sadā hi vaḥ āpi tvam asti nidhruvi
marutaḥ mārutasya naḥ ā bheṣajasya vahata sudānavaḥ
yūyam sakhāyaḥ saptayaḥ
yābhiḥ sindhum avatha yābhiḥ tūrvatha yābhiḥ daśasyatha krivim
mayaḥ naḥ bhūta ūtibhiḥ mayobhuvaḥ śivābhiḥ a saca dviṣaḥ
yat sindhau yat asiknyām yat samudreṣu marutaḥ su barhiṣaḥ
yat parvateṣu bheṣajam
viśvam paśyantaḥ bibhṛtha tanūṣu ā tena naḥ adhi vocata
kṣamā rapaḥ marutaḥ āturasya naḥ iṣkarta vihrutam punar
vayam u tvām apūrvya sthūram na kaccit bharantaḥ avasyavaḥ
vāje citram havāmahe
upa tvā karman ūtaye sa naḥ yuvā ugraḥ cakrāma yaḥ dhṛṣat
tvām id hi avitāram vavṛmahe sakhāyaḥ indra sānasim
ā yāhi ime indavaḥ aśva pate go pate urvarā pate
somam soma pate piba
vayam hi tvā bandhumantam abandhavaḥ viprāsaḥ indra yemima
yā te dhāmāni vṛṣabha tebhiḥ ā gahi viśvebhiḥ soma pītaye
sīdantaḥ te vayaḥ yathā go śrīte madhau madire vivakṣaṇe
abhi tvām indra nonumaḥ
acchā ca tvā enā namasā vadāmasi kim muhur cit vi dīdhayaḥ
santi kāmāsaḥ harivas dadiḥ tvam smaḥ vayam santi naḥ dhiyaḥ
nūtnāḥ id indra te vayam ūtī abhūma nahi nu te adrivas
vidma purā parīṇasaḥ
vidma sakhi tvam uta śūra bhojyam ā te tā vajrin īmahe
uta u samasmin ā śiśīhi naḥ vaso vāje su śipra gomati
yaḥ naḥ idam idam purā pra vasyaḥ ānināya tam u vaḥ stuṣe
sakhāyaḥ indram ūtaye
haryaśvam satpatim carṣaṇīsaham sa hi sma yaḥ amandata
ā tu naḥ sa vayati gavyam aśvyam stotṛbhyaḥ maghavā śatam
tvayā ha svid yujā vayam prati śvasantam vṛṣabha bruvīmahi
saṃsthe janasya gomataḥ
jayema kāre puruhūta kāriṇaḥ abhi tiṣṭhema dūḍhyaḥ
nṛbhiḥ vṛtram hanyāma śūśuyāma ca aveḥ indra pra naḥ dhiyaḥ
a bhrātṛvyaḥ anā tvam an āpiḥ indra januṣā sanāt asi
yudhā id āpi tvam icchase
nakir revantam sakhyāya vindase pīyanti te surāśvaḥ
yadā kṛṇoṣi nadanum sam ūhasi āt id pitā iva hūyase
mā te amājuraḥ yathā mūrāsaḥ indra sakhye tvāvataḥ
ni sadāma sacā sute
mā te go datra niḥ arāma rādhasaḥ indra mā te gṛhāmahi
dṛﾱhā cit aryaḥ pra mṛśa abhi ā bhara na te dāmānaḥ ādabhe
indraḥ vā gha id iyat magham sarasvatī vā subhagā dadiḥ vasu
tvam vā citra dāśuṣe
citraḥ id rājā rājakāḥ id anyake yake sarasvatīm anu
parjanyaḥ iva tatanat hi vṛṣṭyā sahasram ayutā dadat
ā u tyam ahve ā ratham adya daṃsiṣṭham ūtaye
yam aśvinā su havā rudravartanī ā sūryāyai tasthathuḥ
pūrva āyuṣam su havam puruspṛham bhujyum vājeṣu pūrvyam
sacanāvantam sumatibhiḥ sobhare vidveṣasam anehasam
iha tyā puru bhūtamā devā namobhiḥ aśvinā
arvācīnā su avase karāmahe gantārā dāśuṣaḥ gṛham
yuvoḥ rathasya pari cakram īyate īrmā anyat vām iṣaṇyati
asmān acchā sumatiḥ vām śubhaḥ patī ā dhenuḥ iva dhāvatu
rathaḥ yaḥ vām tri vandhuraḥ hiraṇya abhīśuḥ aśvinā
pari dyāvāpṛthivī bhūṣati śrutaḥ tena nāsatyā gatam
daśasyantā manave pūrvyam divi yavam vṛkeṇa karṣathaḥ
tā vām adya sumatibhiḥ śubhaḥ patī aśvinā pra stuvīmahi
upa naḥ vājinīvasū yātam ṛtasya pathibhiḥ
yebhiḥ tṛkṣim vṛṣaṇā trāsadasyavam mahe kṣatrāya jinvathaḥ
ayam vām adribhiḥ sutaḥ somaḥ narā vṛṣaṇvasū
ā yātam soma pītaye pibatam dāśuṣaḥ gṛhe
ā hi ruhatam aśvinā rathe kośe hiraṇyaye vṛṣaṇvasū
yuñjāthām pīvarīḥ iṣaḥ
yābhiḥ paktham avathaḥ yābhiḥ adhrigum yābhiḥ babhrum vijoṣasam
tābhiḥ naḥ makṣū tūyam aśvinā gatam bhiṣajyatam yat āturam
yat adhrigāvaḥ adhrigū idā cit ahnaḥ aśvinā havāmahe
vayam gīrbhiḥ vipanyavaḥ
tābhiḥ ā yātam vṛṣaṇā upa me havam viśvapsum viśva vāryam
iṣā maṃhiṣṭhā puru bhūtamā narā yābhiḥ krivim vāvṛdhuḥ tābhiḥ ā gatam
tau idā cit ahānām tau aśvinā vandamānaḥ upa bruve
tau u namobhiḥ īmahe
tau id doṣā tau uṣasi śubhaḥ patī tā yāman rudravartanī
mā naḥ martāya ripave vājinīvasū paras rudrau ati khyatam
ā sugmyāya sugmyam prātar rathena aśvinā vā sakṣaṇī
huve pitā iva sobharī
manaḥ javasā vṛṣaṇā mada cyutā makṣuṃgamābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
ārāttāt cit bhūtam asme avase pūrvībhiḥ puru bhojasā
ā naḥ aśvāvat aśvinā vartiḥ yāsiṣṭam madhu pātamā narā
gomat dasrā hiraṇyavat
su prāvargam su vīryam suṣṭhu vāryam an ādhṛṣṭam rakṣasvinā
asmin ā vām āyāne vājinīvasū viśvā vāmāni dhīmahi
īḍiṣva hi pratīvyam yajasva jātavedasam
cariṣṇu dhūmam a gṛbhīta śociṣam
dāmānam viśvacarṣaṇe agnim viśvamanaḥ girā
uta stuṣe viṣpardhasaḥ rathānām
yeṣām ābādhaḥ ṛgmiyaḥ iṣaḥ pṛkṣaḥ ca nigrabhe
upavidā vahniḥ vindate vasu
ud asya śociḥ asthāt dīdiyuṣaḥ vi ajaram
tapuḥ jambhasya su dyutaḥ gaṇa śriyaḥ
ud u tiṣṭha su adhvara stavānaḥ devyā kṛpā
abhikhyā bhāsā bṛhatā śuśukvaniḥ
agne yāhi su śastibhiḥ havyā juhvānaḥ ānuṣak
yathā dūtaḥ babhūtha havyavāhanaḥ
agnim vaḥ pūrvyam huve hotāram carṣaṇīnām
tam ayā vācā gṛṇe tam u vaḥ stuṣe
yajñebhiḥ adbhuta kratum yam kṛpā sūdayante id
mitram na jane sudhitam ṛtāvani
ṛtāvānam ṛtāyavaḥ yajñasya sādhanam girā
upa u enam jujuṣuḥ namasaḥ pade
acchā naḥ aṅgirastamam yajñāsaḥ yantu saṃyataḥ
hotā yaḥ asti vikṣu ā yaśastamaḥ
agne tava tye ajara indhānāsaḥ bṛhat bhās
aśvāḥ iva vṛṣaṇaḥ taviṣīyavaḥ
sa tvam naḥ ūrjām pate rayim rāsva su vīryam
prāva naḥ toke tanaye samatsu ā
yat vai u viśpatiḥ śitaḥ su prītaḥ manuṣaḥ viśi
viśvā id agniḥ prati rakṣāṃsi sedhati
śruṣṭī agne navasya me stomasya vīra viśpate
ni māyinaḥ tapuṣā rakṣasaḥ daha
na tasya māyayā cana ripuḥ īśīta martyaḥ
yaḥ agnaye dadāśa havya dātibhiḥ
vyaśvaḥ tvā vasu vidam ukṣaṇyuḥ aprīṇāt ṛṣiḥ
mahaḥ rāye tam u tvā sam idhīmahi
uśanā kāvyaḥ tvā ni hotāram asādayat
āyajim tvā manave jātavedasam
viśve hi tvā sajoṣasaḥ devāsaḥ dūtam akrata
śruṣṭī deva prathamaḥ yajñiyaḥ bhuvaḥ
imam gha vīraḥ amṛtam dūtam kṛṇvīta martyaḥ
pāvakam kṛṣṇa vartanim vihāyasam
tam huvema yata srucaḥ su bhāsam śukra śociṣam
viśām agnim ajaram pratnam īḍyam
yaḥ asmai havya dātibhiḥ āhutim martaḥ avidhat
bhūri poṣam sa dhatte vīravat yaśaḥ
prathamam jātavedasam agnim yajñeṣu pūrvyam
prati sruc eti namasā haviṣmatī
ābhiḥ vidhema agnaye jyeṣṭhābhiḥ vyaśva vat
maṃhiṣṭhābhiḥ matibhiḥ śukra śociṣe
nūnam arca vihāyase stomebhiḥ sthūra yūpa vat
ṛṣe vaiyaśva damyāya agnaye
atithim mānuṣāṇām sūnum vanaspatīnām
viprāḥ agnim avase pratnam īḍate
mahaḥ viśvān abhi sataḥ abhi havyāni mānuṣā
agne ni satsi namasā adhi barhiṣi
vaṃsva naḥ vāryā puru vaṃsva rāyaḥ puruspṛhaḥ
su vīryasya prajāvataḥ yaśasvataḥ
tvam _ suṣāmṇe agne janāya codaya
sadā vaso rātim yaviṣṭha śaśvate
tvam hi supratur asi tvam naḥ gomatīḥ iṣaḥ
mahaḥ rāyaḥ sātim agne apa vṛdhi
agne tvam yaśāḥ asi ā mitrāvaruṇā vaha
ṛtāvānā samrājā pūta dakṣasā
sakhāyaḥ ā śiṣāmahi brahma indrāya vajriṇe
stuṣe u su vaḥ nṛtamāya dhṛṣṇave
śavasā hi asi śrutaḥ vṛtra hatyena vṛtrahā
maghaiḥ maghonaḥ ati śūra dāśasi
sa naḥ stavānaḥ ā bhara rayim citra śravastamam
nireke cit yaḥ harivas vasuḥ dadiḥ
ā nirekam uta priyam indra darṣi janānām
dhṛṣatā dhṛṣṇo stavamānaḥ ā bhara
na te savyam na dakṣiṇam hastam varante āmuraḥ
na paribādhaḥ harivas gaviṣṭiṣu
ā tvā gobhiḥ iva vrajam gīrbhiḥ ṛṇomi adrivas
ā sma kāmam jarituḥ ā manaḥ pṛṇa
viśvāni viśvamanasaḥ dhiyā naḥ vṛtra hantama
ugra praṇetar adhi su vaso gahi
vayam te asya vṛtrahan vidyāma śūra navyasaḥ
vaso spārhasya puruhūta rādhasaḥ
indra yathā hi asti te aparītam nṛto śavaḥ
amṛktā rātiḥ puruhūta dāśuṣe
ā vṛṣasva mahā maha mahe nṛtama rādhase
dṛﾱhaḥ cit dṛhya maghavan maghattaye
nu anyatra cit adrivas tvat naḥ jagmuḥ āśasaḥ
maghavan śagdhi tava tat naḥ ūtibhiḥ
nahi aṅga nṛto tvat anyam vindāmi rādhase
rāye dyumnāya śavase ca girvaṇaḥ
ā indum indrāya siñcata pibāti somyam madhu
pra rādhasā codayāte mahitvanā
upa u harīṇām patim dakṣam pṛñcantam abravam
nūnam śrudhi stuvataḥ aśvyasya
nahi aṅga purā cana jajñe vīrataraḥ tvat
nakir rāyā na evathā na bhandanā
ā id u madhvaḥ madintaram siñca vā adhvaryo andhasaḥ
eva hi vīra stavate sadāvṛdhaḥ
indra sthātar harīṇām nakir te pūrvya stutim
ud ānaṃśa śavasā na bhandanā
tam vaḥ vājānām patim ahūmahi śravasyavaḥ
aprāyubhiḥ yajñebhiḥ vāvṛdhenyam
eta u nu indram stavāma sakhāyaḥ stomyam naram
kṛṣṭīḥ yaḥ viśvāḥ abhi asti ekaḥ id
agorudhāya gaviṣe dyukṣāya dasmyam vacaḥ
ghṛtāt svādīyaḥ madhunaḥ ca vocata
yasya amitāni vīryā na rādhaḥ paryetave
jyotiḥ na viśvam abhi asti dakṣiṇā
stuhi indram vyaśva vat anūrmim vājinam yamam
aryaḥ gayam maṃhamānam vi dāśuṣe
eva nūnam upa stuhi vaiyaśva daśamam navam
su vidvāṃsam carkṛtyam caraṇīnām
vettha hi nirṛtīnām vajrahasta parivṛjam
ahar ahar śundhyuḥ paripadām iva
tat indra avaḥ ā bhara ye nā daṃsiṣṭha kṛtvane
dvitā kutsāya śiśnathaḥ ni codaya
tam u tvā nūnam īmahe navyam daṃsiṣṭha sanyase
sa tvam naḥ viśvāḥ abhimātīḥ sakṣaṇiḥ
yaḥ ṛkṣāt aṃhasaḥ mucat yaḥ vā āryāt sapta sindhuṣu
vadhar dāsasya tuvi nṛmṇa nīnamaḥ
yathā _ suṣāmṇe sanibhyaḥ āvahaḥ rayim
vyaśvebhyaḥ subhage vājinīvati
ā nāryasya dakṣiṇā vyaśvāṁ etu sominaḥ
sthūram ca rādhaḥ śatavat sahasravat
yat tvā pṛcchāt ījānaḥ kuhayā kuhayākṛte
eṣa u apaśritaḥ valaḥ gomatīm ava tiṣṭhati
tā vām viśvasya gopā devā deveṣu yajñiyā
ṛtāvānā yajase pūta dakṣasā
mitrā tanā na rathyā varuṇaḥ yaḥ ca su kratuḥ
sanāt su jātā tanayā dhṛta vratā
tā mātā viśva vedasā asuryāya pramahasā
mahī jajāna aditiḥ ṛtāvarī
mahāntā mitrāvaruṇā samrājā devau asurā
ṛtāvānau ṛtam ā ghoṣataḥ bṛhat
napātā śavasaḥ mahaḥ sūnū dakṣasya su kratū
sṛpra dānū iṣaḥ vāstū adhi kṣitaḥ
sam yā dānūni yemathuḥ divyāḥ pārthivīḥ iṣaḥ
nabhasvatīḥ ā vām carantu vṛṣṭayaḥ
adhi yā bṛhataḥ divaḥ abhi yūthā iva paśyataḥ
ṛtāvānā samrājā namase hitā
ṛtāvānā ni sedatuḥ sāmrājyāya su kratū
dhṛta vratā kṣatriyā kṣatram āśatuḥ
akṣṇaḥ cit gātu vittarā an ulbaṇena cakṣasā
ni cit miṣantā nicirā ni cikyatuḥ
uta naḥ devī aditiḥ uruṣyatām nāsatyā
uruṣyantu marutaḥ vṛddha śavasaḥ
te naḥ nāvam uruṣyata divā naktam sudānavaḥ
a riṣyantaḥ ni pāyubhiḥ sacemahi
a ghnate viṣṇave vayam a riṣyantaḥ sudānave
śrudhi sva yāvan sindho pūrvacittaye
tat vāryam vṛṇīmahe variṣṭham gopayatyam
mitraḥ yat pānti varuṇaḥ yat aryamā
uta naḥ sindhuḥ apām tat marutaḥ tat aśvinā
indraḥ viṣṇuḥ mīḍhvāṃsaḥ sajoṣasaḥ
te hi sma vanuṣaḥ naraḥ abhimātim kayasya cit
tigmam na kṣodaḥ pratighnanti bhūrṇayaḥ
ayam ekaḥ itthā puru uru caṣṭe vi viśpatiḥ
tasya vratāni anu vaḥ carāmasi
anu pūrvāṇi okyā sāmrājyasya saścima
mitrasya vratā varuṇasya dīrgha śrut
pari yaḥ raśminā divaḥ antān mame pṛthivyāḥ
ubhe ā paprau rodasī mahitvā
ud u sya śaraṇe divaḥ jyotiḥ ayaṃsta sūryaḥ
agniḥ na śukraḥ samidhānaḥ āhutaḥ
vacaḥ dīrghaprasadmani īśe vājasya gomataḥ
īśe hi pitvaḥ a viṣasya dāvane
tat sūryam rodasī ubhe doṣā vastoḥ upa bruve
bhojeṣu asmāṁ abhi ud cara sadā
ṛjram ukṣaṇyāyane rajatam harayāṇe
ratham yuktam asanāma suṣāmaṇi
tā me aśvyānām harīṇām nitośanā
uta u nu kṛtvyānām nṛ vāhasā
smat abhīśū kaśāvantā viprāḥ naviṣṭhayā matī
mahaḥ vājinau arvantā sacā asanam
yuvoḥ u su ratham huve sadhastutyāya sūriṣu
a tūrta dakṣā vṛṣaṇā vṛṣaṇvasū
yuvam _ suṣāmṇe mahe tane nāsatyā
avobhiḥ yāthaḥ vṛṣaṇā vṛṣaṇvasū
tā vām adya havāmahe havyebhiḥ vājinīvasū
pūrvīḥ iṣaḥ iṣayantau ati kṣapaḥ
ā vām vāhiṣṭhaḥ aśvinā rathaḥ yātu śrutaḥ narā
upa stomān turasya darśathaḥ śriye
juhurāṇā cit aśvinā manyethām vṛṣaṇvasū
yuvam hi rudrā parṣathaḥ ati dviṣaḥ
dasrā hi viśvam ānuṣak makṣūbhiḥ paridīyathaḥ
dhiyañjinvā madhu varṇā śubhaḥ patī
upa naḥ yātam aśvinā rāyā viśva puṣā saha
maghavānā su vīrau an apacyutā
ā me asya pratīvyam indra nāsatyāḥ gatam
devā devebhiḥ adya sacanastamā
vayam hi vām havāmahe ukṣaṇyantaḥ vyaśva vat
sumatibhiḥ upa viprau iha ā gatam
aśvinā su ṛṣe stuhi kuvid te śravataḥ havam
nedīyasaḥ kūḍayātaḥ paṇīṃr uta
vaiyaśvasya śrutam narā uta u me asya vedathaḥ
sajoṣasā varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā
yuvādattasya dhiṣṇyā yuvānītasya sūribhiḥ
ahar ahar _ mahyam śikṣatam
yaḥ vām yajñebhiḥ āvṛtaḥ adhivastrā vadhūḥ iva
saparyantā śubhe cakrāte aśvinā
yaḥ vām uru vyacastamam ciketati nṛ pāyyam
vartiḥ aśvinā pari yātam asmayū
asmabhyam su vṛṣaṇvasū yātam vartiḥ nṛ pāyyam
viṣu druhā iva yajñam ūhathuḥ girā
vāhiṣṭhaḥ vām havānām stomaḥ dūtaḥ huvat narā
yuvābhyām bhūtu aśvinā
yat adaḥ divaḥ arṇave iṣaḥ vā madathaḥ gṛhe
śrutam id me amartyā
uta syā śveta yāvarī vāhiṣṭhā vām nadīnām
sindhuḥ hiraṇya vartaniḥ
smat etayā su kīrtyā aśvinā śvetayā dhiyā
vahethe śubhra yāvānā
yukṣvā hi tvam rathāsahā yuvasva poṣyā vaso
āt naḥ vāyo madhu piba asmākam savanā gahi
tava vāyo ṛtaspate tvaṣṭuḥ jāmātar adbhuta
avāṃsi ā vṛṇīmahe
tvaṣṭuḥ jāmātaram vayam īśānam rāyaḥ īmahe
sutāvantaḥ vāyum dyumnā janāsaḥ
vāyo yāhi śiva ā divaḥ vahasva su su aśvyam
vahasva mahaḥ pṛthu pakṣasā rathe
tvām hi su psarastamam nṛṣadaneṣu hūmahe
grāvāṇam na aśva pṛṣṭham maṃhanā
sa tvam naḥ deva manasā vāyo mandānaḥ agriyaḥ
kṛdhi vājāṁ apaḥ dhiyaḥ
agniḥ ukthe purohitaḥ grāvāṇaḥ barhiḥ adhvare
ṛcā yāmi marutaḥ brahmaṇaspatim devāṁ avaḥ vareṇyam
ā paśum gāsi pṛthivīm vanaspatīn uṣāsā naktam oṣadhīḥ
viśve ca naḥ vasavaḥ viśva vedasaḥ dhīnām bhūta prāvitāraḥ
pra su naḥ etu adhvaraḥ agnā deveṣu pūrvyaḥ
ādityeṣu pra varuṇe dhṛta vrate marutsu viśva bhānuṣu
viśve hi sma manave viśva vedasaḥ bhuvan vṛdhe riśādasaḥ
ariṣṭebhiḥ pāyubhiḥ viśva vedasaḥ yanta naḥ a vṛkam chardiḥ
ā naḥ adya samanasaḥ ganta viśve sajoṣasaḥ
ṛcā girā marutaḥ devi adite sadane pastye mahi
abhi priyā marutaḥ yā vaḥ aśvyā havyā mitra prayāthana
ā barhiḥ indraḥ varuṇaḥ turāḥ naraḥ ādityāsaḥ sadantu naḥ
vayam vaḥ vṛkta barhiṣaḥ hita prayasaḥ ānuṣak
suta somāsaḥ varuṇa havāmahe manuṣvat iddha agnayaḥ
ā pra yāta marutaḥ viṣṇo aśvinā pūṣan mākīnayā dhiyā
indraḥ ā yātu prathamaḥ saniṣyubhiḥ vṛṣā yaḥ vṛtrahā gṛṇe
vi naḥ devāsaḥ adruhaḥ acchidram śarma yacchata
na yat dūrāt vasavaḥ nu cit antitas varūtham ādadharṣati
asti hi vaḥ sajātyam riśādasaḥ devāsaḥ asti āpyam
pra naḥ pūrvasmai suvitāya vocata makṣū sumnāya navyase
idā hi vaḥ upastutim idā vāmasya bhaktaye
upa vaḥ viśva vedasaḥ namasyuḥ ām asṛkṣi anyām iva
ud u sya vaḥ savitā su praṇītayaḥ asthāt ūrdhvaḥ vareṇyaḥ

ekaḥ eva agniḥ bahudhā samiddhaḥ ekaḥ sūryaḥ viśvam anu prabhūtaḥ
ekā eva uṣāḥ sarvam idam vi bhāti ekam vai idam vi babhūva sarvam
jyotiṣmantam ketumantam tri cakram sukham ratham suṣadam bhūri vāram
citrāmaghā yasya yoge adhijajñe tam vām huve ati riktam pibadhyai
imāni vām bhāgadheyāni sisrate indrāvaruṇā pra mahe suteṣu vām
yajñe yajñe ha savanā bhuraṇyathaḥ yat sunvate yajamānāya śikṣathaḥ
niṣṣidhvarīḥ oṣadhīḥ āpaḥ āstām indrāvaruṇā mahimānam āśata
yā sisratuḥ rajasaḥ pāre adhvanaḥ yayoḥ śatruḥ nakir ādevaḥ ohate
satyam tat indrāvaruṇā kṛśasya vām madhvaḥ ūrmim duhate sapta vāṇīḥ
tābhiḥ dāśvāṃsam avatam śubhaḥ patī yaḥ vām adabdhaḥ abhipāti cittibhiḥ
ghṛta pruṣaḥ saumyāḥ jīra dānavaḥ sapta svasāraḥ sadane ṛtasya
yāḥ ha vām indrāvaruṇā ghṛtaścutaḥ tābhiḥ dhattam yajamānāya śikṣatam
avocāma mahate saubhagāya satyam tveṣābhyām mahimānam indriyam
asmān su indrāvaruṇā ghṛtaścutaḥ tribhiḥ sāptebhiḥ avatam śubhaḥ patī
indrāvaruṇā yat ṛṣibhyaḥ manīṣām vācaḥ matim śrutam adattam agre
yāni sthānāni asṛjanta dhīrāḥ yajñam tanvānāḥ tapasā abhi apaśyam
indrāvaruṇā saumanasam a dṛptam rāyaḥ poṣam yajamāneṣu dhattam
prajām puṣṭim bhūtim asmāsu dhattam dīrgha āyu tvāya pra tiratam naḥ āyuḥ
agne ā yāhi agnibhiḥ hotāram tvā vṛṇīmahe
ā tvām anaktu prayatā haviṣmatī yajiṣṭham barhiḥ āsade
acchā hi tvā sahasaḥ sūno aṅgiraḥ srucaḥ caranti adhvare
ūrjaḥ napātam ghṛta keśam īmahe agnim yajñeṣu pūrvyam
agne kaviḥ vedhāḥ asi hotā pāvaka yakṣyaḥ
mandraḥ yajiṣṭhaḥ adhvareṣu īḍyaḥ viprebhiḥ śukra manmabhiḥ
adrogham ā vahā uśataḥ yaviṣṭhya devāṁ ajasra vītaye
abhi prayāṃsi sudhitā vaso gahi mandasva dhītibhiḥ hitaḥ
tvam id saprathāḥ asi agne trātar _ kaviḥ
tvām viprāsaḥ samidhāna dīdivas ā vivāsanti vedhasaḥ
śoca śociṣṭha dīdihi viśe mayaḥ rāsva stotre mahāṁ asi
devānām śarman mama santu sūrayaḥ śatrūṣāhaḥ su agnayaḥ
yathā cit vṛddham atasam agne saṃjūrvasi kṣami
eva daha mitra mahas yaḥ asmadhruk durmanmā kaḥ ca venati
mā naḥ martāya ripave rakṣasvine mā agha śaṃsāya rīradhaḥ
a sredhadbhiḥ taraṇibhiḥ yaviṣṭhya śivebhiḥ pāhi pāyubhiḥ
pāhi naḥ agne ekayā pāhi uta dvitīyayā
pāhi gīrbhiḥ tisṛbhiḥ ūrjām pate pāhi catasṛbhiḥ vaso
pāhi viśvasmāt rakṣasaḥ arāvṇaḥ pra sma vājeṣu naḥ ava
tvām id hi nediṣṭham devatātaye āpim nakṣāmahe vṛdhe
ā naḥ agne vayaḥ vṛdham rayim pāvaka śaṃsyam
rāsvā ca naḥ upamāte puruspṛham su nītī sva yaśastaram
yena vaṃsāma pṛtanāsu śardhataḥ tarantaḥ aryaḥ ādiśaḥ
sa tvam naḥ vardha prayasā śacī vaso jinva dhiyaḥ vasu vidaḥ
śiśānaḥ vṛṣabhaḥ yathā agniḥ śṛṅge davidhvat
tigmāḥ asya hanavaḥ na pratidhṛṣe su jambhaḥ sahasaḥ yahuḥ
nahi te agne vṛṣabha pratidhṛṣe jambhāsaḥ yat vitiṣṭhase
sa tvam naḥ hotar su hutam haviḥ kṛdhi vaṃsva naḥ vāryā puru
śeṣe vaneṣu mātroḥ sam tvā martāsaḥ indhate
atandraḥ havyā vahasi haviṣkṛtaḥ āt id deveṣu rājasi
sapta hotāraḥ tam id īḍate tvā agne su tyajam ahrayam
bhinatsi adrim tapasā vi śociṣā pra agne tiṣṭha janāṁ ati
agnim agnim vaḥ adhrigum huvema vṛkta barhiṣaḥ
agnim hita prayasaḥ śaśvatīṣu ā hotāram carṣaṇīnām
ketena śarman sacate suṣāmaṇi agne tubhyam cikitvanā
iṣaṇyayā naḥ puru rūpam ā bhara vājam nediṣṭham ūtaye
agne jaritar viśpatiḥ tepānaḥ deva rakṣasaḥ
a proṣivān gṛhapatiḥ mahāṁ asi divaḥ pāyuḥ duroṇayuḥ
mā naḥ rakṣaḥ ā veśīt āghṛṇīvaso mā yātuḥ yātumāvatām
parogavyūtī anirām apa kṣudham agne sedha rakṣasvinaḥ
ubhayam śṛṇavat ca naḥ indraḥ arvāk idam vacaḥ
satrācyā maghavā soma pītaye dhiyā śaviṣṭhaḥ ā gamat
tam hi sva rājam vṛṣabham tam ojase dhiṣaṇe niṣṭatakṣatuḥ
uta upamānām prathamaḥ ni sīdasi soma kāmam hi te manaḥ
ā vṛṣasva purūvaso sutasya indra andhasaḥ
vidma hi tvā harivas pṛtsu sāsahim adhṛṣṭam cit dadhṛṣvaṇim
aprāmi satya maghavan tathā id asat indra kratvā yathā vaśaḥ
sanema vājam tava śiprin avasā makṣū cit yantaḥ adrivas
śagdhi u su śacīpate indra viśvābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
bhagam na hi tvā yaśasam vasu vidam anu śūra carāmasi
pauraḥ aśvasya puru kṛt gavām asi utsaḥ deva hiraṇyayaḥ
nakir hi dānam parimardhiṣat tve yat yat yāmi tat ā bhara
tvam hi ehi cerave vida bhagam vasuttaye
ud vāvṛṣasva maghavan gaviṣṭaye ud indra aśvamiṣṭaye
tvam purū sahasrāṇi śatāni ca yūthā dānāya maṃhase
ā purandaram cakṛma vipra vacasaḥ indram gāyantaḥ avase
a vipraḥ vā yat avidhat vipraḥ vā indra te vacaḥ
sa pra mamandat tvāyā śatakrato prācāmanyo ahaṃsana
ugra bāhuḥ mrakṣa kṛtvā purandaraḥ yadi me śṛṇavat havam
vasūyavaḥ vasu patim śatakratum stomaiḥ indram havāmahe
na pāpāsaḥ manāmahe na arāyāsaḥ na jaḍhavaḥ
yat id nu indram vṛṣaṇam sacā sute sakhāyam kṛṇavāmahai
ugram yuyujma pṛtanāsu sāsahim ṛṇakātim adābhyam
veda bhṛmam cit sanitā rathītamaḥ vājinam yam id u naśat
yatas indra bhayāmahe tatas naḥ abhayam kṛdhi
maghavan śagdhi tava tat naḥ ūtibhiḥ vi dviṣaḥ vi mṛdhaḥ jahi
tvam hi rādhaspate rādhasaḥ mahaḥ kṣayasya asi vidhataḥ
tam tvā vayam maghavan indra girvaṇaḥ sutāvantaḥ havāmahe
indra spaś uta vṛtrahā paraspāḥ naḥ vareṇyaḥ
sa naḥ rakṣiṣat caramam sa madhyamam sa paścāt pātu naḥ puras
tvam naḥ paścāt adharāt uttarāt puras indra ni pāhi viśvatas
āre asmat kṛṇuhi daivyam bhayam āre hetīḥ adevīḥ
adya adya śvas śvas indra trāsva pare ca naḥ
viśvā ca naḥ jaritṝn satpate ahā divā naktam ca rakṣiṣaḥ
prabhaṅgī śūraḥ maghavā tuvīmaghaḥ sammiślaḥ vīryāya kam
ubhā te bāhū vṛṣaṇā śatakrato ni yā vajram mimikṣatuḥ
pra u asmai upastutim bharata yat jujoṣati
ukthaiḥ indrasya māhinam vayaḥ vardhanti sominaḥ bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
ayujaḥ asamaḥ nṛbhiḥ ekaḥ kṛṣṭīḥ ayāsyaḥ
pūrvīḥ ati pra vāvṛdhe viśvā jātāni ojasā bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
a hitena cit arvatā jīra dānuḥ siṣāsati
pravācyam indra tat tava vīryāṇi kariṣyataḥ bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
ā yāhi kṛṇavāma te indra brahmāṇi vardhanā
yebhiḥ śaviṣṭha cākanaḥ bhadram iha śravasyate bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
dhṛṣataḥ cit dhṛṣat manaḥ kṛṇoṣi indra yat tvam
tīvraiḥ somaiḥ saparyataḥ namobhiḥ pratibhūṣataḥ bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
ava caṣṭe ṛcīṣamaḥ avatāṁ iva mānuṣaḥ
juṣṭvī dakṣasya sominaḥ sakhāyam kṛṇute yujam bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
viśve te indra vīryam devāḥ anu kratum daduḥ
bhuvaḥ viśvasya gopatiḥ puruṣṭuta bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
gṛṇe tat indra te śavaḥ upamam devatātaye
yat haṃsi vṛtram ojasā śacīpate bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
samanā iva vapuṣyataḥ kṛṇavat mānuṣā yugā
vide tat indraḥ cetanam adha śrutaḥ bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
ud jātam indra te śavaḥ ud tvām ud tava kratum
bhūrigo bhūri vāvṛdhuḥ maghavan tava śarmaṇi bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
aham ca tvam ca vṛtrahan sam yujyāva sanibhyaḥ ā
arātīvā cit adrivas anu nau śūra maṃsate bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
satyam id vai u tam vayam indram stavāma na anṛtam
mahāṁ a sunvataḥ vadhaḥ bhūri jyotīṃṣi sunvataḥ bhadrāḥ indrasya rātayaḥ
sa pūrvyaḥ mahānām venaḥ kratubhiḥ ānaje
yasya dvārā manuḥ pitā deveṣu dhiyaḥ ānaje
divaḥ mānam na ud sadan soma pṛṣṭhāsaḥ adrayaḥ
ukthā brahma ca śaṃsyā
sa vidvāṁ aṅgirobhyaḥ indraḥ gāḥ avṛṇot apa
stuṣe tat asya pauṃsyam
sa pratnathā kavi vṛdhaḥ indraḥ vākasya vakṣaṇiḥ
śivaḥ arkasya homani asmatrā gantu avase
āt u nu te anu kratum svāhā varasya yajyavaḥ
śvātram arkāḥ anūṣata indra gotrasya dāvane
indre viśvāni vīryā kṛtāni kartvāni ca
yam arkāḥ adhvaram viduḥ
yat pāñcajanyayā viśā indre ghoṣāḥ asṛkṣata
astṛṇāt barhaṇā vipaḥ aryaḥ mānasya sa kṣayaḥ
iyam u te anuṣṭutiḥ cakṛṣe tāni pauṃsyā
prāvaḥ cakrasya vartanim
asya vṛṣṇaḥ vi odane uru kramiṣṭa jīvase
yavam na paśve ā dade
tat dadhānāḥ avasyavaḥ yuṣmābhiḥ dakṣa pitaraḥ
syāma marutvataḥ vṛdhe
baṭ ṛtviyāya dhāmnaḥ ṛkvabhiḥ śūra nonumaḥ
jeṣāma indra tvayā yujā
asme rudrāḥ mehanā parvatāsaḥ vṛtra hatye bhara hūtau sajoṣāḥ
yaḥ śaṃsate stuvate dhāyi pajraḥ indra jyeṣṭhāḥ asmāṁ avantu devāḥ
ud tvā mandantu stomāḥ kṛṇuṣva rādhaḥ adrivas
ava brahma dviṣaḥ jahi
padā paṇīṃr arādhasaḥ ni bādhasva mahāṁ asi
nahi tvā kaścana prati
tvam īśiṣe sutānām indra tvam a sutānām
tvam rājā janānām
ehi prehi kṣayaḥ divi āghoṣan carṣaṇīnām
ā ubhe pṛṇāsi rodasī
tyam cit parvatam girim śatavantam sahasriṇam
vi stotṛbhyaḥ rurojitha
vayam u tvā divā sute vayam naktam havāmahe
asmākam kāmam ā pṛṇa
kva sya vṛṣabhaḥ yuvā tuvi grīvaḥ an ānataḥ
brahmā kaḥ tam saparyati
kasya svid savanam vṛṣā jujuṣvāṁ ava gacchati
indram kaḥ u svid ā cake
kam te dānā asakṣata vṛtrahan kam su vīryā
ukthe kaḥ u svid antamaḥ
ayam te mānuṣe jane somaḥ pūruṣu sūyate
tasya ihi pra drava piba
ayam te śaryaṇāvati suṣomāyām adhi priyaḥ
ārjīkīye madintamaḥ
tam adya rādhase mahe cārum madāya ghṛṣvaye
ehi im indra drava piba
yat indra prāk apāk udak nyak vā hūyase nṛbhiḥ
ā yāhi tūyam āśubhiḥ
yat vā prasravaṇe divaḥ mādayāse svarṇare
yat vā samudre andhasaḥ
ā tvā gīrbhiḥ mahām urum huve gām iva bhojase
indra somasya pītaye
ā te indra mahimānam harayaḥ deva te mahaḥ
rathe vahantu bibhrataḥ
indra gṛṇīṣe u stuṣe mahāṁ ugraḥ īśāna kṛt
ehi naḥ sutam piba
sutāvantaḥ tvā vayam prayasvantaḥ havāmahe
idam naḥ barhiḥ āsade
yat cit hi śaśvatām asi indra sādhāraṇaḥ tvam
tam tvā vayam havāmahe
idam te somyam madhu adhukṣan adribhiḥ naraḥ
juṣāṇaḥ indra tat piba
viśvān aryaḥ vipaścitaḥ ati khyaḥ tūyam ā gahi
asme dhehi śravaḥ bṛhat
dātā me pṛṣatīnām rājā hiraṇyavīnām
mā devāḥ maghavā riṣat
sahasre pṛṣatīnām adhi ścandram bṛhat pṛthu
śukram hiraṇyam ā dade
napātaḥ durgahasya me sahasreṇa su rādhasaḥ
śravaḥ deveṣu akrata
tarobhiḥ vaḥ vidadvasum indram sabādhas ūtaye
bṛhat gāyantaḥ suta some adhvare huve bharam na kāriṇam
na yam dudhrāḥ varante na sthirāḥ muraḥ made su śipram andhasaḥ
yaḥ ādṛtya śaśamānāya sunvate dātā jaritre ukthyam
yaḥ śakraḥ mṛkṣaḥ aśvyaḥ yaḥ vā kījaḥ hiraṇyayaḥ
saḥ ūrvasya rejayati apāvṛtim indraḥ gavyasya vṛtrahā
nikhātam cit yaḥ puru saṃbhṛtam vasu ud id vapati dāśuṣe
vajrī su śipraḥ haryaśvaḥ id karat indraḥ kratvā yathā vaśat
yat vāvantha puruṣṭuta purā cit śūra nṛṇām
vayam tat te indra sam bharāmasi yajñam uktham turam vacaḥ
sacā someṣu puruhūta vajrivas madāya dyukṣa soma pāḥ
tvam id hi brahma kṛte kāmyam vasu deṣṭhaḥ sunvate bhuvaḥ
vayam enam idā hyas apīpema iha vajriṇam
tasmai u adya samanā sutam bhara nūnam bhūṣata śrute
vṛkaḥ cit asya vāraṇaḥ urāmathiḥ ā vayuneṣu bhūṣati
sa imam naḥ stomam jujuṣāṇaḥ ā gahi indra pra citrayā dhiyā
kad u nu asya a kṛtam indrasya asti pauṃsyam
kena u nu kam śromatena na śuśruve januṣaḥ pari vṛtrahā
kad u mahīḥ adhṛṣṭāḥ asya taviṣīḥ kad u vṛtra ghnā u astṛtam
indraḥ viśvān bekanāṭāṁ ahardṛśaḥ uta kratvā paṇīṃr abhi
vayam gha te apūrvya indra brahmāṇi vṛtrahan
purūtamāsaḥ puruhūta vajrivas bhṛtim na pra bharāmasi
pūrvīḥ cit hi tve tuvikūrmin āśasaḥ havante indrā ūtayaḥ
tiras cit aryaḥ savanā vaso gahi śaviṣṭha śrudhi me havam
vayam gha te tve id u indra viprāḥ api smasi
nahi tvat anyaḥ puruhūta kaścana maghavan asti marḍitā
tvam naḥ asyāḥ amateḥ uta kṣudhaḥ abhiśasteḥ ava spṛdhi
tvam naḥ ūtī tava citrayā dhiyā śikṣa śaciṣṭha gātu vid
somaḥ id vaḥ sutaḥ astu kalayaḥ mā bibhītana
apa id eṣa dhvasmā ayati svayam gha eṣaḥ apāyati
tyān nu kṣatriyāṁ ava ādityān yāciṣāmahe
su mṛﾱīkāṁ abhiṣṭaye
mitraḥ naḥ ati aṃhatim varuṇaḥ parṣat aryamā
ādityāsaḥ yathā viduḥ
teṣām hi citram ukthyam varūtham asti dāśuṣe
ādityānām araṅkṛte
mahi vaḥ mahatām avaḥ varuṇa mitra aryaman
avāṃsi ā vṛṇīmahe
jīvān naḥ abhi dhetana ādityāsaḥ purā hathāt
kad ha stha havana śrutaḥ
yat vaḥ śrāntāya sunvate varūtham asti yat chardiḥ
tena naḥ adhi vocata
asti devāḥ aṃhoḥ uru asti ratnam anāgasaḥ
ādityāḥ adbhuta enasaḥ
mā naḥ setuḥ siṣet ayam mahe vṛṇaktu naḥ pari
indraḥ id hi śrutaḥ vaśī
mā naḥ mṛcā ripūṇām vṛjinānām aviṣyavaḥ
devāḥ abhi pra mṛkṣata
uta tvām adite mahī aham devi upa bruve
su mṛﾱīkām abhiṣṭaye
parṣi dīne gabhīre ām ugra putre jighāṃsataḥ
mākir tokasya naḥ riṣat
anehaḥ naḥ uru vraje urūci vi prasartave
kṛdhi tokāya jīvase
ye mūrdhānaḥ kṣitīnām adabdhāsaḥ sva yaśasaḥ
vratā rakṣante adruhaḥ
te naḥ āsnaḥ vṛkāṇām ādityāsaḥ mumocata
stenam baddham iva adite
apa u su naḥ iyam śaruḥ ādityāḥ apa durmatiḥ
asmat etu a jaghnuṣī
śaśvat hi vaḥ sudānavaḥ ādityāḥ ūtibhiḥ vayam
purā nūnam bubhujmahe
śaśvantam hi pracetasaḥ pratiyantam cit enasaḥ
devāḥ kṛṇutha jīvase
tat su naḥ navyam sanyase ādityāḥ yat mumocati
bandhāt baddham iva adite
na asmākam asti tat taraḥ ādityāsaḥ atiṣkade
yūyam asmabhyam mṛḍata
mā naḥ hetiḥ vivasvataḥ ādityāḥ kṛtrimā śaruḥ
purā nu jarasaḥ vadhīt
vi su dveṣaḥ vi aṃhatim ādityāsaḥ vi saṃhitam
viṣvak vi vṛhata rapaḥ
ā tvā ratham yathā ūtaye sumnāya vartayāmasi
tuvikūrmim ṛtīṣaham indra śaviṣṭha satpate
tuvi śuṣma tuvi krato śacīvas viśvayā mate
ā paprātha mahitvanā
yasya te mahinā mahaḥ pari jmāyantam īyatuḥ
hastā vajram hiraṇyayam
viśvānarasya vaḥ patim an ānatasya śavasaḥ
evaiḥ ca carṣaṇīnām ūtī huve rathānām
abhiṣṭaye sadāvṛdham svar mīḍheṣu yam naraḥ
nānā havante ūtaye
paromātram ṛcīṣamam indram ugram su rādhasam
īśānam cit vasūnām
tam tam id rādhase mahe indram codāmi pītaye
yaḥ pūrvyām anuṣṭutim īśe kṛṣṭīnām nṛtuḥ
na yasya te śavasāna sakhyam ānaṃśa martyaḥ
nakir śavāṃsi te naśat
tvotāsaḥ tvā yujā apsu sūrye mahat dhanam
jayema pṛtsu vajrivas
tam tvā yajñebhiḥ īmahe tam gīrbhiḥ girvaṇastama
indra yathā cit āvitha vājeṣu purumāyyam
yasya te svādu sakhyam svādvī praṇītiḥ adrivas
yajñaḥ vitantasāyyaḥ
uru naḥ tanve tane uru kṣayāya naḥ kṛdhi
uru naḥ yandhi jīvase
urum nṛbhyaḥ urum gave urum rathāya panthām
deva vītim manāmahe
upa mā ṣaṭ dvā dvā naraḥ somasya harṣyā
tiṣṭhanti svādu rātayaḥ
ṛjrau indrote ā dade harī ṛkṣasya sūnavi
āśvamedhasya rohitā
su rathāṁ ātithigve su abhīśūṃr ārkṣe
āśvamedhe supeśasaḥ
ṣaṣ aśvāṁ ātithigve indrote vadhūmataḥ
sacā pūtakratau sanam
ā eṣu cetat vṛṣaṇvatī antar ṛjreṣu aruṣī
su abhīśuḥ kaśāvatī
na yuṣme vāja bandhavaḥ ninitsuḥ cana martyaḥ
avadyam adhi dīdharat
pra pra vaḥ triṣṭubham iṣam mandat vīrāya indave
dhiyā vaḥ medha sātaye purandhyā vivāsati
nadam vaḥ odatīnām nadam yoyuvatīnām
patim vaḥ aghnyānām dhenūnām iṣudhyasi
tāḥ asya sūda dohasaḥ somam śrīṇanti pṛśnayaḥ
janman devānām viśaḥ triṣu ā rocane divaḥ
abhi pra go patim girā indram arca yathā vide
sūnum satyasya satpatim
ā harayaḥ sasṛjrire aruṣīḥ adhi barhiṣi
yatra abhi saṃnavāmahe
indrāya gāvaḥ āśiram duduhre vajriṇe madhu
yat sīm upahvare vidat
ud yat bradhnasya viṣṭapam gṛham indraḥ ca ganvahi
madhvaḥ pītvā sacevahi tris sapta sakhyuḥ pade
arcata prārcata priyamedhāsaḥ arcata
arcantu putrakāḥ uta puram na dhṛṣṇu arcata
ava svarāti gargaraḥ godhā pari saniṣvaṇat
piṅgā pari caniṣkadat indrāya brahma udyatam
ā yat patanti enyaḥ su dughāḥ an apasphuraḥ
apasphuram gṛbhāyata somam indrāya pātave
apāt indraḥ apāt agniḥ viśve devāḥ amatsata
varuṇe id iha kṣayat tam āpaḥ abhi anūṣata vatsam saṃśiśvarīḥ iva
su devaḥ asi varuṇa yasya te sapta sindhavaḥ
anukṣaranti kākudam sūrmyam suṣirām iva
yaḥ vyatīṃr aphāṇayat su yuktāṁ upa dāśuṣe
takvaḥ netā tat id vapuḥ upamā yaḥ amucyata
ati id u śakraḥ ohate indraḥ viśvāḥ ati dviṣaḥ
bhinat kanīnaḥ odanam pacyamānam paras girā
arbhakaḥ na kumārakaḥ adhi tiṣṭhat navam ratham
sa pakṣat mahiṣam mṛgam pitre mātre vibhu kratum
ā tu su śipra dampate ratham tiṣṭha hiraṇyayam
adha dyukṣam sacevahi sahasra pādam aruṣam svasti gām anehasam
tam gha īm itthā namasvinaḥ upa svarājam āsate
artham cit asya sudhitam yat etave āvartayanti dāvane
anu pratnasya okasaḥ priyamedhāsaḥ eṣām
pūrvām anu prayatim vṛkta barhiṣaḥ hita prayasaḥ āśata
yaḥ rājā carṣaṇīnām yātā rathebhiḥ adhriguḥ
viśvāsām tarutā pṛtanānām jyeṣṭhaḥ yaḥ vṛtra hā gṛṇe
indram tam śumbha puruhanman avase yasya dvitā vidhartari
hastāya vajraḥ prati dhāyi darśataḥ mahaḥ dive na sūryaḥ
nakir tam karmaṇā naśat yaḥ cakāra sadāvṛdham
indram na yajñaiḥ viśva gūrtam ṛbhvasam adhṛṣṭam dhṛṣṇu ojasam
aṣāḍham ugram pṛtanāsu sāsahim yasmin mahīḥ urujrayaḥ
sam dhenavaḥ jāyamāne anonavuḥ dyāvaḥ kṣāmaḥ anonavuḥ
yat dyāvaḥ indra te śatam śatam bhūmīḥ uta syuḥ
na tvā vajrin sahasram sūryāḥ anu na jātam aṣṭa rodasī
ā paprātha mahinā vṛṣṇyā vṛṣan viśvā śaviṣṭha śavasā
asmāṁ ava maghavan gomati vraje vajrin citrābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ
na sīm adevaḥ āpat iṣam dīrgha āyo martyaḥ
etagvā cit yaḥ etaśā yuyojate harī indraḥ yuyojate
tam vaḥ _ mahāyyam indram dānāya sakṣaṇim
yaḥ gādheṣu yaḥ āraṇeṣu havyaḥ vājeṣu asti havyaḥ
ud u su naḥ vaso mahe mṛśasva śūra rādhase
ud u su mahyai maghavan maghattaye ud indra śravase mahe
tvam naḥ indraḥ ṛtayuḥ tvānidaḥ ni tṛmpasi
madhye vasiṣva tuvi nṛmṇa ūrvoḥ ni dāsam śiśnathaḥ hathaiḥ
anya vratam a mānuṣam a yajvānam a devayum
ava svaḥ sakhā dudhuvīta parvataḥ su ghnāya dasyum parvataḥ
tvam naḥ indra āsām haste śaviṣṭha dāvane
dhānānām na sam gṛbhāya asmayuḥ dvis sam gṛbhāya asmayuḥ
sakhāyaḥ kratum icchata kathā rādhāma śarasya
upastutim bhojaḥ sūriḥ yaḥ ahrayaḥ
bhūribhiḥ samaha ṛṣibhiḥ barhiṣmadbhiḥ staviṣyase
yat ittham ekam ekam id śara vatsān parādadaḥ
karṇa gṛhya maghavā śauradevyaḥ vatsam naḥ tribhyaḥ ānayat
ajām sūriḥ na dhātave
tvam naḥ agne mahobhiḥ pāhi viśvasyāḥ arāteḥ
uta dviṣaḥ martyasya
nahi manyuḥ pauruṣeyaḥ īśe hi vaḥ priya jāta
tvam id asi kṣapāvān
sa naḥ viśvebhiḥ devebhiḥ ūrjaḥ napāt bhadra śoce
rayim dehi viśva vāram
na tam agne arātayaḥ martam yuvanta rāyaḥ
yam trāyase dāśvāṃsam
yam tvam vipra medha sātau agne hinoṣi dhanāya
sa tava ūtī goṣu gantā
tvam rayim puru vīram agne dāśuṣe martāya
pra naḥ naya vasyaḥ accha
uruṣya naḥ mā parā dāḥ aghāyate jātavedaḥ
durādhye martāya
agne mākir te devasya rātim adevaḥ yuyota
tvam īśiṣe vasūnām
sa naḥ vasvaḥ upa māsi ūrjaḥ napāt māhinasya
sakhe vaso jaritṛbhyaḥ
acchā naḥ śīra śociṣam giraḥ yantu darśatam
acchā yajñāsaḥ namasā purūvasum puru praśastam ūtaye
agnim sūnum sahasaḥ jātavedasam dānāya vāryāṇām
dvitā yaḥ bhūt amṛtaḥ martyeṣu ā hotā mandratamaḥ viśi
agnim vaḥ deva yajyayā agnim prayati adhvare
agnim dhīṣu prathamam agnim arvati agnim kṣaitrāya sādhase
agniḥ iṣām sakhye dadātu naḥ īśe yaḥ vāryāṇām
agnim toke tanaye śaśvat īmahe vasum santam tanū pām
agnim īḍiṣva avase gāthābhiḥ śīra śociṣam
agnim rāye purumīﾱha śrutam naraḥ agnim sudītaye chardiḥ
agnim dveṣaḥ yotavai naḥ gṛṇīmasi agnim śam yos ca dātave
viśvāsu vikṣu avitā iva havyaḥ bhuvat vastuḥ ṛṣūṇām
haviḥ kṛṇudhvam ā gamat adhvaryuḥ vanate punar
vidvāṁ asya praśāsanam
ni tigmam abhi aṃśum sīdat hotā manau adhi
juṣāṇaḥ asya sakhyam
antar icchanti tam jane rudram paras manīṣayā
gṛbhṇanti jihvayā sasam
jāmi atītape dhanuḥ vayodhāḥ aruhat vanam
dṛṣadam jihvayā avadhīt
caran vatsaḥ ruśan iha nidātāram na vindate
veti stotave ambyam
uta u nu asya yat mahat aśvāvat yojanam bṛhat
dāma rathasya dadṛśe
duhanti sapta ekām upa dvā pañca sṛjataḥ
tīrthe sindhoḥ adhi svare
ā daśabhiḥ vivasvataḥ indraḥ kośam acucyavīt
khedayā trivṛtā divaḥ
pari tri dhātuḥ adhvaram jūrṇiḥ eti navīyasī
madhvā hotāraḥ añjate
siñcanti namasā avatam uccācakram parijmānam
nīcīna bāram akṣitam
abhyāram id adrayaḥ niṣiktam puṣkare madhu
avatasya visarjane
gāvaḥ upāvata avatam mahī yajñasya rapsudā
ubhā karṇā hiraṇyayā
ā sute siñcata śriyam rodasyoḥ abhiśriyam
rasā dadhīta vṛṣabham
te jānata svam okyam sam vatsāsaḥ na mātṛbhiḥ
mithas nasanta jāmibhiḥ
upa srakveṣu bapsataḥ kṛṇvate dharuṇam divi
indre agnā namaḥ svar
adhukṣat pipyuṣīm iṣam ūrjam saptapadīm ariḥ
sūryasya sapta raśmibhiḥ
somasya mitrāvaruṇā uditā sūraḥ ā dade
tat āturasya bheṣajam
uta u nu asya yat padam haryatasya nidhānyam
pari dyām jihvayā atanat
ud īrāthām ṛtāyate yuñjāthām aśvinā ratham
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
nimiṣaḥ cit javīyasā rathena ā yātam aśvinā
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
upa stṛṇītam atraye himena gharmam aśvinā
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
kuha sthaḥ kuha jagmathuḥ kuha śyenā iva petathuḥ
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
yat adya karhi karhicit śuśrūyātam imam havam
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
aśvinā yāma hūtamā nediṣṭham yāmi āpyam
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
avantam atraye gṛham kṛṇutam yuvam aśvinā
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
varethe agnim ātapaḥ vadate valgū atraye
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
pra saptavadhriḥ āśasā dhārām agneḥ aśāyata
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
iha ā gatam vṛṣaṇvasū śṛṇutam me imam havam
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
kim idam vām purāṇa vat jaratoḥ iva śasyate
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
samānam vām sajātyam samānaḥ bandhuḥ aśvinā
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
yaḥ vām rajāṃsi aśvinā rathaḥ viyāti rodasī
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
ā naḥ gavyebhiḥ aśvyaiḥ sahasraiḥ upa gacchatam
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
mā naḥ gavyebhiḥ aśvyaiḥ sahasrebhiḥ ati khyatam
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
aruṇapsuḥ uṣāḥ abhūt akaḥ jyotiḥ ṛtāvarī
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
aśvinā su vicākaśat vṛkṣam paraśumāṁ iva
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
puram na dhṛṣṇo ā ruja kṛṣṇayā bādhitaḥ viśā
anti sat bhūtu vām avaḥ
viśaḥ viśaḥ vaḥ atithim vājayantaḥ puru priyam
agnim vaḥ duryam vacaḥ stuṣe śūṣasya manmabhiḥ
yam janāsaḥ haviṣmantaḥ mitram na sarpiḥ āsutim
praśaṃsanti praśastibhiḥ
panyāṃsam jātavedasam yaḥ devatāti udyatā
havyāni airayat divi
āganma vṛtra hantamam jyeṣṭham agnim ānavam
yasya śrutarvā bṛhan ārkṣaḥ anīke edhate
amṛtam jātavedasam tiras tamāṃsi darśatam
ghṛtāhavanam īḍyam
sabādhas yam janāḥ ime agnim havyebhiḥ īḍate
juhvānāsaḥ yata srucaḥ
iyam te navyasī matiḥ agne adhāyi asmat ā
mandra su jāta sukrato amūra dasma atithe
sā te agne śantamā caniṣṭhā bhavatu priyā
tayā vardhasva suṣṭutaḥ
sā dyumnaiḥ dyumninī bṛhat upa upa śravasi śravaḥ
dadhīta vṛtratūrye
aśvam id gām ratha prām tveṣam indram na sat patim
yasya śravāṃsi tūrvatha panyam panyam ca kṛṣṭayaḥ
yam tvā gopavanaḥ girā caniṣṭhat agne aṅgiraḥ
sa pāvaka śrudhī havam
yam tvā janāsaḥ īḍate sabādhas vājasātaye
sa bodhi vṛtratūrye
aham huvānaḥ ārkṣe śrutarvaṇi madacyuti
śardhāṃsi iva stukāvinām mṛkṣā śīrṣā caturṇām
mām catvāraḥ āśavaḥ śaviṣṭhasya dravitnavaḥ
su rathāsaḥ abhi prayaḥ vakṣan vayaḥ na tugryam
satyam id tvā _ paruṣṇi ava dediśam
na īm āpaḥ aśva dātaraḥ śaviṣṭhāt asti martyaḥ
yukṣvā hi deva hūtamāṁ aśvāṁ agne rathīḥ iva
ni hotā pūrvyaḥ sadaḥ
uta naḥ deva devāṁ acchā vocaḥ viduṣṭaraḥ
śrath viśvā vāryā kṛdhi
tvam ha yat yaviṣṭhya sahasaḥ sūno āhuta
ṛtāvā yajñiyaḥ bhuvaḥ
ayam agniḥ sahasriṇaḥ vājasya śatinaḥ patiḥ
mūrdhā kaviḥ rayīṇām
tam nemim ṛbhavaḥ yathā namasva sahūtibhiḥ
nedīyaḥ yajñam aṅgiraḥ
tasmai nūnam abhidyave vācā virūpa nityayā
vṛṣṇe codasva suṣṭutim
kam u svid asya senayā agneḥ apāka cakṣasaḥ
paṇim goṣu starāmahe
mā naḥ devānām viśaḥ prasnātīḥ iva usrāḥ
kṛśam na hāsuḥ aghnyāḥ
mā naḥ samasya dūḍhyaḥ paridveṣasaḥ aṃhatiḥ
ūrmiḥ na nāvam ā vadhīt
namaḥ te agne ojase gṛṇanti deva kṛṣṭayaḥ
amaiḥ amitram ardaya
kuvid su naḥ gaviṣṭaye agne saṃveṣiṣaḥ rayim
uru kṛt uru naḥ kṛdhi
mā naḥ asmin mahā dhane parā vark bhāra bhṛt yathā
saṃvargam sam rayim jaya
anyam asmat bhiyai iyam agne siṣaktu ducchunā
vardha naḥ amavat śavaḥ
yasya ajuṣat namasvinaḥ śamīm adurmakhasya vā
tam gha id agniḥ vṛdhā avati
parasyāḥ adhi saṃvataḥ avarāṁ abhi ā tara
yatra aham asmi tāṁ ava
vidma hi te purā vayam agne pituḥ yathā avasaḥ
adha te sumnam īmahe
imam nu māyinam huve indram īśānam ojasā
marutvantam na vṛñjase
ayam indraḥ marut sakhā vi vṛtrasya abhinat śiraḥ
vajreṇa śata parvaṇā
vāvṛdhānaḥ marut sakhā indraḥ vi vṛtram airayat
sṛjan samudriyāḥ apaḥ
ayam ha yena vai idam svar marutvatā jitam
indreṇa soma pītaye
marutvantam ṛjīṣiṇam ojasvantam virapśinam
indram gīrbhiḥ havāmahe
indram pratnena manmanā marutvantam havāmahe
asya somasya pītaye
marutvāṁ indra mīḍhvaḥ piba somam śatakrato
asmin yajñe puruṣṭuta
tubhya id indra marutvate sutāḥ somāsaḥ adrivas
hṛdā hūyante ukthinaḥ
pibet indra marut sakhā sutam somam diviṣṭiṣu
vajram śiśānaḥ ojasā
uttiṣṭhan ojasā saha pītvī śipre avepayaḥ
somam indra camū sutam
anu tvā rodasī ubhe krakṣamāṇam akṛpetām
indra yat dasyu hā abhavaḥ
vācam aṣṭāpadīm aham nava sraktim ṛta spṛśam
indrāt pari tanvam mame
jajñānaḥ nu śatakratuḥ vi pṛcchat iti mātaram
ke ugrāḥ ke ha śṛṇvire
āt īm śavasī abravīt aurṇavābham ahīśuvam
te putra santu niṣṭuraḥ
sam id tān vṛtrahā akhidat khe arāṁ iva khedayā
pravṛddhaḥ dasyu hā abhavat
ekayā pratidhā apibat sākam sarāṃsi triṃśatam
indraḥ somasya kāṇukā
abhi gandharvam atṛṇat abudhneṣu rajassu ā
indraḥ brahmabhyaḥ id vṛdhe
niḥ āvidhyat giribhyaḥ ā dhārayat pakvam odanam
indraḥ bundam su ātatam
śata bradhnaḥ iṣuḥ tava sahasra parṇaḥ ekaḥ id
yam indra cakṛṣe yujam
tena stotṛbhyaḥ ā bhara nṛbhyaḥ nāribhyaḥ attave
sadyas jātaḥ ṛbhuṣṭhira
etā cyautnāni te kṛtā varṣiṣṭhāni parīṇasā
hṛdā vīḍū adhārayaḥ
viśvā id tā viṣṇuḥ ābharat uru kramaḥ tvā iṣitaḥ
śatam mahiṣān kṣīra pākam odanam varāham indraḥ emuṣam
tuvikṣam te su kṛtam sūmayam dhanuḥ sādhuḥ bundaḥ hiraṇyayaḥ
ubhā te bāhū raṇyā su saṃskṛte ṛdūpe cit ṛdūvṛdhā
puroﾱāśam naḥ andhasaḥ indra sahasram ā bhara
śatā ca śūra gonām
ā naḥ bhara vyañjanam gām aśvam abhyañjanam
sacā manā hiraṇyayā
uta naḥ karṇa śobhanā purūṇi dhṛṣṇo ā bhara
tvam hi śṛṇviṣe vaso
nakīm vṛdhīkaḥ indra te na su sāḥ na su dāḥ uta
na anyaḥ tvat śūra vāghataḥ
nakīm indraḥ nikartave na śakraḥ pariśaktave
viśvam śṛṇoti paśyati
sa manyum martyānām adabdhaḥ ni cikīṣate
purā nidaḥ cikīṣate
kratvaḥ id pūrṇam udaram turasya asti vidhataḥ
vṛtra ghnaḥ soma pāvnaḥ
tve vasūni saṃgatā viśvā ca soma saubhagā
su dātu a parihvṛtā
tvām id yavayuḥ mama kāmaḥ gavyuḥ hiraṇyayuḥ
tvām aśvayuḥ eṣate
tava id indra aham āśasā haste dātram cana ā dade
dinasya vā maghavan saṃbhṛtasya vā pūrdhi yavasya kāśinā
ayam kṛtnuḥ a gṛbhītaḥ viśva jit udbhid id somaḥ
ṛṣiḥ vipraḥ kāvyena
abhi ūrṇoti yat nagnam _ viśvam yat turam
pra īm andhaḥ khyat niḥ śroṇaḥ bhūt
tvam soma tanū kṛdbhyaḥ dveṣobhyaḥ anya kṛtebhyaḥ
uru yantāsi varūtham
tvam cittī tava dakṣaiḥ divaḥ ā pṛthivyāḥ ṛjīṣin
yāvīḥ aghasya cit dveṣaḥ
arthinaḥ yanti ced artham gacchān id daduṣaḥ rātim
vavṛjyuḥ tṛṣyataḥ kāmam
vidat yat pūrvyam naṣṭam ud īm ṛtāyum īrayat
pra īm āyuḥ tārīt a tīrṇam
su śevaḥ naḥ mṛḍayākuḥ a dṛpta kratuḥ a vātaḥ
bhava naḥ soma śam hṛde
mā naḥ soma sam vīvijaḥ mā vi bībhiṣathāḥ rājan
mā naḥ hārdi tviṣā vadhīḥ
ava yat sve sadhasthe devānām durmatīḥ īkṣe
rājan apa dviṣaḥ sedha mīḍhvaḥ apa sridhaḥ sedha
nahi anyam baḍā akaram marḍitāram śatakrato
tvam naḥ indra mṛḍaya
yaḥ naḥ śaśvat purā āvitha amṛdhraḥ vājasātaye
sa tvam naḥ indra mṛḍaya
kim aṅga radhra codanaḥ sunvānasya avitā id asi
kuvid su indra naḥ śakaḥ
indra pra naḥ ratham ava paścāt cit santam adrivas
purastāt enam me kṛdhi
hanta u nu kim āsase prathamam naḥ ratham kṛdhi
upamam vājayu śravaḥ
ava naḥ vājayum ratham sukaram te kim id pari
asmān su jigyuṣaḥ kṛdhi
indra dṛhyasva pūḥ asi bhadrā te eti niṣkṛtam
iyam dhīḥ ṛtviyāvatī
mā sīm avadye ā bhāk urvī kāṣṭhā hitam dhanam
apāvṛktāḥ aratnayaḥ
turīyam nāma yajñiyam yadā karaḥ tat uśmasi
āt id patiḥ naḥ ohase
avīvṛdhat vaḥ amṛtāḥ amandīt ekadyūḥ devāḥ uta yāḥ ca devīḥ
tasmai u rādhaḥ kṛṇuta praśastam prātar makṣū dhiyāvasuḥ jagamyāt
ā tu naḥ indra kṣumantam citram grābham sam gṛbhāya
mahā hastī dakṣiṇena
vidma hi tvā tuvikūrmim tuvi deṣṇam tuvīmagham
tuvimātram avobhiḥ
nahi tvā śūra devāḥ na martāsaḥ ditsantam
bhīmam na gām vārayante

an āyudhāsaḥ asurāḥ a devāḥ cakreṇa tāṁ apa vapa ṛjīṣin
mahe ugrāya tavase suvṛktim preraya śivatamāya paśvaḥ
gir vāhase giraḥ indrāya pūrvīḥ dhehi tanve kuvid aṅga vedat
uktha vāhase vibhve manīṣām druṇā na pāram īraya nadīnām
ni spṛśa dhiyā tanvi śrutasya juṣṭatarasya kuvid aṅga vedat
tat viviḍḍhi yat te indraḥ jujoṣat stuhi suṣṭutim namasā vivāsa
upa bhūṣa jaritar mā ruvaṇyaḥ śrāvaya vācam kuvid aṅga vedat
ava drapsaḥ aṃśumatīm atiṣṭhat iyānaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ daśabhiḥ sahasraiḥ
āvat tam indraḥ śacyā dhamantam apa snehitīḥ nṛmaṇāḥ adhatta
drapsam apaśyam viṣuṇe carantam upahvare nadyaḥ aṃśumatyāḥ
nabhaḥ na kṛṣṇam avatasthivāṃsam iṣyāmi vaḥ vṛṣaṇaḥ yudhyata ājau
adha drapsaḥ aṃśumatyāḥ upasthe adhārayat tanvam titviṣāṇaḥ
viśaḥ adevīḥ abhi ācarantīḥ bṛhaspatinā yujā indraḥ sasāhe
tvam ha tyad saptabhyaḥ jāyamānaḥ aśatrubhyaḥ abhavaḥ śatruḥ indra
gūḍhe dyāvāpṛthivī anu avindaḥ vibhumadbhyaḥ bhuvanebhyaḥ raṇam dhāḥ
tvam ha tyad a pratimānam ojaḥ vajreṇa vajrin dhṛṣitaḥ jaghantha
tvam śuṣṇasya avātiraḥ vadhatraiḥ tvam gāḥ indra śacyā id avindaḥ
tvam ha tyad vṛṣabha carṣaṇīnām ghanaḥ vṛtrāṇām taviṣaḥ babhūtha
tvam sindhūṃr asṛjaḥ tastabhānān tvam apaḥ ajayaḥ dāsa patnīḥ
sa su kratuḥ raṇitā yaḥ suteṣu anutta manyuḥ yaḥ ahā iva revān
yaḥ ekaḥ id nari apāṃsi kartā sa vṛtrahā prati id anyam āhuḥ
sa vṛtrahā indraḥ carṣaṇī dhṛt tam suṣṭutyā havyam huvema
sa prāvitā maghavā naḥ adhivaktā sa vājasya śravasyasya dātā
sa vṛtrahā indraḥ ṛbhukṣāḥ sadyas jajñānaḥ havyaḥ babhūva
kṛṇvan apāṃsi naryā purūṇi somaḥ na pītaḥ havyaḥ sakhibhyaḥ
yāḥ indra bhujaḥ ābharaḥ svarvāṁ asurebhyaḥ
stotāram id maghavan asya vardhaya ye ca tve vṛkta barhiṣaḥ
yam indra dadhiṣe tvam aśvam gām bhāgam avyayam
yajamāne sunvati dakṣiṇāvati tasmin tam dhehi mā paṇau
yaḥ indra sasti avrataḥ anuṣvāpam a devayuḥ
svaiḥ sa evaiḥ mumurat poṣyam rayim sanutar dhehi tam tatas
yat śakra asi parāvati yat arvāvati vṛtrahan
atas tvā gīrbhiḥ dyugat indra keśibhiḥ sutāvāṁ ā vivāsati
yat vā asi rocane divaḥ samudrasya adhi viṣṭapi
yat pārthive sadane vṛtra hantama yat antarikṣe ā gahi
sa naḥ someṣu soma pāḥ suteṣu śavasaḥ pate

mā naḥ indra parā vṛṇak bhava naḥ sadhamādyaḥ
tvam naḥ ūtī tvam id naḥ āpyam mā naḥ indra parā vṛṇak
asme indra sacā sute ni sada pītaye madhu

kratvā variṣṭham vare āmurim uta ugram ojiṣṭham tavasam tarasvinam

maṃhiṣṭhaḥ gīrbhiḥ ā ca yajñiyaḥ vavartat rāye naḥ viśvā su pathā kṛṇotu vajrī

tasmai sarasvatī duhe kṣīram sarpiḥ madhu udakam
pra devam acchā madhumantaḥ indavaḥ asiṣyadanta gāvaḥ ā na dhenavaḥ
barhiṣadaḥ vacanāvantaḥ ūdhabhiḥ parisrutam usriyāḥ nirṇijam dhire
sa roruvat abhi pūrvāḥ acikradat upāruhaḥ śrathayan svādate hariḥ
tiras pavitram pariyan uru jrayaḥ ni śaryāṇi dadhate devaḥ ā varam
vi yaḥ mame yamyā saṃyatī madaḥ sākaṃvṛdhā payasā pinvat akṣitā
mahī apāre rajasī vivevidat abhivrajan akṣitam pājaḥ ā dade
sa mātarā vicaran vājayan apaḥ pra medhiraḥ svadhayā pinvate padam
aṃśuḥ yavena pipiśe yataḥ nṛbhiḥ sam jāmibhiḥ nasate rakṣate śiraḥ
sam dakṣeṇa manasā jāyate kaviḥ ṛtasya garbhaḥ nihitaḥ yamā paras
yūnā ha santā prathamam vi jajñatuḥ guhā hitam janima nemam udyatam
mandrasya rūpam vividuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ śyenaḥ yat andhaḥ abharat parāvataḥ
tam marjayanta suvṛdham nadīṣu ām uśantam aṃśum pariyantam ṛgmiyam
tvām mṛjanti daśa yoṣaṇaḥ sutam soma ṛṣibhiḥ matibhiḥ dhītibhiḥ hitam
avyaḥ vārebhiḥ uta deva hūtibhiḥ nṛbhiḥ yataḥ vājam ā darṣi sātaye
pariprayantam vayyam suṣaṃsadam somam manīṣāḥ abhi anūṣata stubhaḥ
yaḥ dhārayā madhumāṁ ūrmiṇā divaḥ iyarti vācam rayiṣāh amartyaḥ
ayam divaḥ iyarti viśvam ā rajaḥ somaḥ punānaḥ kalaśeṣu sīdati
adbhiḥ gobhiḥ mṛjyate adribhiḥ sutaḥ punānaḥ induḥ varivaḥ vidat priyam
eva naḥ soma pariṣicyamānaḥ vayaḥ dadhat citratamam pavasva
a dveṣe dyāvāpṛthivī huvema devāḥ dhatta rayim asme su vīram
iṣuḥ na dhanvan prati dhīyate matiḥ vatsaḥ na mātuḥ upa sarji ūdhani
uru dhārā iva duhe agre āyatī asya vrateṣu api somaḥ iṣyate
upa u matiḥ pṛcyate sicyate madhu mandrājanī codate antar āsani
pavamānaḥ saṃtaniḥ praghnatām iva madhumān drapsaḥ pari vāram arṣati
avye vadhūyuḥ pavate pari tvaci śrathnīte naptīḥ aditeḥ ṛtam yate
hariḥ akrān yajataḥ saṃyataḥ madaḥ nṛmṇā śiśānaḥ mahiṣaḥ na śobhate
ukṣā mimāti prati yanti dhenavaḥ devasya devīḥ upa yanti niṣkṛtam
ati akramīt arjunam vāram avyayam atkam na niktam pari somaḥ avyata
amṛktena ruśatā vāsasā hariḥ amartyaḥ nirṇijānaḥ pari vyata
divaḥ pṛṣṭham barhaṇā nirṇije kṛta upastaraṇam camvoḥ nabhasmayam
sūryasya iva raśmayaḥ drāvayitnavaḥ matsarāsaḥ prasupaḥ sākam īrate
tantum tatam pari sargāsaḥ āśavaḥ na indrāt ṛte pavate dhāma kiṃcana
sindhoḥ iva pravaṇe nimne āśavaḥ vṛṣa cyutāḥ madāsaḥ gātum āśata
śam naḥ niveśe dvipade catuṣpade asme vājāḥ soma tiṣṭhantu kṛṣṭayaḥ
ā naḥ pavasva vasumat hiraṇyavat aśvāvat gomat yavamat su vīryam
yūyam hi soma pitaraḥ mama sthana divaḥ mūrdhānaḥ prasthitāḥ vayaskṛtaḥ
ete somāḥ pavamānāsaḥ indram rathāḥ iva pra yayuḥ sātim accha
sutāḥ pavitram ati yanti avyam hitvī vavrim haritaḥ vṛṣṭim accha
indo indrāya bṛhate pavasva su mṛﾱīkaḥ anavadyaḥ riśādāḥ
_ candrāṇi gṛṇate vasūni devaiḥ dyāvāpṛthivī prāvatam naḥ
tris asmai sapta dhenavaḥ duduhre satyām āśiram pūrvye vyomani
catvāri anyā bhuvanāni nirṇije cārūṇi cakre yat ṛtaiḥ avardhata
sa bhikṣamāṇaḥ amṛtasya cāruṇaḥ ubhe dyāvā kāvyena vi śaśrathe
tejiṣṭhāḥ apaḥ maṃhanā pari vyata yadi devasya śravasā sadaḥ viduḥ
te asya santu ketavaḥ amṛtyavaḥ adābhyāsaḥ januṣī ubhe anu
yebhiḥ nṛmṇā ca devyā ca punate āt id rājānam mananāḥ agṛbhṇata
sa mṛjyamānaḥ daśabhiḥ su karmabhiḥ pra madhyamāsu mātṛṣu prame sacā
vratāni pānaḥ amṛtasya cāruṇaḥ ubhe nṛ cakṣāḥ anu paśyate viśau
sa marmṛjānaḥ indriyāya dhāyase ā ubhe antar rodasī harṣate hitaḥ
vṛṣā śuṣmeṇa bādhate vi durmatīḥ ādediśānaḥ śaryahā iva śurudhaḥ
sa mātarā na dadṛśānaḥ usriyaḥ nānadat eti marutām iva svanaḥ
jānan ṛtam prathamam yat svarṇaram praśastaye kam avṛṇīta su kratuḥ
ruvati bhīmaḥ vṛṣabhaḥ taviṣyayā śṛṅge śiśānaḥ hariṇī vicakṣaṇaḥ
ā yonim somaḥ su kṛtam ni sīdati gavyayī tvac bhavati nirṇij avyayī
śuciḥ punānaḥ tanvam arepasam avye hariḥ ni adhāviṣṭa sānavi
juṣṭaḥ mitrāya varuṇāya vāyave tri dhātu madhu kriyate sukarmabhiḥ
pavasva soma deva vītaye vṛṣā indrasya hārdi soma dhānam ā viśa
purā naḥ bādhāt duritā ati pāraya kṣetra vid hi diśaḥ āha vipṛcchate
hitaḥ na saptiḥ abhi vājam arṣa indrasya indo jaṭharam ā pavasva
nāvā na sindhum ati parṣi vidvān śūraḥ na yudhyan ava naḥ nidaḥ spaḥ
ā dakṣiṇā sṛjyate śuṣmī āsadam veti druhaḥ rakṣasaḥ pāti jāgṛviḥ
hariḥ opaśam kṛṇute nabhaḥ payaḥ upastire camvoḥ brahma nirṇije
pra kṛṣṭi hā iva śūṣaḥ eti roruvat asuryam varṇam ni riṇīte asya tam
jahāti vavrim pituḥ eti niṣkṛtam upaprutam kṛṇute nirṇijam tanā
adribhiḥ sutaḥ pavate gabhastyoḥ vṛṣāyate nabhasā vepate matī
sa modate nasate sādhate girā nenikte apsu yajate parīmaṇi
pari dyukṣam sahasaḥ parvatāvṛdham madhvaḥ siñcanti harmyasya sakṣaṇim
ā yasmin gāvaḥ su hutāde ūdhani mūrdhan śrīṇanti agriyam varīmabhiḥ
sam ī ratham na bhurijoḥ aheṣata daśa svasāraḥ aditeḥ upasthe ā
jigāt upa jrayati goḥ apīcyam padam yat asya matuthāḥ ajījanan
śyenaḥ na yonim sadanam dhiyā kṛtam hiraṇyayam āsadam devaḥ eṣati
_ riṇanti barhiṣi priyam girā aśvaḥ na devāṁ api eti yajñiyaḥ
parā vyaktaḥ aruṣaḥ divaḥ kaviḥ vṛṣā tri pṛṣṭhaḥ anaviṣṭa gāḥ abhi
sahasraṇītiḥ yatiḥ parāyatī rebhaḥ na pūrvīḥ uṣasaḥ vi rājati
tveṣam rūpam kṛṇute varṇaḥ asya sa yatra aśayat samṛtā sedhati sridhaḥ
ap sāḥ yāti svadhayā daivyam janam sam suṣṭutī nasate sam go agrayā
ukṣā iva yūthā pariyan arāvīt adhi tviṣīḥ adhita sūryasya
divyaḥ suparṇaḥ ava cakṣata kṣām somaḥ pari kratunā paśyate jāḥ
harim mṛjanti aruṣaḥ na yujyate sam dhenubhiḥ kalaśe somaḥ ajyate
ud vācam īrayati hinvate matī puruṣṭutasya kati cit paripriyaḥ
sākam vadanti bahavaḥ manīṣiṇaḥ indrasya somam jaṭhare yat āduhuḥ
yadi mṛjanti su gabhastayaḥ naraḥ sanīﾱābhiḥ daśabhiḥ kāmyam madhu
a ramamāṇaḥ ati eti gāḥ abhi sūryasya priyam duhituḥ tiras ravam
anu asmai joṣam abharat vinaṅgṛsaḥ sam dvayībhiḥ svasṛbhiḥ kṣeti jāmibhiḥ
nṛ dhūtaḥ adriṣutaḥ barhiṣi priyaḥ patiḥ gavām pradivaḥ induḥ ṛtviyaḥ
purandhivān manuṣaḥ yajña sādhanaḥ śuciḥ dhiyā pavate somaḥ indra te
nṛ bāhubhyām coditaḥ dhārayā sutaḥ anuṣvadham pavate somaḥ indra te
āprāḥ kratūn sam ajaiḥ adhvare matīḥ veḥ na druṣad camvoḥ āsadat hariḥ
aṃśum duhanti stanayantam akṣitam kavim kavayaḥ apasaḥ manīṣiṇaḥ
sam ī gāvaḥ matayaḥ yanti saṃyataḥ ṛtasya yonā sadane punarbhuvaḥ
nābhā pṛthivyāḥ dharuṇaḥ mahaḥ divaḥ apām ūrmau sindhuṣu antar ukṣitaḥ
indrasya vajraḥ vṛṣabhaḥ vibhūvasuḥ somaḥ hṛde pavate cāru matsaraḥ
sa tu pavasva pari pārthivam rajaḥ stotre śikṣan ādhūnvate ca su krato
mā naḥ niḥ bhāk vasunaḥ sādana spṛśaḥ rayim piśaṅgam bahulam vasīmahi
ā tu naḥ indo śata dātu aśvyam sahasra dātu paśumat hiraṇyavat
upa māsva bṛhatī revatīḥ iṣaḥ adhi stotrasya pavamāna naḥ gahi
srakve drapsasya dhamataḥ sam asvaran ṛtasya yonā sam aranta nābhayaḥ
trīn sa mūrdhnaḥ asuraḥ cakre ārabhe satyasya nāvaḥ sukṛtam apīparan
samyak samyañcaḥ mahiṣāḥ aheṣata sindhoḥ ūrmau adhi venāḥ avīvipan
madhoḥ dhārābhiḥ janayantaḥ arkam id priyām indrasya tanvam avīvṛdhan
pavitravantaḥ pari vācam āsate pitā eṣām pratnaḥ abhi rakṣati vratam
mahaḥ samudram varuṇaḥ tiras dadhe dhīrāḥ id śekuḥ dharuṇeṣu ārabham
sahasra dhāre ava te sam asvaran divaḥ nāke madhu jihvāḥ asaścataḥ
asya spaśaḥ na ni miṣanti bhūrṇayaḥ pade pade pāśinaḥ santi setavaḥ
pituḥ mātuḥ adhi ā ye samasvaran ṛcā śocantaḥ saṃdahantaḥ avratān
indra dviṣṭām apa dhamanti māyayā tvacam asiknīm bhūmanaḥ divaḥ pari
pratnāt mānāt adhi ā ye samasvaran ślokayantrāsaḥ rabhasasya mantavaḥ
apa anakṣāsaḥ badhirāḥ ahāsata ṛtasya panthām na taranti duṣkṛtaḥ
sahasra dhāre vitate pavitre ā vācam punanti kavayaḥ manīṣiṇaḥ
rudrāsaḥ eṣām iṣirāsaḥ adruhaḥ spaśaḥ svañcaḥ sudṛśaḥ nṛ cakṣasaḥ
ṛtasya gopāḥ na dabhāya sukratuḥ trī sa pavitrā hṛdi antar ā dadhe
vidvān sa viśvā bhuvanā abhi paśyati ava ajuṣṭān vidhyati karte avratān
ṛtasya tantuḥ vitataḥ pavitre ā jihvāyāḥ agre varuṇasya māyayā
dhīrāḥ cit tat sam inakṣantaḥ āśata atra kartam ava padāti aprabhuḥ
śiśuḥ na jātaḥ ava cakradat vane svar yat vājī aruṣaḥ siṣāsati
divaḥ retasā sacate payaḥ vṛdhā tam īmahe sumatī śarma saprathaḥ
divaḥ yaḥ skambhaḥ dharuṇaḥ su ātataḥ āpūrṇaḥ aṃśuḥ paryeti viśvatas
sa ime mahī rodasī yakṣat āvṛtā samīcīne dādhāra sam iṣaḥ kaviḥ
mahi psaraḥ su kṛtam somyam madhu urvī gavyūtiḥ aditeḥ ṛtam yate
īśe yaḥ vṛṣṭeḥ itas usriyaḥ vṛṣā apām netā yaḥ itaūtiḥ ṛgmiyaḥ
ātmanvat nabhaḥ duhyate ghṛtam payaḥ ṛtasya nābhiḥ amṛtam vi jāyate
samīcīnāḥ sudānavaḥ prīṇanti tam naraḥ hitam ava mehanti peravaḥ
arāvīt aṃśuḥ sacamānaḥ ūrmiṇā devāvyam manuṣe pinvati tvacam
dadhāti garbham aditeḥ upasthe ā yena tokam ca tanayam ca dhāmahe
sahasra dhāre ava tāḥ asaścataḥ tṛtīye santu rajasi prajāvatīḥ
catasraḥ nābhaḥ nihitāḥ avas divaḥ haviḥ bharanti amṛtam ghṛtaścutaḥ
śvetam rūpam kṛṇute yat siṣāsati somaḥ mīḍhvāṁ asuraḥ veda bhūmanaḥ
dhiyā śamī sacate sa īm abhi pravat divaḥ kavandham ava darṣat udriṇam
adha śvetam kalaśam gobhiḥ aktam kārṣman ā vājī akramīt sasavān
ā hinvire manasā devayantaḥ kakṣīvate śata himāya gonām
adbhiḥ soma papṛcānasya te rasaḥ avyaḥ vāram vi pavamāna dhāvati
sa mṛjyamānaḥ kavibhiḥ madintama svadasva indrāya pavamāna pītaye
abhi priyāṇi pavate canohitaḥ nāmāni yahvaḥ adhi yeṣu vardhate
ā sūryasya bṛhataḥ bṛhan adhi ratham viṣvañcam aruhat vicakṣaṇaḥ
ṛtasya jihvā pavate madhu priyam vaktā patiḥ dhiyaḥ asyāḥ adābhyaḥ
dadhāti putraḥ pitroḥ apīcyam nāma tṛtīyam adhi rocane divaḥ
ava dyutānaḥ kalaśāṁ acikradat nṛbhiḥ yemānaḥ kośe ā hiraṇyaye
abhi īm ṛtasya dohanāḥ anūṣata adhi tri pṛṣṭhaḥ uṣasaḥ vi rājati
adribhiḥ sutaḥ matibhiḥ canohitaḥ prarocayan rodasī mātarā śuciḥ
romāṇi avyā samayā vi dhāvati madhoḥ dhārā pinvamānā dive dive
pari soma pra dhanva svastaye nṛbhiḥ punānaḥ abhi vāsaya āśiram
ye te madāḥ āhanasaḥ vihāyasaḥ tebhiḥ indram codaya dātave magham
dhartā divaḥ pavate kṛtvyaḥ rasaḥ dakṣaḥ devānām anumādyaḥ nṛbhiḥ
hariḥ sṛjānaḥ atyaḥ na satvabhiḥ vṛthā pājāṃsi kṛṇute nadīṣu ā
śūraḥ na dhatte āyudhā gabhastyoḥ svar siṣāsan rathiraḥ gaviṣṭiṣu
indrasya śuṣmam īrayan apasyubhiḥ induḥ hinvānaḥ ajyate manīṣibhiḥ
indrasya soma pavamānaḥ ūrmiṇā taviṣyamāṇaḥ jaṭhareṣu ā viśa
pra naḥ pinva vidyut abhrā iva rodasī dhiyā na vājāṁ upa māsi śaśvataḥ
viśvasya rājā pavate svar dṛśaḥ ṛtasya dhītim ṛṣiṣāh avīvaśat
yaḥ sūryasya asireṇa mṛjyate pitā matīnām a samaṣṭa kāvyaḥ
vṛṣā iva yūthā pari kośam arṣasi apām upasthe vṛṣabhaḥ kanikradat
saḥ indrāya pavase matsarintamaḥ yathā jeṣāma samithe tvotayaḥ
eṣa pra kośe madhumāṁ acikradat indrasya vajraḥ vapuṣaḥ vapuṣṭaraḥ
abhi īm ṛtasya su dughāḥ ghṛtaścutaḥ vāśrāḥ arṣanti payasā iva dhenavaḥ
sa pūrvyaḥ pavate yam divaḥ pari śyenaḥ mathāyat iṣitaḥ tiras rajaḥ
sa madhvaḥ āḥ yuvate vevijānaḥ id kṛśānoḥ astuḥ manasā aha bibhyuṣā
te naḥ pūrvāsaḥ uparāsaḥ indavaḥ mahe vājāya dhanvantu gomate
īkṣeṇyāsaḥ ahyaḥ na cāravaḥ brahma brahma ye jujuṣuḥ haviḥ haviḥ
ayam naḥ vidvān vanavat vanuṣyataḥ induḥ satrācā manasā puruṣṭutaḥ
inasya yaḥ sadane garbham ādadhe gavām urubjam abhi arṣati vrajam
cakriḥ divaḥ pavate kṛtvyaḥ rasaḥ mahāṁ adabdhaḥ varuṇaḥ huruk yate
asāvi mitraḥ vṛjaneṣu yajñiyaḥ atyaḥ na yūthe vṛṣayuḥ kanikradat
pra rājā vācam janayan asiṣyadat apaḥ vasānaḥ abhi gāḥ iyakṣati
gṛbhṇāti ripram aviḥ asya tānvā śuddhaḥ devānām upa yāti niṣkṛtam
indrāya soma pari sicyase nṛbhiḥ nṛ cakṣāḥ ūrmiḥ kaviḥ ajyase vane
pūrvīḥ hi te srutayaḥ santi yātave sahasram aśvāḥ harayaḥ camūṣadaḥ
samudriyāḥ apsarasaḥ manīṣiṇam āsīnāḥ antar abhi somam akṣaran
tāḥ īm hinvanti harmyasya sakṣaṇim yācante sumnam pavamānam akṣitam
go jit naḥ somaḥ ratha jit hiraṇya jit svar jit ap jit pavate sahasra jit
yam devāsaḥ cakrire pītaye madam svādiṣṭham drapsam aruṇam mayobhuvam
etāni soma pavamānaḥ asmayuḥ satyāni kṛṇvan draviṇāni arṣasi
jahi śatrum antike dūrake ca yaḥ urvīm gavyūtim abhayam ca naḥ kṛdhi
acodasaḥ naḥ dhanvantu indavaḥ pra suvānāsaḥ bṛhaddiveṣu harayaḥ
vi ca naśan naḥ iṣaḥ arātayaḥ aryaḥ naśanta saniṣanta naḥ dhiyaḥ
pra naḥ dhanvantu indavaḥ madacyutaḥ dhanā vā yebhiḥ arvataḥ junīmasi
tiras martasya kasyacid parihvṛtim vayam dhanāni viśvadhā bharemahi
uta svasyāḥ arātyāḥ ariḥ hi sa uta anyasyāḥ arātyāḥ vṛkaḥ hi saḥ
dhanvan na tṛṣṇā sam arīta tāṁ abhi soma jahi pavamāna durādhyaḥ
divi te nābhā paramaḥ yaḥ ādade pṛthivyāḥ te ruruhuḥ sānavi kṣipaḥ
adrayaḥ tvā bapsati goḥ adhi tvaci apsu tvā hastaiḥ duduhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ
eva te indo su bhvam supeśasam rasam tuñjanti prathamāḥ abhiśriyaḥ
nidam nidam pavamāna ni tāriṣaḥ āvis te śuṣmaḥ bhavatu priyaḥ madaḥ
somasya dhārā pavate nṛ cakṣasaḥ ṛtena devān havate divaḥ pari
bṛhaspate ravathena vi didyute samudrāsaḥ na savanāni vivyacuḥ
yam tvā vājin aghnyāḥ abhi anūṣata ayaḥ hatam yonim ā rohasi dyumān
maghonām āyuḥ pratiran mahi śravaḥ indrāya soma pavase vṛṣā madaḥ
ā indrasya kukṣā pavate madintamaḥ ūrjam vasānaḥ śravase su maṅgalaḥ
pratyaṅ sa viśvā bhuvanā abhi paprathe krīḍan hariḥ atyaḥ syandate vṛṣā
tam tvā devebhyaḥ madhumattamam naraḥ sahasra dhāram duhate daśa kṣipaḥ
nṛbhiḥ soma pracyutaḥ grāvabhiḥ sutaḥ viśvān devāṁ ā pavasva sahasra jit
tam tvā hastinaḥ madhumantam adribhiḥ duhanti apsu vṛṣabham daśa kṣipaḥ
indram soma mādayan daivyam janam sindhoḥ iva ūrmiḥ pavamānaḥ arṣasi
pra somasya pavamānasya ūrmayaḥ indrasya yanti jaṭharam supeśasaḥ
dadhnā yat īm unnītāḥ yaśasā gavām dānāya śūram udamandiṣuḥ sutāḥ
acchā hi somaḥ kalaśāṁ asiṣyadat atyaḥ na voḍhā raghu vartaniḥ vṛṣā
atha devānām ubhayasya janmanaḥ vidvāṁ aśnoti amutas itas ca yat
ā naḥ soma pavamānaḥ kira vasū indo bhava maghavā rādhasaḥ mahaḥ
śikṣa vayodhaḥ vasave su cetunā mā na u gayam āre asmat parā sicaḥ
ā naḥ pūṣā pavamānaḥ su rātayaḥ mitraḥ gacchantu varuṇaḥ sajoṣasaḥ
bṛhaspatiḥ marutaḥ vāyuḥ aśvinā tvaṣṭā savitā su yamā sarasvatī
ubhe dyāvāpṛthivī viśvaminve aryamā devaḥ aditiḥ vidhātā
bhagaḥ nṛśaṃsaḥ uru antarikṣam viśve devāḥ pavamānam juṣanta
asāvi somaḥ aruṣaḥ vṛṣā hariḥ rājā iva dasmaḥ abhi gāḥ acikradat
punānaḥ vāram pari eti avyayam śyenaḥ na yonim ghṛtavantam āsadam
kaviḥ vedhasyā pari eṣi māhinam atyaḥ na mṛṣṭaḥ abhi vājam arṣasi
apasedhan duritā soma mṛḍaya ghṛtam vasānaḥ pari yāsi nirṇijam
parjanyaḥ pitā mahiṣasya parṇinaḥ nābhā pṛthivyāḥ giriṣu kṣayam dadhe
svasāraḥ āpaḥ abhi gāḥ uta asaran sam grāvabhiḥ nasate vīte adhvare
jāyā iva patyau adhi śeva maṃhase pajrāyāḥ garbha śṛṇuhi bravīmi te
antar vāṇīṣu pra cara su jīvase anindyaḥ vṛjane soma jāgṛhi
yathā pūrvebhyaḥ śata sāḥ amṛdhraḥ sahasra sāḥ paryayāḥ vājam indo
eva pavasva suvitāya navyase tava vratam anu āpaḥ sacante
pavitram te vitatam brahmaṇaspate prabhuḥ gātrāṇi pari eṣi viśvatas
a tapta tanūḥ na tat āmaḥ aśnute śṛtāsaḥ id vahantaḥ tat sam āśata
tapoḥ pavitram vitatam divaḥ pade śocantaḥ asya tantavaḥ vi asthiran
avanti asya pavītāram āśavaḥ divaḥ pṛṣṭham adhi tiṣṭhanti cetasā
arūrucat uṣasaḥ pṛśniḥ agriyaḥ ukṣā bibharti bhuvanāni vājayuḥ
māyāvinaḥ mamire asya māyayā nṛ cakṣasaḥ pitaraḥ garbham ā dadhuḥ
gandharvaḥ itthā padam asya rakṣati pāti devānām janimāni adbhutaḥ
gṛbhṇāti ripum nidhayā nidhā patiḥ su kṛttamāḥ madhunaḥ bhakṣam āśata
haviḥ haviṣmas mahi sadma daivyam nabhaḥ vasānaḥ pari yāsi adhvaram
rājā pavitra rathaḥ vājam āruhaḥ sahasra bhṛṣṭiḥ jayasi śravaḥ bṛhat
pavasva deva mādanaḥ vicarṣaṇiḥ ap sāḥ indrāya varuṇāya vāyave
kṛdhī naḥ adya varivaḥ svastimat uru kṣitau gṛṇīhi daivyam janam
ā yaḥ tasthau bhuvanāni amartyaḥ viśvāni somaḥ pari tāni arṣati
kṛṇvan saṃcṛtam vicṛtam abhiṣṭaye induḥ siṣakti uṣasam na sūryaḥ
ā yaḥ gobhiḥ sṛjyate oṣadhīṣu ā devānām sumne iṣayan upāvasuḥ
ā vidyutā pavate dhārayā sutaḥ indram somaḥ mādayan daivyam janam
eṣa sya somaḥ pavate sahasra jit hinvānaḥ vācam iṣirām uṣarbudham
induḥ samudram ud iyarti vāyubhiḥ ā indrasya hārdi kalaśeṣu sīdati
abhi tyam gāvaḥ payasā payaḥ vṛdham somam śrīṇanti matibhiḥ svar vidam
dhanañjayaḥ pavate kṛtvyaḥ rasaḥ vipraḥ kaviḥ kāvyena svar canāḥ
indrāya soma suṣutaḥ pari srava apa amīvā bhavatu rakṣasā saha
mā te rasasya matsata dvayāvinaḥ draviṇasvantaḥ iha santu indavaḥ
asmān samarye pavamāna codaya dakṣaḥ devānām asi hi priyaḥ madaḥ
jahi śatrūṃr abhi ā bhandanāyataḥ pibā indra somam ava naḥ mṛdhaḥ jahi
adabdhaḥ indo pavase madintamaḥ ātmā indrasya bhavasi dhāsiḥ uttamaḥ
abhi svaranti bahavaḥ manīṣiṇaḥ rājānam asya bhuvanasya niṃsate
sahasraṇīthaḥ śata dhāraḥ adbhutaḥ indrāya induḥ pavate kāmyam madhu
jayan kṣetram abhi arṣa jayan apaḥ urum naḥ gātum kṛṇu soma mīḍhvaḥ
kanikradat kalaśe gobhiḥ ajyase vi avyayam samayā vāram arṣasi
marmṛjyamānaḥ atyaḥ na sānasiḥ indrasya soma jaṭhare sam akṣaraḥ
svāduḥ pavasva divyāya janmane svāduḥ indrāya suhavītunāmne
svāduḥ mitrāya varuṇāya vāyave bṛhaspataye madhumāṁ adābhyaḥ
atyam mṛjanti kalaśe daśa kṣipaḥ pra viprāṇām matayaḥ vācaḥ īrate
pavamānāḥ abhi arṣanti suṣṭutim ā indram viśanti madirāsaḥ indavaḥ
pavamānaḥ abhi arṣa su vīryam urvīm gavyūtim mahi śarma saprathaḥ
mākir naḥ asya pariṣūtiḥ īśatā indo jayema tvayā dhanam dhanam
adhi dyām asthāt vṛṣabhaḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ arūrucat vi divaḥ rocanā kaviḥ
rājā pavitram ati eti roruvat divaḥ pīyūṣam duhate nṛ cakṣasaḥ
divaḥ nāke madhu jihvāḥ asaścataḥ venāḥ duhanti ukṣaṇam giriṣṭhām
apsu drapsam vāvṛdhānam samudre ā sindhoḥ ūrmā madhumantam pavitre ā
nāke suparṇam upapaptivāṃsam giraḥ venānām akṛpanta pūrvīḥ
śiśum rihanti matayaḥ panipnatam hiraṇyayam śakunam kṣāmaṇi sthām
ūrdhvaḥ gandharvaḥ adhi nāke asthāt viśvā rūpā praticakṣāṇaḥ asya
bhānuḥ śukreṇa śociṣā vi adyaut prārūrucat rodasī mātarā śuciḥ
pra te āśavaḥ pavamāna dhī javaḥ madāḥ arṣanti raghu jāḥ iva tmanā
divyāḥ suparṇāḥ madhumantaḥ indavaḥ madintamāsaḥ pari kośam āsate
pra te madāsaḥ madirāsaḥ āśavaḥ asṛkṣata rathyāsaḥ yathā pṛthak
dhenuḥ na vatsam payasā abhi vajriṇam indram indavaḥ madhumantaḥ ūrmayaḥ
atyaḥ na hiyānaḥ abhi vājam arṣa svar vid kośam divaḥ adri mātaram
vṛṣā pavitre adhi sāno avyaye somaḥ punānaḥ indriyāya dhāyase
pra te āśvinīḥ pavamāna dhī juvaḥ divyāḥ asṛgran payasā dharīmaṇi
pra antar ṛṣaya sthāvirīḥ asṛkṣata ye tvā mṛjanti ṛṣiṣāṇa vedhasaḥ
viśvā dhāmāni viśva cakṣaḥ ṛbhvasaḥ prabhoḥ te sataḥ pari yanti ketavaḥ
vyānaśiḥ pavase soma dharmabhiḥ patiḥ viśvasya bhuvanasya rājasi
ubhayatas pavamānasya raśmayaḥ dhruvasya sataḥ pari yanti ketavaḥ
yadi pavitre adhi mṛjyate hariḥ sattā ni yonā kalaśeṣu sīdati
yajñasya ketuḥ pavate su adhvaraḥ somaḥ devānām upa yāti niṣkṛtam
sahasra dhāraḥ pari kośam arṣati vṛṣā pavitram ati eti roruvat
rājā samudram nadyaḥ vi gāhate apām ūrmim sacate sindhuṣu śritaḥ
adhi asthāt sānu pavamānaḥ avyayam nābhā pṛthivyāḥ dharuṇaḥ mahaḥ divaḥ
divaḥ na sānu stanayan acikradat dyauḥ ca yasya pṛthivī ca dharmabhiḥ
indrasya sakhyam pavate vivevidat somaḥ punānaḥ kalaśeṣu sīdati
jyotiḥ yajñasya pavate madhu priyam pitā devānām janitā vibhūvasuḥ
dadhāti ratnam svadhayoḥ apīcyam madintamaḥ matsaraḥ indriyaḥ rasaḥ
abhikrandan kalaśam vājī arṣati patiḥ divaḥ śata dhāraḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ
hariḥ mitrasya sadaneṣu sīdati marmṛjānaḥ avibhiḥ sindhubhiḥ vṛṣā
agre sindhūnām pavamānaḥ arṣati agre vācaḥ agriyaḥ goṣu gacchati
agre vājasya bhajate mahā dhanam su āyudhaḥ sotṛbhiḥ pūyate vṛṣā
ayam matavān śakunaḥ yathā hitaḥ avye sasāra pavamānaḥ ūrmiṇā
tava kratvā rodasī antarā kave śuciḥ dhiyā pavate somaḥ indra te
drāpim vasānaḥ yajataḥ divispṛśam antarikṣa prāḥ bhuvaneṣu arpitaḥ
svar jajñānaḥ nabhasā abhi akramīt pratnam asya pitaram ā vivāsati
saḥ asya viśe mahi śarma yacchati yaḥ asya dhāma prathamam vyānaśe
padam yat asya parame vyomani atas viśvāḥ abhi sam yāti saṃyataḥ
pra u ayāsīt induḥ indrasya niṣkṛtam sakhā sakhyuḥ na pra mināti saṃgiram
maryaḥ iva yuvatibhiḥ sam arṣati somaḥ kalaśe śata yāmnā pathā
pra vaḥ dhiyaḥ mandrayuvaḥ vipanyuvaḥ panasyuvaḥ saṃvasaneṣu akramuḥ
somam manīṣāḥ abhi anūṣata stubhaḥ abhi dhenavaḥ payasā īm aśiśrayuḥ
ā naḥ soma saṃyatam pipyuṣīm iṣam indo pavasva pavamānaḥ asridham
yā naḥ dohate tris ahan a saścuṣī kṣumat vājavat madhumat su vīryam
vṛṣā matīnām pavate vicakṣaṇaḥ somaḥ ahnaḥ pratarītā uṣasaḥ divaḥ
krāṇā sindhūnām kalaśāṁ avīvaśat indrasya hārdi āviśan manīṣibhiḥ
manīṣibhiḥ pavate pūrvyaḥ kaviḥ nṛbhiḥ yataḥ pari kośāṁ acikradat
tritasya nāma janayan madhu kṣarat indrasya vāyoḥ sakhyāya kartave
ayam punānaḥ uṣasaḥ vi rocayat ayam sindhubhyaḥ abhavat u loka kṛt
ayam tris sapta duduhānaḥ āśiram somaḥ hṛde pavate cāru matsaraḥ
pavasva soma divyeṣu dhāmasu sṛjānaḥ indo kalaśe pavitre ā
sīdan indrasya jaṭhare kanikradat nṛbhiḥ yataḥ sūryam ārohayaḥ divi
adribhiḥ sutaḥ pavase pavitre ām indo indrasya jaṭhareṣu āviśan
tvam nṛ cakṣāḥ abhavaḥ vicakṣaṇa soma gotram aṅgirobhyaḥ avṛṇoḥ apa
tvām soma pavamānam svādhyaḥ anu viprāsaḥ amadan avasyavaḥ
tvām suparṇaḥ ābharat divaḥ pari indo viśvābhiḥ matibhiḥ pariṣkṛtam
avye punānam pari vāre ūrmiṇā harim navante abhi sapta dhenavaḥ
apām upasthe adhi āyavaḥ kavim ṛtasya yonā mahiṣāḥ aheṣata
induḥ punānaḥ ati gāhate mṛdhaḥ viśvāni kṛṇvan su pathāni yajyave
gāḥ kṛṇvānaḥ nirṇijam haryataḥ kaviḥ atyaḥ na krīḍan pari vāram arṣati
asaścataḥ śata dhārāḥ abhiśriyaḥ harim navante ava tāḥ udanyuvaḥ
kṣipaḥ mṛjanti pari gobhiḥ āvṛtam tṛtīye pṛṣṭhe adhi rocane divaḥ
tava imāḥ prajāḥ divyasya retasaḥ tvam viśvasya bhuvanasya rājasi
atha idam viśvam pavamāna te vaśe tvam indo prathamaḥ dhāma dhāḥ asi
tvam samudraḥ asi viśva vid kave tava imāḥ pañca pradiśaḥ vidharmaṇi
tvam dyām ca pṛthivīm ca ati jabhriṣe tava jyotīṃṣi pavamāna sūryaḥ
tvam pavitre rajasaḥ vidharmaṇi devebhyaḥ soma pavamāna pūyase
tvām uśijaḥ prathamāḥ agṛbhṇata tubhya imā viśvā bhuvanāni yemire
pra rebhaḥ eti ati vāram avyayam vṛṣā vaneṣu ava cakradat hariḥ
sam dhītayaḥ vāvaśānāḥ anūṣata śiśum rihanti matayaḥ panipnatam
sa sūryasya raśmibhiḥ pari vyata tantum tanvānaḥ trivṛtam yathā vide
nayan ṛtasya praśiṣaḥ navīyasīḥ patiḥ janīnām upa yāti niṣkṛtam
rājā sindhūnām pavate patiḥ divaḥ ṛtasya yāti pathibhiḥ kanikradat
sahasra dhāraḥ pari sicyate hariḥ punānaḥ vācam janayan upāvasuḥ
pavamāna mahi arṇaḥ vi dhāvasi sūraḥ na citraḥ avyayāni pavyayā
gabhasti pūtaḥ nṛbhiḥ adribhiḥ sutaḥ mahe vājāya dhanyāya dhanvasi
iṣam ūrjam pavamāna abhi arṣasi śyenaḥ na vaṃsu kalaśeṣu sīdasi
indrāya madvā madyaḥ madaḥ sutaḥ divaḥ viṣṭambhaḥ upamaḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ
sapta svasāraḥ abhi mātaraḥ śiśum navam jajñānam jenyam vipaścitam
apām gandharvam divyam nṛ cakṣasam somam viśvasya bhuvanasya rājase
īśānaḥ imā bhuvanāni vīyase yujānaḥ indo haritaḥ suparṇyaḥ
tāḥ te kṣarantu madhumat ghṛtam payaḥ tava vrate soma tiṣṭhantu kṛṣṭayaḥ
tvam nṛ cakṣāḥ asi soma viśvatas pavamāna vṛṣabha tā vi dhāvasi
sa naḥ pavasva vasumat hiraṇyavat vayam syāma bhuvaneṣu jīvase
go vid pavasva vasu vid hiraṇya vid retaḥ dhāḥ indo bhuvaneṣu arpitaḥ
tvam su vīraḥ asi soma viśva vid tam tvā viprāḥ upa girā ime āsate
ud madhvaḥ ūrmiḥ vananā atiṣṭhipat apaḥ vasānaḥ mahiṣaḥ vi gāhate
rājā pavitra rathaḥ vājam āruhat sahasra bhṛṣṭiḥ jayati śravaḥ bṛhat
sa bhandanāḥ ud iyarti prajāvatīḥ viśvāyuḥ viśvāḥ subharāḥ ahardivi
brahma prajāvat rayim aśva pastyam pītaḥ indo indram asmabhyam yācatāt
saḥ agre ahnām hariḥ haryataḥ madaḥ pra cetasā cetayate anu dyubhiḥ
dvā janā yātayan antar īyate narā ca śaṃsam daivyam ca dhartari
añjate vi añjate sam añjate kratum rihanti madhunā abhi añjate
sindhoḥ ucchvāse patayantam ukṣaṇam hiraṇya pāvāḥ paśum āsu gṛbhṇate
vipaścite pavamānāya gāyata mahī na dhārā ati andhaḥ arṣati
ahiḥ na jūrṇām ati sarpati tvacam atyaḥ na krīḍan asarat vṛṣā hariḥ
agregaḥ rājā āpyaḥ taviṣyate vimānaḥ ahnām bhuvaneṣu arpitaḥ
hariḥ ghṛta snuḥ su dṛśīkaḥ arṇavaḥ jyotīrathaḥ pavate rāye okyaḥ
asarji skambhaḥ divaḥ udyataḥ madaḥ pari tri dhātuḥ bhuvanāni arṣati
aṃśum rihanti matayaḥ panipnatam girā yadi nirṇijam ṛgmiṇaḥ yayuḥ
pra te dhārāḥ ati aṇvāni meṣyaḥ punānasya saṃyataḥ yanti raṃhayaḥ
yat gobhiḥ indo camvoḥ samajyase ā suvānaḥ soma kalaśeṣu sīdasi
pavasva soma kratu vid na ukthyaḥ avyaḥ vāre pari dhāva madhu priyam
jahi viśvān rakṣasaḥ indo atriṇaḥ bṛhat vadema vidathe su vīrāḥ
pra tu drava pari kośam ni sīda nṛbhiḥ punānaḥ abhi vājam arṣa
aśvam na tvā vājinam marjayantaḥ acchā barhiḥ raśanābhiḥ nayanti
su āyudhaḥ pavate devaḥ induḥ aśasti hā vṛjanam rakṣamāṇaḥ
pitā devānām janitā su dakṣaḥ viṣṭambhaḥ divaḥ dharuṇaḥ pṛthivyāḥ
ṛṣiḥ vipraḥ puraetā janānām ṛbhuḥ dhīraḥ uśanā kāvyena
sa cit viveda nihitam yat āsām apīcyam guhyam nāma gonām
eṣa sya te madhumāṁ indra somaḥ vṛṣā vṛṣṇe pari pavitre akṣār
sahasra sāḥ śata sāḥ bhūri dāvā śaśvattamam barhiḥ ā vājī asthāt
ete somāḥ abhi gavyā sahasrā mahe vājāya amṛtāya śravāṃsi
pavitrebhiḥ pavamānāḥ asṛgran śravasyavaḥ na pṛtanājaḥ atyāḥ
pari hi sma puru hūtaḥ janānām viśvā asarat bhojanā pūyamānaḥ
atha bhara śyena bhṛta prayāṃsi rayim tuñjānaḥ abhi vājam arṣa
eṣa suvānaḥ pari somaḥ pavitre sargaḥ na sṛṣṭaḥ adadhāvat arvā
tigme śiśānaḥ mahiṣaḥ na śṛṅge gāḥ gavyan abhi śūraḥ na satvā
eṣā yayau paramāt antar adreḥ kūcid satīḥ ūrve gāḥ viveda
divaḥ na vidyut stanayantī abhraiḥ somasya te pavate indra dhārā
uta sma rāśim pari yāsi gonām indreṇa soma sa ratham punānaḥ
pūrvīḥ iṣaḥ bṛhatīḥ jīra dāno śikṣā śacīvas tava tāḥ upaṣṭut
ayam somaḥ indra tubhyam sunve tubhyam pavate tvam asya pāhi
tvam ha yam cakṛṣe tvam vavṛṣe indum madāya yujyāya somam
saḥ īm rathaḥ na bhūriṣāh ayoji mahaḥ purūṇi sātaye vasūni
āt īm viśvā nahuṣyāṇi jātā svarṣātā vane ūrdhvā navanta
vāyuḥ na yaḥ niyutvāṁ iṣṭa yāmā nāsatyā iva have ā śambhaviṣṭhaḥ
viśva vāraḥ draviṇaḥ dāḥ iva tman pūṣā iva dhī javanaḥ asi soma
indraḥ na yaḥ mahā karmāṇi cakriḥ hantā vṛtrāṇām asi soma pūḥ bhid
paidvaḥ na hi tvam ahi nāmnām hantā viśvasya asi soma dasyoḥ
agniḥ na yaḥ vane ā sṛjyamānaḥ vṛthā pājāṃsi kṛṇute nadīṣu
janaḥ na yudhvā mahataḥ upabdiḥ iyarti somaḥ pavamānaḥ ūrmim
ete somāḥ ati vārāṇi avyā divyāḥ na kośāsaḥ abhra varṣāḥ
vṛthā samudram sindhavaḥ na nīcīḥ sutāsaḥ abhi kalaśāṁ asṛgran
śuṣmī śardhaḥ na mārutam pavasva anabhiśastā divyā yathā viś
āpaḥ na makṣū sumatiḥ bhava naḥ sahasra apsāḥ pṛtanāṣāh na yajñaḥ
rājñaḥ nu te varuṇasya vratāni bṛhat gabhīram tava soma dhāma
śuciḥ tvam asi priyaḥ na mitraḥ dakṣāyyaḥ aryamā iva asi soma
pra u sya vahniḥ pathyābhiḥ asyān divaḥ na vṛṣṭiḥ pavamānaḥ akṣār
sahasra dhāraḥ asadat ni asme mātuḥ upasthe vane ā ca somaḥ
rājā sindhūnām avasiṣṭa vāsaḥ ṛtasya nāvam āruhat rajiṣṭhām
