apsu drapsaḥ vāvṛdhe śyena jūtaḥ duhe īm pitā duhe īm pituḥ jām
siṃham nasanta madhvaḥ ayāsam harim aruṣam divaḥ asya patim
śūraḥ yutsu prathamaḥ pṛcchate gāḥ asya cakṣasā pari pāti ukṣā
madhu pṛṣṭham ghoram ayāsam aśvam rathe yuñjanti uru cakre ṛṣvam
svasāraḥ īm jāmayaḥ marjayanti sanābhayaḥ vājinam ūrjayanti
catasraḥ īm ghṛta duhaḥ sacante samāne antar dharuṇe niṣattāḥ
tāḥ īm arṣanti namasā punānāḥ tāḥ īm viśvatas pari santi pūrvīḥ
viṣṭambhaḥ divaḥ dharuṇaḥ pṛthivyāḥ viśvāḥ uta kṣitayaḥ haste asya
asat te utsaḥ gṛṇate niyutvān madhvaḥ aṃśuḥ pavate indriyāya
vanvan avātaḥ abhi deva vītim indrāya soma vṛtra hā pavasva
śagdhi mahaḥ puru ścandrasya rāyaḥ su vīryasya patayaḥ syāma
pra hinvānaḥ janitā rodasyoḥ rathaḥ na vājam saniṣyan ayāsīt
indram gacchan āyudhā saṃśiśānaḥ viśvā vasu hastayoḥ ādadhānaḥ
abhi tri pṛṣṭham vṛṣaṇam vayaḥ dhām āṅgūṣāṇām avāvaśanta vāṇīḥ
vanā vasānaḥ varuṇaḥ na sindhūn vi ratna dhāḥ dayate vāryāṇi
śūra grāmaḥ sarva vīraḥ sahāvān jetā pavasva sanitā dhanāni
tigma āyudhaḥ kṣipra dhanvā samatsu a sāḍhaḥ sāhvān pṛtanāsu śatrūn
uru gavyūtiḥ abhayāni kṛṇvan samīcīne ā pavasva purandhī
apaḥ siṣāsan uṣasaḥ svar gāḥ sam cikradaḥ mahaḥ asmabhyam vājān
matsi soma varuṇam matsi mitram matsi indram indo pavamāna viṣṇum
matsi śardhaḥ mārutam matsi devān matsi mahām indram indo madāya
eva rājā iva kratumāṁ amena viśvā ghanighnat duritā pavasva
indo sūktāya vacase vayaḥ dhāḥ yūyam pāta svastibhiḥ sadā naḥ
asarji vakvā rathye yathā ājau dhiyā manotā prathamaḥ manīṣī
daśa svasāraḥ adhi sāno avye ajanti vahnim sadanāni accha
vītī janasya divyasya kavyaiḥ adhi suvānaḥ nahuṣyebhiḥ induḥ
pra yaḥ nṛbhiḥ amṛtaḥ martyebhiḥ marmṛjānaḥ avibhiḥ gobhiḥ adbhiḥ
vṛṣā vṛṣṇe roruvat aṃśuḥ asmai pavamānaḥ ruśat īrte payaḥ goḥ
sahasram ṛkvā pathibhiḥ vacaḥ vid adhvasmabhiḥ sūraḥ aṇvam vi yāti
ruja dṛﾱhā cit rakṣasaḥ sadāṃsi punānaḥ indo ūrṇuhi vi vājān
vṛśca upariṣṭāt tujatā vadhena ye anti dūrāt upanāyam eṣām
sa pratna vat navyase viśva vāra sūktāya pathaḥ kṛṇuhi prācaḥ
ye duḥṣahāsaḥ vanuṣā bṛhantaḥ tān te aśyāma puru kṛt purukṣo
eva punānaḥ apaḥ svar gāḥ asmabhyam tokā tanayāni bhūri
śam naḥ kṣetram uru jyotīṃṣi soma jyok naḥ sūryam dṛśaye rirīhi
pari suvānaḥ hariḥ aṃśuḥ pavitre rathaḥ na sarji sanaye hiyānaḥ
āpat ślokam indriyam pūyamānaḥ prati devāṁ ajuṣata prayobhiḥ
acchā nṛ cakṣāḥ asarat pavitre nāma dadhānaḥ kaviḥ asya yonau
sīdan hotā iva sadane camūṣu upa īm agman ṛṣayaḥ sapta viprāḥ
pra sumedhāḥ gātu vid viśva devaḥ somaḥ punānaḥ sadaḥ eti nityam
bhuvat viśveṣu kāvyeṣu rantā anu janān yatate pañca dhīraḥ
tava tye soma pavamāna niṇye viśve devāḥ trayaḥ ekādaśāsaḥ
daśa svadhābhiḥ adhi sāno avye mṛjanti tvā nadyaḥ sapta yahvīḥ
tat nu satyam pavamānasya astu yatra viśve kāravaḥ saṃnasanta
jyotiḥ yat ahne akṛṇot u lokam prāvat manum dasyave kaḥ abhīkam
pari sadmā iva paśumānti hotā rājā na satyaḥ samitīḥ iyānaḥ
somaḥ punānaḥ kalaśāṁ ayāsīt sīdan mṛgaḥ na mahiṣaḥ vaneṣu
sākamukṣaḥ marjayanta svasāraḥ daśa dhīrasya dhītayaḥ dhanutrīḥ
hariḥ pari adravat jāḥ sūryasya droṇam nanakṣe atyaḥ na vājī
sam mātṛbhiḥ na śiśuḥ vāvaśānaḥ vṛṣā dadhanve puru vāraḥ adbhiḥ
maryaḥ na yoṣām abhi niṣkṛtam yan sam gacchate kalaśe usriyābhiḥ
uta pra pipye ūdhar aghnyāyāḥ induḥ dhārābhiḥ sacate sumedhāḥ
mūrdhānam gāvaḥ payasā camūṣu abhi śrīṇanti vasubhiḥ na niktaiḥ
sa naḥ devebhiḥ pavamāna rada indo rayim aśvinam vāvaśānaḥ
rathirāyatām uśatī purandhiḥ asmadryak ā dāvane vasūnām
nu naḥ rayim upa māsva nṛvantam punānaḥ vātāpyam viśva ścandram
pra vandituḥ indo tāri āyuḥ prātar makṣū dhiyāvasuḥ jagamyāt
adhi yat asmin vājini iva śubhaḥ spardhante dhiyaḥ sūrye na viśaḥ
apaḥ vṛṇānaḥ pavate kavīyan vrajam na paśu vardhanāya manma
dvitā vyūrṇvan amṛtasya dhāma svarvide bhuvanāni prathanta
dhiyaḥ pinvānāḥ svasare na gāvaḥ ṛtāyantīḥ abhi vāvaśre indum
pari yat kaviḥ kāvyā bharate śūraḥ na rathaḥ bhuvanāni viśvā
deveṣu yaśaḥ martāya bhūṣan dakṣāya rāyaḥ puru bhūṣu navyaḥ
śriye jātaḥ śriye ā niḥ iyāya śriyam vayaḥ jaritṛbhyaḥ dadhāti
śriyam vasānāḥ amṛta tvam āyan bhavanti satyā samithā mitadrau
iṣam ūrjam abhi arṣa aśvam gām uru jyotiḥ kṛṇuhi matsi devān
viśvāni hi suṣahā tāni tubhyam pavamāna bādhase soma śatrūn
kanikranti hariḥ ā sṛjyamānaḥ sīdan vanasya jaṭhare punānaḥ
nṛbhiḥ yataḥ kṛṇute nirṇijam gāḥ atas matīḥ janayata svadhābhiḥ
hariḥ sṛjānaḥ pathyām ṛtasya iyarti vācam aritā iva nāvam
devaḥ devānām guhyāni nāmā āviṣkṛṇoti barhiṣi pravāce
apām iva id ūrmayaḥ tarturāṇāḥ pra manīṣāḥ īrate somam accha
namasyantīḥ upa ca yanti sam ca ā ca viśanti uśatīḥ uśantam
tam marmṛjānam mahiṣam na sānau aṃśum duhanti ukṣaṇam giriṣṭhām
tam vāvaśānam matayaḥ sacante tritaḥ bibharti varuṇam samudre
iṣyan vācam upavaktā iva hotuḥ punānaḥ indo vi sya manīṣām
indraḥ ca yat kṣayathaḥ saubhagāya su vīryasya patayaḥ syāma
pra senānīḥ śūraḥ agre rathānām gavyan eti harṣate asya senā
bhadrān kṛṇvan indra havān sakhibhyaḥ ā somaḥ vastrā rabhasāni datte
sam asya harim harayaḥ mṛjanti aśva hayaiḥ aniśitam namobhiḥ
ā tiṣṭhati ratham indrasya sakhā vidvāṁ enā sumatim yāti accha
sa naḥ deva devatāte pavasva mahe soma psarase indra pānaḥ
kṛṇvan apaḥ varṣayan dyām uta imām uroḥ ā naḥ varivasyā punānaḥ
ajītaye ahataye pavasva svastaye sarvatātaye bṛhate
tat uśanti viśve ime sakhāyaḥ tat aham vaśmi pavamāna soma
somaḥ pavate janitā matīnām janitā divaḥ janitā pṛthivyāḥ
janitā agneḥ janitā sūryasya janitā indrasya janitā uta viṣṇoḥ
brahmā devānām padavīḥ kavīnām ṛṣiḥ viprāṇām mahiṣaḥ mṛgāṇām
śyenaḥ gṛdhrāṇām svadhitiḥ vanānām somaḥ pavitram ati eti rebhan
prāvīvipat vācaḥ ūrmim na sindhuḥ giraḥ somaḥ pavamānaḥ manīṣāḥ
antar paśyan vṛjanā imā avarāṇi ā tiṣṭhati vṛṣabhaḥ goṣu jānan
sa matsaraḥ pṛtsu vanvan avātaḥ sahasra retāḥ abhi vājam arṣa
indrāya indo pavamānaḥ manīṣī aṃśoḥ ūrmim īraya gāḥ iṣaṇyan
pari priyaḥ kalaśe deva vātaḥ indrāya somaḥ raṇyas madāya
sahasra dhāraḥ śata vājaḥ induḥ vājī na saptiḥ samanā jigāti
sa pūrvyaḥ vasu vid jāyamānaḥ mṛjānaḥ apsu duduhānaḥ adrau
abhiśasti pāḥ bhuvanasya rājā vidat gātum brahmaṇe pūyamānaḥ
tvayā hi naḥ pitaraḥ soma pūrve karmāṇi cakruḥ pavamāna dhīrāḥ
vanvan avātaḥ paridhīṃr aporṇu vīrebhiḥ aśvaiḥ maghavā bhava naḥ
yathā apavathāḥ manave vayaḥ dhāḥ amitra hā varivaḥ vid haviṣmān
eva pavasva draviṇam dadhānaḥ indre sam tiṣṭha janayā āyudhāni
pavasva soma madhumāṁ ṛtāvā apaḥ vasānaḥ adhi sāno avye
ava droṇāni ghṛtavānti sīda madintamaḥ matsaraḥ indra pānaḥ
vṛṣṭim divaḥ śata dhāraḥ pavasva sahasra sāḥ vājayuḥ deva vītau
sam sindhubhiḥ kalaśe vāvaśānaḥ sam usriyābhiḥ pratiran naḥ āyuḥ
eṣa sya somaḥ matibhiḥ punānaḥ atyaḥ na vājī tarati id arātīḥ
payaḥ na dugdham aditeḥ iṣiram uru iva gātuḥ su yamaḥ na voḍhā
su āyudhaḥ sotṛbhiḥ pūyamānaḥ abhi arṣa guhyam cāru nāma
abhi vājam saptiḥ iva śravasyā abhi vāyum abhi gāḥ deva soma
śiśum jajñānam haryatam mṛjanti śumbhanti vahnim marutaḥ gaṇena
kaviḥ gīrbhiḥ kāvyena kaviḥ san somaḥ pavitram ati eti rebhan
ṛṣi manāḥ yaḥ ṛṣi kṛt svarṣāḥ sahasraṇīthaḥ padavīḥ kavīnām
tṛtīyam dhāma mahiṣaḥ siṣāsan somaḥ virājam anu rājati stubh
camūṣad śyenaḥ śakunaḥ vibhṛtvā go vinduḥ drapsaḥ āyudhāni bibhrat
apām ūrmim sacamānaḥ samudram turīyam dhāma mahiṣaḥ vivakti
maryaḥ na śubhraḥ tanvam mṛjānaḥ atyaḥ na sṛtvā sanaye dhanānām
vṛṣā iva yūthā pari kośam arṣan kanikradat camvoḥ ā viveśa
pavasva indo pavamānaḥ mahobhiḥ kanikradat pari vārāṇi arṣa
krīḍan camvoḥ ā viśa pūyamānaḥ indram te rasaḥ madiraḥ mamattu
prāsya dhārāḥ bṛhatīḥ asṛgran aktaḥ gobhiḥ kalaśāṁ ā viveśa
sāma kṛṇvan sāmanyaḥ vipaścit krandan eti abhi sakhyuḥ na jāmim
apaghnan eṣi pavamāna śatrūn priyām na jāraḥ abhigītaḥ induḥ
sīdan vaneṣu śakunaḥ na patvā somaḥ punānaḥ kalaśeṣu sattā
ā te rucaḥ pavamānasya soma yoṣā iva yanti su dughāḥ su dhārāḥ
hariḥ ānītaḥ puru vāraḥ apsu acikradat kalaśe devayūnām
asya preṣā hemanā pūyamānaḥ devaḥ devebhiḥ sam apṛkta rasam
sutaḥ pavitram pari eti rebhan mitā iva sadma paśumānti hotā
bhadrā vastrā samanyā vasānaḥ mahān kaviḥ nivacanāni śaṃsan
ā vacyasva camvoḥ pūyamānaḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ jāgṛviḥ deva vītau
sam u priyaḥ mṛjyate sāno avye yaśastaraḥ yaśasām kṣaitaḥ asme
abhi svara dhanva pūyamānaḥ yūyam pāta svastibhiḥ sadā naḥ
pra gāyata abhi arcāma devān somam hinota mahate dhanāya
svāduḥ pavāte ati vāram avyam ā sīdāti kalaśam devayuḥ naḥ
induḥ devānām upa sakhyam āyan sahasra dhāraḥ pavate madāya
nṛbhi stavānaḥ anu dhāma pūrvam agan indram mahate saubhagāya
stotre rāye hariḥ arṣa punānaḥ indram madaḥ gacchatu te bharāya
devaiḥ yāhi sa ratham rādhaḥ acchā yūyam pāta svastibhiḥ sadā naḥ
pra kāvyam uśanā iva bruvāṇaḥ devaḥ devānām janimā vivakti
mahi vrataḥ śuci bandhuḥ pāvakaḥ padā varāhaḥ abhi eti rebhan
pra haṃsāsaḥ tṛpalam manyum accha amāt astam vṛṣagaṇāḥ ayāsuḥ
āṅgūṣyam pavamānam sakhāyaḥ durmarṣam sākam pra vadanti vāṇam
sa raṃhate urugāyasya jūtim vṛthā krīḍantam mimate na gāvaḥ
parīṇasam kṛṇute tigma śṛṅgaḥ divā hariḥ dadṛśe naktam ṛjraḥ
induḥ vājī pavate gonyoghāḥ indre somaḥ sahaḥ invan madāya
hanti rakṣaḥ bādhate pari arātīḥ varivaḥ kṛṇvan vṛjanasya rājā
adha dhārayā madhvā pṛcānaḥ tiras roma pavate adri dugdhaḥ
induḥ indrasya sakhyam juṣāṇaḥ devaḥ devasya matsaraḥ madāya
abhi priyāṇi pavate punānaḥ devaḥ devān svena rasena pṛñcan
induḥ dharmāṇi ṛtuthā vasānaḥ daśa kṣipaḥ avyata sāno avye
vṛṣā śoṇaḥ abhikanikradat gāḥ nadayan eti pṛthivīm uta dyām
indrasya iva vagnuḥ ā śṛṇve ājau pracetayan arṣati vācam ā imām
rasāyyaḥ payasā pinvamānaḥ īrayan eṣi madhumantam aṃśum
pavamānaḥ saṃtanim eṣi kṛṇvan indrāya soma pariṣicyamānaḥ
eva pavasva madiraḥ madāya udagrābhasya namayan vadhasnaiḥ
pari varṇam bharamāṇaḥ ruśantam gavyuḥ naḥ arṣa pari soma siktaḥ
juṣṭvī naḥ indo supathā sugāni urau pavasva varivāṃsi kṛṇvan
ghanā iva viṣvak duritāni vighnan adhi snunā dhanva sāno avye
vṛṣṭim naḥ arṣa divyām jigatnum iﾱāvatīm śaṅgayīm jīra dānum
stukā iva vītā dhanva vicinvan bandhūṃr imān avarāṁ indo vāyūn
granthim na vi sya grathitam punānaḥ ṛjum ca gātum vṛjinam ca soma
atyaḥ na kradaḥ hariḥ ā sṛjānaḥ maryaḥ deva dhanva pastyāvān
juṣṭaḥ madāya devatāte indo pari snunā dhanva sāno avye
sahasra dhāraḥ surabhiḥ adabdhaḥ pari srava vājasātau nṛṣahye
a raśmānaḥ ye a rathāḥ a yuktāḥ atyāsaḥ na sasṛjānāsaḥ ājau
ete śukrāsaḥ dhanvanti somāḥ devāsaḥ tāṁ upa yāta pibadhyai
eva naḥ indo abhi deva vītim pari srava nabhaḥ arṇaḥ camūṣu
somaḥ asmabhyam kāmyam bṛhantam rayim dadātu vīravantam ugram
takṣat yadi manasaḥ venataḥ vāc jyeṣṭhasya vā dharmaṇi kṣoḥ anīke
āt īm āyan varam ā vāvaśānāḥ juṣṭam patim kalaśe gāvaḥ indum
pra dānudaḥ divyaḥ dānu pinvaḥ ṛtam ṛtāya pavate sumedhāḥ
dharmā bhuvat vṛjanyasya rājā pra raśmibhiḥ daśabhiḥ bhāri bhūma
pavitrebhiḥ pavamānaḥ nṛ cakṣāḥ rājā devānām uta martyānām
dvitā bhuvat rayi patiḥ rayīṇām ṛtam bharat su bhṛtam cāru induḥ
arvāṁ iva śravase sātim acchā indrasya vāyoḥ abhi vītim arṣa
sa naḥ sahasrā bṛhatīḥ iṣaḥ dāḥ bhava soma draviṇaḥ vid punānaḥ
devāvyaḥ naḥ pariṣicyamānāḥ kṣayam su vīram dhanvantu somāḥ
āyajyavaḥ sumatim viśva vārāḥ hotāraḥ na diviyajaḥ mandratamāḥ
eva deva devatāte pavasva mahe soma psarase deva pānaḥ
mahaḥ cit hi smasi hitāḥ samarye kṛdhi suṣṭhāne rodasī punānaḥ
aśvaḥ na u kradaḥ vṛṣabhiḥ yujānaḥ siṃhaḥ na bhīmaḥ manasaḥ javīyān
arvācīnaiḥ pathibhiḥ ye rajiṣṭhā ā pavasva saumanasam naḥ indo
śatam dhārāḥ deva jātāḥ asṛgran sahasram enāḥ kavayaḥ mṛjanti
indo sanitram divaḥ ā pavasva puraetā asi mahataḥ dhanasya
divaḥ na sargāḥ asasṛgram ahnām rājā na mitram pra mināti dhīraḥ
pituḥ na putraḥ kratubhiḥ yatānaḥ ā pavasva viśe asyai ajītim
pra te dhārāḥ madhumatīḥ asṛgran vārān yat pūtaḥ atyeṣi avyān
pavamāna pavase dhāma gonām jajñānaḥ sūryam apinvaḥ arkaiḥ
kanikradat anu panthām ṛtasya śukraḥ vi bhāsi amṛtasya dhāma
saḥ indrāya pavase matsaravān hinvānaḥ vācam matibhiḥ kavīnām
divyaḥ suparṇaḥ ava cakṣi soma pinvan dhārāḥ karmaṇā deva vītau
ā indo viśa kalaśam soma dhānam krandan ihi sūryasya upa raśmim
tisraḥ vācaḥ īrayati pra vahniḥ ṛtasya dhītim brahmaṇaḥ manīṣām
gāvaḥ yanti gopatim pṛcchamānāḥ somam yanti matayaḥ vāvaśānāḥ
somam gāvaḥ dhenavaḥ vāvaśānāḥ somam viprāḥ matibhiḥ pṛcchamānāḥ
somaḥ sutaḥ pūyate ajyamānaḥ some arkāḥ triṣṭubhaḥ sam navante
eva naḥ soma pariṣicyamānaḥ ā pavasva pūyamānaḥ svasti
indram ā viśa bṛhatā raveṇa vardhaya vācam janayā purandhim
ā jāgṛviḥ vipraḥ ṛtā matīnām somaḥ punānaḥ asadat camūṣu
sapanti yam mithunāsaḥ nikāmāḥ adhvaryavaḥ rathirāsaḥ su hastāḥ
sa punānaḥ upa sūre na dhātā ubhe aprāḥ rodasī vi sa āvaḥ
priyā cit yasya priyasāsaḥ ūtī sa tu dhanam kāriṇe na pra yaṃsat
sa vardhitā vardhanaḥ pūyamānaḥ somaḥ mīḍhvāṁ abhi naḥ jyotiṣā āvīt
yena naḥ pūrve pitaraḥ pada jñāḥ svar vidaḥ abhi gāḥ adrim uṣṇan
akrān samudraḥ prathame vidharman janayan prajāḥ bhuvanasya rājā
vṛṣā pavitre adhi sāno avye bṛhat somaḥ vāvṛdhe suvānaḥ induḥ
mahat tat somaḥ mahiṣaḥ cakāra apām yat garbhaḥ avṛṇīta devān
adadhāt indre pavamānaḥ ojaḥ ajanayat sūrye jyotiḥ induḥ
matsi vāyum iṣṭaye rādhase ca matsi mitrāvaruṇā pūyamānaḥ
matsi śardhaḥ mārutam matsi devān matsi dyāvāpṛthivī deva soma
ṛjuḥ pavasva vṛjinasya hantā apa amīvām bādhamānaḥ mṛdhaḥ ca
abhiśrīṇan payaḥ payasā abhi gonām indrasya tvam tava vayam sakhāyaḥ
madhvaḥ sūdam pavasva vasvaḥ utsam vīram ca naḥ ā pavasva bhagam ca
svadasva indrāya pavamānaḥ indoḥ rayim ca naḥ ā pavasva samudrāt
somaḥ sutaḥ dhārayā atyaḥ na hitvā sindhuḥ na nimnam abhi vājī akṣār
ā yonim vanyam asadat punānaḥ sam induḥ gobhiḥ asarat sam adbhiḥ
eṣa sya te pavate indra somaḥ camūṣu dhīraḥ uśate tavasvān
svar cakṣāḥ rathiraḥ satya śuṣmaḥ kāmaḥ na yaḥ devayatām asarji
eṣa pratnena vayasā punānaḥ tiras varpāṃsi duhituḥ dadhānaḥ
vasānaḥ śarma tri varūtham apsu hotā iva yāti samaneṣu rebhan
nu naḥ tvam rathiraḥ deva soma pari srava camvoḥ pūyamānaḥ
apsu svādiṣṭhaḥ madhumāṁ ṛtāvā devaḥ na yaḥ savitā satya manmā
abhi vāyum vītī arṣa gṛṇānaḥ abhi mitrāvaruṇā pūyamānaḥ
abhi naram dhī javanam ratheṣṭhām abhi indram vṛṣaṇam vajra bāhum
abhi vastrā su vasanāni arṣa abhi dhenūḥ su dughāḥ pūyamānaḥ
abhi candrā bhartave naḥ hiraṇyā abhi aśvān rathinaḥ deva soma
abhi naḥ arṣa divyā vasūni abhi viśvā pārthivā pūyamānaḥ
abhi yena draviṇam aśnavāma abhi ārṣeyam jamadagni vat naḥ
ayā pavā pavasva enā vasūni māṃścatve indo sarasi pra dhanva
bradhnaḥ cit atra vātaḥ na jūtaḥ puru medhaḥ cit takave naram dāt
uta naḥ enā pavayā pavasva adhi śrute śravāyyasya tīrthe
ṣaṣṭim sahasrā naigutaḥ vasūni vṛkṣam na pakvam dhūnavat raṇāya
mahi ime asya vṛṣa nāma śūṣe māṃścatve vā pṛśane vā vadhatre
asvāpayat nigutaḥ snehayat ca apa amitrāṁ apa acitaḥ acetaḥ
sam trī pavitrā vitatāni eṣi anu ekam dhāvasi pūyamānaḥ
asi bhagaḥ asi dātrasya dātā asi maghavā maghavadbhyaḥ indo
eṣa viśva vid pavate manīṣī somaḥ viśvasya bhuvanasya rājā
drapsāṁ īrayan vidatheṣu induḥ vi vāram avyam samayā ati yāti
indum rihanti mahiṣāḥ adabdhāḥ pade rebhanti kavayaḥ na gṛdhrāḥ
hinvanti dhīrāḥ daśabhiḥ kṣipābhiḥ sam añjate rūpam apām rasena
tvayā vayam pavamānena soma bhare kṛtam vi cinuyāma śaśvat
tat naḥ mitraḥ varuṇaḥ māmahantām aditiḥ sindhuḥ pṛthivī uta dyauḥ
abhi naḥ vāja sātamam rayim arṣa puruspṛham
indo sahasrabharṇasam tuvi dyumnam vibhvāsaham
pari sya suvānaḥ avyayam rathe na varma avyata
induḥ abhi druṇā hitaḥ hiyānaḥ dhārābhiḥ akṣār
pari sya suvānaḥ akṣāḥ induḥ avye mada cyutaḥ
dhārā yaḥ ūrdhvaḥ adhvare bhrājā na eti gavyayuḥ
sa hi tvam deva śaśvate vasu martāya dāśuṣe
indo sahasriṇam rayim śata ātmānam vivāsasi
vayam te asya vṛtra han vaso vasvaḥ puruspṛhaḥ
ni nediṣṭhatamāḥ iṣaḥ syāma sumnasya adhrigo
dvis yam pañca sva yaśasam svasāraḥ adri saṃhatam
priyam indrasya kāmyam prasnāpayanti ūrmiṇam
pari tyam haryatam harim babhrum punanti vāreṇa
yaḥ devān viśvāṁ id pari madena saha gacchati
asya vaḥ hi avasā pāntaḥ dakṣa sādhanam
yaḥ sūriṣu śravaḥ bṛhat dadhe svar na haryataḥ
sa vām yajñeṣu mānavī induḥ janiṣṭa rodasī
devaḥ devī giriṣṭhāḥ asredhan tam tuviṣvaṇi
indrāya soma pātave vṛtra ghne pari sicyase
nare ca dakṣiṇāvate devāya sadanāsade
te pratnāsaḥ vyuṣṭiṣu somāḥ pavitre akṣaran
apaprothantaḥ sanutar huraścitaḥ prātar tāṁ apracetasaḥ
tam sakhāyaḥ purorucam yūyam vayam ca sūrayaḥ
aśyāma vājagandhyam sanema vāja pastyam
ā haryatāya dhṛṣṇave dhanuḥ tanvanti pauṃsyam
śukrām vayanti asurāya nirṇijam vipām agre mahīyuvaḥ
adha kṣapā pariṣkṛtaḥ vājāṁ abhi pra gāhate
yadi vivasvataḥ dhiyaḥ harim hinvanti yātave
tam asya marjayāmasi madaḥ yaḥ indra pātamaḥ
yam gāvaḥ āsabhiḥ dadhuḥ purā nūnam ca sūrayaḥ
tam gāthayā purāṇyā punānam abhi anūṣata
uta u kṛpanta dhītayaḥ devānām nāma bibhratīḥ
tam ukṣamāṇam avyaye vāre punanti dharṇasim
dūtam na pūrvacittaye ā śāsate manīṣiṇaḥ
sa punānaḥ madintamaḥ somaḥ camūṣu sīdati
paśau na retaḥ ādadhat patiḥ vacasyate dhiyaḥ
sa mṛjyate su karmabhiḥ devaḥ devebhyaḥ sutaḥ
vide yat āsu saṃdadiḥ mahīḥ apaḥ vi gāhate
sutaḥ indo pavitre ā nṛbhiḥ yataḥ vi nīyase
indrāya matsarintamaḥ camūṣu ā ni sīdasi
abhi navante adruhaḥ priyam indrasya kāmyam
vatsam na pūrve āyuni jātam rihanti mātaraḥ
punānaḥ indo ā bhara soma dvibarhasam rayim
tvam vasūni puṣyasi viśvāni dāśuṣaḥ gṛhe
tvam dhiyam manaḥ yujam sṛja vṛṣṭim na tanyatuḥ
tvam vasūni pārthivā divyā ca soma puṣyasi
pari te jigyuṣaḥ yathā dhārā sutasya dhāvati
raṃhamāṇā vi avyayam vāram vājī iva sānasiḥ
kratve dakṣāya naḥ kave pavasva soma dhārayā
indrāya pātave sutaḥ mitrāya varuṇāya ca
pavasva vāja sātamaḥ pavitre dhārayā sutaḥ
indrāya soma viṣṇave devebhyaḥ madhumattamaḥ
tvām rihanti mātaraḥ harim pavitre adruhaḥ
vatsam jātam na dhenavaḥ pavamāna vidharmaṇi
pavamāna mahi śravaḥ citrebhiḥ yāsi raśmibhiḥ
śardhan tamāṃsi jighnase viśvāni dāśuṣaḥ gṛhe
tvam dyām ca mahi vrata pṛthivīm ca ati jabhriṣe
prati drāpim amuñcathāḥ pavamāna mahitvanā
purojitī vaḥ andhasaḥ sutāya mādayitnave
apa śvānam śnathiṣṭana sakhāyaḥ dīrghajihvyam
yaḥ dhārayā pāvakayā pariprasyandate sutaḥ
induḥ aśvaḥ na kṛtvyaḥ
tam duroṣam abhi naraḥ somam viśvācyā dhiyā
yajñam hinvanti adribhiḥ
sutāsaḥ madhumattamāḥ somāḥ indrāya mandinaḥ
pavitravantaḥ akṣaran devān gacchantu vaḥ madāḥ
induḥ indrāya pavate iti devāsaḥ abruvan
vācaspatiḥ makhasyate viśvasya īśānaḥ ojasā
sahasra dhāraḥ pavate samudraḥ vācamīṅkhayaḥ
somaḥ patiḥ rayīṇām sakhā indrasya dive dive
ayam pūṣā rayiḥ bhagaḥ somaḥ punānaḥ arṣati
patiḥ viśvasya bhūmanaḥ vi akhyat rodasī ubhe
sam u priyāḥ anūṣata gāvaḥ madāya ghṛṣvayaḥ
somāsaḥ kṛṇvate pathaḥ pavamānāsaḥ indavaḥ
yaḥ ojiṣṭhaḥ tam ā bhara pavamāna śravāyyam
yaḥ pañca carṣaṇīḥ abhi rayim yena vanāmahai
somāḥ pavante indavaḥ asmabhyam gātu vittamāḥ
mitrāḥ suvānāḥ arepasaḥ svādhyaḥ svar vidaḥ
suṣvāṇāsaḥ vi adribhiḥ citānāḥ goḥ adhi tvaci
iṣam asmabhyam abhitas sam asvaran vasu vidaḥ
ete pūtāḥ vipaścitaḥ somāsaḥ dadhi āśiraḥ
sūryāsaḥ na darśatāsaḥ jigatnavaḥ dhruvāḥ ghṛte
pra sunvānasya andhasaḥ martaḥ na vṛta tat vacaḥ
apa śvānam arādhasam hata makham na bhṛgavaḥ
ā jāmiḥ atke avyata bhuje na putraḥ oṇyoḥ
sarat jāraḥ na yoṣaṇām varaḥ na yonim āsadam
sa vīraḥ dakṣa sādhanaḥ vi yaḥ tastambha rodasī
hariḥ pavitre avyata vedhāḥ na yonim āsadam
avyaḥ vārebhiḥ pavate somaḥ gavye adhi tvaci
kanikradat vṛṣā hariḥ indrasya abhi eti niṣkṛtam
krāṇā śiśuḥ mahīnām hinvan ṛtasya dīdhitim
viśvā pari priyā bhuvat adha dvitā
upa tritasya pāṣyoḥ abhakta yat guhā padam
yajñasya sapta dhāmabhiḥ adha priyam
trīṇi tritasya dhārayā pṛṣṭheṣu eraya rayim
mimīte asya yojanā vi su kratuḥ
jajñānam sapta mātaraḥ vedhām aśāsata śriye
ayam dhruvaḥ rayīṇām ciketa yat
asya vrate sajoṣasaḥ viśve devāsaḥ adruhaḥ
spārhāḥ bhavanti rantayaḥ juṣanta yat
yam ī garbham ṛtāvṛdhaḥ dṛśe cārum ajījanan
kavim maṃhiṣṭham adhvare puruspṛham
samīcīne abhi tmanā yahvī ṛtasya mātarā
tanvānāḥ yajñam ānuṣak yat añjate
kratvā śukrebhiḥ akṣabhiḥ ṛṇoḥ apa vrajam divaḥ
hinvan ṛtasya dīdhitim pra adhvare
pra punānāya vedhase somāya vacaḥ udyatam
bhṛtim na bharā matibhiḥ jujoṣate
pari vārāṇi avyayā gobhiḥ añjānaḥ arṣati
trī sadhasthā punānaḥ kṛṇute hariḥ
pari kośam madhuścutam avyaye vāre arṣati
abhi vāṇīḥ ṛṣīṇām sapta nūṣata
pariṇetā matīnām viśva devaḥ adābhyaḥ
somaḥ punānaḥ camvoḥ viśat hariḥ
pari daivīḥ anu svadhāḥ indreṇa yāhi sa ratham
punānaḥ vāghat vāghadbhiḥ amartyaḥ
pari saptiḥ na vājayuḥ devaḥ devebhyaḥ sutaḥ
vyānaśiḥ pavamānaḥ vi dhāvati
sakhāyaḥ ā ni sīdata punānāya pra gāyata
śiśum na yajñaiḥ pari bhūṣata śriye
sam ī vatsam na mātṛbhiḥ sṛjata gaya sādhanam
devāvyam madam abhi dvi śavasam
punāta dakṣa sādhanam yathā śardhāya vītaye
yathā mitrāya varuṇāya śantamaḥ
asmabhyam tvā vasu vidam abhi vāṇīḥ anūṣata
gobhiḥ te varṇam abhi vāsayāmasi
sa naḥ madānām pate indo deva psarāḥ asi
sakhā iva sakhye gātu vittamaḥ bhava
sanemi kṛdhī asmat ā rakṣasam kaṃcid atriṇam
_ dvayum aṃhaḥ yuyodhi naḥ
tam vaḥ sakhāyaḥ madāya punānam abhi gāyata
śiśum na yajñaiḥ svadayanta gūrtibhiḥ
sam vatsaḥ iva mātṛbhiḥ induḥ hinvānaḥ ajyate
devāvīḥ madaḥ matibhiḥ pariṣkṛtaḥ
ayam dakṣāya sādhanaḥ ayam śardhāya vītaye
ayam devebhyaḥ madhumattamaḥ sutaḥ
gomat naḥ indo aśvavat sutaḥ su dakṣa dhanva
śucim te varṇam adhi goṣu dīdharam
sa naḥ harīṇām pate indo deva psarastamaḥ
sakhā iva sakhye naryaḥ ruce bhava
sanemi tvam asmat ām adevam kaṃcid atriṇam
sāhvāṁ indo pari bādhaḥ apa dvayum
indram accha sutāḥ ime vṛṣaṇam yantu harayaḥ
śruṣṭī jātāsaḥ indavaḥ svar vidaḥ
ayam bharāya sānasiḥ indrāya pavate sutaḥ
somaḥ jaitrasya cetati yathā vide
asya id indraḥ madeṣu ā grābham gṛbhṇīta sānasim
vajram ca vṛṣaṇam bharat sam apsujit
pra dhanva soma jāgṛviḥ indrāya indo pari srava
dyumantam śuṣmam ā bhara svar vidam
indrāya vṛṣaṇam madam pavasva viśva darśataḥ
sahasra yāmā pathikṛt vicakṣaṇaḥ
asmabhyam gātu vittamaḥ devebhyaḥ madhumattamaḥ
sahasram yāhi pathibhiḥ kanikradat
pavasva deva vītaye indo dhārābhiḥ ojasā
ā kalaśam madhumān soma naḥ sadaḥ
tava drapsāḥ uda prutaḥ indram madāya vāvṛdhuḥ
tvām devāsaḥ amṛtāya kam papuḥ
ā naḥ sutāsaḥ indavaḥ punānāḥ dhāvata rayim
_ rīti apaḥ svar vidaḥ
somaḥ punānaḥ ūrmiṇā avyaḥ vāram vi dhāvati
agre vācaḥ pavamānaḥ kanikradat
dhībhiḥ hinvanti vājinam vane krīḍantam atyavim
abhi tri pṛṣṭham matayaḥ sam asvaran
asarji kalaśāṁ abhi mīḍhe saptiḥ na vājayuḥ
punānaḥ vācam janayan asiṣyadat
pavate haryataḥ hariḥ ati hvarāṃsi raṃhyā
abhyarṣan stotṛbhyaḥ vīravat yaśaḥ
ayā pavasva devayuḥ madhoḥ dhārāḥ asṛkṣata
rebhan pavitram pari eṣi viśvatas
pari itas siñcata sutam somaḥ yaḥ uttamam haviḥ
dadhanvāṁ yaḥ naryaḥ apsu antar ā suṣāva somam adribhiḥ
nūnam punānaḥ avibhiḥ pari srava adabdhaḥ surabhintaraḥ
sute cit tvā apsu madāmaḥ andhasā śrīṇantaḥ gobhiḥ uttaram
pari suvānaḥ cakṣase deva mādanaḥ kratuḥ induḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ
punānaḥ soma dhārayā apaḥ vasānaḥ arṣasi
ā ratna dhāḥ yonim ṛtasya sīdasi utsaḥ deva hiraṇyayaḥ
duhānaḥ ūdhar divyam madhu priyam pratnam sadhastham āsadat
āpṛcchyam dharuṇam vājī arṣati nṛbhiḥ dhūtaḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ
punānaḥ soma jāgṛviḥ avyaḥ vāre pari priyaḥ
tvam vipraḥ abhavaḥ aṅgirastamaḥ madhvā yajñam mimikṣa naḥ
somaḥ mīḍhvān pavate gātu vittamaḥ ṛṣiḥ vipraḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ
tvam kaviḥ abhavaḥ deva vītamaḥ ā sūryam rohayaḥ divi
somaḥ u suvānaḥ sotṛbhiḥ adhi snubhiḥ avīnām
aśvayā iva haritā yāti dhārayā mandrayā yāti dhārayā
anūpe gomān gobhiḥ akṣār somaḥ dugdhābhiḥ akṣār
samudram na saṃvaraṇāni agman mandī madāya tośate
ā soma suvānaḥ adribhiḥ tiras vārāṇi avyayā
janaḥ na puri camvoḥ viśat hariḥ sadaḥ vaneṣu dadhiṣe
sa māmṛje tiras aṇvāni meṣyaḥ mīḍhe saptiḥ na vājayuḥ
anumādyaḥ pavamānaḥ manīṣibhiḥ somaḥ viprebhiḥ ṛkvabhiḥ
pra soma deva vītaye sindhuḥ na pipye arṇasā
aṃśoḥ payasā madiraḥ na jāgṛviḥ acchā kośam madhuścutam
ā haryataḥ arjune atke avyata priyaḥ sūnuḥ na marjyaḥ
tam īm hinvanti apasaḥ yathā ratham nadīṣu ā gabhastyoḥ
abhi somāsaḥ āyavaḥ pavante madyam madam
samudrasya adhi viṣṭapi manīṣiṇaḥ matsarāsaḥ svar vidaḥ
tarat samudram pavamānaḥ ūrmiṇā rājā devaḥ ṛtam bṛhat
arṣat mitrasya varuṇasya dharmaṇā pra hinvānaḥ ṛtam bṛhat
nṛbhiḥ yemānaḥ haryataḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ rājā devaḥ samudriyaḥ
indrāya pavate madaḥ somaḥ marutvate sutaḥ
sahasra dhāraḥ ati avyam arṣati tam ī mṛjanti āyavaḥ
punānaḥ camū janayan matim kaviḥ somaḥ deveṣu raṇyati
apaḥ vasānaḥ pari gobhiḥ uttaraḥ sīdan vaneṣu avyata
tava aham soma rāraṇa sakhye indo dive dive
purūṇi babhro ni caranti mām ava paridhīṃr ati tān ihi
uta aham naktam uta soma te divā sakhyāya babhro ūdhani
ghṛṇā tapantam ati sūryam paras śakunāḥ iva paptima
mṛjyamānaḥ su hastya samudre vācam invasi
rayim piśaṅgam bahulam puruspṛham pavamāna abhi arṣasi
mṛjānaḥ vāre pavamānaḥ avyaye vṛṣā ava cakradaḥ vane
devānām soma pavamāna niṣkṛtam gobhiḥ añjānaḥ arṣasi
pavasva vāja sātaye abhi viśvāni kāvyā
tvam samudram prathamaḥ vi dhārayaḥ devebhyaḥ soma matsaraḥ
sa tu pavasva pari pārthivam rajaḥ divyā ca soma dharmabhiḥ
tvām viprāsaḥ matibhiḥ vicakṣaṇa śubhram hinvanti dhītibhiḥ
pavamānāḥ asṛkṣata pavitram ati dhārayā
marutvantaḥ matsarāḥ indriyāḥ hayāḥ medhām abhi prayāṃsi ca
apaḥ vasānaḥ pari kośam arṣati induḥ hiyānaḥ sotṛbhiḥ
janayan jyotiḥ mandanā avīvaśat gāḥ kṛṇvānaḥ na nirṇijam
pavasva madhumattamaḥ indrāya soma kratu vittamaḥ madaḥ
mahi dyukṣatamaḥ madaḥ
yasya te pītvā vṛṣabhaḥ vṛṣāyate asya pītā svar vidaḥ
sa su praketaḥ abhi akramīt iṣaḥ acchā vājam na etaśaḥ
tvam hi aṅga daivyā pavamāna janimāni dyumattamaḥ
amṛta tvāya ghoṣayaḥ
yena navagvaḥ dadhyaṅ aporṇute yena viprāsaḥ āpire
devānām sumne amṛtasya cāruṇaḥ yena śravāṃsi ānaśuḥ
eṣa sya dhārayā sutaḥ avyaḥ vārebhiḥ pavate madintamaḥ
krīḍan ūrmiḥ apām iva
yaḥ usriyāḥ apyāḥ antar aśmanaḥ niḥ gāḥ akṛntat ojasā
abhi vrajam tatniṣe gavyam aśvyam varmī iva dhṛṣṇo ā ruja
ā sota pari siñcata aśvam na stomam apturam rajasturam
vanakrakṣam uda prutam
sahasra dhāram vṛṣabham payovṛdham priyam devāya janmane
ṛtena yaḥ ṛta jātaḥ vivāvṛdhe rājā devaḥ ṛtam bṛhat
abhi dyumnam bṛhat yaśaḥ iṣaḥ pate didīhi deva devayuḥ
vi kośam madhyamam yuva
ā vacyasva su dakṣa camvoḥ sutaḥ viśām vahniḥ na viśpatiḥ
vṛṣṭim divaḥ pavasva rītim apām jinva gaviṣṭaye dhiyaḥ
etam u tyam mada cyutam sahasra dhāram vṛṣabham divaḥ duhuḥ
viśvā vasūni bibhratam
vṛṣā vi jajñe janayan amartyaḥ pratapan jyotiṣā tamaḥ
sa suṣṭutaḥ kavibhiḥ nirṇijam dadhe tri dhātu asya daṃsasā
sa sunve yaḥ vasūnām yaḥ rāyām ānetā yaḥ iﾱānām
somaḥ yaḥ su kṣitīnām
yasya naḥ indraḥ pibāt yasya marutaḥ yasya vā aryamaṇā bhagaḥ
ā yena mitrāvaruṇā karāmahe ā indram avase mahe
indrāya soma pātave nṛbhiḥ yataḥ su āyudhaḥ madintamaḥ
pavasva madhumattamaḥ
indrasya hārdi soma dhānam ā viśa samudram iva sindhavaḥ
juṣṭaḥ mitrāya varuṇāya vāyave divaḥ viṣṭambhaḥ uttamaḥ
pari pra dhanva indrāya soma svāduḥ mitrāya pūṣṇe bhagāya
indraḥ te soma sutasya peyāḥ kratve dakṣāya viśve ca devāḥ
eva amṛtāya mahe kṣayāya sa śukraḥ arṣa divyaḥ pīyūṣaḥ
pavasva soma mahān samudraḥ pitā devānām viśvā abhi dhāma
śukraḥ pavasva devebhyaḥ soma dive pṛthivyai śam ca prajāyai
divaḥ dhartā asi śukraḥ pīyūṣaḥ satye vidharman vājī pavasva
pavasva soma dyumnī su dhāraḥ mahām avīnām anu pūrvyaḥ
nṛbhiḥ yemānaḥ jajñānaḥ pūtaḥ kṣarat viśvāni mandraḥ svar vid
induḥ punānaḥ prajām urāṇaḥ karat viśvāni draviṇāni naḥ
pavasva soma kratve dakṣāya aśvaḥ na niktaḥ vājī dhanāya
tam te sotāraḥ rasam madāya punanti somam mahe dyumnāya
śiśum jajñānam harim mṛjanti pavitre somam devebhyaḥ indum
induḥ paviṣṭa cāruḥ madāya apām upasthe kaviḥ bhagāya
bibharti cāru indrasya nāma yena viśvāni vṛtrā jaghāna
pibanti asya viśve devāsaḥ gobhiḥ śrītasya nṛbhiḥ sutasya
pra suvānaḥ akṣār sahasra dhāraḥ tiras pavitram vi vāram avyam
sa vājī akṣār sahasra retāḥ adbhiḥ mṛjānaḥ gobhiḥ śrīṇānaḥ
pra soma yāhi indrasya kukṣā nṛbhiḥ yemānaḥ adribhiḥ sutaḥ
asarji vājī tiras pavitram indrāya somaḥ sahasra dhāraḥ
añjanti enam madhvaḥ rasena indrāya vṛṣṇe indum madāya
devebhyaḥ tvā vṛthā pājase apaḥ vasānam harim mṛjanti
induḥ indrāya tośate ni tośate śrīṇan ugraḥ riṇan apaḥ
pari u su pra dhanva vāja sātaye pari vṛtrāṇi sakṣaṇiḥ
dviṣaḥ taradhyai ṛṇayāḥ naḥ īyase
anu hi tvā sutam soma madāmasi mahe samarya rājye
vājāṁ abhi pavamāna pra gāhase
ajījanaḥ hi pavamāna sūryam vidhāre śakmanā payaḥ
go jīrayā raṃhamāṇaḥ purandhyā
ajījanaḥ amṛta martyeṣu ām ṛtasya dharman amṛtasya cāruṇaḥ
sadā saraḥ vājam acchā saniṣyadat
abhi abhi hi śravasā tatarditha utsam na kaṃcid jana pānam akṣitam
śaryābhiḥ na bharamāṇaḥ gabhastyoḥ
āt īm kecid paśyamānāsaḥ āpyam vasu rucaḥ divyāḥ abhi anūṣata
vāram na devaḥ savitā vi ūrṇute
tve soma prathamāḥ vṛkta barhiṣaḥ mahe vājāya śravase dhiyam dadhuḥ
sa tvam naḥ vīra vīryāya codaya
divaḥ pīyūṣam pūrvyam yat ukthyam mahaḥ gāhāt divaḥ ā niḥ adhukṣata
indram abhi jāyamānam sam asvaran
adha yat ime pavamāna rodasī imā ca viśvā bhuvanā abhi majmanā
yūthe na niṣṭhāḥ vṛṣabhaḥ vi tiṣṭhase
somaḥ punānaḥ avyaye vāre śiśuḥ na krīḍan pavamānaḥ akṣār
sahasra dhāraḥ śata vājaḥ induḥ
eṣa punānaḥ madhumāṁ ṛtāvā indrāya induḥ pavate svāduḥ ūrmiḥ
vāja saniḥ varivaḥ vid vayaḥ dhāḥ
sa pavasva sahamānaḥ pṛtanyūn sedhan rakṣāṃsi apa durgahāṇi
su āyudhaḥ sāsahvān soma śatrūn
ayā rucā hariṇyā punānaḥ viśvā dveṣāṃsi tarati svayugvabhiḥ sūraḥ na svayugvabhiḥ
dhārā sutasya rocate punānaḥ aruṣaḥ hariḥ
viśvā yat rūpā pariyāti ṛkvabhiḥ sapta āsyebhiḥ ṛkvabhiḥ
tvam tyad paṇīnām vidaḥ vasu sam mātṛbhiḥ marjayasi sve ā dame ṛtasya dhītibhiḥ dame
parāvataḥ na sāma tat yatra raṇanti dhītayaḥ
tri dhātubhiḥ aruṣībhiḥ vayaḥ dadhe rocamānaḥ vayaḥ dadhe
pūrvām anu pradiśam yāti cekitat sam raśmibhiḥ yatate darśataḥ rathaḥ daivyaḥ darśataḥ rathaḥ
agman ukthāni pauṃsyā indram jaitrāya harṣayan
vajraḥ ca yat bhavathaḥ an apacyutā samatsu an apacyutā
nānānam vai u na u dhiyaḥ vi vratāni janānām
takṣā riṣṭam rutam bhiṣaj brahmā sunvantam icchati indrāya indo pari srava
jaratībhiḥ oṣadhībhiḥ parṇebhiḥ śakunānām
kārmāraḥ aśmabhiḥ dyubhiḥ hiraṇyavantam icchati indrāya indo pari srava
kāruḥ aham tataḥ bhiṣaj upala prakṣiṇī nanā
nānā dhiyaḥ vasūyavaḥ anu gāḥ iva tasthima indrāya indo pari srava
aśvaḥ voḍhā sukham ratham hasanām upamantriṇaḥ
śepaḥ romaṇvantau bhedau vāḥ id maṇḍūkaḥ icchati indrāya indo pari srava
śaryaṇāvati somam indraḥ pibatu vṛtra hā
balam dadhānaḥ ātmani kariṣyan vīryam mahat indrāya indo pari srava
ā pavasva diśām pate ārjīkāt soma mīḍhvaḥ
ṛta vākena satyena śraddhayā tapasā sutaḥ indrāya indo pari srava
parjanya vṛddham mahiṣam tam sūryasya duhitā abharat
tam gandharvāḥ prati agṛbhṇan tam some rasam ādadhuḥ indrāya indo pari srava
ṛtam vadan ṛta dyumna satyam vadan satya karman
śraddhām vadan soma rājan dhātrā soma pariṣkṛtaḥ indrāya indo pari srava
satyam ugrasya bṛhataḥ sam sravanti saṃsravāḥ
sam yanti rasinaḥ rasāḥ punānaḥ brahmaṇā hare indrāya indo pari srava
yatra brahmā pavamāna chandasyām vācam vadan
grāvṇā some mahīyate somena ānandam janayan indrāya indo pari srava
yatra jyotiḥ ajasram yasmin loke svar hitam
tasmin mām dhehi pavamāna amṛte loke akṣite indrāya indo pari srava
yatra rājā vaivasvataḥ yatra avarodhanam divaḥ
yatra amūḥ yahvatīḥ āpaḥ tatra mām amṛtam kṛdhi indrāya indo pari srava
yatra anukāmam caraṇam trināke tridive divaḥ
lokāḥ yatra jyotiṣmantaḥ tatra mām amṛtam kṛdhi indrāya indo pari srava
yatra kāmāḥ nikāmāḥ ca yatra bradhnasya viṣṭapam
svadhā ca yatra tṛptiḥ ca tatra mām amṛtam kṛdhi indrāya indo pari srava
yatra ānandāḥ ca modāḥ ca mudaḥ pramudaḥ āsate
kāmasya yatra āptāḥ kāmāḥ tatra mām amṛtam kṛdhi indrāya indo pari srava
yaḥ indoḥ pavamānasya anu dhāmāni akramīt
tam āhuḥ suprajāḥ iti yaḥ te soma avidhat manaḥ indrāya indo pari srava
ṛṣe mantra kṛtām stomaiḥ kaśyapa udvardhayan giraḥ
somam namasya rājānam yaḥ jajñe vīrudhām patiḥ indrāya indo pari srava
sapta diśaḥ nānā sūryāḥ sapta hotāraḥ ṛtvijaḥ
devāḥ ādityāḥ ye sapta tebhiḥ soma abhi rakṣa naḥ indrāya indo pari srava
yat te rājan śṛtam haviḥ tena soma abhi rakṣa naḥ
arātīvā mā naḥ tārīt mā u ca naḥ kim cana amamat indrāya indo pari srava
agre bṛhan uṣasām ūrdhvaḥ asthāt niḥ jaganvān tamasaḥ jyotiṣā agāt
agniḥ bhānunā ruśatā su aṅgaḥ ā jātaḥ viśvā sadmāni aprāḥ
sa jātaḥ garbhaḥ asi rodasyoḥ agne cāruḥ vi bhṛtaḥ oṣadhīṣu
citraḥ śiśuḥ pari tamāṃsi aktūn pra mātṛbhyaḥ adhi kanikradat gāḥ
viṣṇuḥ itthā paramam asya vidvān jātaḥ bṛhan abhi pāti tṛtīyam
āsā yat asya payaḥ akrata svam sacetasaḥ abhi arcanti atra
atas u tvā pitubhṛtaḥ janitrīḥ annāvṛdham prati caranti annaiḥ
tāḥ īm prati eṣi punar anya rūpāḥ asi tvam vikṣu mānuṣīṣu hotā
hotāram citra ratham adhvarasya yajñasya yajñasya ketum ruśantam
pratyardhim devasya devasya mahnā śriyā tu agnim atithim janānām
sa tu vastrāṇi adha peśanāni vasānaḥ agniḥ nābhā pṛthivyāḥ
aruṣaḥ jātaḥ pade iḍāyāḥ purohitaḥ rājan yakṣi iha devān
ā hi dyāvāpṛthivī agne ubhe sadā putraḥ na mātarā tatantha
pra yāhi acchā uśataḥ yaviṣṭha atha ā vaha sahasya iha devān
piprīhi devāṁ uśataḥ yaviṣṭha vidvāṁ ṛtūn ṛtu pate yaja iha
ye daivyāḥ ṛtvijaḥ tebhiḥ agne tvam hotṝṇām asi āyajiṣṭhaḥ
veṣi hotram uta potram janānām mandhātā asi draviṇaḥ dāḥ ṛtāvā
svāhā vayam kṛṇavāmā havīṃṣi devaḥ devān yajatu agniḥ arhan
ā devānām api panthām aganma yat śaknavāma tat anu pravoḍhum
agniḥ vidvān sa yajāt sa id u hotā saḥ adhvarān saḥ ṛtūn kalpayāti
yat vaḥ vayam pra mināma vratāni viduṣām devau aviduṣṭarāsaḥ
agniḥ ṭat viśvam ā pṛṇāti vidvān yebhiḥ devāṁ ṛtubhiḥ kalpayāti
yat pākatrā manasā dīna dakṣāḥ na yajñasya manvate martyāsaḥ
agniḥ tad hotā kratu vid vijānan yajiṣṭhaḥ devāṁ ṛtuśas yajāti
viśveṣām hi adhvarāṇām anīkam citram ketum janitā tvā jajāna
saḥ ā yajasva nṛvatīḥ anu kṣāḥ spārhāḥ iṣaḥ kṣumatīḥ viśvajanyāḥ
yam tvā dyāvāpṛthivī yam tvā āpaḥ tvaṣṭā yam tvā su janimā jajāna
panthām anu pravidvān pitṛyāṇam dyumat agne samidhānaḥ vi bhāhi
inaḥ rājan aratiḥ samiddhaḥ raudraḥ dakṣāya suṣumāṁ adarśi
cikit vi bhāti bhāsā bṛhatā asiknīm eti ruśatīm apājan
kṛṣṇām yat _ abhi varpasā bhūt janayan yoṣām bṛhataḥ pituḥ jām
ūrdhvam bhānum sūryasya stabhāyan divaḥ vasubhiḥ aratiḥ vi bhāti
bhadraḥ bhadrayā sacamānaḥ āgāt svasāram jāraḥ abhi eti paścāt
su praketaiḥ dyubhiḥ agniḥ vitiṣṭhan ruśadbhiḥ varṇaiḥ abhi rāmam asthāt
asya yāmāsaḥ bṛhataḥ na vagnūn indhānāḥ agneḥ sakhyuḥ śivasya
īḍyasya vṛṣṇaḥ bṛhataḥ svāsaḥ bhāmāsaḥ yāman aktavaḥ cikitre
svanāḥ na yasya bhāmāsaḥ pavante rocamānasya bṛhataḥ su divaḥ
jyeṣṭhebhiḥ yaḥ tejiṣṭhaiḥ krīḍumadbhiḥ varṣiṣṭhebhiḥ bhānubhiḥ nakṣati dyām
asya śuṣmāsaḥ dadṛśāna paveḥ jehamānasya svanayan niyudbhiḥ
pratnebhiḥ yaḥ ruśadbhiḥ devatamaḥ vi rebhadbhiḥ aratiḥ bhāti vibhvā
saḥ ā vakṣi mahi naḥ ā ca satsi divaspṛthivyoḥ aratiḥ yuvatyoḥ
agniḥ sutukaḥ sutukebhiḥ aśvaiḥ rabhasvadbhiḥ rabhasvāṁ ā iha gamyāḥ
pra te yakṣi pra te iyarmi manma bhuvaḥ yathā vandyaḥ naḥ haveṣu
dhanvan iva prapā asi tvam agne iyakṣave pūrave pratna rājan
yam tvā janāsaḥ abhi saṃcaranti gāvaḥ uṣṇam iva vrajam yaviṣṭha
dūtaḥ devānām asi martyānām antar mahān carasi rocanena
śiśum na tvā jenyam vardhayantī mātā bibharti sacanasyamānā
dhanoḥ adhi pravatā yāsi haryan jigīṣase paśuḥ iva avasṛṣṭaḥ
mūrāḥ na vayam cikitvaḥ mahi tvam agne tvam aṅga vitse
śaye vavriḥ carati jihvayā adan rerihyate yuvatim viśpatiḥ san
kūcid jāyate sanayāsu navyaḥ vane tasthau palitaḥ dhūma ketuḥ
asnātā apaḥ vṛṣabhaḥ na veti sacetasaḥ yam praṇayanta martāḥ
tanūtyajā iva taskarā vanargū raśanābhiḥ daśabhiḥ abhi adhītām
iyam te agne navyasī manīṣā yukṣvā ratham na śucayadbhiḥ aṅgaiḥ
brahma ca te jātavedaḥ namaḥ ca iyam ca gīḥ sadam id vardhanī bhūt
rakṣā ṇaḥ agne tanayāni tokā rakṣa uta naḥ tanvaḥ aprayucchan
ekaḥ samudraḥ dharuṇaḥ rayīṇām asmat hṛdaḥ bhūri janmā vi caṣṭe
siṣakti ūdhaḥ niṇyoḥ upasthe utsasya madhye nihitam padam veḥ
samānam nīḍam vṛṣaṇaḥ vasānāḥ sam jagmire mahiṣāḥ arvatībhiḥ
ṛtasya padam kavayaḥ ni pānti guhā nāmāni dadhire parāṇi
ṛtāyinī māyinī sam dadhāte mitvā śiśum jajñatuḥ vardhayantī
viśvasya nābhim carataḥ dhruvasya kaveḥ cit tantum manasā viyantaḥ
ṛtasya hi vartanayaḥ su jātam iṣaḥ vājāya pradivaḥ sacante
adhīvāsam rodasī vāvasāne ghṛtaiḥ annaiḥ vāvṛdhāte madhūnām
sapta svasṝḥ aruṣīḥ vāvaśānaḥ vidvān madhvaḥ ud jabhārā dṛśe kam
antar yeme antarikṣe purājāḥ icchan vavrim avidat pūṣaṇasya
sapta maryādāḥ kavayaḥ tatakṣuḥ tāsām ekām id abhi aṃhuraḥ gāt
āyoḥ ha skambhaḥ upamasya nīḍe pathām visarge dharuṇeṣu tasthau
asat ca sat ca parame vyoman dakṣasya janman aditeḥ upasthe
agniḥ ha naḥ prathama jāḥ ṛtasya pūrve āyuni vṛṣabhaḥ ca dhenuḥ
ayam sa yasya śarman avobhiḥ agneḥ edhate jaritā abhiṣṭau
jyeṣṭhebhiḥ yaḥ bhānubhiḥ ṛṣūṇām paryeti parivītaḥ vibhāvā
yaḥ bhānubhiḥ vibhāvā vibhāti agniḥ devebhiḥ ṛtāvā ajasraḥ
ā yaḥ vivāya sakhyā sakhibhyaḥ aparihvṛtaḥ atyaḥ na saptiḥ
īśe yaḥ viśvasyāḥ deva vīteḥ īśe viśvāyuḥ uṣasaḥ vyuṣṭau
ā yasmin manā havīṃṣi agnau ariṣṭa ratha skabhnāti śūṣaiḥ
śūṣebhiḥ vṛdhaḥ juṣāṇaḥ arkaiḥ devāṁ acchā raghupatvā jigāti
mandraḥ hotā sa juhvā yajiṣṭhaḥ sammiślaḥ agniḥ ā jigharti devān
tam usrām indram na rejamānam agnim gīrbhiḥ namobhiḥ ā kṛṇudhvam
ā yam viprāsaḥ matibhiḥ gṛṇanti jātavedasam juhvam sahānām
sam yasmin viśvā vasūni jagmuḥ vāje na aśvāḥ saptīvantaḥ evaiḥ
asme ūtīḥ indra vātatamāḥ arvācīnāḥ agne ā kṛṇuṣva
adhā hi agne mahnā niṣadyā sadyas jajñānaḥ havyaḥ babhūtha
tam te devāsaḥ anu ketam āyan adha avardhanta prathamāsaḥ ūmāḥ
svasti naḥ divaḥ agne pṛthivyāḥ viśvāyuḥ dhehi yajathāya deva
sacemahi tava dasma praketaiḥ uruṣyā ṇaḥ urubhiḥ deva śaṃsaiḥ
imāḥ agne matayaḥ tubhyam jātāḥ gobhiḥ aśvaiḥ abhi gṛṇanti rādhaḥ
yadā te martaḥ anu bhogam ānaṭ vaso dadhānaḥ matibhiḥ su jāta
agnim manye pitaram agnim āpim agnim bhrātaram sadam id sakhāyam
agneḥ anīkam bṛhataḥ saparyam divi śukram yajatam sūryasya
sidhrāḥ agne dhiyaḥ asme sanutrīḥ yam trāyase dame ā nitya hotā
ṛtāvā sa rohit aśvaḥ purukṣuḥ dyubhiḥ asmai ahabhiḥ vāmam astu
dyubhiḥ hitam mitram iva prayogam pratnam ṛtvijam adhvarasya jāram
bāhubhyām agnim āyavaḥ ajananta vikṣu hotāram ni asādayanta
svayam yajasva divi deva devān kim te pākaḥ kṛṇavat apracetāḥ
yathā ayajaḥ ṛtubhiḥ deva devān evā yajasva tanvam su jāta
bhavā naḥ agne avitā uta gopāḥ bhavā vayaskṛt uta naḥ vayodhāḥ
rāsvā ca naḥ su mahaḥ havyadātim trāsva uta naḥ tanvaḥ aprayucchan
pra ketunā bṛhatā yāti agniḥ ā rodasī vṛṣabhaḥ roravīti
divaḥ cit antāṁ upamāṁ ud ānaṭ apām upasthe mahiṣaḥ vavardha
mumoda garbhaḥ vṛṣabhaḥ kakudmān asremā vatsaḥ śimīvāṁ arāvīt
sa devatātī udyatāni kṛṇvan sveṣu kṣayeṣu prathamaḥ jigāti
ā yaḥ mūrdhānam pitroḥ arabdha ni adhvare dadhire sūraḥ arṇaḥ
asya patman aruṣīḥ aśva budhnāḥ ṛtasya yonau tanvaḥ juṣanta
uṣaḥ uṣaḥ hi vaso agram eṣi tvam yamayoḥ abhavaḥ vibhāvā
ṛtāya sapta dadhiṣe padāni janayan mitram tanve svāyai
bhuvaḥ cakṣuḥ mahaḥ ṛtasya gopāḥ bhuvaḥ varuṇaḥ yat ṛtāya veṣi
bhuvaḥ apām napāt jātavedaḥ bhuvaḥ dūtaḥ yasya havyam jujoṣaḥ
bhuvaḥ yajñasya rajasaḥ ca netā yatrā niyudbhiḥ sacase śivābhiḥ
divi mūrdhānam dadhiṣe svarṣām jihvām agne cakṛṣe havyavāham
asya tritaḥ kratunā vavre antar icchan dhītim pituḥ evaiḥ parasya
sacasyamānaḥ pitroḥ upasthe jāmi bruvāṇaḥ āyudhāni veti
sa pitryāṇi āyudhāni vidvān indra iṣitaḥ āptyaḥ abhi ayudhyat
tri śīrṣāṇam sapta raśmim jaghanvān tvāṣṭrasya cit niḥ sasṛje tritaḥ gāḥ
bhūri id indraḥ ud inakṣantam ojaḥ avābhinat satpatiḥ manyamānam
tvāṣṭrasya cit viśvarūpasya gonām ā cakrāṇaḥ trīṇi śīrṣā parā vark
āpaḥ hi ṣṭhā mayaḥ bhuvaḥ tāḥ naḥ ūrje dadhātana
mahe raṇāya cakṣase
yaḥ vaḥ śivatamaḥ rasaḥ tasya bhājayata iha naḥ
uśatīḥ iva mātaraḥ
tasmai aram gamāma vaḥ yasya kṣayāya jinvatha
āpaḥ janayathā ca naḥ
śam naḥ devīḥ abhiṣṭaye āpaḥ bhavantu pītaye
śam yoḥ abhi sravantu naḥ
īśānāḥ vāryāṇām kṣayantīḥ carṣaṇīnām
apaḥ yācāmi bheṣajam
apsu me somaḥ abravīt antar viśvāni bheṣajā
agnim ca viśva śambhuvam
āpaḥ pṛṇīta bheṣajam varūtham tanve mama
jyok ca sūryam dṛśe
idam āpaḥ pra vahata yat kim ca duritam mayi
yat vā aham abhidudroha yat vā śepe uta anṛtam
ā apaḥ adya anu acāriṣam rasena sam agasmahi
payasvān agne ā gahi tam mā sam sṛja varcasā
ā u cit sakhāyam sakhyā tiras purū cit arṇavam jaganvān
pituḥ napātam ā dadhīta vedhāḥ adhi kṣami prataram dīdhyānaḥ
na te sakhā sakhyam vaṣṭi etat salakṣmā yat viṣurūpā bhavāti
mahaḥ putrāsaḥ asurasya vīrāḥ divaḥ dhartāraḥ urviyā pari
uśanti ghā te amṛtāsaḥ etat ekasya cit tyajasam martyasya
ni te manaḥ manasi dhāyi asme janyuḥ patiḥ tanvam ā
na yat purā cakṛma kad ha nūnam ṛtā vadantaḥ anṛtam
gandharvaḥ apsu apyā ca yoṣā sā naḥ nābhiḥ paramam jāmi tat nau
garbhe nu nau janitā dampatī kaḥ devaḥ tvaṣṭā savitā viśva rūpaḥ
nakir asya pra minanti vratāni veda nau asya pṛthivī uta dyauḥ
kaḥ asya veda prathamasya ahnaḥ kaḥ īm dadarśa kaḥ iha pra vocat
bṛhat mitrasya varuṇasya dhāma kad u bravaḥ āhanaḥ vīcyā nṝn
yamasya mā yamyam kāmaḥ āgan samāne yonau sahaśeyyāya
jāyā iva patye tanvam riricyām vi cit vṛheva rathyā iva cakrā
na tiṣṭhanti na ni miṣanti ete devānām spaśaḥ iha ye caranti
anyena mat āhanaḥ yāhi tūyam tena vi vṛha rathyā iva cakrā
rātrībhiḥ asmai ahabhiḥ daśasyet sūryasya cakṣuḥ muhur ud mimīyāt
divā pṛthivyā mithunā sabandhū yamīḥ yamasya bibhṛyāt ajāmi
ā ghā tā gacchān uttarā yugāni yatra jāmayaḥ kṛṇavan ajāmi
upa barbṛhi vṛṣabhāya bāhum anyam icchasva subhage patim mat
kim bhrātā asat yat anātham bhavāti kim u svasā yat nirṛtiḥ nigacchāt
kāma mūtā bahu etat rapāmi tanvā me tanvam sam pipṛgdhi
na vai u te tanvā tanvam sam papṛcyām pāpam āhuḥ yaḥ svasāram nigacchāt
anyena mat pramudaḥ kalpayasva na te bhrātā subhage vaṣṭi etat
bataḥ bata asi yama na eva te manaḥ hṛdayam ca avidāma
anyā kila tvām kakṣyā iva yuktam pari svajāte libujā iva vṛkṣam
anyam ū ṣu tvam yamī anyaḥ u tvām pari svajāte libujā iva vṛkṣam
tasya vā tvam manaḥ icchā sa vā tava adhā kṛṇuṣva saṃvidam subhadrām
vṛṣā vṛṣṇe duduhe dohasā divaḥ payāṃsi yahvaḥ aditeḥ adābhyaḥ
viśvam sa veda varuṇaḥ yathā dhiyā sa yajñiyaḥ yajatu yajñiyāṁ ṛtūn
gandharvīḥ apyā ca yoṣaṇā nadasya nāde pari pātu me manaḥ
iṣṭasya madhye aditiḥ ni dhātu naḥ bhrātā naḥ jyeṣṭhaḥ prathamaḥ vi vocati
sā u cit nu bhadrā kṣumatī yaśasvatī uṣāḥ uvāsa manave svarvatī
yat īm uśantam uśatām anu kratum agnim hotāram vidathāya jījanan
adha drapsam vibhvam vicakṣaṇam viḥ ābharat iṣitaḥ śyenaḥ adhvare
yadī viśaḥ vṛṇate dasmam āryāḥ agnim hotāram adha dhīḥ ajāyata
sadā asi raṇvaḥ yavasā iva puṣyate hotrābhiḥ agne manuṣaḥ su adhvaraḥ
viprasya vā yat śaśamānaḥ ukthyam vājam sasavāṁ upayāsi bhūribhiḥ
ud īraya pitarā jāraḥ ā bhagam iyakṣati haryataḥ hṛttas iṣyati
vivakti vahniḥ svapasyate makhaḥ taviṣyate asuraḥ vepate matī
yaḥ te agne sumatim martaḥ akṣat sahasaḥ sūno ati sa pra śṛṇve
iṣam dadhānaḥ vahamānaḥ aśvaiḥ ā sa dyumāṁ amavān bhūṣati dyūn
yat agne eṣā samitiḥ bhavāti devī deveṣu yajatā yajatra
ratnā ca yat vibhajāsi svadhāvas bhāgam naḥ atra vasumantam vītāt
śrudhī naḥ agne sadane sadhasthe yukṣva ratham amṛtasya dravitnum
ā naḥ vaha rodasī deva putre mākir devānām apa bhūḥ iha syāḥ
dyāvā ha kṣāmā prathame ṛtena abhiśrāve bhavataḥ satya vācā
devaḥ yat martān yajathāya kṛṇvan sīdat hotā pratyaṅ svam asum yan
devaḥ devān paribhūḥ ṛtena vahā naḥ havyam prathamaḥ cikitvān
dhūma ketuḥ samidhā bhāṛjīkaḥ mandraḥ hotā nityaḥ vācā yajīyān
svāvṛj devasya amṛtam yadī goḥ atas jātāsaḥ dhārayante urvī
viśve devāḥ anu tat te yajuḥ guḥ duhe yat enī divyam ghṛtam vāḥ
arcāmi vām vardhāya apaḥ ghṛtasnū dyāvābhūmī śṛṇutam rodasī me
ahā yat dyāvaḥ asunītim ayan madhvā naḥ atra pitarā śiśītām
kim svid naḥ rājā jagṛhe kad asya ati vratam cakṛmā kaḥ vi veda
mitraḥ cit hi sma juhurāṇaḥ devān ślokaḥ na yātām api vājaḥ asti
durmantu atra amṛtasya nāma salakṣmā yat viṣurūpā bhavāti
yamasya yaḥ manavate sumantu agne tam ṛṣva pāhi aprayucchan
yasmin devāḥ vidathe mādayante vivasvataḥ sadane dhārayante
sūrye jyotiḥ adadhuḥ māsi aktūn pari dyotanim carataḥ ajasrā
yasmin devāḥ manmani saṃcaranti apīcye na vayam asya vidma
mitraḥ naḥ atra aditiḥ anāgān savitā devaḥ varuṇāya vocat
śrudhī naḥ agne sadane sadhasthe yukṣvā ratham amṛtasya dravitnum
ā naḥ vaha rodasī deva putre mākir devānām apa bhūḥ iha syāḥ
yuje vām brahma pūrvyam namobhiḥ vi ślokaḥ etu pathyā iva sūreḥ
śṛṇvantu viśve amṛtasya putrāḥ ā ye dhāmāni divyāni tasthuḥ
yame iva yatamāne yat aitam pra vām bharan mānuṣāḥ devayantaḥ
ā sīdatam svam u lokam vidāne svāsasthe bhavatam indave naḥ
pañca padāni rupaḥ anu aroham catuṣpadīm anu emi vratena
akṣareṇa prati mime etām ṛtasya nābhau adhi sam punāmi
devebhyaḥ kam avṛṇīta mṛtyum prajāyai kam amṛtam na avṛṇīta
bṛhaspatim yajñam akṛṇvata ṛṣim priyām yamaḥ tanvam prārirecīt
sapta kṣaranti śiśave marutvate pitre putrāsaḥ api avīvatan ṛtam
ubhe id asya ubhayasya rājataḥ ubhe yatete ubhayasya puṣyataḥ
pareyivāṃsam pravataḥ mahīḥ anu bahubhyaḥ panthām anupaspaśānam
vaivasvatam saṃgamanam janānām yamam rājānam haviṣā duvasya
yamaḥ naḥ gātum prathamaḥ viveda na eṣā gavyūtiḥ apabhartavai u
yatrā naḥ pūrve pitaraḥ pareyuḥ enā jajñānāḥ pathyāḥ anu svāḥ
mātalī kavyaiḥ yamaḥ aṅgirobhiḥ bṛhaspatiḥ ṛkvabhiḥ vāvṛdhānaḥ
yān ca devāḥ vāvṛdhuḥ ye ca devān svāhā anye svadhayā anye madanti
imam yama prastaram ā hi sīda aṅgirobhiḥ pitṛbhiḥ saṃvidānaḥ
ā tvā mantrāḥ kavi śastāḥ vahantu enā rājan haviṣā mādayasva
aṅgirobhiḥ ā gahi yajñiyebhiḥ yama vairūpaiḥ iha mādayasva
vivasvantam huve yaḥ pitā te asmin yajñe barhiṣi ā niṣadya
aṅgirasaḥ naḥ pitaraḥ navagvāḥ atharvāṇaḥ bhṛgavaḥ somyāsaḥ
teṣām vayam sumatau yajñiyānām api bhadre saumanase syāma
prehi prehi pathibhiḥ pūrvyebhiḥ yatrā naḥ pūrve pitaraḥ pareyuḥ
ubhā rājānā svadhayā madantā yamam paśyāsi varuṇam ca devam
sam gacchasva pitṛbhiḥ sam yamena iṣṭāpūrtena parame vyoman
hitvāya avadyam punar astam ehi sam gacchasva tanvā suvarcāḥ
apeta vīta vi ca sarpata atas asmai etam pitaraḥ lokam akran
ahobhiḥ adbhiḥ aktubhiḥ vyaktam yamaḥ dadāti avasānam asmai
ati drava sārameyau śvānau catur akṣau śabalau sādhunā pathā
athā pitṝn suvidatrāṁ upehi yamena ye sadhamādam madanti
yau te śvānau yama rakṣitārau catur akṣau pathi rakṣī nṛ cakṣasau
tābhyām enam pari dehi rājan svasti ca asmai anamīvam ca dhehi
urūṇasau asutṛpau udumbalau yamasya dūtau carataḥ janāṁ anu
tau asmabhyam dṛśaye sūryāya punar dātām asum adya iha bhadram
yamāya somam sunuta yamāya juhutā haviḥ
yamam ha yajñaḥ gacchati agni dūtaḥ araṃkṛtaḥ
yamāya ghṛtavat haviḥ juhota pra ca tiṣṭhata
sa naḥ deveṣu ā yamat dīrgham āyuḥ pra jīvase
yamāya madhumattamam rājñe havyam juhotana
idam namaḥ ṛṣibhyaḥ pūrvajebhyaḥ pūrvebhyaḥ pathikṛdbhyaḥ
trikadrukebhiḥ patati ṣaṣ urvīḥ ekam id bṛhat
triṣṭubh gāyatrī chandāṃsi sarvā tā yame āhitā
ud īratām avare ud parāsaḥ ud madhyamāḥ pitaraḥ somyāsaḥ
asum ye īyuḥ avṛkāḥ ṛta jñāḥ te naḥ avantu pitaraḥ haveṣu
idam pitṛbhyaḥ namaḥ astu adya ye pūrvāsaḥ ye uparāsaḥ īyuḥ
ye pārthive rajasi ā niṣattāḥ ye vā nūnam su vṛjanāsu vikṣu
ā aham pitṝn suvidatrāṁ avitsi napātam ca vikramaṇam ca viṣṇoḥ
barhiṣadaḥ ye svadhayā sutasya bhajanta pitvaḥ te iha āgamiṣṭhāḥ
barhiṣadaḥ pitaraḥ ūtī arvāk imā vaḥ havyā cakṛma juṣadhvam
te ā gata avasā śantamena athā naḥ śam yoḥ arapaḥ dadhāta
upahūtāḥ pitaraḥ somyāsaḥ barhiṣyeṣu nidhiṣu priyeṣu
te ā gamantu te iha śruvantu adhi bruvantu te avantu asmān
ācyā jānu dakṣiṇatas niṣadya imam yajñam abhi gṛṇīta viśve
mā hiṃsiṣṭa pitaraḥ kena cit naḥ yat vaḥ āgaḥ puruṣa tā karāma
āsīnāsaḥ aruṇīnām upasthe rayim dhatta dāśuṣe martyāya
putrebhyaḥ pitaraḥ tasya vasvaḥ pra yacchata te iha ūrjam dadhāta
ye naḥ pūrve pitaraḥ somyāsaḥ anūhire soma pītham vasiṣṭhāḥ
tebhiḥ yamaḥ sam rarāṇaḥ havīṃṣi uśan uśadbhiḥ pratikāmam attu
ye tātṛṣuḥ devatrā jehamānāḥ hotrāvidaḥ stoma taṣṭāsaḥ arkaiḥ
ā agne yāhi suvidatrebhiḥ arvāṅ satyaiḥ kavyaiḥ pitṛbhiḥ gharma sadbhiḥ
ye satyāsaḥ haviradaḥ haviṣpāḥ indreṇa devaiḥ sa ratham dadhānāḥ
ā agne yāhi sahasram deva vandaiḥ paraiḥ pūrvaiḥ pitṛbhiḥ gharma sadbhiḥ
agniṣvāttāḥ pitaraḥ ā iha gacchata sadaḥ sadaḥ sadata su praṇītayaḥ
attā havīṃṣi prayatāni barhiṣi athā rayim sarva vīram dadhātana
tvam agne īḍitaḥ jātavedaḥ avāṭ havyāni surabhīṇi kṛtvī
prādāḥ pitṛbhyaḥ svadhayā te akṣan addhi tvam deva prayatā havīṃṣi
ye ca iha pitaraḥ ye ca na iha yān ca vidma yāṁ u ca na pravidma
tvam vettha yati te jātavedaḥ svadhābhiḥ yajñam su kṛtam juṣasva
ye agnidagdhāḥ ye anagnidagdhāḥ madhye divaḥ svadhayā mādayante
tebhiḥ svarāj asunītim etām yathāvaśam tanvam kalpayasva
mā enam agne vi dahaḥ mā abhi śocaḥ mā asya tvacam cikṣipaḥ mā śarīram
yadā śṛtam kṛṇavaḥ jātavedaḥ atha īm enam pra hiṇutāt pitṛbhyaḥ
śṛtam yadā karasi jātavedaḥ atha īm enam pari dattāt pitṛbhyaḥ
yadā gacchāti asunītim etām atha devānām vaśanīḥ bhavāti
sūryam cakṣuḥ gacchatu vātam ātmā dyām ca gaccha pṛthivīm ca dharmaṇā
apaḥ vā gaccha yadi tatra te hitam oṣadhīṣu prati tiṣṭhā śarīraiḥ
ajaḥ bhāgaḥ tapasā tam tapasva tam te śociḥ tapatu tam te arciḥ
yāḥ te śivāḥ tanvaḥ jātavedaḥ tābhiḥ vahā enam su kṛtām u lokam
ava sṛja punar agne pitṛbhyaḥ yaḥ te āhutaḥ carati svadhābhiḥ
āyuḥ vasānaḥ upa vetu śeṣaḥ sam gacchatām tanvā jātavedaḥ
yat te kṛṣṇaḥ śakunaḥ ātutoda pipīlaḥ sarpaḥ uta vā śvāpadaḥ
agniḥ tat viśvād agadam kṛṇotu somaḥ ca yaḥ brāhmaṇāṁ āviveśa
agneḥ varma pari gobhiḥ vyayasva sam pra ūrṇuṣva pīvasā medasā ca
na id tvā dhṛṣṇuḥ harasā jarhṛṣāṇaḥ dadhṛṣ vidhakṣyan paryaṅkhayāte
imam agne camasam mā vi jihvaraḥ priyaḥ devānām uta somyānām
eṣa yaḥ camasaḥ deva pānaḥ tasmin devāḥ amṛtāḥ mādayante
kravyādam agnim pra hiṇomi dūram yama rājñaḥ gacchatu ripra vāhaḥ
iha eva ayam itaraḥ jātavedāḥ devebhyaḥ havyam vahatu prajānan
yaḥ agniḥ kravyād praviveśa vaḥ gṛham imam paśyan itaram jātavedasam
tam harāmi pitṛ yajñāya devam sa gharmam invāt parame sadhasthe
yaḥ agniḥ kravya vāhanaḥ pitṝn yakṣat ṛtāvṛdhaḥ
pra id u havyāni vocati devebhyaḥ ca pitṛbhyaḥ ā
uśantaḥ tvā ni dhīmahi uśantaḥ sam idhīmahi
uśan uśataḥ ā vaha pitṝn haviṣe attave
yam tvam agne samadahaḥ tam u niḥ vāpayā punar
kiyāmbū atra rohatu pākadūrvā vyalkaśā
śītike śītikāvati hlādike hlādikāvati
maṇḍūkyā su sam gamaḥ imam su agnim harṣaya
tvaṣṭā duhitre vahatum kṛṇoti iti idam viśvam bhuvanam sam eti
yamasya mātā paryuhyamānā mahaḥ jāyā vivasvataḥ nanāśa
apāgūhan amṛtām martyebhyaḥ kṛtvī savarṇām adaduḥ vivasvate
uta aśvinau abharat yat tat āsīt ajahāt u dvā mithunā saraṇyūḥ
pūṣā tvā itas cyāvayatu pra vidvān a naṣṭa paśuḥ bhuvanasya gopāḥ
sa tvā etebhyaḥ pari dadat pitṛbhyaḥ agniḥ devebhyaḥ suvidatriyebhyaḥ
āyuḥ viśvāyuḥ pari pāsati tvā pūṣā tvā pātu prapathe purastāt
yatra āsate su kṛtaḥ yatra te yayuḥ tatra tvā devaḥ savitā dadhātu
pūṣā imāḥ āśāḥ anu veda sarvāḥ saḥ asmāṁ abhayatamena neṣat
svasti dāḥ āghṛṇiḥ sarva vīraḥ aprayucchan puras etu prajānan
prapathe pathām ajaniṣṭa pūṣā prapathe divaḥ prapathe pṛthivyāḥ
ubhe abhi priyatame sadhasthe ā ca parā ca carati prajānan
sarasvatīm devayantaḥ havante sarasvatīm adhvare tāyamāne
sarasvatīm su kṛtaḥ ahvayanta sarasvatī dāśuṣe vāryam dāt
sarasvati yā sa ratham yayātha svadhābhiḥ devi pitṛbhiḥ madantī
āsadya asmin barhiṣi mādayasva anamīvā iṣaḥ ā dhehi asme
sarasvatīm yām pitaraḥ havante dakṣiṇā yajñam abhinakṣamāṇāḥ
sahasra argham iḍaḥ atra bhāgam rāyaḥ poṣam yajamāneṣu dhehi
āpaḥ asmān mātaraḥ śundhayantu ghṛtena naḥ ghṛta pvaḥ punantu
viśvam hi ripram pravahanti devīḥ ud id ābhyaḥ śuciḥ ā pūtaḥ emi
drapsaḥ caskanda prathamāṁ anu dyūn imam ca yonim anu yaḥ ca pūrvaḥ
samānam yonim anu saṃcarantam drapsam juhomi anu sapta hotrāḥ
yaḥ te drapsa skandati yaḥ te aṃśuḥ bāhu cyutaḥ dhiṣaṇāyāḥ upasthāt
adhvaryoḥ vā pari vā yaḥ pavitrāt tam te juhomi manasā vaṣaṭkṛtam
yaḥ te drapsa skannaḥ yaḥ te aṃśuḥ avas ca yaḥ paras srucā
ayam devaḥ bṛhaspatiḥ sam tam siñcatu rādhase
payasvatīḥ oṣadhayaḥ payasvat māmakam vacaḥ
apām payasvat id payaḥ tena mā saha śundhata
param mṛtyo anu parehi panthām yaḥ te svaḥ itaraḥ deva yānāt
cakṣuṣmate śṛṇvate te bravīmi mā naḥ prajām rīriṣaḥ mā uta vīrān
mṛtyoḥ padam yopayantaḥ yat aita drāghīyaḥ āyuḥ prataram dadhānāḥ
āpyāyamānāḥ prajayā dhanena śuddhāḥ pūtāḥ bhavata yajñiyāsaḥ
ime jīvāḥ vi mṛtaiḥ āvavṛtran abhūt bhadrā deva hūtiḥ naḥ adya
prāñcaḥ agāma nṛtaye hasāya drāghīyaḥ āyuḥ prataram dadhānāḥ
imam jīvebhyaḥ paridhim dadhāmi mā eṣām nu gāt aparaḥ artham etam
śatam jīvantu śaradaḥ purūcīḥ antar mṛtyum dadhatām parvatena
yathā ahāni anupūrvam bhavanti yatha ṛtavaḥ ṛtubhiḥ yanti sādhu
yathā na pūrvam aparaḥ jahāti evā dhātar āyūṃṣi kalpaya eṣām
ā rohata āyuḥ jarasam vṛṇānāḥ anupūrvam yatamānāḥ yati ṣṭha
iha tvaṣṭā su janimā sajoṣāḥ dīrgham āyuḥ karati jīvase vaḥ
imāḥ nārīḥ a vidhavāḥ su patnīḥ āñjanena sarpiṣā sam viśantu
an aśravaḥ anamīvāḥ su ratnāḥ ā rohantu janayaḥ yonim agre
ud īrṣva nāri abhi jīva lokam gatāsum etam upa śeṣe ehi
hasta grābhasya didhiṣoḥ tava idam patyuḥ jani tvam abhi sam babhūtha
dhanuḥ hastāt ādadānaḥ mṛtasya asme kṣatrāya varcase balāya
atra eva tvam iha vayam su vīrāḥ viśvāḥ spṛdhaḥ abhimātīḥ jayema
upa sarpa mātaram bhūmim etām uru vyacasam pṛthivīm su śevām
ūrṇamradā yuvatiḥ dakṣiṇāvate eṣā tvā pātu nirṛteḥ upasthāt
ucchvañcasva pṛthivi mā ni bādhathāḥ su upāyanā asmai bhava su upavañcanā
mātā putram yathā sicā abhī enam bhūme ūrṇuhi
ucchvañcamānā pṛthivī su tiṣṭhatu sahasram mitaḥ upa hi śrayantām
te gṛhāsaḥ ghṛtaścutaḥ bhavantu viśvāhā asmai śaraṇāḥ santu atra
ud te stabhnāmi pṛthivīm tvat pari imam logam nidadhan mā u aham riṣam
etām sthūṇām pitaraḥ dhārayantu te atrā yamaḥ sādanā te minotu
pratīcīne mām ahani iṣvāḥ parṇam iva ā dadhuḥ
pratīcīm jagrabhā vācam aśvam raśanayā yathā
ni vartadhvam mā anu gāta asmān siṣakta revatīḥ
agnīṣomā punarvasū asme dhārayatam rayim
punar enāḥ ni vartaya punar enāḥ ni ā kuru
indraḥ enāḥ ni yacchatu agniḥ enāḥ upājatu
punar etāḥ ni vartantām asmin puṣyantu gopatau
iha eva agne ni dhāraya iha tiṣṭhatu yā rayiḥ
yat niyānam nyayanam saṃjñānam yat parāyaṇam
āvartanam nivartanam yaḥ gopāḥ api tam huve
yaḥ udānaṭ vyayanam yaḥ udānaṭ parāyaṇam
āvartanam nivartanam api gopāḥ ni vartatām
ā nivarta ni vartaya punar naḥ indra gāḥ dehi
jīvābhiḥ bhunajāmahai
pari vaḥ viśvatas dadhe ūrjā ghṛtena payasā
ye devāḥ ke ca yajñiyāḥ te rayyā sam sṛjantu naḥ
ā nivartana vartaya ni nivartana vartaya
bhūmyāḥ catasraḥ pradiśaḥ tābhyaḥ enāḥ ni vartaya
bhadram naḥ api vātaya manaḥ
agnim īḍe bhujām yaviṣṭham śāsā mitram durdharītum
yasya dharman svar enīḥ saparyanti mātuḥ ūdhaḥ
yam āsā kṛpanīḍam bhāsā ketum vardhayanti
bhrājate śreṇidan
aryaḥ viśām gātuḥ eti pra yat ānaṭ divaḥ antān
kaviḥ abhram dīdyānaḥ
juṣat havyā mānuṣasya ūrdhvaḥ tasthau ṛbhvāḥ yajñe
minvan sadma puras eti
sa hi kṣemaḥ haviḥ yajñaḥ śruṣṭi id asya gātuḥ eti
agnim devāḥ vāśīmantam
yajñāsāham duvaḥ iṣe agnim pūrvasya śevasya
adreḥ sūnum āyum āhuḥ
naraḥ ye ke ca asmat ā viśvā id te vāme ā syuḥ
agnim haviṣā vardhantaḥ
kṛṣṇaḥ śvetaḥ aruṣaḥ yāmaḥ asya bradhnaḥ ṛjraḥ uta śoṇaḥ yaśasvān
hiraṇya rūpam janitā jajāna
evā te agne vimadaḥ manīṣām ūrjaḥ napāt amṛtebhiḥ sajoṣāḥ
giraḥ ā vakṣat sumatīḥ iyānaḥ iṣam ūrjam su kṣitim viśvam ābhāḥ
ā agnim na svavṛktibhiḥ hotāram tvā vṛṇīmahe
yajñāya stīrṇa barhiṣe vi vaḥ made śīram pāvaka śociṣam vivakṣase
tvām u te su ābhuvaḥ śumbhanti aśva rādhasaḥ
veti tvām upasecanī vi vaḥ made ṛjītiḥ agne āhutiḥ vivakṣase
tve dharmāṇaḥ āsate juhūbhiḥ siñcatīḥ iva
kṛṣṇā rūpāṇi arjunā vi vaḥ made viśvāḥ adhi śriyaḥ dhiṣe vivakṣase
yam agne manyase rayim sahasāvan amartya
tam ā naḥ vājasātaye vi vaḥ made yajñeṣu citram ā bharāḥ vivakṣase
agniḥ jātaḥ atharvaṇā vidat viśvāni kāvyā
bhuvat dūtaḥ vivasvataḥ vi vaḥ made priyaḥ yamasya kāmyaḥ vivakṣase
tvām yajñeṣu īḍate agne prayati adhvare
tvam vasūni kāmyā vi vaḥ made viśvā dadhāsi dāśuṣe vivakṣase
tvām yajñeṣu ṛtvijam cārum agne ni ṣedire
ghṛta pratīkam manuṣaḥ vi vaḥ made śukram cetiṣṭham akṣabhiḥ vivakṣase
agne śukreṇa śociṣā uru prathayase bṛhat
abhikrandan vṛṣāyase vi vaḥ made garbham dadhāsi jāmiṣu vivakṣase
kuha śrutaḥ indraḥ kasmin adya jane mitraḥ na śrūyate
ṛṣīṇām vā yaḥ kṣaye guhā vā carkṛṣe girā
iha śrutaḥ indraḥ asme adya stave vajrī ṛcīṣamaḥ
mitraḥ na yaḥ janeṣu ā yaśaḥ cakre asāmi ā
mahaḥ yaḥ patiḥ śavasaḥ asāmi ā mahaḥ nṛmṇasya tūtujiḥ
bhartā vajrasya dhṛṣṇoḥ pitā putram iva priyam
yujānaḥ aśvā vātasya dhunī devaḥ devasya vajrivas
syantā pathā virukmatā sṛjāna stoṣi adhvanaḥ
tvam tyā cit vātasya aśvā agāḥ ṛjrā tmanā vahadhyai
yayoḥ devaḥ na martyaḥ yantā nakir vidāyyaḥ
adha gmantā uśanā pṛcchate vām kadarthāḥ naḥ ā gṛham
ā jagmathuḥ parākāt divaḥ ca gmaḥ ca martyam
ā naḥ indra pṛkṣase asmākam brahma udyatam
tat tvā yācāmahe avaḥ śuṣṇam yat han a mānuṣam
akarmā dasyuḥ abhi naḥ amantuḥ anya vrataḥ a mānuṣaḥ
tvam tasya amitra han vadhar dāsasya dambhaya
tvam naḥ indra śūra śūraiḥ uta tvotāsaḥ barhaṇā
purutrā te vi pūrtayaḥ navanta kṣoṇayaḥ yathā
tvam tān vṛtra hatye codayaḥ nṝn kārpāṇe śūra vajrivas
guhā yadī kavīnām viśām na kṣatra śavasām
makṣū tā te indra dānāpnase ākṣāṇe śūra vajrivas
yat ha śuṣṇasya dambhayaḥ jātam viśvam sa yāvabhiḥ
mā akudhryak indra śūra vasvīḥ asme bhūvan abhiṣṭayaḥ
vayam vayam te āsām sumne syāma vajrivas
asme tā te indra santu satyā a hiṃsantīḥ upaspṛśaḥ
vidyāma yāsām bhujaḥ dhenūnām na vajrivas
ahastā yat apadī vardhata kṣāḥ śacībhiḥ vedyānām
śuṣṇam pari pradakṣiṇit viśva āyave ni śiśnathaḥ
piba piba id indra śūra somam mā riṣaṇyaḥ vasavāna vasuḥ san
uta trāyasva gṛṇataḥ maghonaḥ mahaḥ ca rāyaḥ revataḥ kṛdhī naḥ
yajāmahe indram vajra dakṣiṇam harīṇām rathyam vivratānām
pra śmaśru dodhuvat ūrdhvathā bhūt vi senābhiḥ dayamānaḥ vi rādhasā
harī nu asya yā vane vide vasu indraḥ maghaiḥ maghavā vṛtra hā bhuvat
ṛbhuḥ vājaḥ ṛbhukṣāḥ patyate śavaḥ ava kṣṇaumi dāsasya nāma cit
yadā vajram hiraṇyam id athā ratham harī yam asya vahataḥ vi sūribhiḥ
ā tiṣṭhati maghavā sana śrutaḥ indraḥ vājasya dīrgha śravasaḥ patiḥ
sā u cit nu vṛṣṭiḥ yūthyā svā _ indraḥ śmaśrūṇi haritā abhi pruṣṇute
ava veti su kṣayam sute madhu ud id dhūnoti vātaḥ yathā vanam
yaḥ vācā vivācaḥ mṛdhravācaḥ purū sahasrā aśivā jaghāna
tat tat id asya pauṃsyam gṛṇīmasi pitā iva yaḥ taviṣīm vāvṛdhe śavaḥ
stomam te indra vimadāḥ ajījanan apūrvyam purutamam su dānave
vidma hi asya bhojanam inasya yat ā paśum na gopāḥ karāmahe
mākir naḥ enā sakhyā vi yauṣuḥ tava ca indra vimadasya ca ṛṣeḥ
vidma hi te pramatim deva jāmi vat asme te santu sakhyā śivāni
indra somam imam piba madhumantam camū sutam
asme rayim ni dhāraya vi vaḥ made sahasriṇam purūvaso vivakṣase
tvām yajñebhiḥ ukthaiḥ upa havyebhiḥ īmahe
śacīpate śacīnām vi vaḥ made śreṣṭham naḥ dhehi vāryam vivakṣase
yaḥ patiḥ vāryāṇām asi radhrasya coditā
indra stotṝṇām avitā vi vaḥ made dviṣaḥ naḥ pāhi aṃhasaḥ vivakṣase
yuvam śakrā māyāvinā samīcī niḥ amanthatam
vimadena yat īḍitā nāsatyā niramanthatam
viśve devāḥ akṛpanta samīcyoḥ niṣpatantyoḥ
nāsatyau abruvan devāḥ punar ā vahatāt iti
madhumat me parāyaṇam madhumat punar āyanam
tā naḥ devā devatayā yuvam madhumataḥ kṛtam
bhadram naḥ api vātaya manaḥ dakṣam uta kratum
adhā te sakhye andhasaḥ vi vaḥ made raṇan gāvaḥ na yavase vivakṣase
hṛdispṛśaḥ te āsate viśveṣu soma dhāmasu
adhā kāmāḥ ime mama vi vaḥ made vi tiṣṭhante vasūyavaḥ vivakṣase
uta vratāni soma te pra aham mināmi pākyā
adhā pitā iva sūnave vi vaḥ made mṛḍa naḥ abhi cit vadhāt vivakṣase
sam u pra yanti dhītayaḥ sargāsaḥ avatāṁ iva
kratum naḥ soma jīvase vi vaḥ made dhārayā camasāṁ iva vivakṣase
tava tye soma śaktibhiḥ nikāmāsaḥ vi ṛṇvire
gṛtsasya dhīrāḥ tavasaḥ vi vaḥ made vrajam gomantam aśvinam vivakṣase
paśum naḥ soma rakṣasi purutrā viṣṭhitam jagat
samākṛṇoṣi jīvase vi vaḥ made viśvā saṃpaśyan bhuvanā vivakṣase
tvam naḥ soma viśvatas gopāḥ adābhyaḥ bhava
sedha rājan apa sridhaḥ vi vaḥ made mā naḥ duḥśaṃsaḥ īśatā vivakṣase
tvam naḥ soma su kratuḥ vayaḥ dheyāya jāgṛhi
kṣetra vittaraḥ manuṣaḥ vi vaḥ made druhaḥ naḥ pāhi aṃhasaḥ vivakṣase
tvam naḥ vṛtra hantama indrasya indo śivaḥ sakhā
yat sīm havante samithe vi vaḥ made yudhyamānāḥ toka sātau vivakṣase
ayam gha sa turaḥ madaḥ indrasya vardhata priyaḥ
ayam kakṣīvataḥ mahaḥ vi vaḥ made matim viprasya vardhayat vivakṣase
ayam viprāya dāśuṣe vājāṁ iyarti gomataḥ
ayam saptabhyaḥ ā varam vi vaḥ made pra andham śroṇam ca tāriṣat vivakṣase
pra hi acchā manīṣāḥ spārhāḥ yanti niyutaḥ
pra dasrā niyudrathaḥ pūṣā aviṣṭu māhinaḥ
yasya tyad mahi tvam vātāpyam ayam janaḥ
vipraḥ ā vaṃsat dhītibhiḥ ciketa suṣṭutīnām
sa veda suṣṭutīnām induḥ na pūṣā vṛṣā
abhi psuraḥ pruṣāyati vrajam naḥ ā pruṣāyati
maṃsīmahi tvā vayam asmākam deva pūṣan
matīnām ca sādhanam viprāṇām ca ādhavam
pratyardhiḥ yajñānām aśva hayaḥ rathānām
ṛṣiḥ sa yaḥ manuḥ hitaḥ viprasya yāvayat sakhaḥ
ādhīṣamāṇāyāḥ patiḥ śucāyāḥ ca śucasya ca
vāsaḥ vāyaḥ avīnām ā vāsāṃsi marmṛjat
inaḥ vājānām patiḥ inaḥ puṣṭīnām sakhā
pra śmaśru haryataḥ dūdhot vi vṛthā yaḥ adābhyaḥ
ā te rathasya pūṣan ajāḥ dhuram vavṛtyuḥ
viśvasya arthinaḥ sakhā sanojāḥ an apacyutaḥ
asmākam ūrjā ratham pūṣā aviṣṭu māhinaḥ
bhuvat vājānām vṛdhaḥ imam naḥ śṛṇavat havam
asat su me jaritar sa abhivegaḥ yat sunvate yajamānāya śikṣam
an āśīrdām aham asmi prahantā satyadhvṛtam vṛjināyantam ābhum
yadi id aham yudhaye saṃnayāni a devayūn tanvā śūśujānān
amā te tumram vṛṣabham pacāni tīvram sutam pañcadaśam ni siñcam
na aham tam veda yaḥ iti bravīti a devayūn samaraṇe jaghanvān
yadā avākhyat samaraṇam ṛghāvat āt id ha me vṛṣabhā pra bruvanti
yat ajñāteṣu vṛjaneṣu āsam viśve satas maghavānaḥ me āsan
jināmi vā id kṣeme ā santam ābhum pra tam kṣiṇām parvate pādagṛhya
na vai u mām vṛjane vārayante na parvatāsaḥ yat aham manasye
mama svanāt kṛdhukarṇaḥ bhayāte eva id anu dyūn kiraṇaḥ sam ejāt
darśan nu atra śṛtapām an indrān bāhukṣadaḥ śarave patyamānān
ghṛṣum vā ye niniduḥ sakhāyam adhi ū nu eṣu pavayaḥ vavṛtyuḥ
abhūḥ u aukṣīḥ vi u āyuḥ ānaṭ darṣat nu pūrvaḥ aparaḥ nu darṣat
dve pavaste pari tam na bhūtas yaḥ asya pāre rajasaḥ viveṣa
gāvaḥ yavam prayutāḥ aryaḥ akṣan tāḥ apaśyam saha gopāḥ carantīḥ
havāḥ id aryaḥ abhitas sam āyan kiyat āsu sva patiḥ chandayāte
sam yat vayam yavasādaḥ janānām aham yavādaḥ urvajre antar
atrā yuktaḥ avasātāram icchāt atho ayuktam yunajat vavanvān
atra id u me maṃsase satyam uktam dvipād ca yat catuṣpād saṃsṛjāni
strībhiḥ yaḥ atra vṛṣaṇam pṛtanyāt a yuddhaḥ asya vi bhajāni vedaḥ
yasya anakṣā duhitā jātu āsa kaḥ tām vidvāṁ abhi manyāte andhām
kataraḥ menim prati tam mucāte yaḥ īm vahāte yaḥ īm vā vareyāt
kiyatī yoṣā maryataḥ vadhūyoḥ pariprītā panyasā vāryeṇa
bhadrā vadhūḥ bhavati yat su peśāḥ svayam sā mitram vanute jane cit
pattas jagāra pratyañcam atti śīrṣṇā śiraḥ prati dadhau varūtham
āsīnaḥ ūrdhvām upasi kṣiṇāti nyaṅ uttānām anu eti bhūmim
bṛhan acchāyaḥ a palāśaḥ arvā tasthau mātā viṣitaḥ atti garbhaḥ
anyasyāḥ vatsam rihatī mimāya kayā bhuvā ni dadhe dhenuḥ ūdhaḥ
sapta vīrāsaḥ adharāt ud āyan aṣṭa uttarāttāt sam ajagmiran te
nava paścātāt sthivimantaḥ āyan daśa prāk sānu vi tiranti aśnaḥ
daśānām ekam kapilam samānam tam hinvanti kratave pāryāya
garbham mātā su dhitam vakṣaṇāsu a venantam tuṣayantī bibharti
pīvānam meṣam apacanta vīrāḥ nyuptāḥ akṣāḥ anu dīve āsan
dvā dhanum bṛhatīm apsu antar pavitravantā carataḥ punantā
vi krośanāsaḥ viṣvañcaḥ āyan pacāti nemaḥ na hi pakṣat ardhaḥ
ayam me devaḥ savitā tat āha dru annaḥ id vanavat sarpiḥ annaḥ
apaśyam grāmam vahamānam ārāt a cakrayā svadhayā vartamānam
siṣakti aryaḥ pra yugā janānām sadyas śiśnā praminānaḥ navīyān
etau me gāvau pramarasya yuktau mā u su pra sedhīḥ muhur id mamandhi
āpaḥ cit asya vi naśanti artham sūraḥ ca markaḥ uparaḥ babhūvān
ayam yaḥ vajraḥ purudhā vivṛttaḥ avas sūryasya bṛhataḥ purīṣāt
śravaḥ id enā paras anyat asti tat avyathī jarimāṇaḥ taranti
vṛkṣe vṛkṣe niyatā mīmayat gauḥ tatas vayaḥ pra patān pūruṣa adaḥ
athā idam viśvam bhuvanam bhayāte indrāya sunvat ṛṣaye ca śikṣat
devānām māne prathamāḥ atiṣṭhan kṛntatrāt eṣām uparāḥ ud āyan
trayaḥ tapanti pṛthivīm anūpāḥ dvā bṛbūkam vahataḥ purīṣam
sā te jīvātuḥ uta tasya viddhi mā sma etādṛś apa gūhaḥ samarye
āvis svar kṛṇute gūhate busam sa pāduḥ asya nirṇijaḥ na mucyate
viśvaḥ hi anyaḥ ariḥ ājagāma mama id aha śvaśuraḥ na ā jagāma
jakṣīyāt dhānāḥ uta somam papīyāt su āśitaḥ punar astam jagāyāt
sa roruvat vṛṣabhaḥ tigma śṛṅgaḥ varṣman tasthau variman ā pṛthivyāḥ
viśveṣu enam vṛjaneṣu pāmi yaḥ me kukṣī suta somaḥ pṛṇāti
adriṇā te mandine indra tūyān sunvanti somān pibasi tvam eṣām
pacanti te vṛṣabhāṁ atsi teṣām pṛkṣeṇa yan maghavan hūyamānaḥ
idam su me jaritar ā cikiddhi pratīpam śāpam nadyaḥ vahanti
lopāśaḥ siṃham pratyañcam atsāḥ kroṣṭā varāham niḥ atakta kakṣāt
kathā te etat aham ā ciketam gṛtsasya pākaḥ tavasaḥ manīṣām
tvam naḥ vidvāṁ ṛtuthā vi vocaḥ yam ardham te maghavan kṣemyā dhūḥ
evā hi mām tavasam vardhayanti divaḥ cit me bṛhataḥ uttarā dhūḥ
purū sahasrā ni śiśāmi sākam aśatrum hi mā janitā jajāna
evā hi mām tavasam jajñuḥ ugram karman karman vṛṣaṇam indra devāḥ
vadhīm vṛtram vajreṇa mandasānaḥ apa vrajam mahinā dāśuṣe vam
devāsaḥ āyan paraśūn abibhran vanā vṛścantaḥ abhi viḍbhiḥ āyan
ni su drvam dadhataḥ vakṣaṇāsu yatrā kṛpīṭam anu tat dahanti
śaśaḥ kṣuram pratyañcam jagāra adrim logena vi abhedam ārāt
bṛhantam cit ṛhate randhayāni vayat vatsaḥ vṛṣabham śūśuvānaḥ
suparṇaḥ itthā nakham ā siṣāya avaruddhaḥ paripadam na siṃhaḥ
niruddhaḥ cit mahiṣaḥ tarṣyāvān godhā tasmai ayatham karṣat etat
tebhyaḥ godhā ayatham karṣat etat ye brahmaṇaḥ pratipīyanti annaiḥ
sime ukṣṇaḥ avasṛṣṭāṁ adanti svayam balāni tanvaḥ śṛṇānāḥ
ete śamībhiḥ suśamī abhūvan ye hinvire tanvaḥ some ukthaiḥ
nṛ vat vadan upa naḥ māhi vājān divi śravaḥ dadhiṣe nāma vīraḥ
vane na vā yaḥ ni adhāyi cākan śuciḥ vām stomaḥ bhuraṇau ajīgaḥ
yasya id indraḥ puru dineṣu hotā nṛṇām naryaḥ nṛtamaḥ kṣapāvān
pra te asyāḥ uṣasaḥ pra aparasyāḥ nṛtau syāma nṛtamasya nṛṇām
anu triśokaḥ śatam āvahat nṝn kutsena rathaḥ yaḥ asat sasavān
kaḥ te madaḥ indra rantyaḥ bhūt duraḥ giraḥ abhi ugraḥ vi dhāva
kad vāhaḥ arvāk upa mā manīṣā ā tvā śakyām upamam rādhaḥ annaiḥ
kad u dyumnam indra tvāvataḥ nṝn kayā dhiyā karase kad naḥ āgan
mitraḥ na satyaḥ urugāya bhṛtyā anne samasya yat asan manīṣāḥ
preraya sūraḥ artham na pāram ye asya kāmam janidhāḥ iva gman
giraḥ ca ye te tuvi jāta pūrvīḥ naraḥ indra pratiśikṣanti annaiḥ
mātre nu te su mite indra pūrvī dyauḥ majmanā pṛthivī kāvyena
varāya te ghṛtavantaḥ sutāsaḥ svādman bhavantu pītaye madhūni
ā madhvaḥ asmai asican amatram indrāya pūrṇam sa hi satya rādhāḥ
sa vāvṛdhe variman ā pṛthivyāḥ abhi kratvā naryaḥ pauṃsyaiḥ ca
vi ānaṭ indraḥ pṛtanāḥ su ojāḥ ā asmai yatante sakhyāya pūrvīḥ
ā smā ratham na pṛtanāsu tiṣṭha yam bhadrayā sumatyā codayāse
pra devatrā brahmaṇe gātuḥ etu apaḥ acchā manasaḥ na prayukti
mahīm mitrasya varuṇasya dhāsim pṛthu jrayase rīradhā suvṛktim
adhvaryavaḥ haviṣmantaḥ hi bhūta acchā apaḥ ita uśatīḥ uśantaḥ
ava yāḥ caṣṭe aruṇaḥ suparṇaḥ tam āsyadhvam ūrmim adyā su hastāḥ
adhvaryavaḥ apa itā samudram apām napātam haviṣā yajadhvam
sa vaḥ dadat ūrmim adyā su pūtam tasmai somam madhumantam sunota
yaḥ anidhmaḥ dīdayat apsu antar yam viprāsaḥ īḍate adhvareṣu
apām napāt madhumatīḥ apaḥ dāḥ yābhiḥ indraḥ vāvṛdhe vīryāya
yābhiḥ somaḥ modate harṣate ca kalyāṇībhiḥ yuvatibhiḥ na maryaḥ
tāḥ adhvaryo apaḥ acchā parehi yat āsiñcāḥ oṣadhībhiḥ punītāt
eva id yūne yuvatayaḥ namanta yat īm uśan uśatīḥ eti accha
sam jānate manasā sam cikitre adhvaryavaḥ dhiṣaṇā apaḥ ca devīḥ
yaḥ vaḥ vṛtābhyaḥ akṛṇot u lokam yaḥ vaḥ mahyāḥ abhiśasteḥ amuñcat
tasmai indrāya madhumantam ūrmim deva mādanam pra hiṇotana apaḥ
pra asmai hinota madhumantam ūrmim garbhaḥ yaḥ vaḥ sindhavaḥ madhvaḥ utsaḥ
ghṛta pṛṣṭham īḍyam adhvareṣu āpaḥ revatīḥ śṛṇutā havam me
tam sindhavaḥ matsaram indra pānam ūrmim pra heta yaḥ ubhe iyarti
mada cyutam auśānam nabhaḥ jām pari tri tantum vicarantam utsam
āvarvṛtatīḥ adha nu dvi dhārāḥ goṣuyudhaḥ na niyavam carantīḥ
ṛṣe janitrīḥ bhuvanasya patnīḥ apaḥ vandasva savṛdhaḥ sayonīḥ
hinotā naḥ adhvaram deva yajyā hinota brahma sanaye dhanānām
ṛtasya yoge vi syadhvam ūdhaḥ śruṣṭīvarīḥ bhūtana asmabhyam āpaḥ
āpaḥ revatīḥ kṣayathā hi vasvaḥ kratum ca bhadram bibhṛtha amṛtam ca
rāyaḥ ca stha su apatyasya patnīḥ sarasvatī tat gṛṇate vayaḥ dhāt
prati yat āpaḥ adṛśram āyatīḥ ghṛtam payāṃsi bibhratīḥ madhūni
adhvaryubhiḥ manasā saṃvidānāḥ indrāya somam su sutam bharantīḥ
ā imāḥ agman revatīḥ jīva dhanyāḥ adhvaryavaḥ sādayatā sakhāyaḥ
ni barhiṣi dhattana somyāsaḥ apām naptrā saṃvidānāsaḥ enāḥ
āgman āpaḥ uśatīḥ barhiḥ ā idam ni adhvare asadan devayantīḥ
adhvaryavaḥ sunuta indrāya somam abhūt u vaḥ suśakā deva yajyā
ā naḥ devānām upa vetu śaṃsaḥ viśvebhiḥ turaiḥ avase yajatraḥ
tebhiḥ vayam su sakhāyaḥ bhavema tarantaḥ viśvā duritā syāma
pari cit martaḥ draviṇam mamanyāt ṛtasya pathā namasā vivāset
uta svena kratunā sam vadeta śreyāṃsam dakṣam manasā jagṛbhyāt
adhāyi dhītiḥ asasṛgram aṃśāḥ tīrthe na dasmam upa yanti ūmāḥ
abhi ānaśma suvitasya śūṣam navedasaḥ amṛtānām abhūma
nityaḥ cākanyāt sva patiḥ damūnāḥ yasmai u devaḥ savitā jajāna
bhagaḥ vā gobhiḥ aryamā īm anajyāt saḥ asmai cāruḥ chadayat uta syāt
iyam sā bhūyāḥ uṣasām iva kṣā yat ha kṣumantaḥ śavasā samāyan
asya stutim jarituḥ bhikṣamāṇāḥ ā naḥ śagmāsaḥ upa yantu vājāḥ
asya id eṣā sumatiḥ paprathānā abhavat pūrvyā bhūmanā gauḥ
asya sanīḍāḥ asurasya yonau samāne ā bharaṇe bibhramāṇāḥ
kim svid vanam ke u sa vṛkṣaḥ āsa yatas dyāvāpṛthivī niṣṭatakṣuḥ
saṃtasthāne ajare itaūtī ahāni pūrvīḥ uṣasaḥ jaranta

iyam naḥ usrā prathamā sudevyam revat sanibhyaḥ revatī vi ucchatu
āre manyum durvidatrasya dhīmahi svasti agnim sam idhānam īmahe

bhadrāḥ naḥ adya śravase vi ucchata svasti agnim sam idhānam īmahe
anamīvāḥ uṣasaḥ ā carantu naḥ ud agnayaḥ jihatām jyotiṣā bṛhat

rāyaḥ janitrīm dhiṣaṇām upa bruve svasti agnim sam idhānam īmahe

ā naḥ barhiḥ sadhamāde bṛhat divi devāṁ īḍe sādayā sapta hotṝn
