bṛhaspatiḥ naḥ pari pātu paścāt uta uttarasmāt adharāt aghāyoḥ
indraḥ purastāt uta madhyatas naḥ sakhā sakhibhyaḥ varivaḥ kṛṇotu
pra hotā jātaḥ mahān nabhaḥ vid nṛṣadvā sīdat apām upasthe
dadhiḥ yaḥ dhāyi sa te vayāṃsi yantā vasūni vidhate tanū pāḥ
imam vidhantaḥ apām sadhasthe paśum na naṣṭam padaiḥ anu gman
guhā catantam uśijaḥ namobhiḥ icchantaḥ dhīrāḥ bhṛgavaḥ avindan
imam tritaḥ bhūri avindat icchan vaibhūvasaḥ mūrdhani aghnyāyāḥ
sa śevṛdhaḥ jātaḥ ā harmyeṣu nābhiḥ yuvā bhavati rocanasya
mandram hotāram uśijaḥ namobhiḥ prāñcam yajñam netāram adhvarāṇām
viśām akṛṇvan aratim pāvakam havyavāham dadhataḥ mānuṣeṣu
pra bhūḥ jayantam mahām vipodhām mūrāḥ amūram purām darmāṇam
nayantaḥ garbham vanām dhiyam dhuḥ hiriśmaśrum na arvāṇam dhana ṛcam
ni pastyāsu trita stabhūyan parivītaḥ yonau sīdat antar
atas saṃgṛbhyā viśām damūnāḥ vidharmaṇā ayantraiḥ īyate nṝn
asya ajarāsaḥ damām aritrā arcat dhūmāsaḥ agnayaḥ pāvakāḥ
śvitīcayaḥ śvātrāsaḥ bhuraṇyavaḥ vanarṣadaḥ vāyavaḥ na somāḥ
pra jihvayā bharate vepaḥ agniḥ pra vayunāni cetasā pṛthivyāḥ
tam āyavaḥ śucayantam pāvakam mandram hotāram dadhire yajiṣṭham
dyāvā yam agnim pṛthivī janiṣṭa ām āpaḥ tvaṣṭā bhṛgavaḥ yam sahobhiḥ
īḍenyam prathamam mātariśvā devāḥ tatakṣuḥ manave yajatram
yam tvā devāḥ dadhire havya vāham puruspṛhaḥ mānuṣāsaḥ yajatram
sa yāman agne stuvate vayaḥ dhāḥ pra devayan yaśasaḥ sam hi pūrvīḥ
jagṛbhma te dakṣiṇam indra hastam vasūyavaḥ vasu pate vasūnām
vidma hi tvā gopatim śūra gonām asmabhyam citram vṛṣaṇam rayim dāḥ
su āyudham su avasam su nītham catur samudram dharuṇam rayīṇām
carkṛtyam śaṃsyam bhūri vāram asmabhyam citram vṛṣaṇam rayim dāḥ
su brahmāṇam devavantam bṛhantam urum gabhīram pṛthu budhnam indra
śruta ṛṣim ugram abhimātiṣāham asmabhyam citram vṛṣaṇam rayim dāḥ
sanat vājam vipra vīram tarutram dhana spṛtam śūśuvāṃsam su dakṣam
dasyu hanam pūrbhidam indra satyam asmabhyam citram vṛṣaṇam rayim dāḥ
aśvāvantam rathinam vīravantam sahasriṇam śatinam vājam indra
bhadra vrātam vipra vīram svarṣām asmabhyam citram vṛṣaṇam rayim dāḥ
pra saptagum ṛta dhītim su medhām bṛhaspatim matiḥ acchā jigāti
yaḥ āṅgirasaḥ namasā upasadyaḥ asmabhyam citram vṛṣaṇam rayim dāḥ
vanīvānaḥ mama dūtāsaḥ indram stomāḥ caranti sumatīḥ iyānāḥ
hṛdispṛśaḥ manasā vacyamānāḥ asmabhyam citram vṛṣaṇam rayim dāḥ
yat tvā yāmi daddhi tat naḥ indra bṛhantam kṣayam asamam janānām
abhi tat dyāvāpṛthivī gṛṇītām asmabhyam citram vṛṣaṇam rayim dāḥ
aham bhuvam vasunaḥ pūrvyaḥ patiḥ aham dhanāni sam jayāmi śaśvataḥ
mām havante pitaram na jantavaḥ aham dāśuṣe vi bhajāmi bhojanam
aham indraḥ rodhaḥ vakṣaḥ atharvaṇaḥ tritāya gāḥ ajanayam aheḥ adhi
aham dasyubhyaḥ pari nṛmṇam ā dade gotrā śikṣan dadhīce mātariśvane
mahyam tvaṣṭā vajram atakṣat āyasam mayi devāsaḥ avṛjan api kratum
mama anīkam sūryasya iva duṣṭaram mām āryanti kṛtena kartvena ca
aham etam gavyayam aśvyam paśum purīṣiṇam sāyakena hiraṇyayam
purū sahasrā ni śiśāmi dāśuṣe yat mā somāsaḥ ukthinaḥ amandiṣuḥ
aham indraḥ na parā jigye id dhanam na mṛtyave ava tasthe kadā cana
somam id mā sunvantaḥ yācatā vasu na me pūravaḥ sakhye riṣāthana
aham etān śāśvasataḥ dvā dvā indram ye vajram yudhaye akṛṇvata
āhvayamānāṁ ava hanmanā ahanam dṛḍhā vadan a namasyuḥ namasvinaḥ
abhi idam ekam ekaḥ asmi niṣṣāh abhī dvā kim u trayaḥ karanti
khale na parṣān prati hanmi bhūri kim mā nindanti śatravaḥ an indrāḥ
aham guṅgubhyaḥ atithigvam iṣkaram iṣam na vṛtra turam vikṣu _
yat parṇaya ghne uta vā karañja he pra aham mahe vṛtra hatye aśuśravi
pra me namī sāpyaḥ iṣe bhuje bhūt gavām eṣe sakhyā kṛṇuta dvitā
didyum yat asya samitheṣu maṃhayam āt id enam śaṃsyam ukthyam karam
pra nemasmin dadṛśe somaḥ antar gopāḥ nemam āvis _ kṛṇoti
sa tigma śṛṅgam vṛṣabham yuyutsan druhaḥ tasthau bahule baddhaḥ antar
ādityānām vasūnām rudriyāṇām devaḥ devānām na mināmi dhāma
te mā bhadrāya śavase tatakṣuḥ aparājitam astṛtam aṣāḍham
pra vaḥ mahe mandamānāya andhasaḥ arcā viśvānarāya viśvābhuve
indrasya yasya su makham sahaḥ mahi śravaḥ nṛmṇam ca rodasī saparyataḥ
saḥ cit nu sakhyā naryaḥ ina stutaḥ carkṛtyaḥ indraḥ māvate nare
viśvāsu dhūrṣu vājakṛtyeṣu satpate vṛtre vā apsu abhi śūra mandase
ke te naraḥ indra ye te iṣe ye te sumnam sa dhanyam iyakṣān
ke te vājāya āsuryāya hinvire ke apsu svāsu urvarāsu pauṃsye
bhuvaḥ tvam indra brahmaṇā mahān bhuvaḥ viśveṣu savaneṣu yajñiyaḥ
bhuvaḥ nṝn cyautnaḥ viśvasmin bhare jyeṣṭhaḥ ca mantraḥ viśvacarṣaṇe
avā nu kam jyāyān yajñavanasaḥ mahīm te omātrām kṛṣṭayaḥ viduḥ
asaḥ nu kam ajaraḥ vardhāḥ ca viśvā id etā savanā tūtumā kṛṣe
etā viśvā savanā tūtumā kṛṣe svayam sūno sahasaḥ yāni dadhiṣe
varāya te pātram dharmaṇe tanā yajñaḥ mantraḥ brahma udyatam vacaḥ
ye te vipra brahma kṛtaḥ sute sacā vasūnām ca vasunaḥ ca dāvane
pra te sumnasya manasā pathā bhuvan made sutasya somyasya andhasaḥ
viśve devāḥ śāstana mā yathā iha hotā vṛtaḥ manavai yat niṣadya
pra me brūta bhāgadheyam yathā vaḥ yena pathā havyam ā vaḥ vahāni
aham hotā ni asīdam yajīyān viśve devāḥ marutaḥ mā junanti
ahar ahar aśvinā ādhvaryavam vām brahmā samidh bhavati sā āhutiḥ vām
ayam yaḥ hotā kis u sa yamasya kam api ūhe yat samañjanti devāḥ
ahar ahar jāyate māsi māsi athā devāḥ dadhire havyavāham
mām devāḥ dadhire havya vāham apamluktam bahu kṛcchrā carantam
agniḥ vidvān yajñam naḥ kalpayāti pañca yāmam trivṛtam sapta tantum
ā vaḥ yakṣi amṛta tvam su vīram yathā vaḥ devāḥ varivaḥ karāṇi
ā bāhvoḥ vajram indrasya dheyām atha imāḥ viśvāḥ pṛtanāḥ jayāti
trīṇi śatā trī sahasrāṇi agnim triṃśat ca devāḥ nava ca asaparyan
aukṣan ghṛtaiḥ astṛṇan barhiḥ asmai āt id hotāram ni asādayanta
tām su te kīrtim maghavan mahitvā yat tvā bhīte rodasī ahvayetām
pra āvaḥ devāṁ ā atiraḥ dāsam ojaḥ prajāyai tvasyai yat aśikṣaḥ indra
yat acaraḥ tanvā vāvṛdhānaḥ balāni indra prabruvāṇaḥ janeṣu
māyā id sā te yāni yuddhāni āhuḥ na adya śatrum nanu purā vivitse
ke u nu te mahimanaḥ samasya asmat pūrve ṛṣayaḥ antam āpuḥ
yat mātaram ca pitaram ca sākam ajanayathāḥ tanvaḥ svāyāḥ
catvāri te asuryāṇi nāmā adābhyāni mahiṣasya santi
tvam aṅga tāni viśvāni vitse yebhiḥ karmāṇi maghavan cakartha
tvam viśvā dadhiṣe kevalāni yāni āvis yā ca guhā vasūni
kāmam id me maghavan mā vi tārīḥ tvam ājñātā tvam indra asi dātā
yaḥ adadhāt jyotiṣi jyotiḥ antar yaḥ asṛjat madhunā sam madhūni
adha priyam śūṣam indrāya manma brahma kṛtaḥ bṛhadukthāt avāci
dūre tat nāma guhyam parācais yat tvā bhīte ahvayetām _
ud astabhnāḥ pṛthivīm dyām abhīke bhrātuḥ putrān maghavan titviṣāṇaḥ
mahat tat nāma guhyam puruspṛh yena bhūtam janayaḥ yena bhavyam
pratnam jātam jyotiḥ yat asya priyam priyāḥ sam aviśanta pañca
ā rodasī apṛṇāt ā uta madhyam pañca devāṁ ṛtuśas sapta sapta
catustriṃśatā purudhā vi caṣṭe sa rūpeṇa jyotiṣā vivratena
yat uṣaḥ aucchaḥ prathamā vibhānām ajanayaḥ yena puṣṭasya puṣṭam
yat te jāmi tvam avaram parasyāḥ mahat mahatyāḥ asura tvam ekam
vidhum dadrāṇam samane bahūnām yuvānam santam palitaḥ jagāra
devasya paśya kāvyam mahitvā adya mamāra sa hyas sam āna
śākmanā śākaḥ aruṇaḥ suparṇaḥ ā yaḥ mahaḥ śūraḥ sanāt anīḍaḥ
yat ciketa satyam id tat na mogham vasu spārham uta jetā uta dātā
ā ebhiḥ dade vṛṣṇyā pauṃsyāni yebhiḥ aukṣat vṛtra hatyāya vajrī
ye karmaṇaḥ kriyamāṇasya mahnaḥ ṛtekarmam ud ajāyanta devāḥ
yujā karmāṇi janayan viśva ojāḥ aśasti hā viśva manāḥ turāṣāh
pītvī somasya divaḥ ā vṛdhānaḥ śūraḥ niḥ yudhā adhamat dasyūn
mā pra gāma pathaḥ vayam mā yajñāt indra sominaḥ
mā antar sthuḥ naḥ arātayaḥ
yaḥ yajñasya prasādhanaḥ tantuḥ deveṣu ātataḥ
tam āhutam naśīmahi
manaḥ nu ā huvāmahe nārāśaṃsena somena
pitṝṇām ca manmabhiḥ
ā te etu manaḥ punar kratve dakṣāya jīvase
jyok ca sūryam dṛśe
punar naḥ pitaraḥ manaḥ dadātu daivyaḥ janaḥ
jīvam vrātam sacemahi
vayam soma vrate tava manaḥ tanūṣu bibhrataḥ
prajāvantaḥ sacemahi
yat te yamam vaivasvatam manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te divam yat pṛthivīm manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te bhūmim catur bhṛṣṭim manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te catasraḥ pradiśaḥ manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te samudram arṇavam manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te marīcīḥ pravataḥ manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te apaḥ yat oṣadhīḥ manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te sūryam yat uṣasam manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te parvatān bṛhataḥ manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te viśvam idam jagat manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te parāḥ parāvataḥ manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
yat te bhūtam ca bhavyam ca manaḥ jagāma dūrakam
tat te ā vartayāmasi iha kṣayāya jīvase
ā janam tveṣa saṃdṛśam māhīnānām upastutam
aganma bibhrataḥ namaḥ
asamātim nitośanam tveṣam niyayinam ratham
bhajerathasya sat patim
yaḥ janān mahiṣāṁ iva atitasthau pavīravān
uta a pavīravān yudhā
yasya ikṣvākuḥ upa vrate revān marāyī edhate
divi iva pañca kṛṣṭayaḥ
indra kṣatrā asamātiṣu rathaproṣṭheṣu dhāraya
divi iva sūryam dṛśe
agastyasya nadbhyaḥ saptī yunakṣi rohitā
paṇīn ni akramīḥ abhi viśvān rājan arādhasaḥ
ayam mātā ayam pitā ayam jīvātuḥ āgamat
idam tava prasarpaṇam subandho ehi niḥ ihi
yathā yugam varatrayā nahyanti dharuṇāya kam
evā dādhāra te manaḥ jīvātave na mṛtyave atho ariṣṭatātaye
yathā iyam pṛthivī mahī dādhāra imān vanaspatīn
evā dādhāra te manaḥ jīvātave na mṛtyave atho ariṣṭatātaye
yamāt aham vaivasvatāt subandhoḥ manaḥ ābharam
jīvātave na mṛtyave atho ariṣṭatātaye
nyak vātaḥ ava vāti nyak tapati sūryaḥ
nīcīnam aghnyā duhe nyak bhavatu te rapaḥ
ayam me hastaḥ bhagavān ayam me bhagavattaraḥ
ayam me viśva bheṣajaḥ ayam śiva abhimarśanaḥ
ye yajñena dakṣiṇayā samaktāḥ indrasya sakhyam amṛta tvam ānaśa
tebhyaḥ bhadram aṅgirasaḥ vaḥ astu prati gṛbhṇīta mānavam sumedhasaḥ
ye udājan pitaraḥ go mayam vasu ṛtena abhindan parivatsare valam
dīrgha āyu tvam aṅgirasaḥ vaḥ astu prati gṛbhṇīta mānavam sumedhasaḥ
ye ṛtena sūryam ārohayan divi aprathayan pṛthivīm mātaram vi
suprajāstvam aṅgirasaḥ vaḥ astu prati gṛbhṇīta mānavam sumedhasaḥ
ayam nābhā vadati valgu vaḥ gṛhe deva putrāḥ ṛṣayaḥ tat śṛṇotana
subrahmaṇyam aṅgirasaḥ vaḥ astu prati gṛbhṇīta mānavam sumedhasaḥ
virūpāsaḥ id ṛṣayaḥ te id gambhīra vepasaḥ
te aṅgirasaḥ sūnavaḥ te agneḥ pari jajñire
ye agneḥ pari jajñire virūpāsaḥ divaḥ pari
navagvaḥ nu daśagvaḥ aṅgirastamaḥ sacā deveṣu maṃhate
indreṇa yujā niḥ sṛjanta vāghataḥ vrajam gomantam aśvinam
sahasram me dadataḥ aṣṭakarṇyaḥ śravaḥ deveṣu akrata
pra nūnam jāyatām ayam manuḥ tokmā iva rohatu
yaḥ sahasram śata aśvam sadyas dānāya maṃhate
na tam aśnoti kaścana divaḥ iva sānū ārabham
sāvarṇyasya dakṣiṇā vi sindhuḥ iva paprathe
uta dāsā pariviṣe smaddiṣṭī go parīṇasā
yaduḥ turvaḥ ca māmahe
sahasra dāḥ grāmaṇīḥ mā riṣat manuḥ sūryeṇa asya yatamānā etu dakṣiṇā
sāvarṇeḥ devāḥ pra tirantu āyuḥ yasmin a śrāntāḥ asanāma vājam
parāvataḥ ye didhiṣante āpyam manu prītāsaḥ janimā vivasvataḥ
yayāteḥ ye nahuṣyasya barhiṣi devāḥ āsate te adhi bruvantu naḥ
viśvā hi vaḥ namasyāni vandyā nāmāni devau uta yajñiyāni vaḥ
ye stha jātā aditeḥ adbhyaḥ pari ye pṛthivyāḥ te me iha śruta havam
yebhyaḥ mātā madhumat pinvate payaḥ pīyūṣam dyauḥ aditiḥ adribarhāḥ
uktha śuṣmān vṛṣabharān svapnasaḥ tāṁ ādityāṁ anu mada svastaye
nṛ cakṣasaḥ a nimiṣantaḥ arhaṇāḥ bṛhat devāsaḥ amṛta tvam ānaśuḥ
jyotīrathāḥ ahi māyāḥ anāgasaḥ divaḥ varṣmāṇam vasate svastaye
samrājaḥ ye suvṛdhaḥ yajñam āyayuḥ aparihvṛtāḥ dadhire divi kṣayam
tāṁ ā vivāsa namasā suvṛktibhiḥ _ ādityāṁ aditim svastaye
kaḥ vaḥ stomam rādhati yam jujoṣatha viśve devāsaḥ manuṣaḥ yati sthana
kaḥ vaḥ adhvaram tu vijātāḥ aram karat yaḥ naḥ parṣat ati aṃhaḥ svastaye
yebhyaḥ hotrām prathamām ā yeje manuḥ samiddha agniḥ manasā sapta hotṛbhiḥ
te ādityāḥ abhayam śarma yacchata su gāḥ naḥ karta su pathā svastaye
ye īśire bhuvanasya pracetasaḥ viśvasya sthātuḥ jagataḥ ca mantavaḥ
te naḥ kṛtāt akṛtāt enasaḥ pari adyā devāsaḥ pipṛta svastaye
bhareṣu indram su havam havāmahe aṃhaḥ mucam su kṛtam daivyam janam
agnim mitram varuṇam sātaye bhagam dyāvāpṛthivī marutaḥ svastaye
su trāmāṇam pṛthivīm dyām anehasam su śarmāṇam aditim su praṇītim
daivīm nāvam su aritrām anāgasam asravantīm ā ruhema svastaye
viśve yajatrā adhi vocata ūtaye trāyadhvam naḥ durevāyāḥ abhihrutaḥ
satyayā vaḥ devahūtyāḥ huvema śṛṇvataḥ devāḥ avase svastaye
apa amīvām apa viśvām anāhutim apa arātim durvidatrām aghāyataḥ
āre devāḥ dveṣaḥ asmat yuyotana uru ṇaḥ śarma yacchatā svastaye
ariṣṭaḥ sa martaḥ viśvaḥ edhate pra prajābhiḥ jāyate dharmaṇaḥ pari
yam ādityāsaḥ nayatha sunītibhiḥ ati viśvāni duritā svastaye
yam devāsaḥ avatha vājasātau yam śūrasātā marutaḥ hite dhane
prātaryāvāṇam ratham indra sānasim ariṣyantam ā ruhema svastaye
svasti naḥ pathyāsu dhanvasu svasti apsu vṛjane svarvati
svasti naḥ putrakṛtheṣu yoniṣu svasti rāye marutaḥ dadhātana
svastiḥ id hi prapathe śreṣṭhā rekṇasvatī abhi yā vāmam eti
sā naḥ amā sā u araṇe ni pātu su āveśā bhavatu deva gopā
evā plateḥ sūnuḥ avīvṛdhat vaḥ viśve ādityāḥ adite manīṣī
īśānāsaḥ naraḥ amartyena astāvi janas divyaḥ gayena
devān huve bṛhat śravasaḥ svastaye jyotiṣkṛtaḥ adhvarasya pracetasaḥ
ye vāvṛdhuḥ prataram viśva vedasaḥ indra jyeṣṭhāsaḥ amṛtāḥ ṛtāvṛdhaḥ
indra prasūtāḥ varuṇa praśiṣṭāḥ ye sūryasya jyotiṣaḥ bhāgam ānaśuḥ
marut gaṇe vṛjane manma dhīmahi māghone yajñam janayanta sūrayaḥ
indraḥ vasubhiḥ pari pātu naḥ gayam ādityaiḥ naḥ aditiḥ śarma yacchatu
rudraḥ rudrebhiḥ devaḥ mṛḍayāti naḥ tvaṣṭā naḥ gnābhiḥ suvitāya jinvatu
aditiḥ dyāvāpṛthivī ṛtam mahat indrāḥ viṣṇū marutaḥ svar bṛhat
devāṁ ādityāṁ avase havāmahe vasūn rudrān savitāram su daṃsasam
sarasvān dhībhiḥ varuṇaḥ dhṛta vrataḥ pūṣā viṣṇuḥ mahimā vāyuḥ aśvinā
brahma kṛtaḥ amṛtāḥ viśva vedasaḥ śarma naḥ yaṃsan tri varūtham aṃhasaḥ
vṛṣā yajñaḥ vṛṣaṇaḥ santu yajñiyāḥ vṛṣaṇaḥ devāḥ vṛṣaṇaḥ haviṣkṛtaḥ
vṛṣaṇā dyāvāpṛthivī ṛtāvarī vṛṣā parjanyaḥ vṛṣaṇaḥ vṛṣa stubhaḥ
agnīṣomā vṛṣaṇā vājasātaye puru praśastā vṛṣaṇā upa bruve
yau ījire vṛṣaṇaḥ deva yajyayā tā naḥ śarma tri varūtham vi yaṃsataḥ
dhṛta vratāḥ kṣatriyāḥ yajña niṣkṛtaḥ bṛhat divāḥ adhvarāṇām abhiśriyaḥ
agni hotāraḥ ṛtasāpaḥ adruhaḥ apaḥ asṛjan anu vṛtratūrye
dyāvāpṛthivī janayan abhi vratā apaḥ oṣadhīḥ vanināni yajñiyā
antarikṣam svar ā papruḥ ūtaye vaśam devāsaḥ tanvī ni māmṛjuḥ
dhartāraḥ divaḥ ṛbhavaḥ su hastāḥ vātāparjanyā mahiṣasya tanyatoḥ
āpaḥ oṣadhīḥ pra tirantu naḥ giraḥ bhagaḥ rātiḥ vājinaḥ yantu me havam
samudraḥ sindhuḥ rajaḥ antarikṣam ajaḥ ekapād tanayitnuḥ arṇavaḥ
ahiḥ budhnyaḥ śṛṇavat vacāṃsi me viśve devāsaḥ uta sūrayaḥ mama
syāma vaḥ manavaḥ deva vītaye prāñcam naḥ yajñam pra nayata sādhuyā
ādityāḥ rudrāḥ vasavaḥ sudānavaḥ imā brahma śasyamānāni jinvata
daivyā hotārā prathamā purohitaḥ ṛtasya panthām anu emi sādhuyā
kṣetrasya patim prativeśam īmahe viśvān devāṁ amṛtāṁ aprayucchataḥ
vasiṣṭhāsaḥ pitṛ vat vācam akrata devāṁ īḍānāḥ ṛṣi vat svastaye
prītāḥ iva jñātayaḥ kāmam etya asme devāsaḥ ava dhūnutā vasu
devān vasiṣṭhaḥ amṛtān vavande ye viśvā bhuvanā abhi pratasthuḥ
te naḥ rāsantām urugāyam adya yūyam pāta svastibhiḥ sadā naḥ
imām dhiyam sapta śīrṣṇīm pitā naḥ ṛta prajātām bṛhatīm avindat
turīyam svid janayat viśvajanyaḥ ayāsyaḥ uktham indrāya śaṃsan
ṛtam śaṃsantaḥ ṛju dīdhyānāḥ divaḥ putrāsaḥ asurasya vīrāḥ
vipram padam aṅgirasaḥ dadhānāḥ yajñasya dhāma prathamam mananta
haṃsaiḥ iva sakhibhiḥ vāvadadbhiḥ aśmanmayāni nahanā vyasyan
bṛhaspatiḥ abhi kanikradat gāḥ uta prāstaut ud ca vidvāṁ agāyat
avas dvābhyām paras ekayā gāḥ guhā tiṣṭhantīḥ anṛtasya setau
bṛhaspatiḥ tamasi jyotiḥ icchan ud usrāḥ ākaḥ vi hi tisraḥ āvaḥ
vibhidyā puram śayathā īm apācīm niḥ trīṇi sākam udadheḥ akṛntat
bṛhaspatiḥ uṣasam sūryam gām arkam viveda stanayan iva dyauḥ
indraḥ valam rakṣitāram dughānām kareṇa iva vi cakartā raveṇa
sveda añjibhiḥ āśiram icchamānaḥ arodayat paṇim ā gāḥ amuṣṇāt
saḥ īm satyebhiḥ sakhibhiḥ śucadbhiḥ go dhāyasam vi dhanasaiḥ adardar
brahmaṇaspatiḥ vṛṣabhiḥ varāhaiḥ gharma svedebhiḥ draviṇam vi ānaṭ
te satyena manasā gopatim gāḥ iyānāsaḥ iṣaṇayanta dhībhiḥ
bṛhaspatiḥ mithoavadyapebhiḥ ud usriyāḥ asṛjata sva yugbhiḥ
tam vardhayantaḥ matibhiḥ śivābhiḥ siṃham iva nānadatam sadhasthe
bṛhaspatim vṛṣaṇam śūrasātau bhare bhare anu madema jiṣṇum
yadā vājam asanat viśva rūpam ā dyām arukṣat uttarāṇi sadma
bṛhaspatim vṛṣaṇam vardhayantaḥ nānā santaḥ bibhrataḥ jyotiḥ āsā
satyām āśiṣam kṛṇuta _ kīrim cit hi avatha svebhiḥ evaiḥ
paścā mṛdhaḥ apa bhavantu viśvāḥ tat rodasī śṛṇutam viśvaminve
indraḥ mahnā mahataḥ arṇavasya vi mūrdhānam abhinat arbudasya
ahan ahim ariṇāt sapta sindhūn devaiḥ dyāvāpṛthivī prāvatam naḥ
bhadrāḥ agneḥ vadhryaśvasya saṃdṛśaḥ vāmī praṇītiḥ suraṇāḥ upetayaḥ
yat īm sumitrāḥ viśaḥ agre indhate ghṛtena āhutaḥ jarate davidyutat
ghṛtam agneḥ vadhryaśvasya vardhanam ghṛtam annam ghṛtam u asya medanam
ghṛtena āhutaḥ urviyā vi paprathe sūryaḥ iva rocate sarpiḥ āsutiḥ
yat te manuḥ yat anīkam sumitraḥ samīdhe agne tat idam navīyaḥ
sa revat śoca sa giraḥ juṣasva sa vājam darṣi saḥ iha śravaḥ dhāḥ
yam tvā pūrvam īḍitaḥ vadhryaśvaḥ samīdhe agne saḥ idam juṣasva
sa na stipāḥ uta bhavā tanū pāḥ dātram rakṣasva yat idam te asme
bhavā dyumnī vādhryaśva uta gopāḥ mā tvā tārīt abhimātiḥ janānām
śūraḥ iva dhṛṣṇuḥ cyavanaḥ sumitraḥ pra nu vocam vādhryaśvasya nāma
sam ajryā parvatyā vasūni dāsā vṛtrāṇi āryā jigetha
śūraḥ iva dhṛṣṇuḥ cyavanaḥ janānām tvam agne pṛtanāyūn abhi syāḥ
dīrgha tantuḥ bṛhat ukṣā ayam agniḥ sahasra starīḥ śata nīthaḥ ṛbhvā
dyumān dyumatsu nṛbhiḥ mṛjyamānaḥ sumitreṣu dīdayaḥ devayatsu
tve dhenuḥ su dughā jātavedaḥ asaścatā iva samanā sabarduh
tvam nṛbhiḥ dakṣiṇāvadbhiḥ agne sumitrebhiḥ idhyase devayadbhiḥ
devāḥ cit te amṛtāḥ jātavedaḥ mahimānam vādhryaśva pra vocan
yat saṃpṛccham mānuṣīḥ viśaḥ āyan tvam nṛbhiḥ ajayaḥ tvāvṛdhebhiḥ
pitā iva putram abibhar upasthe tvām agne vadhryaśvaḥ saparyan
juṣāṇaḥ asya samidham yaviṣṭha uta pūrvām avanoḥ vrādhataḥ cit
śaśvat agniḥ vadhryaśvasya śatrūn nṛbhiḥ jigāya suta somavadbhiḥ
samanam cit adahaḥ citrabhāno ava vrādhantam abhinat vṛdhaḥ cit
ayam agniḥ vadhryaśvasya vṛtra hā sanakāt preddhaḥ namasā upavākyaḥ
sa naḥ ajāmīn uta vā vijāmīn abhi tiṣṭha śardhataḥ vādhryaśva
devānām nu vayam jānā pra vocāma vipanyayā
uktheṣu śasyamāneṣu yaḥ paśyāt uttare yuge
brahmaṇaḥ patiḥ etā sam karmāraḥ iva ādhamat
devānām pūrvye yuge asataḥ sat ajāyata
devānām yuge prathame asataḥ sat ajāyata
tat āśāḥ anu ajāyanta tat uttānapadaḥ pari
bhūḥ jajñe uttānapadaḥ bhuvaḥ āśāḥ ajāyanta
aditeḥ dakṣaḥ ajāyata dakṣāt u aditiḥ pari
aditiḥ hi ajaniṣṭa dakṣa yā duhitā tava
tām devāḥ anu ajāyanta bhadrāḥ amṛta bandhavaḥ
yat devāḥ adaḥ salile su saṃrabdhāḥ atiṣṭhata
atrā vaḥ nṛtyatām iva tīvraḥ reṇuḥ apa āyata
yat devāḥ yatayaḥ yathā bhuvanāni apinvata
atrā samudre ā gūḍham ā sūryam ajabhartana
aṣṭau putrāsaḥ aditeḥ ye jātāḥ tanvaḥ pari
devāṁ upa prait saptabhiḥ parā mārtāṇḍam āsyat
saptabhiḥ putraiḥ aditiḥ upa prait pūrvyam yugam
prajāyai mṛtyave _ punar mārtāṇḍam ābharat
janiṣṭhāḥ ugraḥ sahase turāya mandraḥ ojiṣṭhaḥ bahula abhimānaḥ
avardhan indram marutaḥ cit atra mātā yat vīram dadhanat dhaniṣṭhā
druhā u niṣattā pṛśanī cit evaiḥ purū śaṃsena vāvṛdhuḥ te indram
abhīvṛtā iva tā mahā padena dhvāntāt prapitvāt ud aranta garbhāḥ
ṛṣvā te pādā pra yat jigāsi avardhan vājāḥ uta ye cit atra
tvam indra sālāvṛkān sahasram āsan dadhiṣe aśvinā vavṛtyāḥ
samanā tūrṇiḥ upa yāsi yajñam ā nāsatyā sakhyāya vakṣi
vasāvyām indra dhārayaḥ sahasrā aśvinā śūra dadatuḥ maghāni
mandamānaḥ ṛtāt adhi prajāyai sakhibhiḥ indraḥ iṣirebhiḥ artham
ābhiḥ hi māyāḥ upa dasyum āgāt mihaḥ pra tamrāḥ avapat tamāṃsi
sanāmānā cit dhvasayaḥ ni asmai avāhan indraḥ uṣasaḥ yathā anaḥ
ṛṣvaiḥ agacchaḥ sakhibhiḥ nikāmaiḥ sākam pratiṣṭhāḥ hṛdyāḥ jaghantha
tvam jaghantha namucim makhasyum dāsam kṛṇvānaḥ ṛṣaye vimāyam
tvam cakartha manave syonān pathaḥ devatrā añjasā iva yānān
tvam etāni papriṣe vi nāmā īśāna indra dadhiṣe gabhastau
anu tvā devāḥ śavasā madanti uparibudhnān vaninaḥ cakartha
cakram yat asya apsu ā niṣattam uta u tat asmai madhu id cachadyāt
pṛthivyām atiṣitam yat ūdhaḥ payaḥ goṣu adadhāḥ oṣadhīṣu
aśvāt iyāya iti yat vadanti ojasaḥ jātam uta manye enam
manyoḥ iyāya harmyeṣu tasthau yatas prajajñe indraḥ asya veda
vayaḥ su parṇāḥ upa seduḥ indram priyamedhāḥ ṛṣayaḥ nādhamānāḥ
apa dhvāntam ūrṇuhi pūrdhi cakṣuḥ mumugdhi asmān nidhayā iva baddhān
vasūnām vā carkṛṣe iyakṣan dhiyā vā yajñaiḥ vā rodasyoḥ
arvantaḥ vā ye rayimantaḥ sātau vanum vā ye suśruṇam su śrutaḥ dhuḥ
have eṣām asuraḥ nakṣata dyām śravasyatā manasā niṃsata kṣām
cakṣāṇāḥ yatra suvitāya devāḥ dyauḥ na vārebhiḥ kṛṇavanta svaiḥ
iyam eṣām amṛtānām gīḥ sarvatātā ye kṛpaṇanta ratnam
dhiyam ca yajñam ca sādhantaḥ te naḥ dhāntu vasavyam asāmi
ā tat te indra āyavaḥ pananta abhi ye ūrvam gomantam titṛtsān
sakṛtsvam ye puru putrām mahīm sahasra dhārām bṛhatīm dudukṣan
śacīvas indram avase kṛṇudhvam an ānatam damayantam pṛtanyūn
ṛbhukṣaṇam maghavānam suvṛktim bhartā yaḥ vajram naryam purukṣuḥ
yat vāvāna purutamam purāṣāh ā vṛtrahā indraḥ nāmāni aprāḥ
aceti prāsahaḥ patiḥ tuviṣmān yat īm uśmasi kartave karat tat
ā vaḥ ṛñjase ūrjām vyuṣṭiṣu indram marutaḥ rodasī anaktana
ubhe yathā naḥ ahanī sacābhuvā sadaḥ sadaḥ varivasyātaḥ _
tat u śreṣṭham savanam sunotana atyaḥ na hasta yataḥ adriḥ sotari
vidat hi aryaḥ abhibhūti pauṃsyam mahaḥ rāye cit tarute yat arvataḥ
tat id hi asya savanam _ apaḥ yathā purā manave gātum aśret
goarṇasi tvāṣṭre aśva nirṇiji _ adhvareṣu adhvarāṁ aśiśrayuḥ
apa hata rakṣasaḥ bhaṅgurāvata skabhāyata nirṛtim sedhata amatim
ā naḥ rayim sarva vīram sunotana devāvyam bharata ślokam adrayaḥ
divaḥ cit ā vaḥ amavattarebhyaḥ vibhvanā cit āśvapastarebhyaḥ
vāyoḥ cit ā somarabhastarebhyaḥ agneḥ cit arca pitukṛttarebhyaḥ
bhurantu naḥ yaśasaḥ sotu andhasaḥ grāvāṇaḥ vācā divitā divitmatā
naraḥ yatra duhate kāmyam madhu āghoṣayantaḥ abhitas mithasturaḥ
sunvanti somam rathirāsaḥ adrayaḥ niḥ asya rasam gaviṣaḥ duhanti te
duhanti ūdhaḥ upasecanāya kam naraḥ havyāḥ na marjayante āsabhiḥ
ete naraḥ su apasaḥ abhūtana ye indrāya sunutha somam adrayaḥ
vāmam vāmam vaḥ divyāya dhāmne vasu vasu vaḥ pārthivāya sunvate
abhrapruṣaḥ na vācā pruṣā vasu haviṣmantaḥ na yajñāḥ vi jānuṣaḥ
su mārutam na brahmāṇam arhase gaṇam astoṣi eṣām na śobhase
śriye maryāsaḥ añjīṃr akṛṇvata su mārutam na pūrvīḥ ati kṣapaḥ
divaḥ putrāsaḥ etāḥ na yetire ādityāsaḥ te akrāḥ na vāvṛdhuḥ
pra ye divaḥ pṛthivyāḥ na barhaṇā tmanā riricre abhrāt na sūryaḥ
pājasvantaḥ na vīrāḥ panasyavaḥ riśādasaḥ na maryāḥ abhidyavaḥ
yuṣmākam budhne apām na yāmani vithuryati na mahī śratharyati
viśvapsuḥ yajñaḥ arvāk ayam su vaḥ prayasvantaḥ na satrācaḥ ā gata
yūyam dhūrṣu prayujaḥ na raśmibhiḥ jyotiṣmantaḥ na bhāsā vyuṣṭiṣu
śyenāsaḥ na sva yaśasaḥ riśādasaḥ pravāsaḥ na prasitāsaḥ paripruṣaḥ
pra yat vahadhve marutaḥ parākāt yūyam mahaḥ saṃvaraṇasya vasvaḥ
vidānāsaḥ vasavaḥ rādhyasya ārāt cit dveṣaḥ sanutar yuyota
yaḥ udṛci yajñe adhvareṣṭhāḥ marudbhyaḥ na mānuṣaḥ dadāśat
revat sa vayaḥ dadhate su vīram sa devānām api gopīthe astu
te hi yajñeṣu yajñiyāsaḥ ūmāḥ ādityena nāmnā śambhaviṣṭhāḥ
te naḥ avantu _ manīṣām mahaḥ ca yāman adhvare cakānāḥ
viprāsaḥ na manmabhiḥ su ādhyaḥ _ na yajñaiḥ svapnasaḥ
rājānaḥ na citrāḥ su saṃdṛśaḥ kṣitīnām na maryāḥ arepasaḥ
agniḥ na ye bhrājasā rukma vakṣasaḥ vātāsaḥ na sva yujaḥ sadyaūtayaḥ
prajñātāraḥ na jyeṣṭhāḥ su nītayaḥ su śarmāṇaḥ na somāḥ ṛtam yate
vātāsaḥ na ye dhunayaḥ jigatnavaḥ agnīnām na jihvāḥ virokiṇaḥ
varmaṇvantaḥ na yodhāḥ śimīvantaḥ pitṝṇām na śaṃsāḥ su rātayaḥ
rathānām na ye arāḥ sanābhayaḥ jigīvāṃsaḥ na śūrāḥ abhidyavaḥ
vareyavaḥ na maryāḥ ghṛtapruṣaḥ abhisvartāraḥ arkam na suṣṭubhaḥ
aśvāsaḥ na ye jyeṣṭhāsaḥ āśavaḥ didhiṣavaḥ na _ sudānavaḥ
āpaḥ na nimnaiḥ udabhiḥ jigatnavaḥ viśva rūpāḥ aṅgirasaḥ na sāmabhiḥ
grāvāṇaḥ na sūrayaḥ sindhu mātaraḥ ādardirāsaḥ adrayaḥ na viśvahā
śiśūlāḥ na krīḍayaḥ su mātaraḥ mahā grāmaḥ na yāman uta tviṣā
uṣasām na ketavaḥ adhvara śriyaḥ śubhaṃyavaḥ na añjibhiḥ vi aśvitan
sindhavaḥ na _ bhrājat ṛṣṭayaḥ parāvataḥ na yojanāni mamire
subhāgān naḥ devāḥ kṛṇutā su ratnān asmān stotṝn marutaḥ vāvṛdhānāḥ
adhi stotrasya sakhyasya gāta sanāt hi vaḥ ratna dheyāni santi
yaḥ imā viśvā bhuvanāni juhvat ṛṣiḥ hotā ni asīdat pitā naḥ
saḥ āśiṣā draviṇam icchamānaḥ prathamacchad avarāṁ ā viveśa
kim svid āsīt adhiṣṭhānam ārambhaṇam katamat svid kathā āsīt
yatas bhūmim janayan viśvakarmā vi dyām aurṇot mahinā viśva cakṣāḥ
viśvatas cakṣuḥ uta viśvatomukhaḥ viśvatobāhuḥ uta viśvataspād
sam bāhubhyām dhamati sam patatraiḥ dyāvābhūmī janayan devaḥ ekaḥ
kim svid vanam kaḥ u sa vṛkṣaḥ āsa yatas dyāvāpṛthivī niṣṭatakṣuḥ
manīṣiṇaḥ manasā pṛcchata id u tat yat adhyatiṣṭhat bhuvanāni dhārayan
yā te dhāmāni paramāṇi yā avamā yā madhyamā viśvakarman uta imā
śikṣā sakhibhyaḥ haviṣi svadhāvas svayam yajasva tanvam vṛdhānaḥ
viśvakarman haviṣā vāvṛdhānaḥ svayam yajasva pṛthivīm uta dyām
muhyantu anye abhitas janāsaḥ iha asmākam maghavā sūriḥ astu
vācaḥ patim viśvakarmāṇam ūtaye _ vāje adyā huvema
sa naḥ viśvāni havanāni joṣat _ avase sādhu karmā
cakṣuṣaḥ pitā manasā hi dhīraḥ ghṛtam ene ajanat nannamāne
yadā id antāḥ adadṛhanta pūrve āt id dyāvāpṛthivī aprathetām
viśvakarmā vimanāḥ āt vihāyāḥ dhātā vidhātā paramā uta saṃdṛś
teṣām iṣṭāni sam iṣā madanti yatrā sapta ṛṣīn paras ekam āhuḥ
yaḥ naḥ pitā janitā yaḥ vidhātā dhāmāni veda bhuvanāni viśvā
yaḥ devānām nāmadhāḥ ekaḥ eva tam sampraśnam bhuvanā yanti anyā
te āyajanta draviṇam sam asmai ṛṣayaḥ pūrve jaritāraḥ na bhūnā
asūrte sūrte rajasi niṣatte ye bhūtāni samakṛṇvan imāni
paras divā paras enā pṛthivyā paras devebhiḥ asuraiḥ yat asti
kam svid garbham prathamam dadhre āpaḥ yatra devāḥ samapaśyanta viśve
tam id garbham prathamam dadhre āpaḥ yatra devāḥ samagacchanta viśve
ajasya nābhau adhi ekam arpitam yasmin viśvāni bhuvanāni tasthuḥ
na tam vidātha yaḥ imā jajāna anyat yuṣmākam antaram babhūva
nīhāreṇa prāvṛtāḥ jalpyā ca asutṛpaḥ uktha śāsaḥ caranti
yaḥ te manyo avidhat vajra sāyaka sahaḥ ojaḥ puṣyati viśvam ānuṣak
sāhyāma dāsam āryam tvayā yujā sahaskṛtena sahasā sahasvatā
manyuḥ indraḥ manyuḥ eva āsa devaḥ manyuḥ hotā varuṇaḥ jātavedāḥ
manyum viśaḥ īḍate mānuṣīḥ yāḥ pāhi naḥ manyo tapasā sajoṣāḥ
abhīhi manyo tavasaḥ tavīyān tapasā yujā vi jahi śatrūn
amitra hā vṛtra hā dasyu hā ca viśvā vasūni ā bhara tvam naḥ
tvam hi manyo abhibhūti ojāḥ svayaṃbhūḥ bhāmaḥ abhimātiṣāhaḥ
viśvacarṣaṇiḥ sahuriḥ sahāvān asmāsu ojaḥ pṛtanāsu dhehi
a bhāgaḥ san apa paretaḥ asmi tava kratvā taviṣasya pracetaḥ
tam tvā manyo akratuḥ jihīḍa aham svā tanūḥ bala deyāya mā ihi
ayam te asmi upa mā ihi arvāṅ pratīcīnaḥ sahure viśva dhāyaḥ
manyo vajrin abhi mām ā vavṛtsva hanāva dasyūn uta bodhi āpeḥ
abhi prehi dakṣiṇatas bhava me adha vṛtrāṇi jaṅghanāva bhūri
juhomi te dharuṇam madhvaḥ agram ubhau upāṃśu prathamā pibāva
tvayā manyo sa ratham ārujantaḥ harṣamāṇāsaḥ dhṛṣitāḥ marutvas
tigmeṣavaḥ āyudhā saṃśiśānāḥ abhi pra yantu naraḥ agni rūpāḥ

ṛc sāmābhyām abhihitau gāvau te sāmanau itaḥ

kva ekam cakram vām āsīt kva deṣṭrāya tasthathuḥ

sūryāyai devebhyaḥ mitrāya varuṇāya ca
ye bhūtasya pracetasaḥ idam tebhyaḥ akaram namaḥ

ā roha sūrye amṛtasya lokam syonam patye vahatum kṛṇuṣva

anyām iccha prapharvyam sam jāyām patyā sṛja

na sa īśe yasya romaśam niṣeduṣaḥ vijṛmbhate
sa id īśe yasya rambate antarā _ kapṛth viśvasmāt indraḥ uttaraḥ
ayam indra vṛṣākapiḥ parasvantam hatam vidat

punar ehi vṛṣākape suvitā kalpayāvahai
yaḥ eṣa svapnanaṃśanaḥ astam eṣi pathā punar viśvasmāt indraḥ uttaraḥ
yat udañcaḥ vṛṣākape gṛham indra ajagantana
kva sya pulu aghaḥ mṛgaḥ kam agan jana yopanaḥ viśvasmāt indraḥ uttaraḥ
parśuḥ ha nāma mānavī sākam sasūva viṃśatim
bhadram bhala tyasyāḥ abhūt yasyāḥ udaram _ viśvasmāt indraḥ uttaraḥ
rakṣaḥ haṇam vājinam ā jigharmi mitram prathiṣṭham upa yāmi śarma
śiśānaḥ agniḥ kratubhiḥ samiddhaḥ sa naḥ divā sa riṣaḥ pātu naktam
ayaḥ daṃṣṭraḥ arciṣā yātudhānān upa spṛśa jātavedaḥ samiddhaḥ
ā jihvayā mūradevān rabhasva kravyādaḥ vṛktvī api dhatsva āsan
ubhā ubhayāvin upa dhehi daṃṣṭrā hiṃsraḥ śiśānaḥ avaram param ca
uta antarikṣe pari yāhi rājan jambhaiḥ sam dhehi abhi yātudhānān
yajñaiḥ iṣūḥ saṃnamamānaḥ agne vācā śalyāṁ aśanibhiḥ dihānaḥ
tābhiḥ vidhya hṛdaye yātudhānān pratīcaḥ bāhūn prati bhaṅdhi eṣām
agne tvacam yātudhānasya bhinddhi hiṃsra aśaniḥ harasā hantu enam
pra parvāṇi jātavedaḥ śṛṇīhi kravyād kraviṣṇuḥ vi cinotu vṛkṇam
yatrā idānīm paśyasi jātavedaḥ tiṣṭhantam agne uta vā carantam
yat vā antarikṣe pathibhiḥ patantam tam astā vidhya śarvā śiśānaḥ
uta ālabdham spṛṇuhi jātavedaḥ ālebhānāt ṛṣṭibhiḥ yātudhānāt
agne pūrvaḥ ni jahi śośucānaḥ āmādaḥ kṣviṅkāḥ tam adantu enīḥ
iha pra brūhi yatamaḥ saḥ agne yaḥ yātudhānaḥ yaḥ idam kṛṇoti
tam ā rabhasva samidhā yaviṣṭha nṛ cakṣasaḥ cakṣuṣe randhaya enam
tīkṣṇena agne cakṣuṣā rakṣa yajñam prāñcam vasubhyaḥ pra naya pracetaḥ
hiṃsram rakṣāṃsi abhi śośucānam mā tvā dabhan yātudhānāḥ nṛ cakṣaḥ
nṛ cakṣāḥ rakṣaḥ pari paśya vikṣu tasya trīṇi prati śṛṇīhi agrā
tasya agne pṛṣṭīḥ harasā śṛṇīhi tredhā mūlam yātudhānasya vṛśca
tris yātudhānaḥ prasitim te etu ṛtam yaḥ agne anṛtena hanti
tam arciṣā sphūrjayan jātavedaḥ samakṣam enam gṛṇate ni vṛṅdhi
tat agne cakṣuḥ prati dhehi rebhe śaphārujam yena paśyasi yātudhānam
atharva vat jyotiṣā daivyena satyam dhūrvantam acitam ni oṣa
yat agne adya mithunā śapātaḥ yat vācaḥ tṛṣṭam janayanta rebhāḥ
manyoḥ manasaḥ śaravyā jāyate yā tayā vidhya hṛdaye yātudhānān
parā śṛṇīhi tapasā yātudhānān parā agne rakṣaḥ harasā śṛṇīhi
parā arciṣā mūradevān śṛṇīhi parā asutṛpaḥ abhi śośucānaḥ
parā adya devāḥ vṛjinam śṛṇantu pratyak enam śapathāḥ yantu tṛṣṭāḥ
vācāstenam śaravaḥ ṛcchantu marman viśvasya aitu prasitim yātudhānaḥ
yaḥ pauruṣeyeṇa kraviṣā samaṅkte yaḥ aśvyena paśunā yātudhānaḥ
yaḥ aghnyāyāḥ bharati kṣīram agne teṣām śīrṣāṇi harasā api vṛśca
saṃvatsarīṇam payaḥ usriyāyāḥ tasya mā aśīt yātudhānaḥ nṛ cakṣaḥ

yaśaḥ na pakvam madhu goṣu antar ā bhūtāṃśaḥ aśvinoḥ kāmam aprāḥ
āvis abhūt mahi māghonam eṣām viśvam jīvam tamasaḥ niḥ amoci
mahi jyotiḥ pitṛbhiḥ dattam āgāt uruḥ panthāḥ dakṣiṇāyāḥ adarśi
uccā divi dakṣiṇāvantaḥ asthuḥ ye aśva dāḥ saha te sūryeṇa
hiraṇya dāḥ amṛta tvam bhajante vāsaḥ dāḥ soma pra tirante āyuḥ
daivī pūrtiḥ dakṣiṇā deva yajyā na kavāribhyaḥ nahi te pṛṇanti
athā naraḥ prayata dakṣiṇāsaḥ avadya bhiyā bahavaḥ pṛṇanti
śata dhāram vāyum arkam svarvidam nṛ cakṣasaḥ te abhi cakṣate haviḥ
ye pṛṇanti pra ca yacchanti saṃgame te dakṣiṇām duhate sapta mātaram
dakṣiṇāvān prathamaḥ hūtaḥ eti dakṣiṇāvān grāmaṇīḥ agram eti
tam eva manye nṛpatim janānām yaḥ prathamaḥ dakṣiṇām āvivāya
tam eva ṛṣim tam u brahmāṇam āhuḥ yajñanyam sāma gām uktha śāsam
sa śukrasya tanvaḥ veda tisraḥ yaḥ prathamaḥ dakṣiṇayā rarādha
dakṣiṇā aśvam dakṣiṇā gām dadāti dakṣiṇā candram uta yat hiraṇyam
dakṣiṇā annam vanute yaḥ naḥ ātmā dakṣiṇām varma kṛṇute vijānan
na bhojāḥ mamruḥ na nyartham īyuḥ na riṣyanti na vyathante ha bhojāḥ
idam yat viśvam bhuvanam svar ca etat sarvam dakṣiṇā ebhyaḥ dadāti
bhojāḥ jigyuḥ surabhim yonim agre bhojāḥ jigyuḥ vadhvam yā su vāsāḥ
bhojāḥ jigyuḥ antaḥpeyam surāyāḥ bhojāḥ jigyuḥ ye a hūtāḥ prayanti
bhojāya aśvam sam mṛjanti āśum bhojāya āste kanyā śumbhamānā
bhojasya idam puṣkariṇī iva veśma pariṣkṛtam deva mānā iva citram
bhojam aśvāḥ suṣṭhuvāhaḥ vahanti suvṛt rathaḥ vartate dakṣiṇāyāḥ
bhojam devāsaḥ avatā bhareṣu bhojaḥ śatrūn samanīkeṣu jetā
kim icchantī saramā pra idam ānaṭ dūre hi adhvā jaguriḥ parācais
kā asmehitiḥ kā paritakmyā āsīt katham rasāyāḥ ataraḥ payāṃsi
indrasya dūtīḥ iṣitā carāmi mahaḥ icchantī paṇayaḥ nidhīn vaḥ
atiṣkadaḥ bhiyasā tat naḥ āvat tathā rasāyāḥ ataram payāṃsi
kīdṛṅ indraḥ sarame kā dṛśīkā yasya idam dūtīḥ asaraḥ parākāt
ā ca gacchāt mitram enā dadhāma athā gavām gopatiḥ naḥ bhavāti
na aham tam veda dabhyam dabhat sa yasya idam dūtīḥ asaram parākāt
na tam gūhanti sravataḥ gabhīrāḥ hatāḥ indreṇa paṇayaḥ śayadhve
imāḥ gāvaḥ sarame yāḥ aicchaḥ pari divaḥ antān subhage patantī
kaḥ te enāḥ ava sṛjāt a yudhvī uta asmākam āyudhā santi tigmā
asenyā vaḥ paṇayaḥ vacāṃsi aniṣavyāḥ tanvaḥ santu pāpīḥ
adhṛṣṭaḥ vaḥ etavai astu panthāḥ bṛhaspatiḥ vaḥ ubhayā na mṛḍāt
ayam nidhiḥ sarame adri budhnaḥ gobhiḥ aśvebhiḥ vasubhiḥ ni ṛṣṭaḥ
rakṣanti tam paṇayaḥ ye su gopāḥ reku padam alakam ā jagantha
ā iha gaman ṛṣayaḥ soma śitāḥ ayāsyaḥ aṅgirasaḥ navagvāḥ
te etam ūrvam vi bhajanta gonām atha etat vacaḥ paṇayaḥ vaman id
evā ca tvam sarame ājagantha prabādhitā sahasā daivyena
svasāram tvā kṛṇavai mā punar gāḥ apa te gavām subhage bhajāma
na aham veda bhrātṛ tvam no svasṛ tvam indraḥ viduḥ aṅgirasaḥ ca ghorāḥ
go kāmāḥ me acchadayan yat āyam apa atas ita paṇayaḥ varīyaḥ
dūram ita paṇayaḥ varīyaḥ ud gāvaḥ yantu minatīḥ ṛtena
bṛhaspatiḥ yāḥ avindat nigūḍhāḥ somaḥ grāvāṇaḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca viprāḥ
te avadan prathamāḥ brahma kilbiṣe akūpāraḥ salilaḥ mātariśvā
vīḍu harāḥ tapaḥ ugraḥ mayaḥ bhūḥ āpaḥ devīḥ prathama jāḥ ṛtena
somaḥ rājā prathamaḥ brahma jāyām punar prāyacchat a hṛṇīyamānaḥ
anvartitā varuṇaḥ mitraḥ āsīt agniḥ hotā hasta gṛhyā nināya
hastena eva grāhyaḥ ādhiḥ asyāḥ brahma jāyā iyam iti ced avocan
na dūtāya prahye tasthe eṣā tathā rāṣṭram gupitam kṣatriyasya
devāḥ etasyām avadanta pūrve sapta ṛṣayaḥ tapase ye niṣeduḥ
bhīmā jāyā brāhmaṇasya upanītā durdhām dadhāti parame vyoman
brahmacārī carati veviṣat viṣaḥ sa devānām bhavati ekam aṅgam
tena jāyām anu avindat bṛhaspatiḥ somena nītām juhvam na devāḥ
punar vai devāḥ adaduḥ punar manuṣyāḥ uta
rājānaḥ satyam kṛṇvānāḥ brahma jāyām punar daduḥ
punar dāya brahma jāyām kṛtvī devaiḥ nikilbiṣam
ūrjam pṛthivyāḥ bhaktvāya urugāyam upāsate
samiddhaḥ adya manuṣaḥ duroṇe devaḥ devān yajasi jātavedaḥ
ā ca vaha mitra mahas cikitvān tvam dūtaḥ kaviḥ asi pracetāḥ
tanūnapād pathaḥ ṛtasya yānān madhvā samañjan svadayā sujihva
manmāni dhībhiḥ uta yajñam ṛndhan devatrā ca kṛṇuhi adhvaram naḥ
ājuhvānaḥ īḍyaḥ vandyaḥ ca ā yāhi agne vasubhiḥ sajoṣāḥ
tvam devānām asi yahva hotā saḥ enān yakṣi iṣitaḥ yajīyān
prācīnam barhiḥ pradiśā pṛthivyāḥ vastoḥ asyāḥ vṛjyate agre ahnām
vi u prathate vitaram varīyaḥ devebhyaḥ aditaye syonam
vyacasvatīḥ urviyā vi śrayantām patibhyaḥ na janayaḥ śumbhamānāḥ
devīḥ dvāraḥ bṛhatīḥ viśvaminvāḥ devebhyaḥ bhavata su prāyaṇāḥ
ā _ yajate upāke uṣāsānaktā sadatām ni yonau
divye yoṣaṇe bṛhatī su rukme adhi śriyam śukrapiśam dadhāne
daivyā hotārā prathamā su vācā mimānā yajñam manuṣaḥ yajadhyai
pracodayantā vidatheṣu kārū prācīnam jyotiḥ pradiśā diśantā
ā naḥ yajñam bhāratī tūyam etu iḍā manuṣvat iha cetayantī
tisraḥ devīḥ barhiḥ ā idam syonam sarasvatī su apasaḥ sadantu
yaḥ ime dyāvāpṛthivī janitrī rūpaiḥ apiṃśat bhuvanāni viśvā
tam adya hotar iṣitaḥ yajīyān devam tvaṣṭāram iha yakṣi vidvān
upa avasṛja _ samañjan devānām pāthaḥ ṛtuthā havīṃṣi
vanaspatiḥ śamitā devaḥ agniḥ svadantu havyam madhunā ghṛtena
sadyas jātaḥ vi amimīta yajñam agniḥ devānām abhavat purogāḥ
asya hotuḥ pradiśi ṛtasya vāci svāhākṛtam haviḥ adantu devāḥ
manīṣiṇaḥ pra bharadhvam manīṣām yathā yathā matayaḥ santi nṛṇām
indram satyaiḥ ā īrayāma kṛtebhiḥ sa hi vīraḥ girvaṇasyuḥ vidānaḥ
ṛtasya hi sadasaḥ dhītiḥ adyaut sam gārṣṭeyaḥ vṛṣabhaḥ gobhiḥ ānaṭ
ud atiṣṭhat taviṣeṇa raveṇa mahānti cit sam vivyāca rajāṃsi
indraḥ kila śrutyāḥ asya veda sa hi jiṣṇuḥ pathikṛt sūryāya
āt menām kṛṇvan acyutaḥ bhuvat goḥ patiḥ divaḥ sanajāḥ apratītaḥ
indraḥ mahnā mahataḥ arṇavasya vratā amināt aṅgirobhiḥ gṛṇānaḥ
purūṇi cit ni tatāna rajāṃsi dādhāra yaḥ dharuṇam satyatātā
indraḥ divaḥ pratimānam pṛthivyāḥ viśvā veda savanā hanti śuṣṇam
mahīm cit dyām ātanot sūryeṇa cāskambha cit kambhanena skabhīyān
vajreṇa hi vṛtrahā vṛtram astaḥ adevasya śūśuvānasya māyāḥ
vi dhṛṣṇaḥ atra dhṛṣatā jaghantha athā abhavaḥ maghavan bāhu ojāḥ
sacanta yat uṣasaḥ sūryeṇa citrām asya ketavaḥ rām avindan
ā yat nakṣatram dadṛśe divaḥ na punar yataḥ nakir addhā nu veda
dūram kila prathamāḥ jagmuḥ āsām indrasya yāḥ prasave sasruḥ āpaḥ
kva svid agram kva budhnaḥ āsām āpaḥ madhyam kva vaḥ nūnam antaḥ
sṛjaḥ sindhūn ahinā jagrasānāṁ āt id etāḥ pra vivijre javena
mumukṣamāṇāḥ uta yāḥ mumucre adha id etāḥ na ramante nitiktāḥ
sadhrīcīḥ sindhum uśatīḥ iva āyan sanāt jāraḥ āritaḥ pūrbhid āsām
astam ā te pārthivā vasūni asme jagmuḥ sūnṛtāḥ indra pūrvīḥ
indra piba pratikāmam sutasya prātaḥsāvaḥ tava hi pūrva pītiḥ
harṣasva hantave śūra śatrūn ukthebhiḥ te vīryā pra bravāma
yaḥ te rathaḥ manasaḥ javīyān ā indra tena soma peyāya yāhi
tūyam ā te harayaḥ pra dravantu yebhiḥ yāsi vṛṣabhiḥ mandamānaḥ
haritvatā varcasā sūryasya śreṣṭhaiḥ rūpaiḥ tanvam sparśayasva
asmābhiḥ indra sakhibhiḥ huvānaḥ sadhrīcīnaḥ mādayasva niṣadya
yasya tyad te mahimānam madeṣu ime mahī rodasī na aviviktām
tat okaḥ ā haribhiḥ indra yuktaiḥ priyebhiḥ yāhi priyam annam accha
yasya śaśvat papivān indra śatrūn anānukṛtyā raṇyā cakartha
sa te purandhim taviṣīm iyarti sa te madāya sutaḥ indra somaḥ
idam te pātram sanavittam indra pibā somam enā śatakrato
pūrṇaḥ āhāvaḥ madirasya madhvaḥ yam viśve id abhiharyanti devāḥ
vi hi tvām indra purudhā janāsaḥ hita prayasaḥ vṛṣabha hvayante
asmākam te madhumattamāni imā bhuvan savanā teṣu harya
pra te indra pūrvyāṇi pra nūnam vīryā vocam prathamā kṛtāni
satīna manyuḥ _ adrim su vedanām akṛṇoḥ brahmaṇe gām
ni su sīda gaṇapate gaṇeṣu tvām āhuḥ vipratamam kavīnām
na ṛte tvat kriyate kim cana are _ arkam maghavan citram arca
_ naḥ maghavan nādhamānān sakhe bodhi vasupate sakhīnām
raṇam kṛdhi raṇa kṛt satya śuṣma a bhakte cit ā bhaja rāye asmān
citraḥ id śiśoḥ taruṇasya vakṣathaḥ na yaḥ mātarau apyeti dhātave
anūdhāḥ yadi jījanat adhā ca nu vavakṣa sadyas mahi dūtyam caran
agniḥ ha nāma dhāyi _ apastamaḥ sam yaḥ vanā yuvate bhasmanā datā
abhipramurā juhvā su adhvaraḥ inaḥ na prothamānaḥ yavase vṛṣā
tam vaḥ vim na druṣadam devam andhasaḥ indum prothantam pravapantam arṇavam
āsā vahnim na śociṣā virapśinam mahi vratam na sarajantam adhvanaḥ
vi yasya te jrayasānasya ajara dhakṣoḥ na vātāḥ pari santi acyutāḥ
ā raṇvāsaḥ yuyudhayaḥ na satvanam tritam naśanta pra śiṣantaḥ iṣṭaye
saḥ id agniḥ kaṇvatamaḥ kaṇva sakhā āryaḥ parasya antarasya taruṣaḥ
agniḥ pātu gṛṇataḥ agniḥ sūrīn agniḥ dadātu teṣām avaḥ naḥ
vājintamāya sahyase su pitrya tṛṣu cyavānaḥ anu jātavedase
anudre cit yaḥ dhṛṣatā varam sate mahintamāya dhanvanā id aviṣyate
evā agniḥ martaiḥ saha sūribhiḥ vasu _ _ sūnaraḥ nṛbhiḥ
mitrāsaḥ na ye sudhitāḥ ṛtāyavaḥ _ na dyumnaiḥ abhi santi mānuṣān
ūrjaḥ napāt sahasāvan iti tvā upastutasya vandate vṛṣā vāc
tvām stoṣāma tvayā su vīrāḥ drāghīyaḥ āyuḥ prataram dadhānāḥ
iti tvā agne vṛṣṭihavyasya putrāḥ upastutāsaḥ ṛṣayaḥ avocan
tān ca pāhi gṛṇataḥ ca sūrīn vaṣaṭ vaṣaṭ iti ūrdhvāsaḥ anakṣan namaḥ namaḥ iti ūrdhvāsaḥ anakṣan
pibā somam mahate indriyāya pibā vṛtrāya hantave śaviṣṭha
piba rāye śavase hūyamānaḥ piba madhvaḥ tṛpat indrāḥ vṛṣasva
asya piba kṣumataḥ prasthitasya indra somasya varam ā sutasya
svasti dāḥ manasā mādayasva arvācīnaḥ revate saubhagāya
mamattu tvā divyaḥ somaḥ indra mamattu yaḥ sūyate pārthiveṣu
mamattu yena varivaḥ cakartha mamattu yena niriṇāsi śatrūn
ā dvibarhāḥ aminaḥ yātu indraḥ vṛṣā haribhyām pariṣiktam andhaḥ
gavi ā sutasya prabhṛtasya madhvaḥ satrā khedām aruśa hā vṛṣasva
ni tigmāni bhrāśayan bhrāśyāni ava sthirā tanuhi yātu jūnām
ugrāya te sahaḥ balam dadāmi pratītyā śatrūn vigadeṣu vṛśca
vi aryaḥ indra tanuhi śravāṃsi ojaḥ sthirā iva dhanvanaḥ abhimātīḥ
asmadryak vāvṛdhānaḥ sahobhiḥ a nibhṛṣṭaḥ tanvam vāvṛdhasva
idam haviḥ maghavan tubhyam rātam prati samrāj a hṛṇānaḥ gṛbhāya
tubhyam sutaḥ maghavan tubhyam pakvaḥ addhi indra piba ca prasthitasya
addhi id indra prasthitā imā havīṃṣi canaḥ dadhiṣva pacatā uta somam
prayasvantaḥ prati haryāmasi tvā satyāḥ santu yajamānasya kāmāḥ
pra indra agnibhyām su vacasyām iyarmi sindhau iva prerayam nāvam arkaiḥ
ayā iva pari caranti devāḥ ye asmabhyam dhana dāḥ udbhidaḥ ca
na vai u devāḥ kṣudham id vadham daduḥ uta āśitam upa gacchanti mṛtyavaḥ
uta u rayiḥ pṛṇataḥ nā upa dasyati uta a pṛṇan marḍitāram na vindate
yaḥ ādhrāya cakamānāya pitvaḥ annavān san raphitāya upajagmuṣe
sthiram manaḥ kṛṇute sevate purā uta u cit sa marḍitāram na vindate
saḥ id bhojaḥ yaḥ gṛhave dadāti anna kāmāya carate kṛśāya
aram asmai bhavati yāmahūtau _ kṛṇute sakhāyam
na sa sakhā yaḥ na dadāti sakhye sacābhuve sacamānāya pitvaḥ
apa asmāt preyāt na tat okaḥ asti pṛṇantam anyam araṇam cit icchet
pṛṇīyāt id nādhamānāya tavyān drāghīyāṃsam anu paśyeta panthām
ā u hi vartante rathyā iva cakrā anyam anyam upa tiṣṭhanta rāyaḥ
mogham annam vindate apracetāḥ satyam bravīmi vadhaḥ id sa tasya
na aryamaṇam puṣyati no sakhāyam kevala aghaḥ bhavati kevala ādī
kṛṣan id phālaḥ āśitam kṛṇoti yan adhvānam apa vṛṅkte caritraiḥ
vadan brahmā a vadataḥ vanīyān pṛṇan āpiḥ a pṛṇantam abhi syāt
ekapād bhūyas dvipadaḥ vi cakrame dvipād tripādam abhī eti paścāt
catuṣpād eti dvipadām abhisvare sampaśyan paṅktīḥ upatiṣṭhamānaḥ
samau cit hastau na samam viviṣṭaḥ sammātarā cit na samam duhāte
yamayoḥ cit na samā vīryāṇi jñātī cit santau na samam pṛṇītaḥ
agne haṃsi ni atriṇam dīdyan martyeṣu ā
sve kṣaye śuci vrata
ud tiṣṭhasi su āhutaḥ ghṛtāni prati modase
yat tvā srucaḥ samasthiran
saḥ āhutaḥ vi rocate agniḥ īḍenyaḥ girā
srucā pratīkam ajyate
ghṛtena agniḥ sam ajyate madhu pratīkaḥ āhutaḥ
rocamānaḥ vibhāvasuḥ
jaramāṇaḥ sam idhyase devebhyaḥ havya vāhana
tam tvā havanta martyāḥ
tam martāḥ amartyam ghṛtena agnim saparyata
adābhyam gṛhapatim
adābhyena śociṣā agne rakṣaḥ tvam daha
gopāḥ ṛtasya dīdihi
sa tvam agne pratīkena prati oṣa yātudhānyaḥ
urukṣayeṣu dīdyat
tam tvā gīrbhiḥ urukṣayāḥ havyavāham sam īdhire
yajiṣṭham mānuṣe jane
iti vai iti me manaḥ gām aśvam sanuyām iti
kuvid somasya apām iti
pra vātāḥ iva _ ud mā pītāḥ ayaṃsata
kuvid somasya apām iti
ud mā pītāḥ ayaṃsata ratham aśvāḥ iva āśavaḥ
kuvid somasya apām iti
upa mā matiḥ asthita vāśrā putram iva priyam
kuvid somasya apām iti
aham taṣṭā iva vandhuram pari _ hṛdā matim
kuvid somasya apām iti
nahi me akṣipat cana acchāntsuḥ pañca kṛṣṭayaḥ
kuvid somasya apām iti
nahi me rodasī ubhe anyam pakṣam cana prati
kuvid somasya apām iti
abhi dyām mahinā bhuvam abhī imām pṛthivīm mahīm
kuvid somasya apām iti
hanta aham pṛthivīm imām ni dadhāni iha vā iha vā
kuvid somasya apām iti
oṣam id pṛthivīm aham jaṅghanāni iha vā iha vā
kuvid somasya apām iti
divi me anyaḥ pakṣaḥ adhas anyam acīkṛṣam
kuvid somasya apām iti
aham asmi mahā mahaḥ abhinabhyam udīṣitaḥ
kuvid somasya apām iti
gṛhaḥ yāmi araṃkṛtaḥ devebhyaḥ havya vāhanaḥ
kuvid somasya apām iti
tat id āsa bhuvaneṣu jyeṣṭham yatas jajñe ugraḥ tveṣa nṛmṇaḥ
sadyas jajñānaḥ ni riṇāti śatrūn anu yam viśve madanti ūmāḥ
vāvṛdhānaḥ śavasā bhūri ojāḥ śatruḥ dāsāya bhiyasam dadhāti
a vyanat ca vyanat ca sasni sam te navanta prabhṛtāḥ madeṣu
tve kratum api vṛñjanti viśve dvis yat ete tris bhavanti ūmāḥ
svādoḥ svādīyaḥ svādunā sṛja sam adaḥ su madhu madhunā abhi yodhīḥ
iti cit hi tvā dhanā jayantam made made anumadanti viprāḥ
ojīyaḥ dhṛṣṇo sthiram ā tanuṣva mā tvā dabhan yātudhānāḥ durevāḥ
tvayā vayam śāśadmahe raṇeṣu prapaśyantaḥ yudhenyāni bhūri
codayāmi te āyudhā vacobhiḥ sam te śiśāmi brahmaṇā vayāṃsi
stuṣeyyam puru varpasam ṛbhvam inatamam āptyam āptyānām
ā darṣate śavasā sapta dānūn pra sākṣate pratimānāni bhūri
ni tat dadhiṣe avaram param ca yasmin āvitha avasā duroṇe
ā mātarā sthāpayase jigatnū atas inoṣi karvarā purūṇi
imā brahma bṛhaddivaḥ vivakti indrāya śūṣam agriyaḥ svarṣāḥ
mahaḥ gotrasya kṣayati svarājaḥ duraḥ ca viśvāḥ avṛṇot apa svāḥ
evā mahān bṛhaddivaḥ atharvā avocat svām tanvam indram eva
svasāraḥ mātaribhvarīḥ ariprāḥ hinvanti ca śavasā vardhayanti ca
hiraṇya garbhaḥ sam avartata agre bhūtasya jātaḥ patiḥ ekaḥ āsīt
sa dādhāra pṛthivīm dyām uta imām kasmai devāya haviṣā vidhema
yaḥ ātma dāḥ bala dāḥ yasya viśve upāsate praśiṣam yasya devāḥ
yasya chāyā amṛtam yasya mṛtyuḥ kasmai devāya haviṣā vidhema
yaḥ prāṇataḥ nimiṣataḥ mahitvā ekaḥ id rājā jagataḥ babhūva
yaḥ īśe asya dvipadaḥ catuṣpadaḥ kasmai devāya haviṣā vidhema
yasya ime himavantaḥ mahitvā yasya samudram rasayā saha āhuḥ
yasya imāḥ pradiśaḥ yasya bāhū kasmai devāya haviṣā vidhema
yena dyauḥ ugrā pṛthivī ca dṛḍhā yena sva stabhitam yena nākaḥ
yaḥ antarikṣe rajasaḥ vimānaḥ kasmai devāya haviṣā vidhema
yam krandasī avasā tastabhāne abhī aikṣetām manasā rejamāne
yatra adhi sūraḥ uditaḥ vibhāti kasmai devāya haviṣā vidhema
āpaḥ ha yat bṛhatīḥ viśvam āyan garbham dadhānāḥ janayantīḥ agnim
tatas devānām sam avartata asuḥ ekaḥ kasmai devāya haviṣā vidhema
yaḥ cit āpaḥ mahinā paryapaśyat dakṣam dadhānāḥ janayantīḥ yajñam
yaḥ deveṣu adhi devaḥ ekaḥ āsīt kasmai devāya haviṣā vidhema
mā naḥ hiṃsīt janitā yaḥ pṛthivyāḥ yaḥ vā divam satya dharmā jajāna
yaḥ ca apaḥ candrāḥ bṛhatīḥ jajāna kasmai devāya haviṣā vidhema
prajāpate na tvat etāni anyaḥ viśvā jātāni pari tā babhūva
yad kāmāḥ te juhumaḥ tat naḥ astu vayam syāma patayaḥ rayīṇām
vasum na citra mahasam gṛṇīṣe vāmam śevam atithim adviṣeṇyam
sa rāsate śurudhaḥ viśva dhāyasaḥ agniḥ hotā gṛhapatiḥ su vīryam
juṣāṇaḥ agne prati harya me vacaḥ viśvāni vidvān vayunāni su krato
ghṛta nirṇij brahmaṇe gātum eraya tava devāḥ ajanayan anu vratam
sapta dhāmāni pariyan amartyaḥ dāśat dāśuṣe su kṛte māmahasva
su vīreṇa rayiṇā agne _ yaḥ te ānaṭ samidhā tam juṣasva
yajñasya ketum prathamam purohitam haviṣmantaḥ īḍate sapta vājinam
śṛṇvantam agnim ghṛta pṛṣṭham ukṣaṇam pṛṇantam devam pṛṇate su vīryam
tvam dūtaḥ prathamaḥ vareṇyaḥ sa hūyamānaḥ amṛtāya matsva
tvām marjayan marutaḥ dāśuṣaḥ gṛhe tvām stomebhiḥ bhṛgavaḥ vi rurucuḥ
iṣam duhan sudughām viśva dhāyasam yajña priye yajamānāya su krato
agne ghṛta snuḥ tris ṛtāni dīdyat vartiḥ yajñam pariyan sukratūyase
tvām id asyāḥ uṣasaḥ vyuṣṭiṣu dūtam kṛṇvānāḥ ayajanta mānuṣāḥ
tvām devāḥ mahayāyyāya vāvṛdhuḥ ājyam agne nimṛjantaḥ adhvare
ni tvā vasiṣṭhāḥ ahvanta vājinam gṛṇantaḥ agne vidatheṣu vedhasaḥ
rāyaspoṣam yajamāneṣu dhāraya yūyam pāta svastibhiḥ sadā naḥ
ayam venaḥ codayat pṛśni garbhāḥ jyotiḥ jarāyū rajasaḥ vimāne
imam apām saṃgame sūryasya śiśum na viprāḥ matibhiḥ rihanti
samudrāt ūrmim ud iyarti venaḥ nabhaḥ jāḥ pṛṣṭham haryatasya darśi
ṛtasya sānau adhi viṣṭapi bhrāj samānam yonim abhī anūṣata vrāḥ
samānam pūrvīḥ abhi vāvaśānāḥ tiṣṭhan vatsasya mātaraḥ sanīḍāḥ
ṛtasya sānau adhi cakramāṇāḥ rihanti madhvaḥ amṛtasya vāṇīḥ
jānantaḥ rūpam akṛpanta viprāḥ mṛgasya ghoṣam mahiṣasya hi gman
ṛtena yantaḥ adhi sindhum asthuḥ vidat gandharvaḥ amṛtāni nāma
apsarāḥ jāram upasiṣmiyāṇā yoṣā bibharti parame vyoman
carat priyasya yoniṣu priyaḥ san sīdat pakṣe hiraṇyaye sa venaḥ
nāke suparṇam upa yat patantam hṛdā venantaḥ abhī acakṣata tvā
hiraṇya pakṣam varuṇasya dūtam yamasya yonau śakunam bhuraṇyum
ūrdhvaḥ gandharvaḥ adhi nāke asthāt pratyaṅ citrā bibhrat asya āyudhāni
vasānaḥ atkam surabhim dṛśe kam svar na nāma janata priyāṇi
drapsaḥ samudram abhi yat jigāti paśyan gṛdhrasya cakṣasā vidharman
bhānuḥ śukreṇa śociṣā cakānaḥ tṛtīye cakre rajasi priyāṇi
aham rudrebhiḥ vasubhiḥ carāmi aham ādityaiḥ uta viśvadevaiḥ
aham mitrāvaruṇā ubhā bibharmi aham indra agnī aham aśvinā ubhā
aham somam āhanasam bibharmi aham tvaṣṭāram uta pūṣaṇam bhagam
aham dadhāmi draviṇam haviṣmate yajamānāya sunvate
aham rāṣṭrī saṃgamanī vasūnām cikituṣī prathamā yajñiyānām
tām mā devāḥ vi adadhuḥ purutrā bhūri sthātrām bhūri āveśayantīm
mayā saḥ annam atti yaḥ vipaśyati yaḥ prāṇiti yaḥ īm śṛṇoti uktam
amantavaḥ mām te upa kṣiyanti śrudhi śruta śraddhivam te vadāmi
aham eva svayam idam vadāmi juṣṭam devebhiḥ uta mānuṣebhiḥ
yam kāmaye tam tam ugram kṛṇomi tam brahmāṇam tam ṛṣim tam su medhām
aham rudrāya dhanuḥ ā tanomi brahma dviṣe śarave hantavai u
aham janāya samadam kṛṇomi aham dyāvāpṛthivī ā viveśa
aham suve pitaram asya mūrdhan mama yoniḥ apsu antar samudre
tatas vi tiṣṭhe bhuvanā anu viśvā uta amūm dyām varṣmaṇā upa spṛśāmi
aham eva vātaḥ iva pra vāmi ārabhamāṇā bhuvanāni viśvā
paras divā paras enā pṛthivyā etāvatī mahinā sam babhūva
na tam aṃhaḥ na duritam devāsaḥ aṣṭa martyam
sajoṣasaḥ yam aryamā mitraḥ nayanti varuṇaḥ ati dviṣaḥ
tat hi vayam vṛṇīmahe varuṇa mitra aryaman
yena niḥ aṃhasaḥ yūyam pātha netha ca martyam ati dviṣaḥ
te nūnam naḥ ayam ūtaye varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā
nayiṣṭhāḥ u naḥ neṣaṇi parṣiṣṭhāḥ u naḥ parṣaṇi ati dviṣaḥ
yūyam viśvam pari pātha varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā
yuṣmākam śarmaṇi priye syāma su praṇītayaḥ ati dviṣaḥ
ādityāsaḥ ati sridhaḥ varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā
ugram marudbhiḥ rudram huvema indram agnim svastaye ati dviṣaḥ
netāraḥ u su naḥ tiras varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā
ati viśvāni duritā rājānaḥ carṣaṇīnām ati dviṣaḥ
śunam asmabhyam ūtaye varuṇaḥ mitraḥ aryamā
śarma yacchantu saprathaḥ ādityāsaḥ yat īmahe ati dviṣaḥ
yathā ha tyad vasavaḥ gauryam cit padi sitām amuñcata yajatrāḥ
eva u su asmat muñcata vi aṃhaḥ pra tāri agne prataram naḥ āyuḥ
rātrī vi akhyat āyatī purutrā devī akṣabhiḥ
viśvāḥ adhi śriyaḥ adhita
ā uru aprāḥ amartyā nivataḥ devī udvataḥ
jyotiṣā bādhate tamaḥ
niḥ u svasāram askṛta uṣasam devī āyatī
apa id u hāsate tamaḥ
sā naḥ adya yasyāḥ vayam ni te yāman avikṣmahi
vṛkṣe na vasatim vayaḥ
ni grāmāsaḥ avikṣata ni padvantaḥ ni pakṣiṇaḥ
ni śyenāsaḥ cit arthinaḥ
yāvaya vṛkyam vṛkam yavaya stenam ūrmye
athā naḥ sutarā bhava
upa mā pepiśat tamaḥ kṛṣṇam vyaktam asthita
uṣaḥ ṛṇā iva yātaya
upa te gāḥ iva akaram vṛṇīṣva duhitar divaḥ
rātri stomam na jigyuṣe
mama agne varcaḥ vihaveṣu astu vayam tvā indhānāḥ tanvam puṣema
mahyam namantām pradiśaḥ catasraḥ tvayā adhyakṣeṇa pṛtanāḥ jayema
mama devāḥ vihave santu sarve indravantaḥ marutaḥ viṣṇuḥ agniḥ
mama antarikṣam uru lokam astu mahyam vātaḥ pavatām kāme asmin
mayi devāḥ draviṇam ā yajantām mayi āśīḥ astu mayi deva hūtiḥ
daivyāḥ hotāraḥ _ pūrve ariṣṭāḥ syāma tanvā su vīrāḥ
mahyam yajantu mama yāni havyā ākūtiḥ satyā manasaḥ me astu
enaḥ mā ni gām katamat cana aham viśve devāsaḥ adhi vocatā naḥ
devīḥ ṣaṣ urvīḥ uru naḥ kṛṇota viśve devāsaḥ iha vīrayadhvam
mā hāsmahi prajayā mā tanūbhiḥ mā radhāma dviṣate soma rājan
agne manyum pratinudan pareṣām adabdhaḥ gopāḥ pari pāhi naḥ tvam
pratyañcaḥ yantu nigutaḥ punar te amā eṣām cittam prabudhām vi neśat
dhātā dhātṝṇām bhuvanasya yaḥ patiḥ devam trātāram abhimātiṣāham
imam yajñam aśvinā ubhā bṛhaspatiḥ devāḥ pāntu yajamānam nyarthāt
uru vyacāḥ naḥ mahiṣaḥ śarma yaṃsat asmin have puru hūtaḥ puru kṣuḥ
sa naḥ prajāyai haryaśva mṛḍaya indra mā naḥ rīriṣaḥ mā parā dāḥ
ye naḥ sapatnāḥ apa te bhavantu indra agnibhyām ava bādhāmahe tān
vasavaḥ rudrāḥ ādityāḥ uparispṛśam mā ugram cettāram adhirājam akran
nā asat āsīt na u sat āsīt tadānīm na āsīt rajaḥ na u vyomā paras yat
kim āvarīvar kuha kasya śarman ambhaḥ kim āsīt gahanam gabhīram
na mṛtyuḥ āsīt amṛtam na tarhi na rātryāḥ ahnaḥ āsīt praketaḥ
ānīt a vātam svadhayā tat ekam tasmāt ha anyat na paras kim cana āsa
tamaḥ āsīt tamasā gūḍham agre a praketam salilam sarvam āḥ idam
tucchyena ābhu apihitam yat āsīt tapasaḥ tat mahinā ajāyata ekam
kāmaḥ tat agre sam avartata adhi manasaḥ retaḥ prathamam yat āsīt
sataḥ bandhum asati niḥ avindan hṛdi pratīṣya kavayaḥ manīṣā
tiraścīnaḥ vitataḥ raśmiḥ eṣām adhas svid āsīt upari svid āsīt
retaḥ dhāḥ āsan mahimānaḥ āsan svadhā avastāt prayatiḥ parastāt
kaḥ addhā veda kaḥ iha pra vocat kutas ājātā kutas iyam visṛṣṭiḥ
arvāk devā asya visarjanena athā kaḥ veda yatas ābabhūva
iyam visṛṣṭiḥ yatas ābabhūva yadi vā dadhe yadi vā na
yaḥ asya adhyakṣaḥ parame vyoman saḥ aṅga veda yadi vā na veda
ījānam id dyauḥ gūrtāvasuḥ ījānam bhūmiḥ abhi prabhūṣaṇi
ījānam devau aśvinau abhi sumnaiḥ avardhatām
tā vām mitrāvaruṇā dhārayat kṣitī suṣumnā iṣitatvatā yajāmasi
yuvoḥ krāṇāya sakhyaiḥ abhi ṣyāma rakṣasaḥ
adhā cit nu yat didhiṣāmahe vām abhi priyam rekṇaḥ patyamānāḥ
_ vā yat puṣyati rekṇaḥ sam _ _ nakir asya maghāni
asau anyaḥ asura _ dyauḥ tvam viśveṣām varuṇa asi rājā
mūrdhā rathasya cākan na etāvatā enasā antakadhruk
asmin su etat śakapūte enaḥ hite mitre nigatān hanti vīrān
_ vā yat dhāt tanūṣu avaḥ priyāsu yajñiyāsu arvā
yuvoḥ hi mātā aditiḥ vicetasā dyauḥ na bhūmiḥ payasā pupūtani
ava priyā didiṣṭana sūraḥ ninikta raśmibhiḥ
yuvam hi apnarājau asīdatam tiṣṭhat ratham na dhūrṣadam vanarṣadam
tāḥ naḥ kaṇūkayantīḥ nṛmedhaḥ tatre aṃhasaḥ sumedhaḥ tatre aṃhasaḥ
pra u su asmai puroratham indrāya śūṣam arcata
abhīke cit u loka kṛt saṃge samatsu vṛtrahā asmākam bodhi coditā nabhantām anyakeṣām jyākāḥ adhi dhanvasu
tvam sindhūṁ avāsṛjaḥ adharācaḥ ahan ahim
aśatruḥ indra jajñiṣe viśvam puṣyasi vāryam tam tvā pari svajāmahe nabhantām anyakeṣām jyākāḥ adhi dhanvasu
vi su viśvāḥ arātayaḥ aryaḥ naśanta naḥ dhiyaḥ
astāsi śatrave vadham yaḥ naḥ indra jighāṃsati yā te rātiḥ dadiḥ vasu nabhantām anyakeṣām jyākāḥ adhi dhanvasu
yaḥ naḥ indra abhitas janaḥ vṛkāyuḥ ādideśati
adhaspadam tam īm kṛdhi vibādhaḥ asi sāsahiḥ nabhantām anyakeṣām jyākāḥ adhi dhanvasu
yaḥ naḥ indra abhidāsati sanābhiḥ yaḥ ca niṣṭyaḥ
ava tasya balam tira mahī iva dyauḥ adha tmanā nabhantām anyakeṣām jyākāḥ adhi dhanvasu
vayam indra tvāyavaḥ sakhitvam ā rabhāmahe
ṛtasya naḥ pathā naya ati viśvāni duritā nabhantām anyakeṣām jyākāḥ adhi dhanvasu
asmabhyam su tvam indra tām śikṣa yā dohate prati varam jaritre
acchidra udhnī pīpayat yathā naḥ sahasra dhārā payasā mahī gauḥ
ubhe yat indra rodasī āpaprātha uṣāḥ iva
mahāntam tvā mahīnām samrājam carṣaṇīnām devī janitrī ajījanat bhadrā janitrī ajījanat
ava sma durhaṇāyataḥ martasya tanuhi sthiram
adhaspadam tam īm kṛdhi yaḥ asmāṁ ādideśati devī janitrī ajījanat bhadrā janitrī ajījanat
ava tyāḥ bṛhatīḥ iṣaḥ viśvaścandrāḥ amitra han
śacībhiḥ śakra dhūnuhi indra viśvābhiḥ ūtibhiḥ devī janitrī ajījanat bhadrā janitrī ajījanat
ava yat tvam śatakrato indra viśvāni dhūnuṣe
rayim na sunvate sacā sahasriṇībhiḥ ūtibhiḥ devī janitrī ajījanat bhadrā janitrī ajījanat
ava svedāḥ iva abhitas viṣvak patantu didyavaḥ
dūrvāyāḥ iva tantavaḥ vi asmat etu durmatiḥ devī janitrī ajījanat bhadrā janitrī ajījanat
dīrgham hi aṅkuśam yathā śaktim bibharṣi mantumas
pūrveṇa maghavan padā ajaḥ vayām yathā yamaḥ devī janitrī ajījanat bhadrā janitrī ajījanat
nakir devāḥ minīmasi nakir ā yopayāmasi mantraśrutyam carāmasi
pakṣebhiḥ apikakṣebhiḥ atra abhi sam rabhāmahe
yasmin vṛkṣe su palāśe devaiḥ saṃpibate yamaḥ
atrā naḥ viśpatiḥ pitā purāṇāṁ anu venati

yam kumāra navam ratham acakram manasā akṛṇoḥ

yam kumāra prāvartayaḥ ratham viprebhyaḥ pari
tam sāmā anu prāvartata sam itas nāvi āhitam
kaḥ kumāram ajanayat ratham kaḥ niḥ avartayat
kaḥ svid tat adya naḥ brūyāt anudeyī yathā abhavat
yathā abhavat anudeyī tatas agram ajāyata
purastāt budhnaḥ ātataḥ paścāt nirayaṇam kṛtam
idam yamasya sādanam deva mānam yat ucyate
iyam asya dhamyate nāḍīḥ ayam gīrbhiḥ pariṣkṛtaḥ
uta devāḥ avahitam devāḥ ud nayathā punar
uta āgaḥ cakruṣam devāḥ devāḥ jīvayathā punar
dvau imau vātau vātaḥ ā sindhoḥ ā parāvataḥ
dakṣam te anyaḥ āḥ vātu parā anyaḥ vātu yat rapaḥ
ā vāta vāhi bheṣajam vi vāta vāhi yat rapaḥ
tvam hi viśva bheṣajaḥ devānām dūtaḥ īyase
ā tvā agamam śantātibhiḥ atho ariṣṭatātibhiḥ
dakṣam te bhadram ābhārṣam parā yakṣmam suvāmi te
trāyantām iha devāḥ trāyatām marutām gaṇaḥ
trāyantām viśvā bhūtāni yathā ayam arapāḥ asat
āpaḥ id vai u bheṣajīḥ āpaḥ amīva cātanīḥ
āpaḥ sarvasya bheṣajīḥ tāḥ te kṛṇvantu bheṣajam
hastābhyām daśa śākhābhyām jihvā vācaḥ purogavī
anāmayitnubhyām tvā tābhyām tvā upa spṛśāmasi
tava tye indra sakhyeṣu vahnayaḥ ṛtam manvānāḥ vi adardiruḥ valam
yatrā daśasyan uṣasaḥ riṇan apaḥ kutsāya manman ahyaḥ ca daṃsayaḥ
avāsṛjaḥ prasvaḥ śvañcayaḥ girīn ud ājaḥ usrāḥ apibaḥ madhu priyam
avardhayaḥ vaninaḥ asya daṃsasā śuśoca sūryaḥ ṛta jātayā girā
vi sūryaḥ madhye amucat ratham divaḥ vidat dāsāya pratimānam āryaḥ
dṛḍhāni piproḥ asurasya māyinaḥ indraḥ vi āsyat cakṛvāṁ ṛjiśvanā
anādhṛṣṭāni dhṛṣitaḥ vi āsyat nidhīṃr adevāṁ amṛṇat ayāsyaḥ
māsā iva sūryaḥ vasu puryam ā dade gṛṇānaḥ śatrūṃr aśṛṇāt virukmatā
a yuddha senaḥ vibhvā vibhindatā dāśat vṛtrahā tujyāni tejate
indrasya vajrāt abibhet abhiśnathaḥ prākrāmat śundhyūḥ ajahāt uṣāḥ anaḥ
etā tyā te śrutyāni kevalā yat ekaḥ ekam akṛṇoḥ a yajñam
māsām vidhānam adadhāḥ adhi dyavi tvayā vibhinnam bharati pradhim pitā
sūrya raśmiḥ hari keśaḥ purastāt savitā jyotiḥ ud ayān ajasram
tasya pūṣā prasave yāti vidvān saṃpaśyan viśvā bhuvanāni gopāḥ
nṛ cakṣāḥ eṣa divaḥ madhye āste āpaprivān rodasī antarikṣam
sa viśvācīḥ abhi caṣṭe ghṛtācīḥ antarā pūrvam aparam ca ketum
rāyaḥ budhnaḥ saṃgamanaḥ vasūnām viśvā rūpā abhi caṣṭe śacībhiḥ
devaḥ iva savitā satya dharmā indraḥ na tasthau samare dhanānām
viśvāvasum soma gandharvam āpaḥ dadṛśuṣīḥ tat ṛtenā vi āyan
tat anvavait indraḥ rārahāṇaḥ āsām pari sūryasya paridhīn apaśyat
viśvāvasuḥ abhi tat naḥ gṛṇātu divyaḥ gandharvaḥ rajasaḥ vimānaḥ
yat vā ghā satyam uta yat na vidma dhiyaḥ hinvānaḥ dhiyaḥ id naḥ avyāḥ
sasnim avindat caraṇe nadīnām apāvṛṇot duraḥ aśma vrajānām
pra āsām gandharvaḥ amṛtāni vocat indraḥ dakṣam pari jānāt ahīnām
agne tava śravaḥ vayaḥ mahi bhrājante arcayaḥ vibhāvaso
bṛhadbhāno śavasā vājam ukthyam dadhāsi dāśuṣe kave
pāvaka varcāḥ śukra varcāḥ anūna varcāḥ ud iyarṣi bhānunā
putraḥ mātarā vicaran upa avasi pṛṇakṣi rodasī ubhe
ūrjaḥ napāt jātavedaḥ su śastibhiḥ mandasva dhītibhiḥ hitaḥ
tve iṣaḥ sam dadhuḥ bhūri varpasaḥ citra ūtayaḥ vāma jātāḥ
irajyan agne prathayasva jantubhiḥ asme rāyaḥ amartya
sa darśatasya vapuṣaḥ vi rājasi pṛṇakṣi sānasim kratum
iṣkartāram adhvarasya pracetasam kṣayantam rādhasaḥ mahaḥ
rātim vāmasya subhagām mahīm iṣam dadhāsi sānasim rayim
ṛtāvānam mahiṣam viśva darśatam agnim sumnāya dadhire puras janāḥ
śrut karṇam saprathastamam tvā girā daivyam mānuṣāḥ yugā
agne acchā vada iha naḥ pratyaṅ naḥ su manāḥ bhava
pra naḥ yaccha viśaḥ pate dhana dāḥ asi naḥ tvam
pra naḥ yacchatu aryamā pra bhagaḥ pra bṛhaspatiḥ
pra devāḥ pra uta sūnṛtā rāyaḥ devī dadātu naḥ
somam rājānam avase agnim gīrbhiḥ havāmahe
ādityān viṣṇum sūryam brahmāṇam ca bṛhaspatim
indra vāyū bṛhaspatim su havā iha havāmahe
yathā naḥ sarvaḥ id janaḥ saṃgatyām su manāḥ asat
aryamaṇam bṛhaspatim indram dānāya codaya
vātam viṣṇum sarasvatīm savitāram ca vājinam
tvam naḥ agne agnibhiḥ brahma yajñam ca vardhaya
tvam naḥ devatātaye rāyaḥ dānāya codaya
ayam agne jaritā tve abhūt api sahasaḥ sūno nahi anyat asti āpyam
bhadram hi śarma tri varūtham asti te āre hiṃsānām apa didyum ā kṛdhi
pravat te agne janimā pitūyataḥ sāci iva viśvā bhuvanā ni ṛñjase
pra saptayaḥ pra saniṣanta naḥ dhiyaḥ puras caranti paśupāḥ iva tmanā
uta vā u pari vṛṇakṣi bapsat bahoḥ agne ulapasya svadhāvas
uta khilyāḥ urvarāṇām bhavanti mā te hetim taviṣīm cukrudhāma
yat udvataḥ nivataḥ yāsi bapsat pṛthak eṣi pragardhinī iva senā
yadā te vātaḥ anuvāti śociḥ vaptā iva śmaśru vapasi pra bhūma
prati asya śreṇayaḥ dadṛśre ekam niyānam bahavaḥ rathāsaḥ
bāhū yat agne anumarmṛjānaḥ _ uttānām anveṣi bhūmim
ud te śuṣmāḥ jihatām ud te arciḥ ud te agne śaśamānasya vājāḥ
ucchvañcasva ni nama vardhamānaḥ ā tvā adya viśve vasavaḥ sadantu
apām idam nyayanam samudrasya niveśanam
anyam kṛṇuṣva itas panthām tena yāhi vaśāṁ anu
āyane te parāyaṇe dūrvāḥ rohantu puṣpiṇīḥ
hradāḥ ca puṇḍarīkāṇi samudrasya gṛhāḥ ime
tyam cit atrim ṛta juram artham aśvam na yātave
kakṣīvantam yadī punar ratham na kṛṇuthaḥ navam
tyam cit aśvam na vājinam areṇavaḥ yam atnata
dṛḍham granthim na vi syatam atrim yaviṣṭham ā rajaḥ
narā daṃsiṣṭhau atraye śubhrā siṣāsatam dhiyaḥ
athā hi vām divaḥ narā punar stomaḥ na _
cite tat vām su rādhasā rātiḥ sumatiḥ aśvinā
ā yat naḥ sadane pṛthau samane parṣathaḥ narā
yuvam bhujyum samudre ā rajasaḥ pāre īṅkhitam
yātam acchā patatribhiḥ nāsatyā sātaye kṛtam
ā vām sumnaiḥ śaṃyū iva maṃhiṣṭhāḥ viśva vedasā
sam asme bhūṣatam narā utsam na pipyuṣīḥ iṣaḥ
ayam hi te amartyaḥ induḥ atyaḥ na patyate
dakṣaḥ viśva āyuḥ vedhase
ayam asmāsu kāvyaḥ ṛbhuḥ vajraḥ dāsvate
ayam bibharti ūrdhva kṛśanam madam ṛbhuḥ na kṛtvyam madam
ghṛṣuḥ śyenāya kṛtvane āsu svāsu vaṃsagaḥ
ava dīdhet ahīśuvaḥ
yam suparṇaḥ parāvataḥ śyenasya putraḥ ābharat
śata cakram yaḥ _ vartaniḥ
yam te śyenaḥ cārum avṛkam padā abharat aruṇam mānam andhasaḥ
enā vayaḥ vi tāri āyuḥ jīvase enā jāgāra bandhu tā
evā tat indraḥ indunā deveṣu cit dhārayāte mahi tyajaḥ
kratvā vayaḥ vi tāri āyuḥ su krato kratvā ayam asmat _ sutaḥ
araṇyāni araṇyāni asau yā pra iva naśyasi
kathā grāmam na pṛcchasi na tvā bhīḥ iva vindati īm
vṛṣāravāya vadate yat upa avati ciccikaḥ
āghāṭibhiḥ iva dhāvayan araṇyāniḥ mahīyate
uta gāvaḥ iva adanti uta veśma iva dṛśyate
uta u araṇyāniḥ sāyam śakaṭīḥ iva sarjati
gām aṅga eṣa ā hvayati dārū aṅga eṣaḥ apāvadhīt
vasan araṇyānyām sāyam akrukṣat iti manyate
na vā araṇyāniḥ hanti anyaḥ ced na abhigacchati
svādoḥ phalasya jagdhvāya yathākāmam ni padyate
āñjana gandhim surabhim bahu annām a kṛṣīvalām
pra aham mṛgāṇām mātaram araṇyānim aśaṃsiṣam
śrat te dadhāmi prathamāya manyave ahan yat vṛtram naryam viveḥ apaḥ
ubhe yat tvā bhavataḥ rodasī anu rejate śuṣmāt pṛthivī cit adrivas
tvam māyābhiḥ anavadya māyinam śravasyatā manasā vṛtram ardayaḥ
tvām id naraḥ vṛṇate gaviṣṭiṣu tvām viśvāsu havyāsu iṣṭiṣu
ā eṣu cākandhi puruhūta sūriṣu vṛdhāsaḥ ye maghavan ānaśuḥ magham
arcanti toke tanaye pariṣṭiṣu medhasātā vājinam ahraye dhane
saḥ id nu rāyaḥ su bhṛtasya cākanat madam yaḥ asya raṃhyam ciketati
tvāvṛdhaḥ maghavan dāśu adhvaraḥ makṣū sa vājam bharate dhanā nṛbhiḥ
tvam śardhāya mahinā gṛṇāna uru kṛdhi maghavan śagdhi rāyaḥ
tvam naḥ mitraḥ varuṇaḥ na māyī pitvaḥ na dasma dayase vibhaktā
suṣvāṇāsaḥ indra stumasi tvā sasavāṃsaḥ ca tuvi nṛmṇa vājam
ā naḥ bhara suvitam yasya cākan tmanā tanā sanuyāma tvotāḥ
ṛṣvaḥ tvam indra śūra jātaḥ dāsīḥ viśaḥ sūryeṇa sahyāḥ
guhā hitam guhyam gūḍham apsu bibhṛmasi prasravaṇe na somam
aryaḥ vā giraḥ abhī arca vidvān ṛṣīṇām vipraḥ sumatim cakānaḥ
te syāma ye raṇayanta somaiḥ enā uta tubhyam ratha ūḍha bhakṣaiḥ
imā brahmā indra tubhyam śaṃsi dāḥ nṛbhyaḥ nṛṇām śūra śavaḥ
tebhiḥ bhava sakratuḥ yeṣu cākan uta trāyasva gṛṇataḥ uta stīn
śrudhī havam indra śūra pṛthyā uta stavase venyasya arkaiḥ
ā yaḥ te yonim ghṛtavantam asvār ūrmiḥ na nimnaiḥ dravayanta vakvāḥ
savitā yantraiḥ pṛthivīm aramṇāt askambhane savitā dyām adṛṃhat
aśvam iva adhukṣat dhunim antarikṣam atūrte baddham savitā samudram
yatrā samudra skabhitaḥ vi aunat apām napāt savitā tasya veda
atas bhūḥ atas ā utthitam rajaḥ atas dyāvāpṛthivī aprathetām
paścā idam anyat abhavat yajatram amartyasya bhuvanasya bhūnā
suparṇaḥ aṅga savituḥ garutmān pūrvaḥ jātaḥ saḥ u asya anu dharma
gāvaḥ iva grāmam yūyudhiḥ iva aśvān vāśrā iva vatsam sumanāḥ duhānā
patiḥ iva jāyām abhi naḥ ni etu dhartā divaḥ savitā viśva vāraḥ
hiraṇyastūpaḥ savitar yathā tu āṅgirasaḥ juhve vāje asmin
evā tvā arcan avase vandamānaḥ somasya iva aṃśum prati jāgara aham
samiddhaḥ cit sam idhyase devebhyaḥ havya vāhana
ādityaiḥ rudraiḥ vasubhiḥ naḥ ā gahi mṛḍīkāya naḥ ā gahi
imam yajñam idam vacaḥ jujuṣāṇaḥ upāgahi
martāsaḥ tvā samidhāna havāmahe mṛḍīkāya havāmahe
tvām u jātavedasam viśva vāram gṛṇe dhiyā
agne devāṁ ā vaha naḥ priya vratān mṛḍīkāya priya vratān
agniḥ devaḥ devānām abhavat purohitaḥ agnim manuṣyāḥ ṛṣayaḥ sam īdhire
agnim mahaḥ dhana sātau aham huve mṛḍīkam dhana sātaye
agniḥ atrim bharadvājam gaviṣṭhiram prāvat naḥ kaṇvam trasadasyum āhave
agnim vasiṣṭhaḥ havate purohitaḥ mṛḍīkāya purohitaḥ
śraddhayā agniḥ sam idhyate śraddhayā hūyate haviḥ
śraddhām bhagasya mūrdhani vacasā vedayāmasi
priyam śraddhe dadataḥ priyam śraddhe didāsataḥ
priyam bhojeṣu yajvasu idam me uditam kṛdhi
yathā devāḥ asureṣu śraddhām ugreṣu cakrire
evam bhojeṣu yajvasu asmākam uditam kṛdhi
śraddhām devāḥ yajamānāḥ vāyu gopāḥ upāsate
śraddhām hṛdayyayā ākūtyā śraddhayā vindate vasu
śraddhām prātar havāmahe śraddhām madhyandinam pari
śraddhām sūryasya nimruci śraddhe śrad dhāpaya iha naḥ
īṅkhayantīḥ apasyuvaḥ indram jātam upāsate
bhejānāsaḥ su vīryam
tvam indra balāt adhi sahasaḥ jātaḥ ojasaḥ
tvam vṛṣan vṛṣā id asi
tvam indra asi vṛtrahā vi antarikṣam atiraḥ
ud dyām astabhnāḥ ojasā
tvam indra sajoṣasam arkam bibharṣi bāhvoḥ
vajram śiśānaḥ ojasā
tvam _ asi viśvā jātāni ojasā
sa viśvāḥ bhuvaḥ ābhavaḥ
somaḥ ekebhyaḥ pavate ghṛtam eke upāsate
yebhyaḥ madhu pradhāvati tān cit evā api gacchatāt
tapasā ye anādhṛṣyāḥ tapasā ye svar yayuḥ
tapaḥ ye cakrire mahaḥ tān cit evā api gacchatāt
ye yudhyante pradhaneṣu śūrāsaḥ ye tanūtyajaḥ
ye vā sahasra dakṣiṇāḥ tān cit evā api gacchatāt
ye cit pūrve ṛtasāpaḥ ṛtāvānaḥ ṛtāvṛdhaḥ
pitṝn tapasvataḥ yama tān cit evā api gacchatāt
sahasraṇīthāḥ kavayaḥ ye gopāyanti sūryam
ṛṣīn tapasvataḥ yama tapaḥ jāṁ api gacchatāt
arāyi kāṇe vikaṭe girim gaccha sadānve
śirimbiṭhasya satvabhiḥ tebhiḥ ṭvā cātayāmasi
cattā u itas cattā amutas sarvā bhrūṇāni āruṣī
arāyyam brahmaṇaḥ pate tīkṣṇa śṛṅga udṛṣan ihi
adaḥ yat dāru plavate sindhoḥ pāre apūruṣam
tat ā rabhasva durhaṇo tena gaccha parastaram
yat ha prācīḥ ajaganta uraḥ maṇḍūradhāṇikīḥ
hatāḥ indrasya śatravaḥ sarve budbuda yāśavaḥ
pari ime gām aneṣata pari agnim ahṛṣata
deveṣu akrata śravaḥ kaḥ imāṁ ā dadharṣati
agnim hinvantu naḥ dhiyaḥ saptim āśum iva ājiṣu
tena jeṣma dhanam dhanam
yayā gāḥ ākarāmahe senayā agne tava ūtyā
tām naḥ hinva maghattaye
ā agne sthūram rayim bhara pṛthum gomantam aśvinam
aṅdhi kham vartayā paṇim
agne nakṣatram ajaram ā sūryam rohayaḥ divi
dadhat jyotiḥ janebhyaḥ
agne ketuḥ viśām asi preṣṭhaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ upastha sat
bodhā stotre vayaḥ dadhat
sūryaḥ naḥ divas pātu vātaḥ antarikṣāt
agniḥ naḥ pārthivebhyaḥ
joṣā savitar yasya te haraḥ śatam savāṁ arhati
pāhi naḥ didyutaḥ patantyāḥ
cakṣuḥ naḥ devaḥ savitā cakṣuḥ naḥ uta parvataḥ
cakṣuḥ dhātā dadhātu naḥ
cakṣuḥ naḥ dhehi cakṣuṣe cakṣuḥ vikhyai tanūbhyaḥ
sam ca idam vi ca paśyema
su saṃdṛśam tvā vayam prati paśyema sūrya
vi paśyema nṛ cakṣasaḥ
ud asau sūryaḥ agāt ud ayam māmakaḥ bhagaḥ
aham tat vidvalā patim abhī asākṣi viṣāsahiḥ
aham ketuḥ aham mūrdhā aham ugrā vivācanī
mama id anu kratum patiḥ sehānāyāḥ upācaret
mama putrāḥ śatru haṇaḥ atho me duhitā virāj
uta aham asmi saṃjayā patyau me ślokaḥ uttamaḥ
yena indraḥ haviṣā kṛtvī abhavat dyumnī uttamaḥ
idam tat akri devāḥ asapatnā kila abhuvam
asapatnā sapatna ghnī jayantī abhibhūvarī
āvṛkṣam anyāsām varcaḥ rādhaḥ astheyasām iva
sam ajaiṣam imāḥ aham sapatnīḥ abhibhūvarī
yathā aham asya vīrasya virājāni janasya ca
tīvrasya abhivayasaḥ asya pāhi sarva rathā vi harī iha muñca
indra mā tvā yajamānāsaḥ anye ni rīraman tubhyam ime sutāsaḥ
tubhyam sutāḥ tubhyam u sotvāsaḥ tvām giraḥ śvātryāḥ ā hvayanti
indra idam adya savanam juṣāṇaḥ viśvasya vidvāṁ iha pāhi somam
yaḥ uśatā manasā somam asmai sarva hṛdā deva kāmaḥ sunoti
na gāḥ indraḥ tasya parā dadāti praśastam id cārum asmai kṛṇoti
anuspaṣṭaḥ bhavati eṣaḥ asya yaḥ asmai revān na sunoti somam
niḥ aratnau maghavā tam dadhāti brahma dviṣaḥ hanti anānudiṣṭaḥ
aśvāyantaḥ gavyantaḥ vājayantaḥ havāmahe tvā upagantavai u
ābhūṣantaḥ te sumatau navāyām vayam indra tvā śunam huvema
muñcāmi tvā haviṣā jīvanāya kam ajñāta yakṣmāt uta rājayakṣmāt
grāhiḥ jagrāha yadi vā etat enam tasyāḥ indra agnī pra mumuktam enam
yadi kṣita āyuḥ yadi vā paretaḥ yadi mṛtyoḥ antikam nītaḥ eva
tam ā harāmi nirṛteḥ upasthāt aspārṣam enam śata śāradāya
sahasra akṣeṇa śata śāradena śata āyuṣā haviṣā ahārṣam enam
śatam yathā imam śaradaḥ naya ati indraḥ viśvasya duritasya pāram
śatam jīva śaradaḥ vardhamānaḥ śatam hemantān śatam u vasantān
śatam indra agnī savitā bṛhaspatiḥ śata āyuṣā haviṣā imam punar duḥ
āhārṣam tvā avidam tvā punar āgāḥ punarnava
sarva aṅga sarvam te cakṣuḥ sarvam āyuḥ ca te avidam
brahmaṇā agniḥ saṃvidānaḥ rakṣaḥ hā bādhatām itas
amīvā yaḥ te garbham durṇāmā yonim āśaye
yaḥ te garbham amīvā durṇāmā yonim āśaye
agniḥ ṭam brahmaṇā saha niṣ kravyādam anīnaśat
yaḥ te hanti patayantam niṣatsnum yaḥ sarīsṛpam
jātam yaḥ te jighāṃsati tam itas nāśayāmasi
yaḥ te ūrū viharati antarā dampatī śaye
yonim yaḥ antar āreḍhi tam itas nāśayāmasi
yaḥ tvā bhrātā patiḥ bhūtvā jāraḥ bhūtvā nipadyate
prajām yaḥ te jighāṃsati tam itas nāśayāmasi
yaḥ tvā svapnena tamasā mohayitvā nipadyate
prajām yaḥ te jighāṃsati tam itas nāśayāmasi
akṣībhyām te nāsikābhyām karṇābhyām chubukāt adhi
yakṣmam śīrṣaṇyam mastiṣkāt jihvāyāḥ vi vṛhāmi te
grīvābhyaḥ te uṣṇihābhyaḥ kīkasābhyaḥ anūkyāt
yakṣmam doṣaṇyam aṃsābhyām bāhubhyām vi vṛhāmi te
āntrebhyaḥ te gudābhyaḥ vaniṣṭhoḥ hṛdayāt adhi
yakṣmam matasnābhyām yaknaḥ plāśibhyaḥ vi vṛhāmi te
ūrubhyām te aṣṭhīvadbhyām pārṣṇibhyām prapadābhyām
yakṣmam śroṇibhyām bhāsadāt bhaṃsasaḥ vi vṛhāmi te
mehanāt vanaṅkaraṇāt lomabhyaḥ te nakhebhyaḥ
yakṣmam sarvasmāt ātmanaḥ tam idam vi vṛhāmi te
aṅgāt aṅgāt lomnaḥ lomnaḥ jātam parvaṇi parvaṇi
yakṣmam sarvasmāt ātmanaḥ tam idam vi vṛhāmi te
apehi manasas pate apa krāma paras cara
paras nirṛtyai ā cakṣva bahudhā jīvataḥ manaḥ
bhadram vai varam vṛṇate bhadram yuñjanti dakṣiṇam
bhadram vaivasvate cakṣuḥ bahutrā jīvataḥ manaḥ
yat āśasā niḥśasā abhiśasā upa ārima jāgrataḥ yat svapantaḥ
agniḥ viśvāni apa duṣkṛtāni ajuṣṭāni āre asmat dadhātu
yat indra brahmaṇas pate abhidroham carāmasi
pracetāḥ naḥ āṅgirasaḥ dviṣatām pātu aṃhasaḥ
ajaiṣma adya asanāma ca abhūma anāgasaḥ vayam
jāgrat svapnaḥ saṃkalpaḥ pāpaḥ yam dviṣmaḥ tam saḥ ṛcchatu yaḥ naḥ dveṣṭi tam ṛcchatu
devāḥ kapotaḥ iṣitaḥ yat icchan dūtaḥ nirṛtyāḥ idam ājagāma
tasmai arcāma kṛṇavāma niṣkṛtim śam naḥ astu dvipade śam catuṣpade
śivaḥ kapotaḥ iṣitaḥ naḥ astu anāgāḥ devāḥ śakunaḥ gṛheṣu
agniḥ hi vipraḥ juṣatām haviḥ naḥ pari hetiḥ pakṣiṇī naḥ vṛṇaktu
hetiḥ pakṣiṇī na dabhāti asmān āṣṭryām padam kṛṇute agnidhāne
śam naḥ gobhyaḥ ca puruṣebhyaḥ ca astu mā naḥ hiṃsīt iha devāḥ kapotaḥ
yat ulūkaḥ vadati mogham etat yat kapotaḥ padam agnau kṛṇoti
yasya dūtaḥ prahitaḥ eṣaḥ etat tasmai yamāya namaḥ astu mṛtyave
ṛcā kapotam nudata praṇodam iṣam madantaḥ pari gām nayadhvam
saṃyopayantaḥ duritāni viśvā hitvā naḥ ūrjam pra patāt patiṣṭhaḥ
vātasya nu mahimānam rathasya rujan eti stanayan asya ghoṣaḥ
divispṛś yāti aruṇāni kṛṇvan uta u eti pṛthivyā reṇum asyan
sam prerate anu vātasya viṣṭhāḥ ā enam gacchanti samanam na yoṣāḥ
tābhiḥ sayuj sa ratham devaḥ īyate asya viśvasya bhuvanasya rājā
antarikṣe pathibhiḥ īyamānaḥ na ni viśate katamat cana ahar
apām sakhā prathama jāḥ ṛtāvā kva svid jātaḥ kutas ā babhūva
ātmā devānām bhuvanasya garbhaḥ yathāvaśam carati devaḥ eṣaḥ
ghoṣāḥ id asya śṛṇvire na rūpam tasmai vātāya haviṣā vidhema
mayaḥ bhūḥ vātaḥ abhi vātu usrāḥ ūrjasvatīḥ oṣadhīḥ ā riśantām
pīvasvatīḥ jīva dhanyāḥ pibantu avasāya padvate rudra mṛḍa
yāḥ sarūpāḥ virūpāḥ eka rūpāḥ yāsām agniḥ iṣṭyā nāmāni veda
yāḥ aṅgirasaḥ tapasā iha cakruḥ tābhyaḥ parjanya mahi śarma yaccha
yāḥ deveṣu tanvam airayanta yāsām somaḥ viśvā rūpāṇi veda
tāḥ asmabhyam payasā pinvamānāḥ prajāvatīḥ indra goṣṭhe rirīhi
prajāpatiḥ mahyam etāḥ rarāṇaḥ viśvaiḥ devaiḥ pitṛbhiḥ saṃvidānaḥ
śivāḥ satīḥ upa naḥ goṣṭham ā akaḥ tāsām vayam prajayā sam sadema
vibhrāj bṛhat pibatu somyam madhu āyuḥ dadhat yajñapatau avihrutam
vāta jūtaḥ yaḥ abhirakṣati tmanā prajāḥ pupoṣa purudhā vi rājati
vibhrāj bṛhat su bhṛtam vāja sātamam dharman divaḥ dharuṇe satyam arpitam
amitra hā vṛtra hā dasyu hantamam jyotiḥ jajñe asura hā sapatna hā
idam śreṣṭham jyotiṣām jyotiḥ uttamam viśva jit dhana jit ucyate bṛhat
viśva bhrāj bhrājaḥ mahi sūryaḥ dṛśe uru paprathe sahaḥ ojaḥ acyutam
vibhrājan jyotiṣā svar agacchaḥ rocanam divaḥ
yena imā viśvā bhuvanāni ābhṛtā viśvakarmaṇā viśvadevyāvatā
tvam tyam iṭataḥ ratham indra prāvaḥ sutāvataḥ
aśṛṇoḥ sominaḥ havam
tvam makhasya dodhataḥ śiraḥ ava tvacaḥ bharaḥ
agacchaḥ sominaḥ gṛham
tvam tyam indra martyam āstrabudhnāya venyam
muhur śrathnāḥ manasyave
tvam tyam indra sūryam paścā santam puras kṛdhi
devānām cit tiras vaśam
ā yāhi vanasā saha gāvaḥ sacanta vartanim yat ūdhabhiḥ
ā yāhi vasvyā dhiyā maṃhiṣṭhaḥ jārayat makhaḥ sudānubhiḥ
pitu bhṛtaḥ na tantum id sudānavaḥ prati dadhmaḥ yajāmasi
uṣāḥ apa svasuḥ tamaḥ sam vartayati vartanim su jāta tā
ā tvā ahārṣam antar edhi dhruvaḥ tiṣṭhā avicācaliḥ
viśaḥ tvā sarvāḥ vāñchantu mā tvat rāṣṭram adhi bhraśat
iha evā edhi mā apa cyoṣṭhāḥ parvataḥ iva avicācaliḥ
indraḥ iva iha dhruvaḥ tiṣṭhā iha rāṣṭram u dhāraya
imam indraḥ adīdharat dhruvam dhruveṇa haviṣā
tasmai somaḥ adhi bravat tasmai u brahmaṇas patiḥ
dhruvā dyauḥ dhruvā pṛthivī dhruvāsaḥ parvatāḥ ime
dhruvam viśvam idam jagat dhruvaḥ rājā viśām ayam
dhruvam te rājā varuṇaḥ dhruvam devaḥ bṛhaspatiḥ
dhruvam te indraḥ ca agniḥ ca rāṣṭram dhārayatām dhruvam
dhruvam dhruveṇa haviṣā abhi somam mṛśāmasi
atho te indraḥ kevalīḥ viśaḥ bali hṛtas karat
pra vaḥ grāvāṇaḥ savitā devaḥ suvatu dharmaṇā
dhūrṣu yujyadhvam sunuta
grāvāṇaḥ apa ducchunām apa sedhata durmatim
usrāḥ kartana bheṣajam
grāvāṇaḥ upareṣu ā mahīyante sajoṣasaḥ
vṛṣṇe dadhataḥ vṛṣṇyam
grāvāṇaḥ savitā nu vaḥ devaḥ suvatu dharmaṇā
yajamānāya sunvate
pra sūnavaḥ ṛbhūṇām bṛhat navanta vṛjanā
kṣāmā ye viśva dhāyasaḥ aśnan dhenum na mātaram
pra devam devyā dhiyā bharatā jātavedasam
havyā naḥ vakṣat ānuṣak
ayam u ṣya pra devayuḥ hotā yajñāya nīyate
rathaḥ na yoḥ abhīvṛtaḥ ghṛṇīvān cetati tmanā
ayam agniḥ uruṣyati amṛtāt iva janmanaḥ
sahasaḥ cit sahīyān devaḥ jīvātave kṛtaḥ
pataṅgam aktam asurasya māyayā hṛdā paśyanti manasā vipaścitaḥ
samudre antar kavayaḥ vi cakṣate marīcīnām padam icchanti vedhasaḥ
pataṅgaḥ vācam manasā bibharti tām gandharvaḥ avadat garbhe antar
tām dyotamānām svaryam manīṣām ṛtasya pade kavayaḥ ni pānti
apaśyam gopām a nipadyamānam ā ca parā ca pathibhiḥ carantam
sa sadhrīcīḥ sa viṣūcīḥ vasānaḥ ā varīvarti bhuvaneṣu antar
tyam ū ṣu vājinam deva jūtam sahāvānam tarutāram rathānām
ariṣṭa nemim pṛtanājam āśum svastaye tārkṣyam ihā huvema
indrasya iva rātim ājohuvānāḥ svastaye nāvam ivā ruhema
urvī na pṛthvī bahule gabhīre mā vām etau mā paretau riṣāma
sadyas cit yaḥ śavasā pañca kṛṣṭīḥ sūryaḥ iva jyotiṣā apaḥ tatāna
sahasra sāḥ śata sāḥ asya raṃhiḥ na smā varante yuvatim na śaryām
ud tiṣṭhata ava paśyata indrasya bhāgam ṛtviyam
yadi śrātaḥ juhotana yadi a śrātaḥ mamattana
śrātam haviḥ ā u ṣu indra pra yāhi jagāma sūraḥ adhvanaḥ vimadhyam
pari tvā āsate nidhibhiḥ sakhāyaḥ kulapāḥ na vrāja patim carantam
śrātam manye ūdhani śrātam agnau su śrātam manye tat ṛtam navīyaḥ
mādhyandinasya savanasya dadhnaḥ pibā indra vajrin puru kṛt juṣāṇaḥ
pra sasāhiṣe puruhūta śatrūn jyeṣṭhaḥ te śuṣmaḥ iha rātiḥ astu
indrā bhara dakṣiṇenā vasūni patiḥ sindhūnām asi revatīnām
mṛgaḥ na bhīmaḥ kucaraḥ giriṣṭhāḥ parāvataḥ ā jaganthā parasyāḥ
sṛkam saṃśāya pavim indra tigmam vi śatrūn tāḍhi vi mṛdhaḥ nudasva
indra kṣatram abhi vāmam ojaḥ ajāyathāḥ vṛṣabha carṣaṇīnām
apānudaḥ janam amitrayantam urum devebhyaḥ akṛṇoḥ u lokam
prathaḥ ca yasya sa prathaḥ ca nāma ānuṣṭubhasya haviṣaḥ haviḥ yat
dhātuḥ dyutānāt savituḥ ca viṣṇoḥ rathantaram ā jabhārā vasiṣṭhaḥ
avindan te atihitam yat āsīt yajñasya dhāma paramam guhā yat
dhātuḥ dyutānāt savituḥ ca viṣṇoḥ bharadvājaḥ bṛhat ā cakre agneḥ
te avindan manasā dīdhyānāḥ yaju ṣkannam prathamam deva yānam
dhātuḥ dyutānāt savituḥ ca viṣṇoḥ ā sūryāt abharan gharmam ete
bṛhaspatiḥ nayatu durgahā tiras punar neṣat agha śaṃsāya manma
kṣipat aśastim apa durmatim han athā karat yajamānāya śam yoḥ
narāśaṃsaḥ naḥ avatu prayāje śam naḥ astu anuyājaḥ haveṣu
kṣipat aśastim apa durmatim han athā karat yajamānāya śam yoḥ
tapurmūrdhā tapatu rakṣasaḥ ye brahma dviṣaḥ śarave hantavai u
kṣipat aśastim apa durmatim han athā karat yajamānāya śam yoḥ
apaśyam tvā manasā cekitānam tapasaḥ jātam tapasaḥ vibhūtam
iha prajām iha rayim rarāṇaḥ pra jāyasva prajayā putra kāma
apaśyam tvā manasā dīdhyānām svāyām tanū ṛtvye nādhamānām
upa mām uccā yuvatiḥ babhūyāḥ pra jāyasva prajayā putra kāme
aham garbham adadhām oṣadhīṣu aham viśveṣu bhuvaneṣu antar
aham prajāḥ ajanayam pṛthivyām aham janibhyaḥ aparīṣu putrān
viṣṇuḥ yonim kalpayatu tvaṣṭā rūpāṇi piṃśatu
ā siñcatu prajāpatiḥ dhātā garbham dadhātu te
garbham dhehi sinīvāli garbham dhehi sarasvati
garbham te aśvinau devau ā dhattām puṣkarasrajā
hiraṇyayī araṇī yam nirmanthataḥ aśvinā
tam te garbham havāmahe daśame māsi sūtave
mahi trīṇām avaḥ astu dyukṣam mitrasya aryamṇaḥ
durādharṣam varuṇasya
nahi teṣām amā cana nā adhvasu vāraṇeṣu
īśe ripuḥ agha śaṃsaḥ
yasmai putrāsaḥ aditeḥ pra jīvase martyāya
jyotiḥ yacchanti ajasram
vātaḥ ā vātu bheṣajam śambhu mayobhu naḥ hṛde
pra ṇaḥ āyūṃṣi tāriṣat
uta vāta pitā asi naḥ uta bhrātā uta naḥ sakhā
sa naḥ jīvātave kṛdhi
yat adaḥ vāta te gṛhe amṛtasya nidhiḥ hitaḥ
tatas naḥ dehi jīvase
pra agnaye vācam īraya vṛṣabhāya kṣitīnām
sa naḥ parṣat ati dviṣaḥ
yaḥ parasyāḥ parāvataḥ tiras dhanva atirocate
sa naḥ parṣat ati dviṣaḥ
yaḥ rakṣāṃsi nijūrvati vṛṣā śukreṇa śociṣā
sa naḥ parṣat ati dviṣaḥ
yaḥ viśvā abhi vipaśyati bhuvanā sam ca paśyati
sa naḥ parṣat ati dviṣaḥ
yaḥ asya pāre rajasaḥ śukraḥ agniḥ ajāyata
sa naḥ parṣat ati dviṣaḥ
pra nūnam jātavedasam aśvam hinota vājinam
idam naḥ barhiḥ āsade
asya pra jātavedasaḥ vipra vīrasya mīḍhuṣaḥ
mahīm iyarmi suṣṭutim
yāḥ rucaḥ jātavedasaḥ devatrā havya vāhanīḥ
tābhiḥ naḥ yajñam invatu
ā ayam gauḥ pṛśniḥ akramīt asadat mātaram puras
pitaram ca prayan svar
antar carati rocanā asya prāṇāt apānatī
vi akhyat mahiṣaḥ divam
triṃśat dhāma vi rājati vāc pataṅgāya dhīyate
prati vastoḥ aha dyubhiḥ
ṛtam ca satyam ca abhīddhāt tapasaḥ adhi ajāyata
tatas rātrī ajāyata tatas samudraḥ arṇavaḥ
samudrāt arṇavāt adhi saṃvatsaraḥ ajāyata
ahorātrāṇi vidadhat viśvasya miṣataḥ vaśī
sūryācandramasau dhātā yathāpūrvam akalpayat
divam ca pṛthivīm ca antarikṣam atho svar
